18600024h R_AX_AFE_CTRL1
[31:24] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[23:22] R/W 0 B_AX_WLCPU_CLK_SEL WLCPU clock sel
2’b0X : select PLLMUX div1; cpu: security:mac = 2:2:1
2’b10: select PLLMUX div2; cpu: security:mac = 1:2:1
[21] R/W 0 B_AX_CMAC_CLK_SEL Select DMAC_CLK : CMAC_CLK select 1:1 or 2:1
0 : 1:1
1: 2:1
[20] R/W 0 B_AX_PLL_DIV_SEL PLL clock frist divider selection :
0 : PLL divide by 1
1 : PLL divide by 2
[19] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[18] R/W 1 B_AX_DMEM6_PC_EN Addr range : 0x54000 ~ 0x5CFFF (32KB)
[17] R/W 1 B_AX_DMEM5_PC_EN Addr range : 0x44000 ~ 0x53FFF (64KB)
[16] R/W 1 B_AX_DMEM4_PC_EN Addr range : 0x34000 ~ 0x43FFF (64KB)
[15] R/W 1 B_AX_DMEM3_PC_EN Addr range : 0x24000 ~ 0x33FFF (64KB)
[14] R/W 1 B_AX_DMEM2_PC_EN Addr range : 0x14000 ~ 0x23FFF (64KB)
[13] R/W 1 B_AX_DMEM1_PC_EN Addr range : 0x00000 ~ 0x13FFF (80KB)
[12] R/W 1 B_AX_IMEM4_PC_EN
[11] R/W 1 B_AX_IMEM3_PC_EN
[10] R/W 1 B_AX_IMEM2_PC_EN
[9] R/W 1 B_AX_IMEM1_PC_EN
[8] R/W 1 B_AX_IMEM0_PC_EN
[7:5] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[4] R/W 0 B_AX_r_SYM_WLCMAC1_P4_PC_EN
[3] R/W 0 B_AX_r_SYM_WLCMAC1_P3_PC_EN
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_r_SYM_WLCMAC1_P2_PC_EN
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_r_SYM_WLCMAC1_P1_PC_EN
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_r_SYM_WLCMAC1_PC_EN
18600028h R_AX_SYS_OCP_CTRL
[31] R/W 0 B_AX_SPS_OCP_DIS SPS OCP for system mechanism to shutdown chip ( OCP counter , threshold , window )
0: enable sps ocp
1: disable sps ocp
Default: 0
[30:16] R/W 0040 B_AX_SPS_OCP_TH Sps ocp threshold,
If ocp occurs more than ocp_th_cfg_sps times in the ocp monitor window, shut down sps
[15:0] R/W 0100 B_AX_OCP_WINDOW Ocp monitor window width configure, count on ana_clk/16
1860002Ch R_AX_SYSANA_OCP_CTRL
[31] R/W 0 B_AX_SPSANA_OCP_DIS SPSANA OCP for system mechanism to shutdown chip ( OCP counter , threshold , window )
0: enable spsana ocp
1: disable spsana ocp
Default: 0
[30:16] R/W 0040 B_AX_SPSANA_OCP_TH Spsana ocp threshold,
If ocp occurs more than ocp_th_cfg_spsana times in the ocp monitor window, shut down spsana
[15:0] R/W 0100 B_AX_OCPANA_WINDOW Ocp monitor window width configure, count on ana_clk/16
18600030h R_AX_EFUSE_CTRL
[31:30] R/W 00 B_AX_EF_MODE_SEL Efuse controller Mode selection
2’b00 : Read
2’b10 : Write
2’b01 : Autoload Enable
2’b11 : Compare Secure Data Enable
[29] R/W 0 B_AX_EF_RDY Ready bit
Note : HW set , SW clear
[28] R/W 0 B_AX_EF_COMP_RESULT compare result
1 : PASS
0 : FAIL
Note : HW set , SW clear
[27] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[26:16] R/W 0 B_AX_EF_ADDR Access Address
[15:0] R/W 0 B_AX_EF_DATA Access Data
[7:0] : Read / Write
[15:0] : Compare
18600034h R_AX_EFUSE_TEST
[31] R/W 0 B_AX_EF_CRES_SEL 1: for debug , 0: for normal
[30] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[29:19] R/W 0 B_AX_EF_SCAN_SADR Scan start Address (unit in byte)
[18:8] R/W 0 B_AX_EF_SCAN_EADR EFuse Scan End address
[7] R/W 0 B_AX_EF_SCAN_TRPT Test Scan Report: 1 : Fail, 0 : OK
[6:0] R/W 0 B_AX_EF_SCAN_FTHR Threshold number of bit error
若[6:0] = 7’h1,
則scan check的時候若有任何一個cell bit不是1’b1 (default), 就會判定為fail
依此類推, 7’h2, 表示允許有一個cell bit fail….
18600038h R_AX_EFUSE_CTRL_1_V1
[31] R/W 1 B_AX_EF_ENT OTP IP enable time (OTP SPEC Tcs >10us)
Clock 12MHz 計算
0:24us
1:36us
建議default value : 1
[30:28] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[27] R/W 1 B_AX_EF_RDT OTP Clock cycle time (OTP SPEC Tcyc >80ns)
Clock 12MHz 計算
0:166.66ns
1:249.9ns
建議default value : 1
[26:24] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[23:20] R/W 0011 B_AX_EF_PGTS OTP Program Setup time and Recovery time. In the unit of cycle time.
OTP SPEC 5us< Tpps=Tppr <100us
Clock 12MHz 計算
0 : 5us, 1 : 11us, 2 : 17us, 3 : 23us,
4 : 30us, 5 : 36us , 6 : 42us , 7 : 49us
8 : 55us, 9 : 61us , A : 68us , B : 74us
C : 80us, D : 87us , E : 93us , F : 100us
建議default value : 3
[19] R/W 0 B_AX_EF_BURST Efuse Read / Write Burst Mode Enable
0 : Disable
1 : Enable
[18:16] R/W 0 B_AX_EF_TEST_SEL OTP Test Mode Selection:
000: User Mode
001: Initial Margin Read Mode
010: Program Margin Read Mode
101: Repair Margin Read Mode
110: Repair Check Mode
111: Repair Program Mode
Bit18=0:User mode and Test mode
Bit18=1: Use Repair mode
[15] R/W 0 B_AX_EF_TROW_EN OTP Test Row Select:
0: Test Row Function Disable
1: Test Row Function Enable
[14] R 0 B_AX_EF_ERR_FLAG OTP Error Flag:
When OTP read/write and test mode mapping process Error, this flag will be set to 1
[13] R/W 0 B_AX_EF_FBURST_DIS Force WLBT OTP Burst Mode Disable :
0: Non-Force
1: Force WLBT Burst Disable
need OTP autoload
[12] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[11] R/W 0 B_AX_EF_DSB_EN 0: OTP Deep Standby Mode Disable
1 : OTP Deep Standby Mode Enable
[10:4] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[3:0] R/W 1111 B_AX_EF_DLY_SEL OTP HCI autoload Delay:
0x38[3:0] = 0x1 : add 2T delay / 0x2 : add 4T delay / …. / 0xF : add 30T delay
Default value 0xF
1860003Ch R_AX_DUMMY
[31:0] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
18600040h R_AX_GPIO_MUXCFG
[31:20] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[19] R/W 0 B_AX_BOOT_MODE CPU boot from flash. autoload by efuse.
0: FW from driver (boot from IMEM)
1: FW from Flash (including MP and usb auto install) [boot from Flash]
[18] R/W 0 B_AX_WL_EECS_EXT_32K_SEL 1: Disable
0: select EECS as external 32K clock source.
[17] RO 0 B_AX_WL_SEC_BONDING_OPT_STS WLAN Security bonding option status ( Default : down bond )
[16] R/W 0 B_AX_SECSIC_SEL CR_SIC_SEL for selecting WLCPU or SIC_OFF (default select WLCPU)
[15] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[14] R/W 0 B_AX_EnHTP 0 : Enable SIC as Host Debug Port (from MCU path, default)
1 : Enable SIC as Host Test Port (from HCI path, auto set by ICFG)
[13] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[12] R/W 0 B_AX_EnSIC Enable GPIO Pins as SIC, (auto set by ICFG)
[11] R/W 0 B_AX_SIC_SWRST 0 : Reset SIC by SW, prevent SIC Dead Lock,
(auto release by specific ICFG SIC mode)
[10] R/W 0 B_AX_PINMUX_PTA_EN PINMUX PTA function enabled
0 : Disabled (Default)
1 : Enabled
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_WL_BT_PTA_SEC WL_PTA and BT_PTA Selection
0 : WL_PTA
1 : BT_PTA
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_EnUartTX Enable GPIO[7] Pins as UART TX
[7:6] R/W 0 B_AX_BTMode Bluetooth COEX Mode
[5] R/W 0 B_AX_EnBT Enable PTA
[4] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[3] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_EnUartRX Enable GPIO[6] Pins as UART RX
[1] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[0] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
18600044h R_AX_GPIO_PIN_CTRL
[31:24] R/W 0 B_AX_GPIO_MOD_7_TO_0 When the specific bit is set to zero, the corresponding GPIO port is configured to data port; otherwise, when a specific bit is set to “1”, and GPIO_IO_SEL is set to “0”, then it is interrupt mode.
[23:16] R/W 0 B_AX_GPIO_IO_SEL_7_TO_0 GPIO pins output enable when a bit is set to “1”; otherwise, input is configured.
[15:8] R/W 0 B_AX_GPIO_OUT_7_TO_0 GPIO pins output value
[7:0] RO 0 B_AX_GPIO_IN_7_TO_0 GPIO pins input value
18600048h R_AX_GPIO_INTM
[31:18] R/W 0 RSVD rsvd
[17] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[16] R/W 0 B_AX_EXTWOL_EN Enable External WOL function
[15] R/W 0 B_AX_GPIOF_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
[14] R/W 0 B_AX_GPIOE_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
[13] R/W 0 B_AX_GPIOD_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
[12] R/W 0 B_AX_GPIOC_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
[11] R/W 0 B_AX_GPIOB_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
[10] R/W 0 B_AX_GPIOA_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_GPIO9_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_GPIO8_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
[7] R/W 0 B_AX_GPIO7_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
[6] R/W 0 B_AX_GPIO6_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
[5] R/W 0 B_AX_GPIO5_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
[4] R/W 0 B_AX_GPIO4_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
[3] R/W 0 B_AX_GPIO3_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_GPIO2_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_GPIO1_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_GPIO0_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
1860004Ch R_AX_LED_CFG
[31] R/W 0 RSVD rsvd
[30] R/W 0 RSVD rsvd
[29] R/W 0 RSVD rsvd
[28] R/W 0 B_AX_MAILBOX_3Wire_GPIO_CFG 1 : enable GPIO mux switch to MAILBOX mode
GPIO5 : I2C_INT
GPIO9 : I2C_SD
GPIO11 : I2C_CLK
[27] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[26] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[25] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[24] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[23] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[22] R/W 1 B_AX_LED2_EN 1: Disable
0: WL GPIO control ( LED2 enable )
[21] R/W 1 B_AX_LED2DIS GPIO-8 as LED2
[20] R/W 0 B_AX_LED2PL LED2 polarity control
0: Normal Polarity definition for LED2SV, LED2CM;
1: Inverse the Polarity definition for LED2CM. Default: 0h.
[19] R/W 0 B_AX_LED2SV LED2 software value.
Default: 0h.
[18:16] R/W 010 B_AX_LED2CM LED2 Control Mode
000: Software control (this mode can handle LED on, LED off, and LED twinkle [we assume there are ms-level delays between each twinkle, and this includes the twinkle BAR cases])
001: Always off (LED pin drives high)
010: Tx or Rx event (LED on = active, so LED pin drives low). Rx active only physical address match, and should be used only when adapter is linked.
011: Tx or Rx event (LED off = active, so LED pin drives high). Rx active only physical address match, and should be used only when adapter is linked.
100: Tx event only (LED on = active)
101: Tx event only (LED off = active)
110: Rx event only (LED on = active)
111: Rx event only (LED off = active)
Default: 010b
[15] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[14:13] RO 00 B_AX_LED0LED1_RD_ONLY LED0 and LED1 Read Only
[12:0] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
18600050h R_AX_PWR_OPTION_CTRL
[31:25] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[24] R/W 0 B_AX_DIS_LPS_WT_PDNSUS
[23:12] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[11] R/W 0 B_AX_SYSON_DBG_PAD_E2 DBGTST[31:0] IOPAD output driving
0 : 4mA , 1 : 8mA
[10] R/W 0 RSVD rsvd
[9] R/W 0 RSVD rsvd
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_SYSON_PCI_PAD_E2 PCIE IOPAD output driving
0: 4mA, 1: 8mA
UART IOPAD output driving
0: 8mA, 1: 16mA
[7:6] R/W 0 B_AX_SYSON_WLPC_IDX WLPON/MAC/BB power cut waiting time index
00: x1
01: x2
10: x3
11: x4
[5:4] R/W 0 B_AX_SYSON_SPS0WWV_WT Waiting Time for SPS
[3:2] R/W 0 B_AX_SYSON_SPS0LDO_WT Waiting Time for SPS_LDO
2’b00 = 104us,
2’b01 = 56us
2’b10 = 256us
2’b11 = 512us
[1:0] R/W 0 B_AX_SYSON_RCLK_SCALE ANACLK Default Scale
18600054h R_AX_CAL_TIMER
[31:30] R/W 0 RSVD rsvd
[29] R/W 0 RSVD rsvd
[28:16] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[15:0] R/W A0 B_AX_CAL_SCAL HW 8us count
Scaler fine tune for sleep mode (tune in Time unit)
18600058h R_AX_DBG_CTRL
[31:30] R/W 0 B_AX_DBG_SEL1_4BIT gpio_out[15:12]:gpio_out[7:4] sel, share with dbg_pad[15:8]
00: dbg_port[23:16]
01: dbg_port[27:20]
10: dbg_port[31:24]
11: dbg_port[19:16][31:28]
[29:28] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[27] R/W 0 B_AX_DBG_SEL1_16BIT 0: reg_dbg_port[31:16] = dbg_sel1[31:16]
1: reg_dbg_port[31:16] = dbg_sel1[15:0]
[26:24] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[23:16] R/W 0 B_AX_DBG_SEL1 DBG port selection1
[15:14] R/W 0 B_AX_DBG_SEL0_4BIT gpio_out[11:8]:gpio_out[3:0] sel, share with dbg_pad[7:0]
00: dbg_port[7:0]
01: dbg_port[11:4]
10: dbg_port[15:8]
11: dbg_port[3:0][15:12]
[13:12] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[11] R/W 0 B_AX_DBG_SEL0_16BIT 0: reg_dbg_port[15:0] = dbg_sel0[15:0]
1: reg_dbg_port[15:0] = dbg_sel0[31:16]
[10:8] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[7:0] R/W 0 B_AX_DBG_SEL0 DBG port selection0
1860005Ch R_AX_PWR_CUT_CTRL
[31:24] R/W F B_AX_WLBBPC1_WT waiting time for WLBB big power cut (8us/unit)
[23:16] R/W F B_AX_WLBBPC0_WT waiting time for WLBB small power cut (8us/unit)
[15:12] R/W F B_AX_WLMACPC1_WT waiting time for WLMAC big power cut (8us/unit)
[11:8] R/W F B_AX_WLMACPC0_WT waiting time for WLMAC small power cut (8us/unit)
[7:4] R/W F B_AX_WLPONPC1_WT waiting time for WLPON big power cut (8us/unit)
[3:0] R/W F B_AX_WLPONPC0_WT waiting time for WLPON small power cut (8us/unit)
18600060h R_AX_GPIO_EXT_CTRL
[31:24] R/W 0 B_AX_GPIO_MOD_15_TO_8 GPIO[15:8] function mode selection. When the specific bit is set to zero, the
corresponding GPIO port is configured to data port; otherwise, when a specific
bit is set to “1”, and GPIO_IO_SEL is set to “0”, then it is interrupt mode.
[23:16] R/W 0 B_AX_GPIO_IO_SEL_15_TO_8 GPIO[15:8] pins output enable when a bit is set to “1”; otherwise, input is configured.
[15:8] R/W 0 B_AX_GPIO_OUT_15_TO_8 GPIO[15:8] pins output value
[7:0] RO 0 B_AX_GPIO_IN_15_TO_8 GPIO[15:8] pins input value
18600064h R_AX_PAD_CTRL1
[31:30] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[29] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[28] R/W 0 B_AX_BT_OTP_PWC_DIS 1 : OTP SW Power cut control force to wlan control only
0 : OTP SW Power cut control need to check with BT SW Power cut control
[27] R/W 0 B_AX_BTGP_UART0_SEL BTGP BQB function enable
[26] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[25] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[24] R/W 0 B_AX_BTGP_JTAG_EN RSVD
[23] R/W 0 B_AX_XTAL_CLK_EXTARNAL_EN Need external XTAL clock
0: Internal XTAL clock
1: External XTAL clock
[22] R/W 0 B_AX_BTGP_UART0_EN Enable BT UART0 function
[21] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[20] R/W 0 B_AX_BTGP_SPI_EN Enable BT SFLASH function at GPIO[7:4], EECS and EESK
[19] R/W 0 B_AX_BTGP_GPIO_E2 BTGP_GPIO PAD E2 Driving Selector
[18] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[17] R/W 0 B_AX_BTGPDBG_EN BT Group Debug function enable
1 : enable
0 : disable
[16] R/W 0 B_AX_BTGP_I2C_EN BT Group I2C function enable
1 : enable
0 : disable
[15] R/W 0 B_AX_WL_JTAG_EN Enable WL JTAG function
[14] R/W 0 B_AX_PAD_SDIO_SR SDIO pad slew rate control
[13] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[12] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[11] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[10:0] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
18600068h R_AX_WL_BT_PWR_CTRL
[31] R/W 1 B_AX_ISO_BD2PP BT Digital to Power on. 1: Isolation, 0: attach
[30] R/W 0 B_AX_LDOV12B_EN Enable LDOV12B Macro block (For BT Power Cut)
[29] R/W 0 B_AX_CKEN_BT Enable BT PON clock enable
[28] R/W 0 B_AX_FEN_BT Enable BT function
[27] R/W 0 B_AX_BTCPU_BOOTSEL Enable BT CPU BOOT From SPI
[26] R/W 0 B_AX_SPI_SPEEDUP Not used Currently
[25] R/W 0 B_AX_BT_LDO_Mode BT_PLL_LDO_Mode
0: LDO mode
1: power cut mode
[24] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[23] R/W 0 B_AX_CLKREQ_PAD_TYPE_SEL PAD Type control select for GPIO15 (CLKREQ) in USB or SDIO interface:
0: Push-Pull
1: Open-Drain
[22] R/W 1 B_AX_ISO_BTPON2PP BT PON to Power On, 1: isolation; 0: attach
[21:20] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[19] R/W 0 B_AX_BT_HWROF_EN Enable GPIO[11] as BT RF HW PDn source
[18] R/W 1 B_AX_BT_FUNC_EN BT function enable
[17] R/W 0 B_AX_BT_HWPDN_SL BT HW PDn polarity control, 0: Low active, 1: High active
[16] R/W 0 B_AX_BT_DISN_EN Enable GPIO[11] as BT HW PDn source
[15] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[14] R/W 1 RSVD RSVD
[13] R/W 1 B_AX_EXTERNAL_REQUEST_PL When system request the clock of platform, it need to pull high/low GPIO 15.
Request GPIO polarity:
0: low active
1: high active
[12] R/W 0 B_AX_SDM_SRC_SEL SDM input source select.
0:XTAL.
1:OSC.
[11] R/W 1 B_AX_ISO_BA2PP Isolate signal from BT Top, 1: isolation, 0: attach
[10] R/W 0 B_AX_BT_AFE_LDO_EN BT AFE LDO
0: disable
1; enable
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_BT_AFE_PLL_EN BT AFE PLL
0: disable
1; enable
[8] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[7] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[6] R/W 0 B_AX_WLAN_32K_SEL WLAN 32K_SEL (WL_ON)
0 : XTAL 32K (default)
1 : OSC 32K
[5] R/W 0 B_AX_WL_DRV_EXIST_IDX WLAN driver exist index or not
1 : Exist
0 : Not exist
0x68[5] =1 一定要設才能使用LPS option降壓
=> 表示 WiFi Driver 在, 主控權切給 WiFi
[4] R/W 0 B_AX_DOP_EHPAD DOP_EHPAD: disable SDIO/UART iopad shutdown in SDIO-UART power down mode (B-
(PICE 3 pin)
0:enable
1:disable
[3] R/W 0 B_AX_WL_HWROF_EN WLAN RF HW power down enable
[2] R/W 1 B_AX_WL_FUNC_EN WLAN function enable
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_WL_HWPDN_SL WLAN HW PDn polarity control, 0: Low active, 1: High active
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_WL_HWPDN_EN Enable GPIO[9] as WLAN HW PDn source
1860006Ch R_AX_SDM_DEBUG
[31:11] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[10] R/W 1 B_AX_GPIO IE_V18 set GPIOs PAD input voltage threhsold to decision high or low
1 : 1.8V
0 : 3.3V
若要改值需要寫0xCC[2]=1先解鎖
[9] R/W 1 B_AX_PCIE IE_V18 set PCIe PAD (WAKEn/PERSTn/CLKREQn) input voltage threhsold to decision high or low
1 : 1.8V
0 : 3.3V
若要改值需要寫0xCC[2]=1先解鎖
[8] R/W 1 B_AX_UART IE_V18 set UART PAD input voltage threhsold to decision high or low
1 : 1.8V
0 : 3.3V
若要改值需要寫0xCC[2]=1先解鎖
[7:5] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[4:0] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
18600070h R_AX_SYS_SDIO_CTRL
[31] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[30] R/W 0 B_AX_BT_ZIGBEE_FUNC_EN BT1 Zigbee function enable
0 : Disabled
1 : Enabled
[29] R/W 1 B_AX_DUAL_HOST_WAKE_BT_EN Dual_HOST_WAKE_BT pin function enable
0 : Disabled
1 : Enabled
[28] R/W 0 B_AX_MCM_FLASH_EN MCM Flash enable
0 : Disabled
1 : Enabled
[27] R/W 0 B_AX_DUAL_BT_FUNC_EN Dual BT function enable
0 : Disabled
1 : Enabled
[26] R/W 0 B_AX_LTE_MUX_CTRL_PATH (PTA_Owner)
0 : control path is at BT
1 : control path is at WLAN
( Select WiFi or BT LTE-PTA/UART/GNT_BT/GNT_WL software control owner
1: WiFi, 0:BT (default: 0))
[25] R/W 1 RSVD Reserved
[24] R/W 0 RSVD Reserved
[23:21] R/W 0 RSVD Reserved
[20] R/W 0 B_AX_SDIO_CMD_SW_RST SDIO Command Software Reset
[19] R/W 0 B_AX_SDIO_INT_POLARITY 0: Low Active 1: High Active
[18] R/W 0 RSVD rsvd
[17] R/W 0 B_AX_SDIO_OFF_EN Enable SDIO_OFF module
[16] R/W 0 B_AX_SDIO_ON_EN Enable SDIO_ON module
[15] R/W 1 B_AX_PCIE_DIS_L2_CTRL_LDO_HCI PCIE L2 下對 LDO_HCI 做的省電控制
1 : Disable
0 : Enable
[14] R/W 0 B_AX_PCIE_DIS_WLSUS_AFT_PDN 在L2等到EPHY回phystatus之後，才拿powerdown=P2去告知CHIPTOP可以進WL SUS
1 : Disable
0 : Enable
[13] R/W 0 B_AX_PCIE_FORCE_PWR_NGAT 1 : disable PCIE EMAC power gated
0 : enable PCIE EMAC power gated
[12] R/W 0 B_AX_PCIE_CALIB_EN For PCIE force IBX ( Cobmo APHY )
1 : Force
0 : No Force
[11] R/W 0 B_AX_PCIE_AUXCLK_GATE AUX clock switch to access PCIE local register under PCIE L1 state
0: Gated (default)
1: Enable
[10] R/W 0 B_AX_PCIE_WAIT_TIMEOUT_EVENT Enable PCLK wait timeout event
1 : Enabled (Let PCIE can entry suspend mode)
0 : Disabled
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_PCIE_WAIT_TIME Enable PCLK wait time
1 : Enabled
0 : Disabled
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_L1OFF_TO_L0_RESUME_EVT L1.2->L0 當作 resume event.
1 : Enabled
0 : Disabled
[7] R/W 0 B_AX_USBA_FORCE_PWR_NGAT 1: Disable USB link_usb2 to gate CA10PC_EN/CA33PC_EN for USB Multi
Disable USB link_usb3 to gate UA10PC_EN/UA33PC_EN
0: Enable USB link_usb2 to gate CA10PC_EN/CA33PC_EN for USB Multi
Enable USB link_usb3 to gate UA10PC_EN/UA33PC_EN
[6] R/W 0 B_AX_USBD_FORCE_PWR_NGAT 1: disable USB link_usb2 to gate CD10PC_EN/U3MAC_D10PC_En for USB Multi
0: enable USB link_usb2 to gate CD10PC_EN/U3MAC_D10PC_En for USB Multi
[5] R/W 1 B_AX_BT_CTRL_USB_PWR Back door for BT control usb related (BT FW 去控制 USB APHY power cut)
1 : Enabled
0 : Disabled
[4] R/W 0 B_AX_USB_D_STATE_Hold USB D+/D-line state hold (擋住 USB bus D+/D- 訊號變化)
1 : Enabled
0 : Disabled
[3] R/W 0 B_AX_R_AX_force_dp 1: special suspend(DP pull-up resistor by R_AX_dp_mode)
0: normal suspend
[2] R/W 1 B_AX_R_AX_dp_mode 1: pull-up DP resistor
0: pull-down DP resistor
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_RES_USB_MASS_STORAGE_DESC 1: Need response usb mass storage descriptor
0: Disabled
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_USB_WAIT_TIME Enable USB CLK wait time
1 : Enabled
0 : Disabled
18600074h R_AX_HCI_OPT_CTRL
[31:29] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[28:22] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[21] R/W 0 B_AX_USBMAC_ANACLK_SW rollback CR for USB LPS clock selection
0 : USB select ana_clk or usb_clk
1 : rollback to original design, always used usb_clk
[20] R/W 0 B_AX_PCIE_CPHY_CCK_XTAL_SEL PCIE Combo PHY XTAL source select
0 : Digital Buffer (APR)
1 : Special Route (NO Buffer)
[19] R/W 0 B_AX_SDIO_DATA_PAD_SMT SDIO data pad smith trigger control
[18] R/W 0 B_AX_SDIO_PAD_E5 SDIO PAD Driving Control E5
[17] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[16] R/W 0 B_AX_HCI_LA_ADDR_MAP HCI LA address mapping switch ( 切換控制CR/ indirect read Read SRAM )
1: mapping to READ HCI_LA SRAM
0 : mapping to READ/ WRITE HCI_LA CR ( hw default value )
[15] R/W 0 B_AX_HCI_LA_GLO_RST HCI_LA function global reset
1 : Reset release
0 : Reset State ( hw default value )
[14] R/W 0 B_AX_USB3_SUS_DIS Disable USB3.0 Suspend Signal
Disable USB3.0 suspend to AON (SUSB_TOON = 1)
[13] R/W 0 B_AX_NOPWR_CTRL_SEL Disable USB2.0 suspend to USBPHY(SUSB_TOPHY = 1)
[12] R/W 0 B_AX_USB_HOST_PWR_OFF_EN 1: USB host power off control enable
0: disable
[11] R/W 0 B_AX_SYM_LPS_BLOCK_EN HCI Type: 00
SDIO/GSPI
1: SDIO will postpone response until the bit becomes zero
GSPI will reply 32k bit enable until the bit becomes zero.
0: SDIO/GSPI work normally.
HCI TYPE: 01
USB
1: SIE start ack to WL Usb bus transaction
0: SIE start nak to WL Usb bus transaction
[10] R/W 1 B_AX_USB_LPM_ACT_EN When enable LPM, SYMON filter USB_PHY_SUSB signal.
0: disable filter (Hw/Fw can know USB suspend)
1: enable filter (Hw/Fw can't know USB suspend)
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_USB_LPM_NY Indicate USB report NotYet for LPM Token
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_USB2_SUS_DIS Disable USB2.0 Suspend Signal
Disable USB2.0 suspend to AON (SUSB_TOON = 1)
[7:5] R/W 111 B_AX_SDIO_PAD_E SDIO PAD Driving Control {E4,E3,E2}
Bit[5] : 1'b1 => PCIE WAKE enabled ( PCIE+USB & PCIE+UART package)
[4] R/W 0 B_AX_USB_LPPLL_EN Lower Power USB PLL Enable (Only used in HCI-MIX Mode)
SDIO I/O pull up resistance H3L1
[3] R/W 1 B_AX_USB1_1_USB2_0 decision BIT[0] : only use in PCIE+USB package
1 : USB1.1 (HW default value)
0 : USB2.0
[2] R/W 1 B_AX_ROP_SW15 ROP_SW15: Resume option to skip wait SPS_LD15 power ready
1: Enable, 0: Disable
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_PCI_CKRDY_OPT PCIE Clock ready option
[0] R/W 1 B_AX_PCI_VAUX_EN Board provide VAUX
0: Enable, 1: Disable
18600078h R_AX_HCI_BG_CTRL
[15] RO 0 B_AX_IBX_EN_Value show IBX_EN Value
[14] RO 0 B_AX_IB_EN_Value show IB_EN Value
[13:5] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[4] R/W 0 B_AX_Forced_IB_EN control if need to forced IB_EN (protect by 0xCC[2])
[3] R/W 0 B_AX_EN_REGBG Bandgap enable (protect by 0xCC[2])
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_R_AX_BG_LPF BG_LPF enable (protect by 0xCC[2])
[1:0] R/W 2'b01 B_AX_R_AX_BG VBG voltage select (protect by 0xCC[2])
00: 1.2025V
01: 1.1986V
10: 1.1945V
11: 1.1905V
1860007Ah R_AX_HCI_LDO_CTRL
[15:7] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[6] R/W 0 B_AX_EN_LW_PWR Enable LDO low power mode (protect by 0xCC[2])
[5] R/W 0 B_AX_EN_REGU Enable LDO (protect by 0xCC[2])
[4] R/W 0 B_AX_EN_PC Bypass LDO (protect by 0xCC[2])
[3:0] R/W 4'b1000 B_AX_R_AX_VADJ HCI_LDO voltage select (protect by 0xCC[2]) (LDO_HCI)
0000 1080
0001 1041
0010 1020
0011 1002
0100 981.9
0101 960.1
0110 941.7
0111 921.6
1000 900
1001 886.1
1010 870.4
1011 855.3
1100 840.7
1101 826.6
1110 811.1
1111 601.7
1860007Ch R_AX_LDO_SWR_CTRL
[31:28] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[27] R/W 1 B_AX_DIG_ZCD_HW_AUTO_EN Enable DIG ZCD HW auto calibration
0 : Disabled
1 : Enabled
[26] R/W 0 B_AX_DIG_ZCD_REGSEL 0 : Select Auto ZCD code in (0x7C[25:21])
1 : Select ZCD code in register (0x7C[20:16])
[25:21] RO 10000 B_AX_DIG_AUTO_ZCD_IN_CODE For DIG AUTO_ZCD_IN_Code
[20:16] R/W 10000 B_AX_DIG_ZCD_code_in_L For PFM efficiency to DIG SWR (from efuse)
[15:12] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[11] R/W 1 B_AX_ANA_ZCD_HW_AUTO_EN Enable ANA ZCD HW auto calibration
0 : Disabled
1 : Enabled
[10] R/W 0 B_AX_ANA_ZCD_REGSEL 0 : Select Auto ZCD code in (0x7C[25:21])
1 : Select ZCD code in register (0x7C[20:16])
[9:5] RO 10000 B_AX_ANA_AUTO_ZCD_IN_CODE For ANA AUTO_ZCD_IN_Code
[4:0] R/W 10000 B_AX_ANA_ZCD_code_in_L For PFM efficiency to ANA SWR (from efuse)
18600080h R_AX_SYS_ISO_CTRL_EXTEND
[31] R/W 0 B_AX_r_SYM_FEN_WLMACOFF
[30] R/W 0 B_AX_CMAC1_FEN
[29] R/W 0 B_AX_r_SYM_ISO_DMEM62PP Addr range : 0x54000 ~ 0x5CFFF (32KB)
[28] R/W 0 B_AX_r_SYM_ISO_DMEM52PP Addr range : 0x44000 ~ 0x53FFF (64KB)
[27] R/W 0 B_AX_r_SYM_ISO_DMEM42PP Addr range : 0x34000 ~ 0x43FFF (64KB)
[26] R/W 0 B_AX_r_SYM_ISO_DMEM32PP_V1 Addr range : 0x24000 ~ 0x33FFF (64KB)
[25] R/W 0 B_AX_r_SYM_ISO_DMEM22PP_V1 Addr range : 0x14000 ~ 0x23FFF (64KB)
[24] R/W 0 B_AX_r_SYM_ISO_DMEM12PP_V1 Addr range : 0x00000 ~ 0x13FFF (80KB)
[23] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[22] R/W 0 B_AX_r_SYM_ISO_IMEM42PP
[21] R/W 0 B_AX_r_SYM_ISO_IMEM32PP
[20] R/W 0 B_AX_r_SYM_ISO_IMEM22PP
[19] R/W 0 B_AX_r_SYM_ISO_IMEM12PP
[18] R/W 0 B_AX_r_SYM_ISO_IMEM02PP
[17] R/W 0 B_AX_r_SYM_FEN_WLBBGLB_1 When this bit is set to “0”, whole BB S1 is reset. When this bit is set, BB is enabled.
[16] R/W 0 B_AX_r_SYM_FEN_WLBBFUN_1 When this bit is set to “0”, S1 CCK and OFDM are disabled, and clock are gated. Otherwise, CCK and OFDM are enabled.
[15] R/W 0 B_AX_r_SYM_ISO_AON_OFF2PP
[14] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[13] R/W 0 B_AX_r_SYM_PWC_HCILA For HCI LA mode power cut
[12] R/W 0 B_AX_r_SYM_PWC_PD12V
[11] R/W 0 B_AX_r_SYM_PWC_UD12V
[10] R/W 0 B_AX_r_SYM_PWC_BTBRG For Dual BT USB-To-UART Bridge power cut
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_r_SYM_LDOBTSDIO_EN
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_r_SYM_LDOSPDIO_EN
[7] R/W 1 B_AX_r_SYM_ISO_BB2PP
[6] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD ( data engine )
[5] R/W 1 B_AX_r_SYM_ISO_CMAC12PP
[4] R/W 1 B_AX_r_SYM_ISO_HCILA for HCI LA mode ISO
[3] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[2] R/W 1 B_AX_r_SYM_ISO_BTBRG2PP For Dual BT USB-To-UART Bridge ISO
[1] R/W 1 B_AX_r_SYM_ISO_BTSDIO2PP
[0] R/W 1 B_AX_r_SYM_ISO_SPDIO2PP
18600088h R_AX_PLATFORM_ENABLE
10 R/W 1 B_AX_SYM_WLPLT_MEM_MUX_EN Enable WLAN platform IDMEM MUX
0: disable
1: enable;
9 R/W 0 B_AX_WCPU_WARM_EN WLAN_CPU Core Warm reset enable bit
0: plat_reset will assert cpu_cold_reset only
1: plat_reset will assert cpu_warm_reset only
8 R/W 0 B_AX_SPIC_EN SPIC enable bit
0: SPIC reset
1: SPIC enable
7 R/W 0 B_AX_UART_EN UART enable bit
0: UART reset
1: UART enable
6 R/W 0 B_AX_IDDMA_EN IDDMA enable bit
0: IDDMA reset
1: IDDMA enable
5 R/W 0 B_AX_IPSEC_EN IPSEC enable bit
0: IPSEC reset
1: IPSEC enable
4 R/W 0 B_AX_HIOE_EN HIOE enable bit
0: HIOE reset
1: HIOE enable
3 R/W 0 B_AX_AXIDMA_EN AXIDMA enable bit
0: AXIDMA reset
1: AXIDMA enable
2 R/W 1 B_AX_APB_WRAP_EN APB_WRAP enable bit
0: APB_WRAP reset
1: APB_WRAP enbale
1 R/W 0 B_AX_WCPU_EN WLAN_CPU Core enable bit
0: WLAN_CPU reset
1: WLAN_CPU enable
0 R/W 0 B_AX_PLATFORM_EN WLAN_CPU platform enabled bit
0: Platform reset
1: Platform enable
18600090h R_AX_WLLPS_CTRL
[31:30] R/W 00 RSVD RSVD
[29] R/W 0 B_AX_LPSOP_BBOFF LPS option to enable WL BB OFF block
1: Enable WL BB OFF block power
0: Disable WL BB OFF block power
[28] R/W 0 B_AX_LPSOP_MACOFF LPS option to enable WL MAC OFF block
1: Enable WL MAC OFF block power
0: Disable WL MAC OFF block power
[27] R/W 0 B_AX_LPSOP_OFF_CAPC_EN LPS option for Enable to cut CA33PC_EN & CA10PC_EN as PCIE assert L1.OFF/L2 in PCIE LPS state
(for LPS 要不要關APHY power cut)
0 : disable to cut CA33PC_EN & CA10PC_EN
1 : enable to cut CA33PC_EN & CA10PC_EN
[26] R/W 0 B_AX_LPSOP_MEM_DS LPS option to enable memory to deep sleep mode
1 : Enable memory to deep sleep mode
0 : Disable memory to deep sleep mode
[25] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[24] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[23] R/W 0 B_AX_LPSOP_XTALM_LPS LPS option for POW_XTAL_LPS
1 : XTAL is LowPower Mode in LPS
0 : XTAL is OFF in LPS
[22] R/W 0 B_AX_LPSOP_XTAL LPS option not to turn off XTAL (POW_XTAL)
1: Enable XTAL, 0: Disable XTAL
[21] R/W 0 B_AX_LPSOP_ACLK_DIV_2 1 : LPS option ANA_CLK Div 2
0 : LPS option ANA_CLK
[20] R/W 0 B_AX_LPSOP_ACLK_SEL LPS option to switch analog Clock Mode to 12Mhz
(Host could suspend by gating, Power Modes by FSM).
1: keep 12M (Fast Clock), 0: 500K(Slow Clock)
[19:18] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[17] R/W 0 B_AX_LPSOP_ASWRM LPS option for SWR_A operates in LPS.
1: PWM mode, 0: PFM mode
[16] R/W 1 B_AX_LPSOP_ASWR LPS option for SWR_A operation
1. SWR enable, 0: SWR disable
[15:12] R/W 1010 B_AX_LPSOP_DSWR_ADJ SWR PFM VADJ
0000: 0.55V 0001: 0.60V 0010: 0.65V 0011: 0.70V
0100: 0.75V 0101: 0.80V 0110: 0.85V 0111: 0.90V
1000: 0.95V 1001: 1.00V 1010: 1.05V 1011: 1.10V
1100: 1.10V 1101: 1.10V 1110: 1.10V 1111: 1.10V
[11] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[10] R/W 0 B_AX_LPSOP_DSWRSD LPS option to enable digital SWR step down
1: enable SWR_D step down
0: disable SWR_D step down
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_LPSOP_DSWRM LPS option for SWR_D operates in LPS.
1: PWM mode, 0: PFM mode
[8] R/W 1 B_AX_LPSOP_DSWR LPS option for SWR_D operation
1. SWR enable, 0: SWR disable
[7:4] R/W 1011 B_AX_LPSOP_OLD_ADJ LDOH12 voltage select (ON block LDO)
0000: 0.824V 0001: 0.84V 0010: 0.857V 0011: 0.875V
0100: 0.894V 0101: 0.913V 0110: 0.933V 0111: 0.955V
1000: 0.977V 1001: 1.000V 1010: 1.024V 1011: 1.050V
1100: 1.077V 1101: 1.105V 1110: 1.167V 1111: 1.235V
[3] R/W 0 B_AX_Force_Leave_LPS Set this bit to 1 to trigger HW leave LPS
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_LPSOP_OLDSD LPS option to enable WLAN On LDO step down
1: enable On LDO step down
0: disable On LDO step down
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_DIS_WLBT_LPSEN_LOPC Disable WLBT LPSEN_LOPC
為了避免sympmc在跑LPS or SUS的時候
因LPS/SUS的condition過短, 造成選擇LPS/SUS option時誤動作的問題
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_WL_LPS_EN Inform WLAN PMC FSM to enter LPS mode.
(auto clear when ready)
18600094h R_AX_WLRESUME_CTRL
[31:21] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[20] R/W 0 B_AX_LPSROP_CMAC1 LPS option to enable CMAC1 when LPS resume
1: Enable CMAC1
0: disable CMAC1
[19] R/W 0 B_AX_LPSROP_XTALM LPS resume option to set xtal mode ( XTAL_MODE )
1 : Set XTAL_MODE=1 for HP
0 : Set XTAL_MODE=0 for Normal
[18] R/W 0 B_AX_LPSROP_AFEM LPS option to enable AFE low power beacon mode when LPS resume
1 : Enable AFE low power beacon mode
0 : Disable AFE low power beacon mode
[17] R/W 0 B_AX_LPSROP_HIOE LPS option to enable FSM to load HIOE address and trigger HIOE to execute
- restore sequence when LPS resume,
- backup sequence when enter LPS (RP_END_INT issued)
1: Enable
0: Dislable
[16] R/W 0 B_AX_LPSROP_CPU LPS option to enable CPU when LPS resume
1: Enable CPU
0: disable CPU
[15:6] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[5:4] R/W 10 B_AX_LPSROP_DSWRSD_SEL LPS option for SWR_D step down time selection
00: 0.1ms 01: 0.25ms 10: 0.5ms 11:1ms
[3:0] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
18600098h R_AX_GPIO_DEBOUNCE_CTRL
[31:16] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[15] R/W 0 B_AX_WLGP_DBC1EN Enable GPIO Debounce Loop-1
[14:12] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[11:8] R/W 0 B_AX_WLGP_DBC1 Debounce Loop-1 stage count
[7] R/W 0 B_AX_WLGP_DBC0EN Enable GPIO Debounce Loop-0
[6:4] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[3:0] R/W 0 B_AX_WLGP_DBC0 Debounce Loop-0 stage count
186000A0h R_AX_SYSON_FSM_MON
[31:27] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[26:24] R/W 0 B_AX_FSM_MON_SEL FSM monitor selector
[23] R/W 0 B_AX_DOP_ELDO Power Down option for LDO analog block control
1: Enable LDO, 0: power down LDO
p.s. If power down LDO, then CLK_ANA will be gated
[22:16] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[15] WC 0 B_AX_FSM_MON_UPD FSM parameters Update
[14:0] R/W 0 B_AX_FSM_PAR FSM parameters
186000A8h R_AX_PMC_DBG_CTRL1
[31:16] RO 0 RSVD Reserved
[15:9] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[8] R/W1C 0 B_AX_PMC_WR_OVF PMC Write Access Timer Overflow
[7:0] R/W1C 0 B_AX_WLPMC_ERRINT WLPMC Error interrupt
186000ACh R_AX_SCOREBOARD
[31] R/W 0 B_AX_TOGGLE Toggle bit for Scoreboard
[30:0] R/W 0 B_AX_DATA_LINE DATA Line for Scoreboard
186000C0h R_AX_DBG_PORT_SEL
[31:0] RO 0 B_AX_DEBUG_ST Debug signals polling
186000C4h R_AX_PAD_CTRL2
[31:26] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[25] R/W 0 B_AX_FORCE_CLK_U2 Force clock USB2
[24] R/W 0 B_AX_FORCE_U2_CK Force USB2 CK
[23] R/W 0 B_AX_FORCE_U3_CK Force USB3 CK
[22] R/W 0 B_AX_USB2_FORCE Force USB2 mode
[21] R/W 0 B_AX_USB3_FORCE Force USB3 mode
[20] R/W 0 B_AX_USB3_USB2_TRANSITION USB3/USB2 transition enable :
0 : USB3 card emulation follow up USB3 spec
1 : USB2 card emulation , but support USB3/USB2 switch
[19:18] R/W 00 B_AX_USB23_SW_MODE_V1 if efuse 0x06[7] =1'b1:
2’b00,2’b01 : usb2 for next chipoff resume
2’b10 : usb3 for next chipoff resume
2’b11 : rsvd		 0x74 (8812A&8814A)
[17] R/W 0 B_AX_NO_PDN_CHIPOFF_V1 Chipoff not powerdown(ana clock always has) 0x70 (8812A&8814A)
[16] R/W 0 B_AX_RSM_EN_V1 When Timer Expired, Resume Hardware StateMachine 0x3E (8812A&8814A)
[15:8] R/W 00 B_AX_MATCH_CNT USB2 and USB3 Match counter for sleep mode 0x3D (8812A&8814A)
[7] RO 0 B_AX_LD_B12V_EN Autoload option for 1.5V of board, 1: 1.5V provided by Board; 0: 1.5V provided by WLAN chip
[6] R/W 0 B_AX_EECS_IOSEL_V1 EECS PAD GPIO output control
[5] R/W 0 B_AX_EECS_DATA_O_V1 Data Output for EECS PAD
[4] RO 0 B_AX_EECS_DATA_I_V1 EECS PIN current status
[3] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_EESK_IOSEL_V1 EESK PAD GPIO output control
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_EESK_DATA_O_V1 Data Output for EESK PAD
[0] RO 0 B_AX_EESK_DATA_I_V1 EESK PIN current status
[31:0] RO EAEAEAEA
186000CCh R_AX_PMC_DBG_CTRL2
[31:24] R/W 0 B_AX_EFUSE_BURN_GNT The Grant Code for Efuse Burn
[23:17] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[16] RO 0 B_AX_DIS_IOWRAP_TIMEOUT 0 : Enable IOWRAP time out
1 : Disable IOWRAP time out
[PS : hw tie 0 , 無法write]
[15:13] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[12] R/W 0 B_AX_PCIE_USB_PC_WRMSK PCIe_USB power cut CR protection bit
具體對應
reg 0x00[4:1] , reg 0x00[13:10] , reg 0x80[12:11]
note :
PCIE & USB APHY/DPHY/ISO都改0xCC[12]
[11:10] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_STOP_WL_PMC Halt the WL FSM
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_STOP_SYM_PMC Halt the SYM FSM
[7] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[6] R/W 0 B_AX_BT_ACCESS_WL_PAGE0 BT access WL page0 Enable
0 : Disabled
1 : Enabled
[5] R/W 1 B_AX_R_AX_RST_WLPMC Option to gengerate WLREG initial when SW auto power on WLAN
[4] R/W 0 B_AX_R_AX_RST_PD12N Option to generate HOSTRST when Power Down
[3] R/W 1 B_AX_SYSON_DIS_WLR_AX_WRMSK Write Access Mask for PMC FSM
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_SYSON_DIS_PMCR_AX_WRMSK Write Access Mask for PMC FSM
[1:0] R/W 01 B_AX_SYSON_R_AX_ARB HW PMC Access Register Time Out Control
186000D0h R_AX_MEM_PWR_CTRL
[31:18] R/W 0 RSVD Reserved
[17] R/W 0 B_AX_MEM_BB_SD For BB Memory SD(Shutdown)
[16] R/W 0 B_AX_MEM_BB_DS For BB Memory DS
[15:11] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[10] R/W 0 B_AX_MEM_BT_DS For BT_memory DS
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_MEM_SDIO_LS For memory SDIO LS
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_MEM_SDIO_DS For memory SDIO DS
[7] R/W 0 B_AX_MEM_USB_LS For memory USB LS
[6] R/W 0 B_AX_MEM_USB_DS For memory USB DS
[5] R/W 0 B_AX_MEM_PCI_LS For memory PCI LS
[4] R/W 0 B_AX_MEM_PCI_DS For memory PCI DS
[3] R/W 0 B_AX_MEM_WLMAC_LS For memory WL MAC LS
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_MEM_WLMAC_DS For memory WL MAC DS
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_MEM_WLMCU_LS For memory WL MCU LS
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_MEM_WLMCU_DS For memory WL MCU DS
186000D4h R_AX_Indir_Adr_SDIO
[31:18] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[17] R/W1C 0 B_AX_INDIR_READY_SDIO Polling to 1, it indicates the indirect access R/W is ready.
Write 1 Clear.
[16] R0/W 0 B_AX_INDIR_R_SDIO When write this bit to 1, the indirect read request will be issued. This bit is always read as 0
[15:0] R/W 0 B_AX_INDIR_ADR_SDIO SDIO register address, need 4 Byte alignment
Addr = 0x00h, HW get sdio local reg 0x00h ~ 0x03h
Addr = 0x04h, HWget sdio local reg 0x04h ~ 0x07h

Start address
FN1 local: 0x0000
CCCR: 0x4000
FN1 FBR: 0x5000
FN2 FBR: 0x6000
186000D8h R_AX_Indir_data_SDIO
[31:0] R 0 B_AX_INDIR_DATA_SDIO Read data [31:0] = {sdio_local_R_AX_N+3, sdio_local_R_AX_N+2, sdio_local_R_AX_N+1, sdio_local_R_AX_N }
186000E0h R_AX_USB_SIE_INTF
[31] R/W 0 B_AX_USB_REG_SEL 0: USB local register
1: USB PHY parameter
[30] R/W 0 B_AX_USB_WRITE_EN USB write enable bit, 0: read 1: write
[29] R/W 0 B_AX_USB_REG_EN USB register enable bit
[28] R/W 0 B_AX_USB_SIE_SEL USB SIE buffer enable bit for debug
[27] R/W 0 B_AX_USB_REG_STATUS 0: IO done
1:indirect access should set BIT_USB_REG_STATUS=1
[26] R/W 0 B_AX_USB_PHY_BYTE_SEL B_AX_USB_REG_SEL =0
USB address[10]
,B_AX_USB_REG_SEL =1
PHY high/low byte selector
[25:16] R/W 0 B_AX_USB_SIE_INTF_ADDR USB address
[15:8] RO 0 B_AX_USB_SIE_INTF_RD The read data from USB SIE.
[7:0] R/W 0 B_AX_USB_SIE_INTF_WD The write data from USB SIE.
186000E4h R_AX_PCIE_MIO_INTF
[31:21] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[20:16] R/W 0 B_AX_PCIE_MIO_ADDR_PAGE_V1 The page of PCIE MIO access address:
5’b00000 : 0x2000 page
5’b00001 : 0x2100 page
5’b00010 : 0x2200 page
5’b00011 : 0x2300 page
…
5’b11011 : 0x3B00 page
[15:14] RO 0 RSVD Reserved
[13] R/W 0 B_AX_PCIE_MIO_BYIOREG MIO bypass IOREG interface.
[12] R/W 0 B_AX_PCIE_MIO_RE Read Enable of MIO interface.
[11:8] R/W 0 B_AX_PCIE_MIO_WE Write Byte Enable of MIO interface
[7:0] R/W 0 B_AX_PCIE_MIO_ADDR The address of PCIE MIO Access register.
186000E8h R_AX_PCIE_MIO_INTD
[31:0] R/W 0 B_AX_PCIE_MIO_DATA The data read from /write to PCIE MIO.
186000F0h R_AX_SYS_CFG1
[31:28] R 0 B_AX_TRP_ICFG Trapped ICFG data value
0: normall mode
XXXX: the other mode (Test Mode)
[27] R 1 B_AX_RF_TYPE_ID 1 : 2*2
0 : 1*1
[26] R 1 RSVD RSVD
[25] R 0 B_AX_BD_PKG_SEL Trapped PKG_ENG_SEL value
[24] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[23] RO 0 B_AX_RTL_ID TestChip ID, 1 : Test (RLE) ; 0 : MP (RL)
[22] R 1 B_AX_PAD_HWPD_IDN HWPDN PAD status Indicator, when this bit is high, any HWPDN INT is a fake interrupt.
[21] R/W 0 RSVD Reserved
[20] RO 0 B_AX_Testmode Test mode trap :
0: normal mode
1: test mode
[19:18] RO 10 B_AX_FOUNDRY_ID Foundry ID :
00: TSMC , 01: SMIC, 10: UMC
[17:16] RO 01 RSVD RSVD
[15:12] RO 0000 B_AX_CHIP_VER Chip version (From RF_RTL_ID) – 8852A
0000 : A-cut
0001 : B-cut
0010 : C-cut
0011 : D-cut
……以此類推.
[11] RO 1 B_AX_BD_MAC3 Bonding option for MAC function-3 Enable (Reserved bonding option)
[10] RO 1 B_AX_BD_MAC1 Bonding option for MAC function-1 Enable (VHT_SIGB_CRC enable)
[9] RO 1 B_AX_BD_MAC2 Bonding option for MAC function-2 Enable (DIS_CCK_ENC [disable CCK encode])
[8] RO 1 B_AX_SIC_IDLE Indicator of SIC idle state
[7] RO 0 B_AX_ANA_SPS_OCP_SHUTDN ANA SPS OCP shutdown Chip
[6] RO 0 B_AX_DIG_SPS_OCP_SHUTDN Digital SPS OCP shutdown Chip
[5] RO 0 B_AX_V15_VLD SWR_DIG Core Power Ready. 1: Reset relese after Power Ready
[4] RO 0 B_AX_PCIRSTB PCIE External PERST, Pin Status
[3] RO 0 B_AX_PCLK_VLD PCIE PHY Clock Stable, 1: Clock Stable
[2] RO 0 B_AX_UCLK_VLD USB PHY Clock Stable, 1: Clock Stable
[1] RO 0 B_AX_ACLK_VLD AFE Clock Stable, 1: Clock Stable
[0] RO 0 B_AX_XCLK_VLD Xtal Clock Stable, 1: Clock Stable
186000F4h R_AX_SYS_STATUS1
[31:28] RO 0 B_AX_RF_RL_ID Vendor ID defined in RF
[27] RO 0 B_AX_BT_LPS_EN BT LPS enabled
[26] RO 0 B_AX_WLAN_LPS_EN WLAN LPS enabled
[25:20] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[19] R/W 0 B_AX_HPHY_ICFG Enable Host PHY LBK Pin Out
[18] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[17:16] R/W 0 B_AX_SEL_0xC0 Debug Message Selector for 0xC0
[15:13] R/W 0 B_AX_HCI_SEL_V4 Final HCI configuration
3'b000 : WL-SDIO/SPI , BT-UART
3'b001 : USB-MF
3'b010 : WL-PCIe , BT-UART
3'b011 : WL-PCIe , BT-USB1.1&USB2.0
3'b100 : SDIO Multi
[12] RO 0 B_AX_USB_OPERATION_MODE HCI Selection: 11
0 => USB 2.0
1 => USB 1.1
HCI Selection: 10
0 => USB 2.0
1 => HSIC
[11] R/W 0 B_AX_BT_PDN Option for Disable all function when BT is disable
[10] R/W 0 B_AX_AUTO_WLPON Option for WL Auto power on
[9:8] RO 10 B_AX_WL_MODE 2'b00 : 11N
2'b01 : 11AC
2'b10 : 11AX
2'b11 : RSVD
[7] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[6] RO 0 B_AX_PKG_SEL_HCI Bounding option for using PAD_HCI_SEL[1:0] as HCI configuration
[5:3] RO 0 B_AX_PAD_HCI_SEL_V2 Bounding option for HCI configuration:
3'b000 : WL-SDIO/SPI , BT-UART
3'b001 : USB-MF
3'b010 : WL-PCIe , BT-UART
3'b011 : WL-PCIe , BT-USB1.1&USB2.0
3'b100 : SDIO Multi
[2:0] R/W 3'b000 B_AX_EFS_HCI_SEL_V1 Efuse/EEPROM for HCI configuration:
3'b000 : WL-SDIO/SPI , BT-UART
3'b001 : USB-MF
3'b010 : WL-PCIe , BT-UART
3'b011 : WL-PCIe , BT-USB1.1&USB2.0
3'b100 : SDIO Multi
186000F8h R_AX_SYS_STATUS2
[31:24] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD

[19] R/W 0 B_AX_SIO_ALDN SDIO Interface autoload done bit
[18] R/W 0 B_AX_USB_ALDN USB Interface autoload doen bit

[7:0] R/W 0 B_AX_EPVID0 Efuse/EEPROM load verification ID-0

[29] RO 0 B_AX_U3_TERM_DETECT
[28:10] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD

2'b01: FPGA
2'b10: PXP
2'b11: ASIC

0x56: RTL8852D
18600100h R_AX_USER_DEFINED_0
[31:0] R/W 0 B_AX_USER_DEFINED_0 USER_DEFINED_0

18600148h R_AX_GPIO_EXT_INTM
[31:3] R/W 0 Rsvd RSVD
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_GPIO18_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_GPIO17_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_GPIO16_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
18600150h R_AX_GPIO_16_TO_18_EXT_CTRL
[31:27] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[26:24] R/W 0 B_AX_GPIO_MOD_18_TO_16 GPIO[18:16] function mode selection. When the specific bit is set to zero, the
corresponding GPIO port is configured to data port; otherwise, when a specific
bit is set to “1”, and GPIO_IO_SEL is set to “0”, then it is interrupt mode.
[23:19] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[18:16] R/W 0 B_AX_GPIO_IO_SEL_18_TO_16 GPIO[18:16] pins output enable when a bit is set to “1”; otherwise, input is configured.
[15:11] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[10:8] R/W 0 B_AX_GPIO_OUT_18_TO_16 GPIO[18:16] pins output value
[7:3] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[2:0] RO 0 B_AX_GPIO_IN_18_TO_16 GPIO[18:16] pins input value
[31:0] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[31:0] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
18600160h R_AX_HALT_H2C_CTRL
31:1 R/W 0 RSVD
0 R/W 0 B_AX_HALT_H2C_TRIGGER Write 1 to trigger HALT H2C REG interrupt to FW.
(After receiving H2C, FW must write 0 to B_AX_HALT_H2C_TRIGGER to let the host know the data has been received)
18600164h R_AX_HALT_C2H_CTRL
31:1 R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
0 R/W 0 B_AX_HALT_C2H_TRIGGER Write 1 to trigger HALT C2H REG interrupt to the host.
(After receiving HALT C2H, the host must write 0 to B_AX_HALT_C2H_TRIGGER to let FW know the data has been received)
18600168h R_AX_HALT_H2C
31:0 R/W 0 B_AX_HALT_H2C HALT H2CREG data
1860016Ch R_AX_HALT_C2H
[31:28] R/W 0 B_AX_HALT_C2H_ERROR_SENARIO Wlan CPU Senario
1: RXI-300 Error
2: CPU Exception
3: Assertion Function
4.WDT
[27:16] R/W 0 RSVD
[15:0] R/W 0 B_AX_ERROR_CODE Error code:
When B_AX_HALT_C2H_ERROR_SENARIO = 0001' ,the field means RXI-300 Error Code

When B_AX_HALT_C2H_ERROR_SENARIO = 0002',the field means CPU ExcCode (CoProcessor General Register Address13)

When B_AX_HALT_C2H_ERROR_SENARIO = 0003',the field means FW Alarm Code. (Defined by FW,refer the src/Internal/RTL8852A/Intl8852A_Debug_RAM.h)
18600170h R_AX_SYS_CFG5
[31:11] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[10] R/W 0 B_AX_WDT_WAKE_PCIE_EN WDT WAEK PCIE enable
1 : Enabled
0 : Disabled
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_WDT_WAKE_USB_EN WDT WAEK USB enable
1 : Enabled
0 : Disabled
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_SYM_DIS_HC_ACCESS_MAC 通知 Host read/write DMAC/CMAC
0 : Disable
1 : 通知 HCI 回覆 0xEA
[7:4] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[3] R 0 B_AX_LPS_STATUS 0: In Active State
1: In LPS State
[2] R 0 B_AX_HCI_TXDMA_BUSY 0: Idle
1: Busy
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_HCI_TXDMA_ALLOW 0: TXDMA Not allowed
1. TXDMA allowed
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_FW_CTRL_HCI_TXDMA_EN 0: HCI send the Packet to MAC FIFO directly when receiving Packet from the host.
1. HCI need to check the value of LPS_STATUS and HCI_TXDMA_ALLOW for DMA behavior
18600180h R_AX_FW_DEBUG_USE_ONLY_0
[31:0] R/W 0 B_AX_FW_DEBUG_USE_ONLY_0 for fw debug

1860018Ch R_AX_FW_DEBUG_USE_ONLY_3

18600190h R_AX_FWS0IMR
[31] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_HALT_H2C_INT_EN Enable HALT H2C(triggered by0x160) interrupt
[30] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_FSM_HIOE_TO_EVENT_INT_EN Enable the interrupt source that when FSM load register to HIOE in LPS flow, FSM keeps in waiting state and start counting. If the counter over 87ms, issue this interrupt to wake WCPU.
[29] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_HCI_SUS_INT_EN Enable USB, PCIE, and SDIO suspend event
[28] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_HCI_RES_INT_EN Enable USB, PCIE and SDIO Resume Event
[27] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_HCI_RESET_INT_EN Enable HCI reset event
WL 在 USB 是代表 SE0 reset,
WL 在 PCIe 是代表 PERST
[26] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_USB_SCSI_CMD_INT_EN [MP] Enable USB SCSI CMD/Resp interrupt source
[25] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_ACT2RECOVERY_INT_EN USB3 Active to Recovery Interrupt source, PCIE STC interrupt source
[24] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_GEN1Gen2_SWITCH_INT_EN PCIE Gen1 <-> Gen2 switch
[23] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[22] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_USB_LPMRSM_INT_EN Enable USB LPM Resume Interrupt. The status bit is asserted when USB resume from LPM state.
[21] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_USB_LPMINT_INT_EN Enable USB LPM Interrupt. The status bit is asserted when USB enters into LPM states.
[20] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_PWMERR_INT_EN Enable HCION iowrap timeout error interrupt source
[19] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_PDNINT_EN Enable Hardware Power Down interrupt source
[18] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_SPSA_OCP_INT_EN Enable SPS Analog OCP(Over Current Protection) alarm interrupt source
[17] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_SPSD_OCP_INT_EN Enable SPS Digital OCP(Over Current Protection) alarm interrupt source
[16] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_BT_SB_INT_EN enable BT scoreboard update interrupt
When 0xAC[31] write to 1 , this interrupt is issue to indicate the status updated.
[15] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_GPIOF_INT_EN Enable GPIOF interrupt source
[14] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_GPIOE_INT_EN Enable GPIOE interrupt source
[13] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_GPIOD_INT_EN Enable GPIOD interrupt source
[12] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_GPIOC_INT_EN Enable GPIOC interrupt source
[11] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_GPIOB_INT_EN Enable GPIOB interrupt source
[10] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_GPIOA_INT_EN Enable GPIOA interrupt source
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_GPIO9_INT_EN Enable GPIO9 interrupt source
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_GPIO8_INT_EN Enable GPIO8 interrupt source
[7] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_GPIO7_INT_EN Enable GPIO7 interrupt source
[6] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_GPIO6_INT_EN Enable GPIO6 interrupt source
[5] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_GPIO5_INT_EN Enable GPIO5 interrupt source
[4] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_GPIO4_INT_EN Enable GPIO4 interrupt source
[3] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_GPIO3_INT_EN Enable GPIO3 interrupt source
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_GPIO2_INT_EN Enable GPIO2 interrupt source
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_GPIO1_INT_EN Enable GPIO1 interrupt source
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_GPIO0_INT_EN Enable GPIO0 interrupt source
18600194h R_AX_FWS0ISR
[31] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_HALT_H2C_INT HALT H2C(triggered by0x160) interrupt
[30] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_FSM_HIOE_TO_EVENT_INT After FSM load B_AX_BKP_HIOE_CTRL or B_AX_RES_HIOE_CTRL, FSM keeps in waiting state and start counting. If the counter over 87ms(20bit counter, ana_clk), issue this interrupt to wake WCPU.
[29] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_HCI_SUS_INT USB, PCIE, and SDIO suspend event
[28] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_HCI_RES_INT USB, PCIE and SDIO Resume Event
[27] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_HCI_RESET_INT HCI reset event
WL 在 USB 是代表 SE0 reset,
WL 在 PCIe 是代表 PERST
[26] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_USB_SCSI_CMD_INT [MP] USB SCSI cmd/resp autoinstall interrupt
[25] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_ACT2RECOVERY_INT USB3 Active to Recovery Interrupt, PCIE STC interrupt
[24] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_GEN1Gen2_SWITCH_INT PCIE Gen1 <-> Gen2 switch
[23] R/W1C 0 RSVD RSVD
[22] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_USB_LPMRSM_INT The status bit is asserted when USB resume from LPM state.
[21] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_USB_LPMINT_INT The status bit is asserted when USB enters into LPM states.
[20] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_PWMERR_INT HCION iowrap timeout error interrupt
[19] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_PDNINT Hardware Power Down interrupt
[18] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_SPSA_OCP_INT SPS Analog OCP(Over Current Protection) alarm interrupt
[17] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_SPSD_OCP_INT SPS Digital OCP(Over Current Protection) alarm interrupt
[16] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_BT_SB_INT BT scoreboard update interrupt
When 0xAC[31] write to 1 , this interrupt is issue to indicate the status updated.

[4] R/W1C 0 B_AX_GPIO4_INT GPIO4 Interrupt
[3] R/W1C 0 B_AX_GPIO3_INT GPIO3 Interrupt
[2] R/W1C 0 B_AX_GPIO2_INT GPIO2 Interrupt
[1] R/W1C 0 B_AX_GPIO1_INT GPIO1 Interrupt
[0] R/W1C 0 B_AX_GPIO0_INT GPIO0 Interrupt
186001A8h R_AX_HIMR1
[31:3] R/W 0 Rsvd Rsvd
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_GPIO18_INT_EN GPIO18 HSIMR
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_GPIO17_INT_EN GPIO17 HSIMR
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_GPIO16_INT_EN GPIO16 HSIMR
186001ACh R_AX_HISR1
[31:3] R/W 0 Rsvd Rsvd
[2] R/W1C 0 B_AX_GPIO18_INT GPIO18 Interrupt
[1] R/W1C 0 B_AX_GPIO17_INT GPIO17 Interrupt
[0] R/W1C 0 B_AX_GPIO16_INT GPIO16 Interrupt
186001B0h R_AX_DRV_FW_HSK_0
[31:0] R/W 0 B_AX_DRV_FW_HSK_0 For driver handshake reg
186001B4h R_AX_DRV_FW_HSK_1
[31:0] R/W 0 B_AX_DRV_FW_HSK_1 For driver handshake reg
186001B8h R_AX_DRV_FW_HSK_2
[31:0] R/W 0 B_AX_DRV_FW_HSK_2 For driver handshake reg
186001BCh R_AX_DRV_FW_HSK_3
[31:0] R/W 0 B_AX_DRV_FW_HSK_3 For driver handshake reg
186001C0h R_AX_DRV_FW_HSK_4
[31:0] R/W 0 B_AX_DRV_FW_HSK_4 For driver handshake reg
186001C4h R_AX_DRV_FW_HSK_5
[31:0] R/W 0 B_AX_DRV_FW_HSK_5 For driver handshake reg
186001C8h R_AX_DRV_FW_HSK_6
[31:0] R/W 0 B_AX_DRV_FW_HSK_6 For driver handshake reg
186001CCh R_AX_DRV_FW_HSK_7
[31:0] R/W 0 B_AX_DRV_FW_HSK_7 For driver handshake reg
186001D0h R_AX_IO_Hang_CTRL
[31:24] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[23] R/W 1 B_AX_AHB_AUTO_FIX_HANG_EN Enable fix AHB bus hang. It will return 0xEAEA_EAEA for those AHB stuck
1 : Enabled
0 : Disabled
[22:16] R/W 1000000 B_AX_AHB_AUTO_FIX_HANG_THD Maximum timeout cycles for AHB response
[15] R/W 1 B_AX_APB_AUTO_FIX_HANG_EN Enable platform backdoor bit. It will return 0xDEADBEAF for those IO register stuck.
[14:0] R/W 100000000000000 B_AX_APB_AUTO_FIX_HANG_THD Maximum timeout cycles for IO register response.
186001E0h R_AX_WCPU_FW_CTRL
[31] R/W 0 RSVD
[30] R/W 0 B_AX_WCPU_ROM_CUT_REQ IROM write ROM cut id to B_AX_WCPU_ROM_CUT and then clear this bit if this bit is set
[29:28] R/W 0 B_AX_FW_ENV FW Environment
2'b00: ASIC
2'b01: FPGA
2'b10: PXP
2'b11: rsvd
[27:24] R/W 0 B_AX_IDMEM_SHARE_MODE_RECORD Save IDMEM Share Mode Config if last FWDL Success.
Information of IDMEM Share Mode stored in FW Image Header
[23] R/W 0 B_AX_IDMEM_SHARE_MODE_RECORD_VALID 2'b0:B_AX_IDMEM_SHARE_MODE_RECORD Value is invalid, should be ignord
2'b1:B_AX_IDMEM_SHARE_MODE_RECORD Value is valid
[22:17] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[16] R/W 0 B_AX_WDT_PLT_RST_EN in wowlan mode it decide WDT platform reset need to enable for fw init wdt
[15:8] R/W 0 B_AX_WCPU_ROM_CUT IROM write ROM cut id to this byte if B_AX_WCPU_ROM_CUT_REQ is set
[7:5] R/W 0 B_AX_WCPU_FWDL_STS WCPU fw download status, set by WCPU. (For SW handshake)
FWDL procedure is done if this symbol value is equal to WCPU_FW_INIT_RDY.
2'b111 : WCPU_FW_INIT_RDY
2'b110 : WCPU_FWDL_RDY
2'b101 : rsvd
2'b100 : CUT_NOT_MATCH
2'b011 : SECURITY_FAIL
2'b010 : CHECKSUM_FAIL
2'b001 : FWDL_ONGOING
2'b000 : INITIAL_STATE
[4] R/W 0 B_AX_FW_RAM_RUN_IND This bit is set to 1 to means FW RAM code is running.
[3] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[2] RW 0 B_AX_FWDL_PATH_RDY This bit is set to 1 to means that AXIDMA_CH1 is realdy(by cpu). Then driver could download fw. (For SW handshake)
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_H2C_PATH_RDY This bit is set to 1 to means that AXIDMA_CH0 is realdy(by cpu). Then driver could use H2C to handshake with cpu. (For SW handshake)
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_WCPU_FWDL_EN WCPU Firmware download enable. (For SW handshake)
This bit is enabled by driver to notify WCPU need FW Patch. This bit is cleared by WCPU to notify driver that FWDL is done, and driver should check B_AX_WCPU_FWDL_STS.
1:Enable(Default),
0:Disable.
186001E4h R_AX_RPWM
[15] RO 0 B_AX_RPWM_TOGGLE HRPWM register.
If driver toggle this bit, RPWM FWISR will be issued
(This register is a direct bus signal from each HCI block HRPWM register.)
[14:0] RO 0 B_AX_RPWM_VAL RPWM value (SW defined)
BIT14: ACK bit. When FW receive RPWM Interrupt, FW should trigger CPWM to response to host.
BIT13~BIT0 : RPWM SW defined value
(This register is a direct bus signal from each HCI block HRPWM register.)
186001E6h R_AX_Boot_Reason
[15:3] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[2:0] R/W 0 B_AX_Boot_Reason WCPU Boot Reason:
0: boot reason is Pwr_On (initial value or updated by FW)
1: boot reason is WDT, and Leve2_rstb (WCPU, Platform and peripheral) is reset and released. (WCPU_RST will be auto released after PLATFORM_RST released). This value should be updated by WDT.
2: boot reason is LPS (updated by FW)
Else, it is unknown state.
186001E8h R_AX_LDM
[31] R/W 0 B_AX_EN_32K Enable CG/PG indicator.
[30:0] R/W 0 B_AX_LDM LPS Debug Message

PS:
Reuse this register for FW Log Control usage before FWDL. FW log will be controled by H2C after FW initial ready
[7:4]: Debug Level
[3:0]: Debug Path (BIT0: UART, BIT1: C2H)
186001F0h R_AX_UDM0
[31:28] R/W 0 B_AX_UDM0_SEND2RA_CNT FW send to RA counter
[27:24] R/W 0 B_AX_UDM0_TX_RPT_CNT Tx report counter that can indicate the cmac is still alive
[23:8] R/W 0 B_AX_UDM0_FS_CODE FW state code: the code is defined by fw .
Please reference: src/Internal/RTL8852A/Intl8852A_Debug_RAM.h
[7] R/W 0 B_AX_NULL_POINTER_INDC Null pointer Indicator
0: null pointer event never happened
1: null pointer event ever happened
[6] R/W 0 B_AX_ROM_ASSERT_INDC ROM Assert Indicator
0: Assert never happened
1: Assert ever happened
[5] R/W 0 B_AX_RAM_ASSERT_INDC RAM Assert Indicator(except null pointer)
0: Assert never happened
1: Assert ever happened
[4] R/W 0 B_AX_FW_IMAGE_TYPE FW image type
0: Normal FW
1: Wowlan FW
[3] R/W 0 B_AX_HCI_ILLEGAL_CMD_INDC HCI illegal command indicator
0: Illegal command not happened
1: Illegal command happened( HCI read value with 0xDEADBEE0)
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_UDM0_TRAP_LOOP_CTRL The bit control the error senario will send haltc2h or not.The bit only effect when the below 3 conditions are true at the same time:
B_AX_HALT_C2H_ERROR_SENARIO = 0011'b and B_AX_UDM0_DBG_MODE_CTRL= 1'b and B_AX_UDM0_Send_HALTC2H_CTRL = 1'b
0:Send haltc2h
1:Will not send haltc2h
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_UDM0_Send_HALTC2H_CTRL The bit control the error senario will send haltc2h or not.The bit only effect in the condition:Error type:Assertion and B_AX_UDM0_DBG_MODE_CTRL=1'b
0:Send haltc2h
1:Will not send haltc2h
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_UDM0_DBG_MODE_CTRL The bit control current mode is debug or normal mode.If debug mode,FW will dump information into share buffer
0: Normal mode
1: Debug mode
186001F4h R_AX_UDM1
[31:16] R/W 0 B_AX_UDM1_ERROR_ADDR The address that been accessed and cause bus error or cpu exception
If B_AX_HALT_C2H_ERROR_SENARIO = 0001'b , it means RXI300 Error Log Register
If B_AX_HALT_C2H_ERROR_SENARIO = 0010'b , it means CPU BadVAddr(Coprocessor 0 General Register Addr=8)
If B_AX_HALT_C2H_ERROR_SENARIO = 0011'b , it's meanlingnessBIT 15:0 is temperally used by h2c/ch2 counter. No impact while error happend
[15:12] R/W 0 B_AX_UDM1_HALMAC_C2H_ENQ_CNT Halmac C2H EnQ counter
[11:8] R/W 0 B_AX_UDM1_HALMAC_H2C_DEQ_CNT Halmac H2C DeQ counter
[7:4] R/W 0 B_AX_UDM1_WCPU_C2H_ENQ_CNT FW C2H EnQ counter
[3:0] R/W 0 B_AX_UDM1_WCPU_H2C_DEQ_CNT FW H2C DeQ counter
186001F8h R_AX_UDM2
[31:0] R/W 0 B_AX_UDM2_EPC_RA The address of the next instruction to be executed following return from the exception handler or subroutine.
If B_AX_HALT_C2H_ERROR_SENARIO = 0001'b/0011'b , it means RA.
If B_AX_HALT_C2H_ERROR_SENARIO = 0010'b , it means Return EPC
186001FCh R_AX_UDM3
[31:0] R/W 0 B_AX_UDM3 User Defined Message
18600200h R_AX_SPS_DIG_ON_CTRL0
[31] R/W 1 B_AX_PFMCMP_IQ PFM comparator current
PFM comparator bias,
0: 50nA 1:250nA		 0x103[7] ANAPARSWR_MAC[31]
[30] R/W 1 B_AX_REG_BG_H SWR reference voltage select
1:VREF=0.6
0:VREF=0.575		 0x103[6] ANAPARSWR_MAC[30]
[29] R/W 1 B_AX_OFF END SEL PFM function
COT off time controlled by,
0: ZCD 1: min off time		 0x103[5] ANAPARSWR_MAC[29]
[28] R/W 1 B_AX_POW_MINOFF_L OCP cmp current select
0:normal current
1:increase OCP cmp current		 0x103[4] ANAPARSWR_MAC[28]
[27:26] R/W 01 B_AX_COT_I_L SWR PFM on time
COT ON Current
00:150nA
01:150nA+100nA
10:150nA+150nA
11:150nA+250nA		 0x102[7:6] ANAPARSWR_MAC[27:26]

SWR

0110 0.881

1101 1.03
1110 1.048(+16.4%)
1111 1.048(+16.4%)		 0x103[3:0] ANAPARSWR_MAC[25:22]

1:ZCD bias on when ZCD enable		 0x102[5] ANAPARSWR_MAC[21]
[20:19] R/W 01 B_AX_ZCD_SDZ_L SWR ZCD delay cell

Enable ZCD		 0x102[0] ANAPARSWR_MAC[16]

[31:28] R/W 1011 B_AX_SN_N_L NGATE NMOS driving 0x107[7:4] ANAPARSWR_MAC[63:60]
[27:24] R/W 0011 B_AX_SP_N_L NGATE PMOS driving 0x107[3:0] ANAPARSWR_MAC[59:56]
[23:20] R/W 1000 B_AX_SN_P_L PGATE NMOS driving 0x106[7:4] ANAPARSWR_MAC[55:52]

[15] R/W 0 B_AX_VO DISCHG_PWM_H 1:dummy loading 5mA 0x105[7] ANAPARSWR_MAC[47]
[14] R/W 1 B_AX_reg_mode_predriver 1:3 level predriver 0x105[6] ANAPARSWR_MAC[46]
[13:10] R/W 0111 B_AX_reg_adjsldo_L Small ldo voltage
0000 1.043
0001 1.075
0010 1.108
0011 1.143
0100 1.180
0101 1.220
0110 1.263
0111 1.286
1000 1.309
1001 1.333
1010 1.359
1011 1.385
1100 1.412
1101 1.444
1110 1.469
1111 1.500		 0x105[5:2] ANAPARSWR_MAC[45:42]
[9] R/W 1 B_AX_reg_ldor_L 1:ldos res short 0x105[1] ANAPARSWR_MAC[41]
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_PWM Force For PFM <-> PWM control
0: Force PWM bias enable when in PWM/PFM mode
1: PWM bias enabled only at PWM mode		 0x105[0] ANAPARSWR_MAC[40]
[7] R/W 1 B_AX_PFM_PD_RST For PFM <-> PWM control
1: When leave PFM mode, COT logic is reset		 0x104[7] ANAPARSWR_MAC[39]
[6] R/W 0 B_AX_VC_PFM_RSTB For PFM <-> PWM control
When into PFM, VC is,
0: clamped (bit 40 also =1) 1. floating		 0x104[6] ANAPARSWR_MAC[38]
[5] R/W 1 B_AX_PFM_IN_SEL PFM function
Power MOS into PFM when PFM CTRL,
0: rising 1: falling		 0x104[5] ANAPARSWR_MAC[37]
[4] R/W 0 B_AX_VC_RSTB For PFM <-> PWM control
Before SS VC is, 0: pulled low 1: floating		 0x104[4] ANAPARSWR_MAC[36]
[3] R/W 0 B_AX_FPWMDELAY For PFM <-> PWM time tune
1:PFM<=>PWM
PFM/PWM change by using DFF(CKMOD)		 0x104[3] ANAPARSWR_MAC[35]
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_ENFPWMDELAY_H For PFM <-> PWM time tune
1:PFM=>PWM delay
=> PWM enable and wait one clock cycle then PFM off		 0x104[2] ANAPARSWR_MAC[34]
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_reg_mos_half_L 1:power mos half 0x104[1] ANAPARSWR_MAC[33]
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_Current_Sense_MOS OCP function
1: current sensing MOS for large OC current		 0x104[0] ANAPARSWR_MAC[32]
18600208h R_AX_SPS_DIG_ON_CTRL2
[14:12] R/W 100 B_AX_BG_VR1200_tune BG電壓調整 0x108[14:12] ANAPARSWR_MAC[78:76]

[8:6] R/W 100 B_AX_BG_R1_tune BG R1電阻調整 0x108[8:6] ANAPARSWR_MAC[72:70]

1:res+cap improve psrr		 0x108[5] ANAPARSWR_MAC[69]
[4:3] R/W 0 B_AX_reg_bg_current_L Bg iq
00:23.9n
01:54.6n
10:117.8n		 0x108[4:3] ANAPARSWR_MAC[68:67]
[2:1] R/W 00 B_AX_REG_REG_SWR_ZCD_CTRL // SWR ZCD CTRL control
<1>1:double current
<0>1'b1: force in CCM/DCM boundary mode(default), 1'b0 : no boundary
1. 需要BT動態控
2. Digi/Ana SWR都需要
- PFM
- PWM 輕載
- PWM 重載		 0x108[2:1] ANAPARSWR_MAC[66:65]
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_REG_VC_CLAMP_SEL_L For PFM <-> PWM voltage drop improve
0:unity gain feedback clamp VC=VREF 1.orignal clamp(roll back option)		 0x108[0] ANAPARSWR_MAC[64]
18600210h R_AX_SPS_DIG_ON_CTRL4
[31:8] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[7] R/W 0 B_AX_SPS_VPFM_SW_CTRL SW can control PFM voltage for MP
0 : HW Mode
1 : SW Mode

If HW mode , 則 SWR_DIG 電壓設定都需要先脫離PFM mode, 並設定PFM電壓後再進PFM電壓才會生效		 0x110[7]
[6] R/W 0 B_AX_DIS_SWR_PRE_PWM 當 PFM 要切換到 PWM 時 , HW 都一定會先發 pre PWM. 這option可disable這功能
0: Enabled
1: Disable		 0x110[6]
[5:4] R/W 01 B_AX_SPS_PFM_ZCDC_H_PFM SWR ZCD current contro for PFMl
00:0.1u
01:0.2u(PFM)
10:0.7u(PWM)
11:0.8u		 0x110[5:4] ANAPARSWR_MAC[18:17] for PFM
[3] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD

PWM current (A) PFM current (A)

18600218h R_AX_LDO_AON_CTRL0
[31:24] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[23] R/W 0 B_AX_itail_half_en_L 進suspend mode (iQ = 30uA, support loading <15mA)
[REGU][LDO_UART] REG_CTRL
LDO iq half ctrl
0(default): iq normal (for normal mode)
1: iq half (for suspend mode)		 0x11A[7] ANAPAR_LDO[23]
[22] R/W 0 B_AX_standby_L 進standby mode (iQ = 1uA, support loading <100uA)
[REGU][LDO_UART] REG_CTRL
LDO standby mode ctrl:
0 (default): normal mode (iq normal + pwrmos 4x)
1: standby mode (iq reduce + pwrmos 1x)		 0x11A[6] ANAPAR_LDO[22]
[21] R/W 1 B_AX_en_diode_L [REGU][LDO_UART] REG_CTRL
PGATE diode clamp (this gating to disable by pd_regu_L)
0: disable clamp
1: enable clamp (default)		 0x11A[5] ANAPAR_LDO[21]
[20:17] R/W 1001 B_AX_voadj_L [REGU][LDO_UART] REG_CTRL
LDO VOSEL
0000, 0001, 0010, 0011: 1.620, 1.638, 1.657, 1.677
0100, 0101, 0110, 0111: 1.697, 1.717, 1.738, 1.760
1000(default), 1001, 1010, 1011: 1.782, 1.805, 1.828, 1.851
1100, 1101, 1110, 1111: 1.876, 1.901, 1.927, 1.953		 0x11A[4:1] ANAPAR_LDO[20:17]
[16] R/W 0 B_AX_pd_regu_L [REGU][LDO_UART] REG_CTRL
PowerDown CTRL
0: normal-Mode
1: power-down Mode		 0x11A[0] ANAPAR_LDO[16]
[15:12] R/W 0 B_AX_AONLDO_dummy_v2 [REGU][AONLDO] dummy 0x119[7:4] ANAPAR_LDO[15:12]
[11] R/W 1 B_AX_CK12M_EN 1: enable 12M ring 0x119[3] ANAPAR_LDO[11]
[10] R/W 0 B_AX_CK12M_SEL ( NO autoload )
1: 12MHz 0:500kHz
12M and 500K選擇，選擇500K的時候12M一定要開
12M是給選擇用邏輯電路的CLK，選完後就可以關"		 0x119[2] ANAPAR_LDO[10]
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_AONLDO_dummy_v1 [REGU][AONLDO] dummy 0x119[1] ANAPAR_LDO[9]

0 : disable (default)
1 : enable"		 0x119[0] ANAPAR_LDO[8]

VREF 0P600V 0P575V

0 (default) VREF = 0P600V

01 enable RC => disable RC

18600270h R_AX_WLAN_XTAL_SI_CTRL
[31] R/W 0 B_AX_WL_XTAL_SI_CMD_POLL 此bit要寫bit為1才代表觸發CMD, 下完CMD後要check此bit為0,才代表HW有把CMD完成
(HW完成後需要把此bit clear為0)
[30] RO 0 B_AX_BT_XTAL_SI_ERR_FLAG Error flag :
WLAN: 目前應該沒有
BT :當write address不是0xC0~0xFF時,會舉ERR flag
[29] RO 0 B_AX_WL_XTAL_GNT 1 : 目前XTAL_SI grant to WLAN
[28] RO 0 B_AX_BT_XTAL_GNT 1 : 目前XTAL_SI grant to BT
[27:26] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[25:24] R/W 0 B_AX_WL_XTAL_SI_MODE Control mode :
2'b00 : normal write
2'b01 : normal read
2'b10 : fast write
2'b11 : fast read
[23:16] R/W 0xFF B_AX_WL_XTAL_SI_BITMASK Bitmask :
1 : 需要寫入的bit要填1
0 : 不需寫入的bit要填0
如果bitmask = 0, 傳送到A-die志凱那邊,應該是都不寫入,預期是寫入無效的case
[15:8] R/W 0 B_AX_WL_XTAL_SI_DATA Read data or write data
Normal mode : data bit is 8 bit
SI_data = B_AX_WL_XTAL_SI_DATA[15:8]
Fast mode : data bit is 3 bit
SI_data = B_AX_WL_XTAL_SI_DATA[15:13] (MSB)
[7:0] R/W 0 B_AX_WL_XTAL_SI_ADDR Address (WL可以控制範圍 :
Read : 0x00~0xFF
Write : 0x00~0xFF)
Normal mode : address it 8 bit
SI_addr = B_AX_WL_XTAL_SI_ADDR[7:0]
Fast mode : address it 2 bit
SI_addr = B_AX_WL_XTAL_SI_ADDR[7:6] (MSB)
18600274h R_AX_WLAN_XTAL_SI_Config
[31] R/W 0 B_AX_XTAL_SI_RST XTAL_SI reset
0 : release reset
1 : reset
Software control 1’b1 & 1’b0. (no auto clear) (0->1->0)
若XTAL_SI在傳輸過程中, 發生force reset
這時候, XTAL_SI_EN訊號應該被clear,
所以, 理論上應該不會有問題才對		 0x174[31]
[30:2] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD 0x174[30:2]
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_XTAL_SI_CLK_DIV2 0 : XTAL_SI_CLK = 6M
1 : XTAL_SI_CLK = 6M/2 = 3M		 0x174[1]
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_XTAL_SI_ADDR_NOT_CHK 0 : WLAN check BT過來的write address offset是否在0xC0~0xFF, 若不是就return,不執行CMD
會舉ERR flag並把bt_xtal_rdy設為1
1 : WLAN不check BT過來的write address offset		 0x174[0]
18600280h R_AX_XTAL_ON_CTRL0
[31:30] R/W 0 B_AX_XBUF_SEL_TOK_L For cycles / 40MHz / 26MHz
000: 8 / 200n / 300n
001: 16 / 400n / 600n
010: 32 / 800n / 1.2u
011: 64 / 1.6u / 2.5u
100: 2^14 / 0.4m / 0.6m
101: 2^15 / 0.8m / 1.2m
110: 2^16 / 1.6m / 2.5m
111: 2^17 / 3.2m / 4.9m		 0x183[7:6] ANAPAR_XBUF[31:30]

[31:4] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[3:2] R/W 01 B_AX_XBUF_DUMMY XBUF dunny control 0x184[3:2] ANAPAR_XBUF[35:24]
[1] R/W 1 B_AX_XBUF_LPS_DIVISOR XBUF LPS clock divider
0: XTAL/256 (80M), 1: XTAL/128 (40M)		 0x184[1] ANAPAR_XBUF[33]
[0] R/W 1 B_AX_XBUF_SEL_TOK_H For cycles / 40MHz / 26MHz
000: 8 / 200n / 300n
001: 16 / 400n / 600n
010: 32 / 800n / 1.2u
011: 64 / 1.6u / 2.5u
100: 2^14 / 0.4m / 0.6m
101: 2^15 / 0.8m / 1.2m
110: 2^16 / 1.6m / 2.5m
111: 2^17 / 3.2m / 4.9m		 0x184[0] ANAPAR_XBUF[32]
186002A0h R_AX_SYM_ANAPAR_XTAL_MODE_DECODER
[31] R/W 0 B_AX_WiFi_FORCE_XTAL_HPMODE Force XTAL mode in high performance mode 0x1A3[7]
[30] R/W 0 B_AX_bypass_Adie_PWR_READY 0 : check A-die power ready 訊號
1 : bypass A-die power ready 訊號		 0x1A3[6]
[29] R/W 0 B_AX_bypass_XTAL_CHG_OK 0 : check XTAL_change_OK 訊號
1 : bypass XTAL_change_OK 訊號		 0x1A3[5]
[28] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD 0x1A3[4]
[27] R/W 0 B_AX_ADIE_EN A-Die power ctrl by SW. Only vaild when a_die_ctrl_by_sw = 1.
1: A-Die force enable. 0: A-Die force disable.		 0x1A3[3]
[26] R/W 0 B_AX_ADIE_CTRL_BY_SW Enable A-Die power ctrl by SW.
1: control by SW. 0: control by HW.		 0x1A3[2]
[25:24] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD 0x1A3[1:0]
[23:21] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD 0x1A2[7:5]
[20:19] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD 0x1A2[4:3]
[18] RO 0 B_AX_XTAL_MODE_Final HW結合WLAN/BT state最終要給XTAL的結果
0x2A0[1]是單純WLAN的結果		 0x1A2[2]
[17] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD 0x1A2[1]
[16:15] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD 0x1A1[7] &
0x1A2[0]

[8] RO 0 B_AX_XTAL_CLK_CHANGE_OK XTAL clock change OK 0x1A1[1]
[7:6] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD 0x1A0[7:6] &
0x1A1[0]
[5:4] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD 0x1A0[5:4]
[3] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD 0x1A0[3]
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_XTAL_POW_XTAL_LPS XTAL_POW_XTAL_LPS 0x1A0[2]
[1] R/W 1 B_AX_XTAL_MODE xtal mode define:
{POW_XTAL, XTAL_MODE, POW_XTAL_LPS}
[efuse for power on ]		 0x1A0[1]

1: Enable
1 R/W 0 B_AX_GPIO1_PULL_LOW_EN Enable auto pull low function that hw will pull GPIO1 pin to internal weakly low
0: Disable
1: Enable
0 R/W 0 B_AX_GPIO0_PULL_LOW_EN Enable auto pull low function that hw will pull GPIO0 pin to internal weakly low
0: Disable
1: Enable

When into PFM, VC is,
0: clamped (bit 40 also =1) 1. floating		 0x104[6] ANAPARSWR_MAC[38]
[5] R 1 B_AX_PFM_IN_SEL_F PFM function

0: rising 1: falling		 0x104[5] ANAPARSWR_MAC[37]
[4] R 0 B_AX_VC_RSTB_F For PFM <-> PWM control
Before SS VC is, 0: pulled low 1: floating		 0x104[4] ANAPARSWR_MAC[36]

1:PFM<=>PWM

[2] R 0 B_AX_ENFPWMDELAY_H_F For PFM <-> PWM time tune

- PWM 重載		 0x108[2:1] ANAPARSWR_MAC[66:65]

[8] R 0 B_AX_PWM Force_ANA_F For PFM=>PWM control

[7] R 1 B_AX_PFM_PD_RST_ANA_F For PFM=>PWM control
1: When leave PFM mode, COT logic is reset		 0x124[7] ANAPARSWR_ANA_MAC[39]
[6] R 0 B_AX_VC_PFM_RSTB_ANA_F For PFM=>PWM control
When into PFM, VC is,
0: clamped (bit 40 also =1) 1. floating		 0x124[6] ANAPARSWR_ANA_MAC[38]
[5] R 1 B_AX_PFM_IN_SEL_ANA_F PFM function
Power MOS into PFM when PFM CTRL,
0: rising 1: falling		 0x124[5] ANAPARSWR_ANA_MAC[37]
[4] R 0 B_AX_VC_RSTB_ANA_F For PFM=>PWM control
Before SS VC is, 0: pulled low 1: floating		 0x124[4] ANAPARSWR_ANA_MAC[36]
[3] R 0 B_AX_FPWMDELAY_ANA_F For PFM <-> PWM time tune
1:PFM<=>PWM

[2] R 0 B_AX_ENFPWMDELAY_H_ANA_F For PFM <-> PWM time tune
1:PFM=>PWM delay

[REGU][LDO_UART] REG_CTRL
LDO iq half ctrl
0(default): iq normal (for normal mode)
1: iq half (for suspend mode)		 0x11A[7] ANAPAR_LDO[23]
[22] R 0 B_AX_standby_L_F 進standby mode (iQ = 1uA, support loading <100uA)
[REGU][LDO_UART] REG_CTRL
LDO standby mode ctrl:
0 (default): normal mode (iq normal + pwrmos 4x)
1: standby mode (iq reduce + pwrmos 1x)		 0x11A[6] ANAPAR_LDO[22]
[21] R 1 B_AX_en_diode_L_F [REGU][LDO_UART] REG_CTRL

1: enable clamp (default)		 0x11A[5] ANAPAR_LDO[21]

[4:3] R 00 B_AX_reg_fast_sel_F PLL settling behavior deleciton
00 disable RC => enable RC
01 enable RC => disable RC
10 enable RC slow locking
11 disable RC, fast locking		 0x148[4:3] WL_ANAPAR_MAC_ON[68:67]

[18:16] R/W 000 B_AX_SEC_IDMEM_SIZE_CONFIG_V1 6 modes for IMEM and DMEM size (KB):
- 3b'000 for (IMEM0, IMEM0, DMEM0, DMEM1) = (576, 576, 368, 32)
- 3b'001 for (IMEM0, IMEM0, DMEM0, DMEM1) = (576, 512, 432, 32)
- 3b'010 for (IMEM0, IMEM0, DMEM0, DMEM1) = (576, 640, 304, 32)
- 3b'100 for (IMEM0, IMEM0, DMEM0, DMEM1) = (576, 576, 336, 64)
- 3b'101 for (IMEM0, IMEM0, DMEM0, DMEM1) = (576, 512, 400, 64)
- 3b'110 for (IMEM0, IMEM0, DMEM0, DMEM1) = (576, 640, 272, 64)
[15] R 0 B_AX_SEC_BT_SEC1_DIS autoload value by OR result of EFUSE.BT_SEC_DIS_1 2 bits, 0: enable, 1: disable
[14] R 0 B_AX_SEC_BT_SEC0_DIS autoload value by OR result of EFUSE.BT_SEC_DIS_0 2 bits, 0: enable, 1: disable
[13:10] R/W 0 RSVD Reserved
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_SEC_FWDL_TIME Recording secure FWDL time, 0: in first time FWDL, 1: in second time FWDL
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_SEC_AUTH_DONE Recording secure authentication done supporting WoWlan scenario, 0: undone, 1: done
[7:5] R/W 0 RSVD Reserved for EFUSE.SEC_CTRL
[4] R/W 1 B_AX_SEC_UART_RX_EN autoload value by OR result of EFUSE.UART_RX_EN 2 bits, 0: disable, 1: enabe
[3] R/W 1 B_AX_SEC_UART_TX_EN autoload value by OR result of EFUSE.UART_TX_EN 2 bits, 0: disable, 1: enabe
[2] R/W 1 B_AX_SEC_JTAG_EN autoload value by OR result of EFUSE.JTAG_EN 2 bits, 0: disable, 1: enabe
[1] R/W 1 B_AX_SEC_SIC_EN autoload value by OR result of EFUSE.SIC_EN 2 bits, 0: disable, 1: enabe
[0] R 0 B_AX_SEC_SEC_DIS autoload value by OR result of EFUSE.SEC_DIS 2 bits, 0: enable, 1: disable
18600C04h R_AX_FILTER_MODEL_ADDR
[31:0] R/W 0x18608000 B_AX_SEC_FILTER_MODEL_ADDR The base address for filter model
18600C30h R_AX_EFUSE_CTRL_S
[31:30] R/W 0x0 B_AX_EF_MODE_SEL_S Efuse controller Mode selection
2’b00 : Read
2’b10 : Write
others : no action
[29] R/W 0x0 B_AX_EF_RDY_S Ready bit
Note : HW set , SW clear
[28:27] R/W 0x0 RSVD RSVD
[26:16] R/W 0x0 B_AX_EF_ADDR_S Access Address
[15:0] R/W 0x0 B_AX_EF_DATA_S Access Data
[7:0] : Read / Write
18600C34h R_AX_EFUSE_TEST_S
[31] R/W 0 B_AX_EF_CRES_SEL_S 1: for debug , 0: for normal
[30] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[29:19] R/W 0x0 B_AX_EF_SCAN_SADR_S Scan start Address (unit in byte)
[18:8] R/W 0x0 B_AX_EF_SCAN_EADR_S EFuse Scan End address
[7] R/W 0x0 B_AX_EF_SCAN_TRPT_S Test Scan Report: 1 : Fail, 0 : OK
[6:0] R/W 0x0 B_AX_EF_SCAN_FTHR_S Threshold number of bit error
若[6:0] = 7’h1,
則scan check的時候若有任何一個cell bit不是1’b1 (default), 就會判定為fail
依此類推, 7’h2, 表示允許有一個cell bit fail….
18601000h R_AX_HAXI_INIT_CFG1
[31:28] R/W 4'b0 B_AX_WD_ITVL_IDLE_V1 PCIE WD-DMA interval of idle mode (TXON is low). 0: no delay. 1: 256. 2: 512. 3: 768. 4: 1024. 5: 1536. 6: 2048. 7: 4096. 8: 8192. 9: 16384. 10~15: rsvd. Unit: ns.
[27:24] R/W 4'b0 B_AX_WD_ITVL_ACT_V1 PCIE WD-DMA interval of active mode (TXON is high). 0: no delay. 1: 256. 2: 512. 3: 768. 4: 1024. 5: 1536. 6: 2048. 7: 4096. 8: 8192. 9: 16384. 10~15: rsvd. Unit: ns.
[23:20] RO 4'b0 RSVD
[19:18] R/W 2'b0 B_AX_DMA_MODE 2'b00 : PCIe + Addrinfo is normal mode
2'b01 : 同2'b00定義
2'b10 : USB mode
2'b11 : SDIO mode
[17] R/W 1'b1 B_AX_STOP_AXI_MST Stop HAXI master
[16] R/W 1'b0 B_AX_HAXI_RST_KEEP_REG Keep register
[15] R/W 1'b0 B_AX_RXHCI_EN_V1 0: Stop RXDMA for all channel.
1: enable RXDMA for all channels.
When value = 0 asserted, RXDMA will stop after finishing to move packet state machine
[14] R/W 1'b0 B_AX_RXBD_MODE_V1 0: PCIE RXDMA use Packet Mode
1: PCIE RXDMA use Separation Mode
[13:10] RO 4'b0 RSVD
[9:8] R/W 2'b01 B_AX_HAXI_MAX_RXDMA rxdma write burst length :
0: 64 bytes; 1: 128 bytes; 2: 256 bytes
others: 128 bytes.
[7] R/W 1'b0 B_AX_TXHCI_EN_V1 0: Stop TXDMA for all channel.
1: enable TXDMA for all channels.
When value = 0 asserted, TXDMA will stop after finishing to move packet state machine, then reset pre-fetch.
[6:5] RO 2'b0 RSVD
[4] RO 1'b0 B_AX_FLUSH_AXI_MST Write 1 to flush read/write data channel and auto clear
[3] W1C 0 B_AX_RST_BDRAM Write 1 to reset BDRAM.
[2] RO 1'b0 RSVD RSVD
[1:0] R/W 2'b10 B_AX_HAXI_MAX_TXDMA txdma write burst length :
0: 64 bytes; 1: 128 bytes; 256 bytes; others : 256 bytes

[3] W1C 0 B_AX_TXDMA_ACH0_INT ACH0 DMA OK HISR
[2] W1C 0 B_AX_RPQDMA_INT RPQ DMA OK HISR
[1] W1C 0 B_AX_RXP1DMA_INT RXQ Part1 DMA OK HISR
[0] W1C 0 B_AX_RXDMA_INT RXQ (Packet mode or Part2) DMA OK HISR
186010B8h R_AX_HAXI_IDCT_MSK
[31:4] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[3] R/W 1 B_AX_ TXBD_LEN0_ERR_IDCT_MSK txbd_zero_lenerr
[2] R/W 1 B_AX_ TXBD_4KBOUND_ERR_IDCT_MSK txbd_4kbound_lenerr
[1] R/W 1 B_AX_RXMDA_STUCK_IDCT_MSK rxdma_stuck
[0] R/W 1 B_AX_TXMDA_STUCK_IDCT_MSK txdma_stuck
186010BCh R_AX_HAXI_IDCT
[31:4] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[3] R/W 1 B_AX_ TXBD_LEN0_ERR_IDCT txbd_zero_lenerr
[2] R/W 1 B_AX_ TXBD_4KBOUND_ERR_IDCT txbd_4kbound_lenerr
[1] R/W 1 B_AX_RXMDA_STUCK_IDCT rxdma_stuck
[0] R/W 1 B_AX_TXMDA_STUCK_IDCT txdma_stuck
18601100h R_AX_HAXI_DBG_CTRL
[31:24] RO 8'b0 RSVD RSVD
[23:16] R/W 8'b0 B_AX_HAXI_DBG_SEL HAXIDMA debug port selection
[15:3] RO 13'b0 RSVD RSVD
[2] R/W 1'b0 B_AX_EN_CHKDSC_NO_RX_STUCK_V1 1: enable pcie rxdma at check descriptor state which can't trigger rx stuck.
0: disable.
[1] R/W 1'b0 B_AX_ASFF_FULL_NO_STK 1: Async FIFO full does NOT trigger PCIe stuck.
[0] R/W 1'b0 B_AX_EN_STUCK_DBG 1: Enable PCIe stuck debug.
18601104h R_AX_DBG_ERR_FLAG_V1
[31:7] RO 25'b0 RSVD RSVD
[6] RO 1'b0 B_AX_HAXI_RPQ_FULL RPQ R/W pointer not enough
[5] RO 1'b0 B_AX_HAXI_RXQ_FULL RXQ R/W pointer not enough
[4] W1C 1'b0 B_AX_RX_STUCK_V1 PCIe RX stuck, write 1 clear
[3] W1C 1'b0 B_AX_TX_STUCK_V1 PCIe TX stuck, write 1 clear
[2] W1C 1'b0 B_AX_HAXI_RXP1_ERR0 Append length > Rx part 1 buffer size, write 1 clear
[1] W1C 1'b0 B_AX_HAXI_TXBD_LEN0 Length of TXBD which NOT cross 4KB boundary is 0, write 1 clear
[0] W1C 1'b0 B_AX_HAXI_TXBD_4KBOUD_LENERR Length of TXBD which cross 4KB boundary is NOT 0, write 1 clear
18601108h R_AX_HAXI_INFO
[31:2] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[1] RO 0 B_AX_HAXIRX_IDLE When PCIE RXDMA finishes on-going operation, PCIE will set idle state to 1.
[0] RO 0 B_AX_HAXITX_IDLE When PCIE TXDMA finishes on-going operation, PCIE will set idle state to 1.
1860110Ch R_AX_HAXI_MST_WDT_TIMEOUT_SEL
[31:2] RO 30'b0 RSVD RSVD
[1:0] W1C 2'b0 B_AX_HAXI_MST_WDT_TIMEOUT_SEL 2'b00 : disable axi master watchdog
2'b01 : 8 mstimeout
2'b10 : 16 mstimeout
2'b11 : 32 ms timeout
18601180h R_AX_INT_MIT_TX_V1
[31] R/W 0 B_AX_TXMIT_CH12_SEL 1: Select CH12 to join TX interrupt mitigation.
0: Ignore CH12 in TX interrupt mitigation statistic.
[30] R/W 0 B_AX_TXMIT_CH11_SEL 1: Select CH11 to join TX interrupt mitigation.
0: Ignore CH11 in TX interrupt mitigation statistic.
[29] R/W 0 B_AX_TXMIT_CH10_SEL 1: Select CH10 to join TX interrupt mitigation.
0: Ignore CH10 in TX interrupt mitigation statistic.
[28] R/W 0 B_AX_TXMIT_CH9_SEL 1: Select CH9 to join TX interrupt mitigation.
0: Ignore CH9 in TX interrupt mitigation statistic.
[27] R/W 0 B_AX_TXMIT_CH8_SEL 1: Select CH8 to join TX interrupt mitigation.
0: Ignore CH8 in TX interrupt mitigation statistic.
[26] R/W 0 B_AX_TXMIT_ACH7_SEL 1: Select ACH7 to join TX interrupt mitigation.
0: Ignore ACH7 in TX interrupt mitigation statistic.
[25] R/W 0 B_AX_TXMIT_ACH6_SEL 1: Select ACH6 to join TX interrupt mitigation.
0: Ignore ACH6 in TX interrupt mitigation statistic.
[24] R/W 0 B_AX_TXMIT_ACH5_SEL 1: Select ACH5 to join TX interrupt mitigation.
0: Ignore ACH5 in TX interrupt mitigation statistic.
[23] R/W 0 B_AX_TXMIT_ACH4_SEL 1: Select ACH4 to join TX interrupt mitigation.
0: Ignore ACH4 in TX interrupt mitigation statistic.
[22] R/W 0 B_AX_TXMIT_ACH3_SEL 1: Select ACH3 to join TX interrupt mitigation.
0: Ignore ACH3 in TX interrupt mitigation statistic.
[21] R/W 0 B_AX_TXMIT_ACH2_SEL 1: Select ACH2 to join TX interrupt mitigation.
0: Ignore ACH2 in TX interrupt mitigation statistic.
[20] R/W 0 B_AX_TXMIT_ACH1_SEL 1: Select ACH1 to join TX interrupt mitigation.
0: Ignore ACH1 in TX interrupt mitigation statistic.
[19] R/W 0 B_AX_TXMIT_ACH0_SEL 1: Select ACH0 to join TX interrupt mitigation.
0: Ignore ACH0 in TX interrupt mitigation statistic.
[18] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[17:16] R/W 0 B_AX_MIT_TXTIMER_UNIT Timer unit for setting Interrupt Migration TX timer.
00: 64 us, 01: 128 us, 10: 256 us, 11: 512 us
Combine with [7:0] to obtain time value of TX timer.
ex : reg. 0x3D0 = 0x00030002, TX timer = 3x256 = 768 us
Note: Timeout variation is +- 1 timer unit
[15:8] R/W 0 B_AX_MIT_TXCOUNTER_MATCH When the buffered TX packet number is matched, the interrupt is then issued.
0x00: disable TX counter
[7:0] R/W 0 B_AX_MIT_TXTIMER_MATCH Multiple value of TX timer unit.
Combine with [17:16] to obtain time value of TX timer.
When the counting time matches or exceeds this setting, the interrupt is then issued.
0x00: disable TX timer
18601184h R_AX_INT_MIT_RX_V1
[31:20] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[19] R/W 0 B_AX_RXMIT_RXP2_SEL_V1 1: Select RX part 2 (RX in packet mode) to join RX interrupt mitigation.
0: Ignore RX part 2 (RX in packet mode) in RX interrupt mitigation statistic.
[18] R/W 0 B_AX_RXMIT_RXP1_SEL_V1 (only valid in separation mode)
1: Select RX part 1 to join RX interrupt mitigation.
0: Ignore RX part 1 in RX interrupt mitigation statistic.
[17:16] R/W 0 B_AX_MIT_RXTIMER_UNIT Timer unit for setting Interrupt Migration RX timer.
00: 64 us, 01: 128 us, 10: 256 us, 11: 512 us
Combine with [7:0] to obtain time value of RX timer.
ex : reg. 0x3D4 = 0x00030002, RX timer = 3x256 = 768 us
Note: Timeout variation is +- 1 timer unit
[15:8] R/W 0 B_AX_MIT_RXCOUNTER_MATCH When the buffered RX packet number is matched, the interrupt is then issued.
0x00: disable RX counter
[7:0] R/W 0 B_AX_MIT_RXTIMER_MATCH Multiple value of RX timer unit.
Combine with [17:16] to obtain time value of RX timer.
When the counting time matches or exceeds this setting, the interrupt is then issued.
0x00: disable RX timer

[12:0] R/W 32'b0 B_AX_REQ_CH_PG request precost page
18601600h R_AX_LTR_DEC_CTRL
[31:17] RO 15'b0 rsvd rsvd
[16] RO 1'b0 B_AX_LTR_IDX_DRV_VLD 1: Drv LTR idx is valid. 0: invalid.
[15:14] RO 2'b0 B_AX_LTR_CURR_IDX_DRV Current Drv LTR idx.
[13] RO 1'b0 B_AX_LTR_IDX_FW_VLD 1: FW LTR idx is valid. 0: invalid.
[12:11] RO 2'b0 B_AX_LTR_CURR_IDX_FW Current FW LTR idx.
[10] RO 1'b0 B_AX_LTR_IDX_HW_VLD 1: HW LTR idx is valid. 0: invalid.
[9:8] RO 2'b0 B_AX_LTR_CURR_IDX_HW Current HW LTR idx.
[7] R/W 1'b0 B_AX_LTR_REQ_DRV Write 1 to request drv LTR idx. Clear to 0 by HW.
[6:5] R/W 2'b0 B_AX_LTR_IDX_DRV LTR idx set by Drv.
[4] R/W 1'b0 B_AX_LTR_DRV_DEC_EN 1: Enable Drv to decide LTR. 0: Disable.
[3] R/W 1'b0 B_AX_LTR_FW_DEC_EN 1: Enable FW to decide LTR. 0: Disable.
[2] R/W 1'b0 B_AX_LTR_HW_DEC_EN 1: Enable HW to decide LTR. 0: Disable.
[1:0] R/W 2'b11 B_AX_LTR_SPACE_IDX_V1 LTR space index. It sets the minimal space between two LTR messages. Recommend set the minimal space to 512us per PCIE Spec. Other value is only for debug purpose.
0: 10 us; 1: 128 us; 2: 256 us; 3: 512us.
18601604h R_AX_LTR_LATENCY_IDX0
[31:0] R/W 32'h880b880b B_AX_LTR_LATENCY_IDX0 LTR latency value for idx 0. Shall be the smallest value in idx 0~3.
18601608h R_AX_LTR_LATENCY_IDX1
[31:0] R/W 32'h0 B_AX_LTR_LATENCY_IDX1 LTR latency value for idx 1. Shall set to larger value than idx 0.
1860160Ch R_AX_LTR_LATENCY_IDX2
[31:0] R/W 32'h0 B_AX_LTR_LATENCY_IDX2 LTR latency value for idx 2. Shall set to larger value than idx 1.
18601610h R_AX_LTR_LATENCY_IDX3
[31:0] R/W 32'h0 B_AX_LTR_LATENCY_IDX3 LTR latency value for idx 3. Shall be the largest value in idx 0~3.
18601614h R_AX_LTR_CURR_LATENCY
[31:0] RO 32'h0 B_AX_LTR_CURR_LATENCY Current LTR latency value.
18601700h R_AX_HCI_FC_CTRL_V1
[31:17] RO 15'b0 RSVD RSVD
[16] R/W 1'b1 B_AX_RTN_PG_DEDICATE_MODE
[15:12] RO 4'b0 RSVD RSVD
[11:10] R/W 2'b0 B_AX_HCI_FC_CH12_FULL_COND HCI FC CH12 full condition (xx times preRSVDcost setting). 0: 1 preRSVDcost. 1: 2 preRSVDcost. 2: 3 preRSVDcost. 3: 4 preRSVDcost.
[9:8] R/W 2'b0 B_AX_HCI_FC_WP_CH811_FULL_COND HCI FC WP full condition of CH 8~11 (xx times preRSVDcost setting). 0: 1 preRSVDcost. 1: 2 preRSVDcost. 2: 3 preRSVDcost. 3: 4 preRSVDcost.
[7:6] R/W 2'b0 B_AX_HCI_FC_WP_CH07_FULL_COND HCI FC WP full condition of CH 0~7 (xx times preRSVDcost setting). 0: 1 preRSVDcost. 1: 2 preRSVDcost. 2: 3 preRSVDcost. 3: 4 preRSVDcost.
[5:4] R/W 2'b0 B_AX_HCI_FC_WD_FULL_COND HCI FC WD full condition (xx times preRSVDcost setting). 0: 1 preRSVDcost. 1: 2 preRSVDcost. 2: 3 preRSVDcost. 3: 4 preRSVDcost.
[3] R/W 1'b0 B_AX_HCI_FC_CH12_EN 1: Enable CH12 flow control; 0: Disable.
[2:1] R/W 2'b0 B_AX_HCI_FC_MODE 2: SDIO mode, only record used page of each channel
1: CH + WP mode
0: CH mode
[0] R/W 1'b0 B_AX_HCI_FC_EN 1: Enable HCI flow control (except for CH12 which is enabled by B_AX_HCI_FC_CH12_EN)
0: Disable and reset HCI flow control

18603008h R_AX_PCIE_PS_CTRL_V1
[31:24] RO 0 B_AX_RSM_FROM_L0S_CNT the timer value of L0s to recovery
[23:9] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_RSM_L0S_EN enable timer for L0s to recovery
[7] R/W 1 B_AX_CMAC_EXIT_L1_EN enbable app_req_entr_l1/app_req_exit_l1 from CMAC(wl_phy_txon_bb)
[6] R/W 0 B_AX_DMAC0_EXIT_L1_EN enbable app_req_entr_l1/app_req_exit_l1 from DMAC1 (wd_quota_empty)
[5] R/W 1 B_AX_L1OFF_PWR_OFF_EN Enable power gating at L1OFF state, default is 0 (not gating)
[4] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[3] R/W 1 B_AX_SEL_XFER_PENDING select of app request pending for l1
1: from hardware control
0: from register
[2] R/W 1 B_AX_SEL_REQ_ENTR_L1 select of app request entrying to l1
1: from hardware control
0: from register
[1] R/W 1 B_AX_PCIE_EN_SWENT_L23 Enable SW call EMAC to enter L23
[0] R/W 1 B_AX_SEL_REQ_EXIT_L1 select of app request exiting to l1
1: from hardware control
0: from register

[31:18] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[17:16] R/W 0 B_AX_ASPM_CTRL 3: L0s and L1 supported
2: L1 supported
1: L0s supported
0: No support ASPM
[15:14] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[13:12] R/W 0 B_AX_HPS_CLKR_PCIE The Registers are used to prevent the deadlock whenever HW or FW turn off ANACLK or SYSCLK, which the HW or FW could not resume by themselves. Currently they are not used in normal control flow. They might be helpful when Driver would like to handle whole Suspend & Resume flow by itself
