18609C18h R_AX_HW_RPT_FWD
[31:18] R 0 RSVD
[17:16] R/W 0x2 B_AX_FWD_TX_PLD_REL_WCPU The packet with RXD.RPKT_TYPE=1 will be transferred to:
0: Don't care.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[15:14] R/W 0x1 B_AX_FWD_DFS_RPT Determine which target the tx DFS report will send to.
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To WLAN CPU.
3: RSVD.
[13:12] R/W 0x1 B_AX_FWD_TX_PLD_REL_HOST Determine which target the tx payload release to host will send to.
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To WLAN CPU.
3: RSVD.
[11:10] R/W 0x2 B_AX_FWD_TX_RPT Determine which target the tx report will send to.
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To WLAN CPU.
3: RSVD.
[9:8] R/W 0x2 B_AX_FWD_SS2FW_RPT Determine which target the SS2FW report will send to.
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To WLAN CPU.
3: RSVD.
[7:6] R/W 0x2 B_AX_FWD_F2P_TX_CMD_RPT Determine which target the F2P TX CMD will send to.
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To WLAN CPU.
3: RSVD.
[5:4] R/W 0x1 B_AX_FWD_BB_SCOPE_MODE Determine which target the BB scope mode will send to.
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To WLAN CPU.
3: RSVD.
[3:2] R/W 0x1 B_AX_FWD_CH_INFO Determine which target the channel info will send to.
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To WLAN CPU.
3: RSVD.
[1:0] R/W 0x1 B_AX_FWD_PPDU_STAT Determine which target the PPDU status will send to.
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To WLAN CPU.
3: RSVD.
18609C1Ch R_AX_PLD_CAM_CTRL
[31:8] RO 0 RSVD
[7] R/W 0 B_AX_PLD_CAM_EN Enable payload CAM. 1: Enable, 0: Disable.
[6:5] RO 0 RSVD
[4] R/W 0 B_AX_PLD_CAM_ACC The select access method of payload CAM.
0: Direct access, 1: Indirect access.
[3:0] R/W 0xF B_AX_PLD_CAM_RANGE Indicate how many entries does HW search, which can be used to decrease HW search time.
18609C20h R_AX_PLD_CAM_ACCESS
[31] R 0 B_AX_PLD_CAM_POLL Write '1' to trigger indirect access and read '0' to check access done.
[30] R/W 0 B_AX_PLD_CAM_RW Indirect access payload CAM. 1: Write, 0: Read.
[29] W1C 0 B_AX_PLD_CAM_CLR Clear all payload CAM contents. Set VALID of all PLD_CAM entries to 0.
Write '1' to trigger clear and read '0' to check clear done
[28:16] RO 0 RSVD
[15:0] R/W 0 B_AX_PLD_CAM_OFFSET Payload CAM offset for indirect access. Unit: 4bytes.
18609C24h R_AX_PLD_CAM_RDATA
[31:0] RO 0xdeadbeef B_AX_PLD_CAM_RDATA Payload CAM read content
18609C28h R_AX_PLD_CAM_WDATA
[31:0] R/W 0 B_PLD_CAM_WDATA Payload CAM write content
18609C2Ch R_AX_RXFWD_SM
[31:0] RO 0 B_AX_RXFWD_SM RX forwarding state machine
18609C30h R_AX_RXCTRL_SM
[31:0] RO 0 B_AX_RXCTRL_SM RX ctrl state machine
18609C38h R_AX_PROFILE_SM
[31:0] RO 0 B_AX_PROFILE_SM profile state machine
18609C3Ch R_AX_PLDM_SM
[31:0] RO 0 B_AX_PLDM_SM PLDM state machine
18609C40h R_AX_CUT_AMSDU_CTRL
[31] R/W 0 B_AX_EN_CUT_AMSDU_V1 Enable AMSDU_CUT
[30] R/W 0 B_AX_CUT_AMSDU_CHKLEN_EN_V1 HW check MSDU length enable
[29] R/W 0 B_AX_CA_CHK_ADDRCAM_EN Cut A-MSDU when rx packet's addrcam hit = 1
[28:24] RO 0 RSVD
[23:16] R/W 0 B_AX_CUT_AMSDU_CHKLEN_L_TH HW check cut MSDU length range. (Low threshold)
[15:0] R/W 0 B_AX_CUT_AMSDU_CHKLEN_H_TH HW check cut MSDU length range. (High threshold)
18609C44h R_AX_CUT_AMSDU_CTRL_2
[31:20] R 0 B_AX_MSDU_DROP_SN sequence number of the AMSDU which trigger R_AX_REG_ERROR_FLAG
[19] W1C 0 B_AX_MSDU_DROP_SN_CLR Write 1 to clear B_AX_MSDU_DROP_SN
[18:17] R/W 0 B_AX_EXTRA_SHIFT leave extra space from previous msdu packet to make payload starting in 4/8 bytes alignment
0: no shift
1: 4 bytes aligned
2: 8 bytes aligned
3: reserve
[16:0] RSVD RSVD RSVD Reserved
18609C48h R_AX_CUT_AMSDU_ERROR_FLAG
[31:3] RO 0 RSVD Reserved
[2] W1C 0 B_AX_AMSDU_2_LEN Indicate last MSDU length of AMSDU or MPDU length is error.
[1] W1C 0 B_AX_AMSDU_2_SMALL Indicate the smallest MSDU in A-MSDU < B_AX_CUT_AMSDU_CHKLEN_L_TH
[0] W1C 0 B_AX_AMSDU_2_LARGE Indicate the largest MSDU in A-MSDU > B_AX_CUT_AMSDU_CHKLEN_H_TH
18609C50h R_AX_WOW_CTRL
[31:6] RO 0 RSVD Reserved
[5] R/W 0 B_AX_WOW_HCI This bit is set to allow wake host as wake on wlan event occurring
[4:3] RO 0 RSVD Reserved
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_WOW_DROP This bit is set to drop packet, when not match wake up pattern/magic packet
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_WOW_WOWEN WoW function on or off
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_WOW_FORCE_WAKEUP Let Wakeup PIN be controllable by FW/Driver.
18609C60h R_AX_HDR_CNV_CTRL
[31:6] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[5:4] R/W 0 B_AX_HDR_INFO 0: Disable add driver info
1: Add BSSID in driver info
2: Add 802.11 header in driver info
[3] R/W 0 B_AX_HC_ADDR_HIT_EN valid when B_AX_RX_HDR_CNV_EN = 1
1: only convert header when rxd.addr_cam_vld = 1
[2] RO 0 RSVD
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_HDR_CNV valid when B_AX_RX_HDR_CNV_EN = 1
0: convert to 802.3
1: convert to ether2
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_RX_HDR_CNV_EN Enable RX header conversion(802.11 -> 802.3/ether2)
18609C64h R_AX_HDR_CNV_VLAN_0_1
[31:16] R/W 0 B_AX_VLAN_TAG_1 Valid when B_AX_VLAN_TAG_EN & DCTRL.VLAN_SEL = 1
[15:0] R/W 0 B_AX_VLAN_TAG_0 Valid when B_AX_VLAN_TAG_EN & DCTRL.VLAN_SEL = 0
18609C68h R_AX_HDR_CNV_VLAN_2_3
[31:16] R/W 0 B_AX_VLAN_TAG_3 Valid when B_AX_VLAN_TAG_EN & DCTRL.VLAN_SEL = 3
[15:0] R/W 0 B_AX_VLAN_TAG_2 Valid when B_AX_VLAN_TAG_EN & DCTRL.VLAN_SEL = 2
18609CE0h R_AX_RX_MPDU_PROC_VER
[31:0] RO 0x20201008 B_AX_RX_MPDU_PROC_VER
18609CE4h R_AX_RX_MPDU_PROC_DBG
[31:30] RO 0 B_AX_CAMCTRL_DBG
[29:26] RO 0 B_AX_MGPT_DBG
[25:21] RO 0 B_AX_WOWLAN_DBG
[20:16] RO 0 B_AX_PLDM_DBG
[15:12] RO 0 B_AX_RXFWD_DBG
[11:8] RO 0 B_AX_CUT_AMSDU_DBG
[7:5] RO 0 B_AX_PROFILE_DBG
[4:0] RO 0 B_AX_RXCTRL_DBG
18609CE8h R_AX_MPDU_RX_PKTCNT
[31:16] R 0x00 B_AX_RX_PKTOUT_CNT Count value for packet forward from mpdu rx processor
[15:0] R 0x00 B_AX_RX_PKTIN_CNT Count value for packet forward to mpdu rx processor
18609CECh R_AX_MPDU_DROP_PKTCNT
[31:16] RO 0 RSVD
[15:0] RO 0x00 B_AX_DROP_PKTCNT Count value for drop by mpdu rx processor
18609CF0h R_AX_MPDU_RX_ERR_ISR
[31:3] RO 0 RSVD Reserved
[2] W1C 0 B_AX_FWDRSVD_ERR_ISR RXD.IDC[2] = 1 which indicted packet would forward to Data CPU
[1] RO 0 RSVD
[0] W1C 0 B_AX_GETPKTID_ERR_ISR Get a null buffer ID during the buffer operations
18609CF4h R_AX_MPDU_RX_ERR_IMR
[31:4] R/W RSVD RSVD Reserved
[3] R/W 1 B_AX_RPT_ERR_INT_EN Receive Report Packet error event interrupt enable
[2] R/W 1 B_AX_FWDRSVD_ERR_INT_EN RXD.IDC[2] = 1 which indicted packet would forward to Data CPU error event interrupt enable
[1] R/W 1 B_AX_MHDRLEN_ERR_INT_EN Receive Packet with Zero header length error event interrupt enable
[0] R/W 1 B_AX_GETPKTID_ERR_INT_EN Get a null buffer ID during the buffer operations error event interrupt enable
18609CF8h R_AX_MPDU_RX_DBG
[31:25] RO 0 RSVD Reserved
[24] R/W 0 B_AX_CAM_RST_CTRL
[23:17] RO 0 RSVD Reserved
[16] R/W 0 B_AX_MPDU_RX_CKEN_DIS Disable HW dynamic clock gating
[15:9] RO 0 RSVD
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_MPDU_RX_DBG_EN Enable MPDU RX Processor output debug signals
[7:1] RO 0 RSVD
[0] R/W 1 B_AX_MPDU_RX_D_LAST_EN Enable d_last function in DLE Data interface
18609D00h R_AX_SEC_ENG_CTRL
[31] R/W 1 B_AX_SEC_ENG_EN Enable MAC security engine. 1: Enable, 0: Disable.
[30] R/W 0 B_AX_CCMP_SPP_MIC 1: use QC[7] to compute CCMP's MIC, 0: not use QC[7] to compute CCMP's MIC.
[29] R/W 0 B_AX_CCMP_SPP_CTR 1: use QC[7] to compute CCMP's CTR, 0: not use QC[7] to compute CCMP's CTR.
[28] R/W 0 B_AX_SEC_CAM_ACC Select access method of security CAM.
0: Direct access, 1: Indirect access.
[27:16] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[15] R/W 0 B_AX_SEC_CAM_CLK Security cam clock always open (For dynamic clock gating)
[14] R/W 0 B_AX_SEC_ENG_CLK Sec engine clock always open (for dynamic clock gating)
[13] R/W 0 B_AX_RX_ICV_ERR Rx check pkt length abnormal , aseert icv error
[12] R/W 1 RSVD RSVD
[11] R/W 1 B_AX_TX_PARTIAL_MODE Tx partial mode enable
[10] R/W 0 B_AX_CLK_EN_CGCMP Enable CCMP and GCMP engine clock. 1: Enable, 0: Disable.
Note: CCMP128, CCMP256, GCMP128, GCMP256 and BIP need to enable it.
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_CLK_EN_WAPI Enable WAPI engine clock. 1: Enable, 0: Disable.
Note: WAPI need to enable it.
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_CLK_EN_WEP_TKIP Enable WEP and TKIP engine clock. 1: Enable, 0: Disable.
Note: WEP and TKIP need to enable it.
[7:6] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[5] R/W 1 B_AX_BMC_MGNT_DEC Determine whethere management packet with broadcast or multicast
will be decrypted or not.
1: Decrypt, 0: Not decrypt.
[4] R/W 1 B_AX_UC_MGNT_DEC Determine whethere management packet with unicast
will be decrypted or not.
1: Decrypt, 0: Not decrypt.
[3] R/W 1 B_AX_MC_DEC Determine whethere multicast will be decrypted or not.
1: Decrypt, 0: Not decrypt.
[2] R/W 1 B_AX_BC_DEC Determine whethere broadcast will be decrypted or not.
1: Decrypt, 0: Not decrypt.
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_SEC_RX_DEC Enable RX decryption function. 1: Enable, 0: Disable
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_SEC_TX_ENC Enable TX encryption function. 1: Enable, 0: Disable
18609D04h R_AX_SEC_MPDU_PROC
[31:2] R/W 0 RSVD
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_APPEND_ICV Append ICV. 1: Append, 0: Not append.
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_APPEND_MIC Append MIC. 1: Append, 0: Not append.
18609D10h R_AX_SEC_CAM_ACCESS
[31:16] R/W 0 RSVD
[15] $R 0 B_AX_SEC_CAM_POLL Write '1' to trigger indirect access and read '0' to check access done.
Note: Only valid when B_AX_SEC_CAM_ACCESS = 1.
[14] R/W 0 B_AX_SEC_CAM_RW Indirect access security CAM. 1: Write, 0: Read.
[13] $R 0 B_AX_SEC_CAM_ACC_FAIL Cannot access security CAM.
[12:10] R 0 RSVD
[9:0] R/W 0 B_AX_SEC_CAM_OFFSET Security CAM offset for indirect access. Unit: 4bytes.
18609D14h R_AX_SEC_CAM_RDATA
[31:0] $RO 0 B_AX_SEC_CAM_RDATA Security CAM read content
18609D18h R_AX_SEC_CAM_WDATA
[31:0] R/W 0 B_AX_SEC_CAM_WDATA Security CAM write content
18609D1Ch R_AX_SEC_DEBUG1
[31:30] RW 0 B_AX_TX_TIMEOUT_SEL TX time out select
[29:28] RW 0 B_AX_RX_TIMEOUT_SEL RX time out select
[27:16] RO 12'hfff B_AX_TX_LAST_PKTID Tx last pkt id
[15:4] RO 12'hfff B_AX_RX_LAST_PKTID Rx last pkt id
[3:0] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
18609D20h R_AX_SEC_TX_DEBUG
[31:23] RO 9'b1 B_AX_TX_READ_PARSER_FSM For DD debug. If TX not hang , it supposed to be 1
[22:15] RO 8'b1 B_AX_TX_WRITE_PARSER_FSM For DD debug. If TX not hang , it supposed to be 1
[14] RO 0 RSVD
[13:6] RO 0 RSVD
[5:2] RO 0 B_AX_TX_SEC_TYPE TX encrypted type
[1] RO 0 B_AX_TX_EXKEY_ERROR TX extend key error
[0] RO 0 B_AX_TX_ENCRYPT Indicate trigger TX encryption module
18609D24h R_AX_SEC_RX_DEBUG
[31:25] RO 7'b1 B_AX_RX_READ_PARSER_FSM
[24:17] RO 8'b1 B_AX_RX_WRITE_PARSER_FSM
[16] RO 0 RSVD
[15] RO 0 RSVD
[14:11] RO 0 B_AX_RX_SEC_TYPE RX descrypt type
[10] RO 0 B_AX_RX_MIC_ERROR RX MIC error
[9] RO 0 B_AX_RX_ICV_ERROR RX ICV error
[8] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[7:1] RO 0 B_AX_RX_EXKEY_INDEX RX extend key index
[0] RO 0 B_AX_RX_ENCRYPT Indicate trigger RX module
18609D28h R_AX_SEC_DEBUG2
[31:2] RO 0 B_AX_DBG_READ debug port read out
18609D2Ch R_AX_SEC_ERROR_FLAG_IMR
[31:2] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[1] R/W 1 B_AX_RX_HANG_IMR RX error flag
[0] R/W 1 B_AX_TX_HANG_IMR TX error flag
18609D30h R_AX_SEC_ERROR_FLAG
[31:2] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[1] W1C 0 B_AX_RX_HANG_ERROR_v1 RX error flag
[0] W1C 0 B_AX_TX_HANG_ERROR_v1 TX error flag
18609E00h R_AX_SS_DBG_0
[31] RO 1'b0 RSVD
[30:24] RO 7'd1 B_AX_SS_PARAM_STAT
[23:22] RO 2'b0 RSVD
[21:16] RO 6'd1 B_AX_SS_PC_STAT
[15:14] RO 2'b0 RSVD
[13:8] RO 6'd1 B_AX_SS_SA_STAT
[7] RO 1'b1 B_AX_SS_SS_INIT_DONE_0 Set B_AX_SS_EN = 1, then polling this bit to 1
Is the same as 0x10[31]
[6:0] RO 7'd1 B_AX_SS_LM_STAT
18609E04h R_AX_SS_DBG_1
[31:30] RO 2'b0 RSVD
[29:28] RO 2'b1 B_AX_SS_DEL_STAT
[27:26] RO 2'b0 RSVD
[25:24] RO 2'b1 B_AX_SS_ADD_STAT
[23:20] RO 4'b0 RSVD
[19:16] RO 4'd1 B_AX_SS_ULRU_STAT
[15:13] RO 3'b0 RSVD
[12:8] RO 5'd1 B_AX_SS_DLTX_STAT
[7] RO 1'b0 RSVD
[6:0] RO 7'd1 B_AX_SS_LEN_STAT
18609E08h R_AX_SS_DBG_2
[31:29] RO 3'h0 RSVD
[28:24] RO 5'h1 B_AX_SS_PLEA_STAT_V1
[23:21] RO 4'h0 RSVD
[20:16] RO 5'h1 B_AX_SS_WDEA_STAT_V1
[15:14] RO 2'h0 RSVD
[13:8] RO 6'h1 B_AX_SS_RPTA_STAT
[7:5] RO 3'h0 RSVD
[4:0] RO 5'h1 B_AX_SS_FWTX_STAT
18609E0Ch R_AX_SS_DBG_3
[31] RW 1'b0 B_AX_SS_CLK_GATE_DIS
[30] RW 1'b0 B_AX_PRE_CHK_FORCE_VLD 1:bypass precheck function for debug
[29:27] RO 3'h0 RSVD
[26] W1C 1'b0 B_AX_SS_HW_ADD_LEN_OVF
[25] W1C 1'b0 B_AX_SS_SW_DECR_LEN_UDN
[24] W1C 1'b0 B_AX_SS_HW_DECR_LEN_UDN
[23:19] RO 5'h0 RSVD
[18] W1C 1'b0 B_AX_SS_ATM_ERR
[17] W1C 1'b0 B_AX_SS_DEL_STA_ERR
[16] W1C 1'b0 B_AX_SS_ADD_STA_ERR
[15:11] RW 5'h0 B_AX_SS_top_dbg_sel_V1
[10] $RO 1'b1 B_AX_SS_LEN_INIT_DONE
[9] $RO 1'b1 B_AX_SS_PARAM_INIT_DONE
[8] $RO 1'b1 B_AX_SS_LINK_INIT_DONE
[7] $RO 1'b1 B_AX_SS_avg_init_done
[6] $RO 1'b1 B_AX_SS_MRT_INIT_DONE
[5:4] RW 2'b0 B_AX_SS_mod_dbg_sel
[3:0] RO 4'b0 RSVD
18609E10h R_AX_SS_CTRL
[31] RO 0x0 B_AX_SS_INIT_DONE_1 Set B_AX_SS_EN = 1, then polling this bit to 1
Is the same as 0x00[7]
[30] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_HW_STA_DIS 1: disable HW auto add STA to list (STA can only be added by reigster)
[29] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_WARM_INIT_FLG If 1, B_AX_SS_EN trigger warm init, only reset state machine and link
If 0, B_AX_SS_EN trigger cold init
[28] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_NONEMPTY_SS2FINFO_EN 1: enable STA link empty to non-empty SS2F_INFO
0: disable (CMAC HW Tx mode should set 0)
[27] R/W 0 B_AX_SS_RMAC_LENG_MEMORY_DIS
[26] RO 0 RSVD
[25:24] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_DELAY_TX_BAND_SEL When it change, reset counter(seat) of delay Tx
0: disable delay tx
1: band 0 四組 counter
2: band 1 四組 counter
3: band 0 二組 counter + band 1 二組 counter
[23:22] R/W 0x3 B_AX_SS_WMM_SEL_3 select WD.QSEL[3:2] = 3 mapping to which WMM
[21:20] R/W 0x2 B_AX_SS_WMM_SEL_2 select WD.QSEL[3:2] = 2 mapping to which WMM
[19:18] R/W 0x1 B_AX_SS_WMM_SEL_1 select WD.QSEL[3:2] = 1 mapping to which WMM
[17:16] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_WMM_SEL_0 select WD.QSEL[3:2] = 0 mapping to which WMM
[15:3] RO 0 RSVD
[2] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_HW_LEN_EN 1 -> 0, trigger length/bitmap/DL RU SRAM init fro partial reset
[1] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_HW_PARAM_EN 1 -> 0 trigger airtime SRAM init, for partial reset
[0] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_EN 1: enable STA scheduler (0->1, initialize SRAM and STA link)
Note: including airtime SRAM and trigger length/bitmap/DL RU SRAM
18609E14h R_AX_SS_DL_quota_CTRL
[31] R/W 0x1 B_AX_SS_quota_MODE_3 mode selection of WMM3
1: tx count mode
0: airtime mode
[30] R/W 0x1 B_AX_SS_quota_MODE_2 mode selection of WMM2
1: tx count mode
0: airtime mode
[29] R/W 0x1 B_AX_SS_quota_MODE_1 mode selection of WMM1
1: tx count mode
0: airtime mode
[28] R/W 0x1 B_AX_SS_quota_MODE_0 mode selection of WMM0
1: tx count mode
0: airtime mode
[27:16] RO 0 RSVD
[15:8] R/W 0x8 B_AX_SS_DL_quota_lower_limit lower limit of DL quota, sign: negative
[7:4] RO 0 RSVD
[3:0] R/W 0x1 B_AX_SS_DL_quota_init HW set DL airtime to this value when reset (B_AX_SS_EN), mode selection follow WMM0 (B_AX_SS_MODE_0)
tx count mode: 0~15 mapping to 0~15
airtime mode (us):
0: 0
1: 32
2: 64
3: 96
4: 160
5: 224
6: 352
7: 480
8: 736
9: 992
10: 1504
11: 2016
12: 3040
13: 4064
14: 6112
15: 8160
18609E18h R_AX_SS_UL_quota_CTRL
[31] R/W 0x1 B_AX_SS_quota_MODE_UL mode selection of UL path
1: tx count mode
0: airtime mode
[30:16] RO 0 RSVD
[15:8] R/W 0x8 B_AX_SS_UL_quota_lower_limit lower limit of UL quota, sign: negative
[7:4] RO 0 RSVD
[3:0] R/W 0x1 B_AX_SS_UL_quota_init HW set DL airtime to this value when reset (B_AX_SS_EN), mode selection follow WMM0 (B_AX_SS_MODE_0)
tx count mode: 0~15 mapping to 0~15
airtime mode (us):
0: 0
1: 32
2: 64
3: 96
4: 160
5: 224
6: 352
7: 480
8: 736
9: 992
10: 1504
11: 2016
12: 3040
13: 4064
14: 6112
15: 8160
18609E1Ch R_AX_SS_BSR_CTRL
[31:30] RO 0 RSVD
[29:16] R/W 0xB B_AX_SS_BSR_THR_1 2nd reference register of BSR threshold of UL search, only BSR ≧ threshold can be reported to SS2F_INFO
Per MACID select (by SS_SRAM.BSR_THR_SEL) the reference register
unit: 256 Bytes
[15:14] RO 0 RSVD
[13:0] R/W 0xB B_AX_SS_BSR_THR_0 1st reference register of BSR threshold of UL search, only BSR ≧ threshold can be reported to SS2F_INFO
Per MACID select (by SS_SRAM.BSR_THR_SEL) the reference register
unit: 256 Bytes
18609E20h R_AX_SS_DL_RPT_CRTL
[31] RO 0 RSVD
[30] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_TXOP_MODE_3 1: support changing MACID in a TXOP (only use with CMAC HW Tx mode), for WMM3
[29:27] RO 0 RSVD
[26:24] RO 0 RSVD
[23] RO 0 RSVD
[22] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_TXOP_MODE_2 1: support changing MACID in a TXOP (only use with CMAC HW Tx mode), for WMM2
[21:19] RO 0 RSVD
[18:16] RO 0 RSVD
[15] RO 0 RSVD
[14] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_TXOP_MODE_1 1: support changing MACID in a TXOP (only use with CMAC HW Tx mode), for WMM1
[13:11] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_TWT_MAX_SU_NUM_1 1: maximum SU STA number (excluding primary), for TWT event, for WMM1
[10:8] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_MAX_SU_NUM_1 1: maximum SU STA number (excluding primary), for non-TWT event, for WMM1
[7] RO 0 RSVD
[6] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_TXOP_MODE_0 1: support changing MACID in a TXOP (only use with CMAC HW Tx mode), for WMM0
[5:3] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_TWT_MAX_SU_NUM_0 1: maximum SU STA number (excluding primary), for TWT event, for WMM0
[2:0] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_MAX_SU_NUM_0 1: maximum SU STA number (excluding primary), for non-TWT event, for WMM0
18609E24h R_AX_SS_UL_RPT_CRTL
[31:18] RO 0 RSVD
[17:16] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_MAX_RU_NUM_UL maximum UL RU STA number (excluding primary), for both TWT and non-TWT event
[15:10] RO 0 RSVD
[9:8] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_UL_WMM in UL SS2F_INFO, WMM_AC_valid field is refer to which WMM
0: WMM0
1: WMM1
2: WMM2
3: WMM3
[7:6] RO 0 RSVD
[5:3] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_TWT_MAX_SU_NUM_UL 1: maximum SU STA number (excluding primary), for TWT event, for UL
[2:0] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_MAX_SU_NUM_UL 1: maximum SU STA number (excluding primary), for non-TWT event, for UL
18609E28h R_AX_SS_SEARCH_TO
[31:24] RO 0 RSVD
[23:16] R/W 0 B_AX_SS_REPORT_HANG_TO
[15:8] R/W 0 B_AX_SS_SEARCH_HANG_TO
[7:0] R/W 0 B_AX_SS_SEARCH_LIMIT_TO MU/RU search timeout threshold
Timer start from the beginning of SU search
unit: 1 us
18609E2Ch R_AX_SS_SEARCH_LVL
[31:24] RO 0 RSVD
[23:16] R/W 0x10 B_AX_SS_NEG_CNT
[15:8] RO 0 RSVD
[7:0] R/W 0x20 B_AX_SS_NEG_LVL negative value
if quota of all STA are negative, select the STA with quota unsigned value smaller than B_AX_SS_NEG_LVL
18609E30h R_AX_SS_SRAM_DATA
[31:0] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_SRAM_DATA put read/write data in this register
18609E34h R_AX_SS_SRAM_W_EN
[31:0] R/W 0x00 B_AX_SS_SRAM_W_EN 1: SRAM value can be changed
18609E38h R_AX_SS_SRAM_CTRL_0
[31] $R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_OWN trigger: write 1 to trigger HW
HW done: polling to 0
[30:29] RO 0 RSVD
[28] R/W 0x0 DUMMY
[27:26] RO 0x0 RSVD
[25:24] R/W 0 DUMMY
[23] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_RW 0: read
1: write
[22:20] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_CMD target SRAM block
0: bitmap SRAM
1: length SRAM
2: DL RU SRAM
[19:10] RO 0 RSVD
[9:8] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_OFFSET if B_AX_SS_CMD = 0
0: MACID 0~31
1: MACID 32~63
2: MACID 64~95
3: MACID 96~127

if B_AX_SS_CMD = 1 or 2
32 bit offset, 0 for bit 0~31, 1 for bit 32~63, 2 for bit 64~95, 3 for bit 96~127
[7] RO 0x0 RSVD
[6:0] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_PARAM_SEL if B_AX_SS_CMD = 0
0: macid_pause
1: p2p_group_0
2: p2p_group_1
3: delay_Tx_en
4: WMM0 STA bitmap
5: WMM1 STA bitmap
6: WMM2 STA bitmap
7: WMM3 STA bitmap
8: twt_group_0
9: twt_group_1
10: twt_group_2
11: twt_group_3
12: ul_sta_bitmap
13: BSR_≧_thr
14: RMAC UL bitmap
15: BSR threshold sel

if B_AX_SS_CMD = 1
MACID, 0=MACID0, 1=MACID1, ......

if B_AX_SS_CMD = 2
DL RU group, 0 = group0, 1 = group1, ...
18609E3Ch R_AX_SS_LINK_INFO
[31] $R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_OWN trigger: write 1 to trigger HW
HW done: polling to 0
[30:29] RO 0x0 B_AX_SS_STATUS 0: success
1:
2:
3:
[28] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_UL 1: UL link
0: WMM link
[27:26] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_WMM 0/1/2/3: WMM0/1/2/3, for WMM link
[25:24] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_AC 0/1/2/3: BE/BK/VI/VO, for WMM link
[23:16] RO 0xFF B_AX_SS_LINK_LEN number of MACID in this link
[15:8] RO 0xFF B_AX_SS_LINK_TAIL tail MACID of this link
[7:0] RO 0xFF B_AX_SS_LINK_HEAD head MACID of this link
18609E40h R_AX_SS_LINK_ADD
[31] $R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_OWN trigger: write 1 to trigger HW
HW done: polling to 0
[30:29] RO 0x0 B_AX_SS_STATUS 0: success
1:
2:
3:
[28] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_UL 1: UL link
0: WMM link
[27:26] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_WMM 0/1/2/3: WMM0/1/2/3, for WMM link
[25:24] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_AC 0/1/2/3: BE/BK/VI/VO, for WMM link
[23:16] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_MACID_2 the 3rd MACID to add
if do not need it, this field should be 0xFF
[15:8] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_MACID_1 the 2nd MACID to add
if do not need it, this field should be 0xFF
[7:0] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_MACID_0 the 1st MACID to add
18609E44h R_AX_SS_LINK_DEL
[31] $R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_OWN trigger: write 1 to trigger HW
HW done: polling to 0
[30:29] RO 0x0 B_AX_SS_STATUS 0: success
1:
2:
3:
[28] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_UL 1: UL link
0: WMM link
[27:26] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_WMM 0/1/2/3: WMM0/1/2/3, for WMM link
[25:24] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_AC 0/1/2/3: BE/BK/VI/VO, for WMM link
[23:16] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_MACID_2 the 3rd MACID to delete
if do not need it, this field should be 0xFF
[15:8] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_MACID_1 the 2nd MACID to delete
if do not need it, this field should be 0xFF
[7:0] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_MACID_0 the 1st MACID to delete
18609E48h R_AX_SS_LINK_SEARCH
[31] $R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_OWN trigger: write 1 to trigger HW
HW done: polling to 0
[30:29] RO 0x0 B_AX_SS_STATUS 0: success
1:
2:
3:
[28] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_UL 1: UL link
0: WMM link
[27:26] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_WMM 0/1/2/3: WMM0/1/2/3, for WMM link
[25:24] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_AC 0/1/2/3: BE/BK/VI/VO, for WMM link
[23:20] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_TWT_GROUP per bit mapping to a TWT group
1: in group
[19:18] RO 0 RSVD
[17:16] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_MODE_SEL definition is the same as F2P_CMD.SS_SEL_MODE
[15:8] RO 0 RSVD
[7:0] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_MACID_0 the MACID to be primary STA
if 0xFF: FW do not assign MACID, HW auto search
18609E4Ch R_AX_SS_SRAM_CTRL_1
[31] $R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_OWN trigger: write 1 to trigger HW
HW done: polling to 0
[30:26] $R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_CMD_SEL [30:26]: cmd_sel / status
0: read setting_quota, [11:8]
1: write setting_quota, [11:8]
2: read quota, [16:8]
3: write quota, [16:8]
4: decrease quota, [15:8]
5: read Tx length, [28:8]
6: add Tx length, [23:8]
7: decrease Tx length, [23:8], if 0xFFFF => set to 0
8: read DL MU/RU disable, [9]: RU, [8]: MU
9: write DL RU/MU disable, [9]: RU, [8]: MU
10: read UL gid_vld_tab, [22:8]
11: write UL gid_vld_tab, [22:8]
12: read BSR length, [22:8]
13: write BSR length, [22:8]
20: read next link, [15:8]
21: write next link, [15:8]
22: read pre link, [15:8]
23: write pre link, [15:8]
[25:24] $R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_AC if B_AX_SS_CMD_SEL = 13:
HW update this field to AC_TYPE of BSR
else if B_AX_SS_CMD_SEL = 12:
HW update AC_TYPE of BSR to this field
else:
0/1/2/3: BE/BK/VI/VO
[23:8] $R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_VALUE *when trigger:
if B_AX_SS_CMD_SEL = 0~4 or 20~23:
[23] = 1: UL path (only for quota and link)
[23] = 0: AC path (for quota, link and Tx length)
else:
value to write/add/decrease

*when HW done:
read value for read CMD
[7] RO 0x0 RSVD MACID RSVD
[6:0] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_MACID MACID
18609E50h R_AX_SS2FINFO_PATH
[31] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_UL_REL for UL
if this bit = 1 and SS2F_INFO.RU_STA_NUM = 0, SS2F_INFO will be send to release port
[30] RO 0 RSVD
[29:24] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_REL_QUEUE release queue of SS2F_INFO in PLE, default = 0x0 (no report)
[23:19] RO 0 RSVD
[18:16] R/W 0x7 B_AX_SS_REL_PORT release of SS2F_INFO in PLE, default = 0x7 (PLRLS)
[15:14] RO 0 RSVD
[13:8] R/W 0x9 B_AX_SS_DEST_QUEUE 1st destination queue of SS2F_INFO in PLE, default = 0x0A (Wlan_CPU1)
[7:3] RO 0 RSVD
[2:0] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SS_DEST_PORT 1st destination port of SS2F_INFO in PLE, default = 0x00 (Dispatcher)
18609E54h R_AX_WMM_LINK_EMPTY
[31:17] RO 0 RSVD
[16] $R/W 0x1 B_AX_UL_link_empty UL empty
[15] $R/W 0x1 B_AX_WMM3_VO_link_empty WMM link 15 length empty
[14] $R/W 0x1 B_AX_WMM3_VI_link_empty WMM link 14 length empty
[13] $R/W 0x1 B_AX_WMM3_BK_link_empty WMM link 13 length empty
[12] $R/W 0x1 B_AX_WMM3_BE_link_empty WMM link 12 length empty
[11] $R/W 0x1 B_AX_WMM2_VO_link_empty WMM link 11 length empty
[10] $R/W 0x1 B_AX_WMM2_VI_link_empty WMM link 10 length empty
[9] $R/W 0x1 B_AX_WMM2_BK_link_empty WMM link 9 length empty
[8] $R/W 0x1 B_AX_WMM2_BE_link_empty WMM link 8 length empty
[7] $R/W 0x1 B_AX_WMM1_VO_link_empty WMM link 7 length empty
[6] $R/W 0x1 B_AX_WMM1_VI_link_empty WMM link 6 length empty
[5] $R/W 0x1 B_AX_WMM1_BK_link_empty WMM link 5 length empty
[4] $R/W 0x1 B_AX_WMM1_BE_link_empty WMM link 4 length empty
[3] $R/W 0x1 B_AX_WMM0_VO_link_empty WMM link 3 length empty
[2] $R/W 0x1 B_AX_WMM0_VI_link_empty WMM link 2 length empty
[1] $R/W 0x1 B_AX_WMM0_BK_link_empty WMM link 1 length empty
[0] $R/W 0x1 B_AX_WMM0_BE_link_empty WMM link 0 length empty
18609E58h R_AX_SS_LINK_SRCH_STAT
[31:25] RO 0 RSVD
[24] RW 0 B_AX_SS_SRCH_UD_VAL_UL UL search status update value, 0: search fail, 1: search OK
[23] RW 0 B_AX_SS_SRCH_UD_VAL_WMM1_VO WMM1 VO search status update value, 0: search fail, 1: search OK
[22] RW 0 B_AX_SS_SRCH_UD_VAL_WMM1_VI WMM1 VI search status update value, 0: search fail, 1: search OK
[21] RW 0 B_AX_SS_SRCH_UD_VAL_WMM1_BK WMM1 BK search status update value, 0: search fail, 1: search OK
[20] RW 0 B_AX_SS_SRCH_UD_VAL_WMM1_BE WMM1 BE search status update value, 0: search fail, 1: search OK
[19] RW 0 B_AX_SS_SRCH_UD_VAL_WMM0_VO WMM0 VO search status update value, 0: search fail, 1: search OK
[18] RW 0 B_AX_SS_SRCH_UD_VAL_WMM0_VI WMM0 VI search status update value, 0: search fail, 1: search OK
[17] RW 0 B_AX_SS_SRCH_UD_VAL_WMM0_BK WMM0 BK search status update value, 0: search fail, 1: search OK
[16] RW 0 B_AX_SS_SRCH_UD_VAL_WMM0_BE WMM0 BE search status update value, 0: search fail, 1: search OK
[15:9] RO 0 RSVD
[8] RO 0 B_AX_SS_SRCH_STAT_UL UL search status , 0: search fail, 1: search OK
[7] RO 0 B_AX_SS_SRCH_STAT_WMM1_VO WMM1 VO search status , 0: search fail, 1: search OK
[6] RO 0 B_AX_SS_SRCH_STAT_WMM1_VI WMM1 VI search status , 0: search fail, 1: search OK
[5] RO 0 B_AX_SS_SRCH_STAT_WMM1_BK WMM1 BK search status , 0: search fail, 1: search OK
[4] RO 0 B_AX_SS_SRCH_STAT_WMM1_BE WMM1 BE search status , 0: search fail, 1: search OK
[3] RO 0 B_AX_SS_SRCH_STAT_WMM0_VO WMM0 VO search status , 0: search fail, 1: search OK
[2] RO 0 B_AX_SS_SRCH_STAT_WMM0_VI WMM0 VI search status , 0: search fail, 1: search OK
[1] RO 0 B_AX_SS_SRCH_STAT_WMM0_BK WMM0 BK search status , 0: search fail, 1: search OK
[0] RO 0 B_AX_SS_SRCH_STAT_WMM0_BE WMM0 BE search status , 0: search fail, 1: search OK
18609E5Ch R_AX_SSLINK_SRCH_UD
[31:25] RO 0 RSVD
[24] RW 0 B_AX_SS_SRCH_UD_UL UL search status update trigger, 0: search fail, 1: search OK
[23] RW 0 B_AX_SS_SRCH_UD_WMM1_VO WMM1 VO search status update trigger, 1: SW update search statis bu write this register to 1
[22] RW 0 B_AX_SS_SRCH_UD_WMM1_VI WMM1 VI search status update trigger, 1: SW update search statis bu write this register to 1
[21] RW 0 B_AX_SS_SRCH_UD_WMM1_BK WMM1 BK search status update trigger, 1: SW update search statis bu write this register to 1
[20] RW 0 B_AX_SS_SRCH_UD_WMM1_BE WMM1 BE search status update trigger, 1: SW update search statis bu write this register to 1
[19] RW 0 B_AX_SS_SRCH_UD_WMM0_VO WMM0 VO search status update trigger, 1: SW update search statis bu write this register to 1
[18] RW 0 B_AX_SS_SRCH_UD_WMM0_VI WMM0 VI search status update trigger, 1: SW update search statis bu write this register to 1
[17] RW 0 B_AX_SS_SRCH_UD_WMM0_BK WMM0 BK search status update trigger, 1: SW update search statis bu write this register to 1
[16] RW 0 B_AX_SS_SRCH_UD_WMM0_BE WMM0 BE search status update trigger, 1: SW update search statis bu write this register to 1
[15:0] RO 0 RSVD
18609E60h R_AX_SS_DELAYTX_TO
[31:24] R/W 0x8 B_AX_SS_BEBK_TO_1 Delay Tx timeout for BE and BK of band1
Unit: 32 us (max delay ~ 8ms)
[23:16] R/W 0x8 B_AX_SS_VOVI_TO_1 Delay Tx timeout for VO and VI of band1
Unit: 32 us (max delay ~ 8ms)
[15:8] R/W 0x8 B_AX_SS_BEBK_TO_0 Delay Tx timeout for BE and BK of band0
Unit: 32 us (max delay ~ 8ms)
[7:0] R/W 0x8 B_AX_SS_VOVI_TO_0 Delay Tx timeout for VO and VI of band0
Unit: 32 us (max delay ~ 8ms)
18609E70h R_AX_SS_DELAYTX_LEN_THR
[31:24] R/W 0x10 B_AX_SS_BEBK_LEN_THR_1 Delay Tx length threshold for BE and BK of band1
Unit: 256 bytes (follow SS_SRAM.TxLength)
[23:16] R/W 0x10 B_AX_SS_VOVI_LEN_THR_1 Delay Tx length threshold for VO and VI of band1
Unit: 256 bytes (follow SS_SRAM.TxLength)
[15:8] R/W 0x10 B_AX_SS_BEBK_LEN_THR_0 Delay Tx length threshold for BE and BK of band0
Unit: 256 bytes (follow SS_SRAM.TxLength)
[7:0] R/W 0x10 B_AX_SS_VOVI_LEN_THR_0 Delay Tx length threshold for VO and VI of band0
Unit: 256 bytes (follow SS_SRAM.TxLength)
18609E78h R_AX_SS_MURU_TBL_CTRL
[31] $RW 0 B_AX_SS_OWN trigger: write 1 to trigger HW
HW done polling to 0
[30:24] RW 0 B_AX_SS_TBL_CMD 0: read common field
1: write common field
2: read per STA field
3: write per STA field
[23:20] R 0 RSVD
[19:16] RW 0 B_AX_SS_STA_IDX valid if B_AX_SS_TBL_CMD = 2 or 3
0:7: STA 0~7
others: rsvd
[15:8] R 0 RSVD
[7:0] RW 0 B_AX_SS_TBL_IDX table index for table 0~255
18609E7Ch R_AX_SS_MURU_TBL_DATA
[31] $RW 0 B_AX_SS_OWN follow R_AX_SS_MURU_TBL_CTRL if HW done
[30:24] RW 0 B_AX_SS_TBL_CMD follow R_AX_SS_MURU_TBL_CTRL if HW done
[23:16] RW 0 B_AX_SS_TBL_MACID valid if B_AX_SS_TBL_CMD = 2 or 3
TBL.STA.MACID
[15:12] RW 0 B_AX_SS_TBL_DIS_AC valid if B_AX_SS_TBL_CMD = 2 or 3
TBL.STA.DIS_AC
[11] RW 0 B_AX_SS_TBL_MURU_VLD valid if B_AX_SS_TBL_CMD = 0 or 1
TBL.VLD
[10] RW 0 B_AX_SS_TBL_MURU valid if B_AX_SS_TBL_CMD = 0 or 1
TBL.MU/RU; 1: RU, 0: NU
[9:8] RW 0 B_AX_SS_TBL_WDIX if B_AX_SS_TBL_CMD = 0 or 1
TBL.WIDX
if B_AX_SS_TBL_CMD = 2 or 3
bit[9] TBL.DCM
bit[10] TBL.SS
[7:0] RW 0 B_AX_SS_TBL_RATE_IDX valid if B_AX_SS_TBL_CMD = 2 or 3
TBL.RATE.IDX

[31:16] RO 0 RSVD

[11:8] R/W 0x1 B_AX_SS_MAX_MU_NUM_1 1: maximum DL MU STA number (excluding primary), for non-TWT event, for WMM1

[31:25] RW 0 DUMMY
[24:16] RW 0 B_AX_MURT_TABLE_MAX
[15:10] RO 0 RSVD
[9] RW 0 B_AX_MU_PING_PONG_EN
[8] RW 0 B_AX_RU_PING_PONG_EN
[7] $RO 0 RSVD
[6] $RO 0 RSVD
[5] RW 0 B_AX_SS_MU_SW_SRCH_MODE
[4] RW 0 B_AX_SS_RU_SW_SRCH_MODE
[3:2] RW 0 B_AX_SS_MU_SEARCH_MODE 0: 1st priority: AC of link, 2nd priority: VO>VI>BE>BK
1: VO>VI>BE>BK
2: 1st priority: AC of link, 2nd priority: AC with the biggest Tx length
3: AC with the biggest Tx length
[1:0] RW 0 B_AX_SS_RU_SEARCH_MODE 0: 1st priority: AC of link, 2nd priority: VO>VI>BE>BK
1: VO>VI>BE>BK
2: 1st priority: AC of link, 2nd priority: AC with the biggest Tx length
3: AC with the biggest Tx length

2'h0~1: wdrls queue4, 2'h2: cpuio queue0, 2'h3: cpuio queue1
[15:14] R/W 2'h0 B_AX_WDRLS_REASON3_DSTSEL WD releason reason3 (MACID drop) destination port/queue ID selection

[11:10] R/W 2'h0 B_AX_WDRLS_REASON1_DSTSEL WD releason reason1 (Drop for retry limit) destination port/queue ID selection

[9:8] R/W 2'h0 B_AX_WDRLS_REASON0_DSTSEL WD releason reason0 (TXOK) destination port/queue ID selection

2'h0: 32us, 2'h1: 128us, 2'h2: 512us, 2'h3: 1024us
[1:0] R/W 2'h2 B_AX_COM_CLKFREQ_SEL Clock frequency selection
2'h0: 40Mhz, 2'h1: 80Mhz, 2'h2~2'h3: 160Mhz

18609F40h R_AX_TXPKTCTL_B0_CFG
[31:25] R/W 7'h0 B_AX_DUMMY_WD040_BYTE3 Dummy
[24] R/W 1'b1 B_AX_B0_PATC_OPT_BRKOFF Option to break off packet airtime countdown as there is no pending packet in PLE_DLE for cmac_dma
[23:16] R/W 8'h0 B_AX_DUMMY_WD040_BYTE2 Dummy
[15:8] R/W 8'h37 B_AX_B0_ATCPAR_REFTU_VAL Reference time unit value for HW to transform one-byte-transfer-time to parameter of packet airtime counter, unit in ns. E.g. it is set to 55ns, then HW calculates N bytes transfered per 55ns as the parameter of packet airtime counter. Packet airtime counter still decreases N byte per 50ns, thus airtime counter timeout value is approximate to 50/55 * oringal packet tx time
*Note this value is range from min='d50 to max='d100
[7:1] R/W 7'h0 B_AX_DUMMY_WD040_BYTE0 Dummy
[0] R/W 1'b0 B_AX_B0_DIS_ACGC Disable auto clock gating control for clock of txpktctl_b0
18609F44h R_AX_TXPKTCTL_B0_CTL
[31:24] R/W 8'h0 B_AX_DUMMY_WD044_BYTE3 Dummy
[23:16] R/W 8'h0 B_AX_DUMMY_WD044_BYTE2 Dummy
[15:8] R/W 8'h0 B_AX_DUMMY_WD044_BYTE1 Dummy
[7:2] R/W 6'h0 B_AX_DUMMY_WD044_BYTE0 Dummy
[1] RO 1'b1 B_AX_B0_CTLST_IDLE Indicate txpktctl FSM stays in IDLE state
[0] R/W 1'b0 B_AX_B0_STOP_REQ Stop function enable. As this bit is set, HW will stop any handshake with CMAC, and start to do flush flow. After flush flow is completed, HW will be into IDLE state until stop function disable.
18609F48h R_AX_TXPKTCTL_B0_PRELD_CFG0
[31] R/W 1'b0 B_AX_B0_PRELD_FEN Band0 preload function enable
[30:26] R/W 5'h0 B_AX_DUMMY_WD048_BYTE3 Dummy
[25:16] R/W 10'h0 B_AX_B0_PRELD_USEMAXSZ Maximum used buffer size of total preload packet's payload, unit in 64bytes. This is soft constraints for total used buffer size. If total used buffer size is larger then this threshold, then preload buffer is deemed full and don't allow adding new packet to preload cam even if cam is not full
[15:13] R/W 3'h0 B_AX_DUMMY_WD048_BYTE1 Dummy
[12:8] R/W 5'h0 B_AX_B0_PRELD_CAM_G1ENTNUM Entry number of preload CAM group1. Group1 is used for MISC queue (excluding 4 AC queue)
[7:5] R/W 3'h0 B_AX_DUMMY_WD048_BYTE0 Dummy
[4:0] R/W 5'h0 B_AX_B0_PRELD_CAM_G0ENTNUM Entry number of preload CAM group0. Group0 is used for 4 AC queue
18609F4Ch R_AX_TXPKTCTL_B0_PRELD_CFG1
[31:24] R/W 8'h0 B_AX_DUMMY_WD04C_BYTE3 Dummy
[23:16] R/W 8'h0 B_AX_DUMMY_WD04C_BYTE2 Dummy
[15:12] R/W 4'h0 B_AX_DUMMY_WD04C_BYTE1 Dummy
[11:8] R/W 4'h1 B_AX_B0_PRELD_NXT_TXENDWIN Time window to allow preload next tx packet's payload after phytxon falling edge. After this time window, stop to fetch next tx packet. The definition is as the follow. The definition is as follow
'h0: No limit, 'h1: 1us, 'h2: 2us, …, 'hf:15us
[7:0] R/W 8'h0 B_AX_B0_PRELD_NXT_RSVMINSZ Minimux reserved buffer size to allow next tx preload, unit in 64 bytes. This is soft constraints for available tx buffer page number. If available tx buffer page number is small than this threshold, then stop to fethch next tx packet's payload

[3] $W1S 1'b0 B_AX_B0_DBGERR_POP_PKTCMD As debug error mode is enabled, write 1 to request packet command read, and then HW clear it as read action is completed
[2] R/W 1'b0 B_AX_DUMMY_WD074_BIT02 Dummy
[1] $RO 1'b0 B_AX_B0_DBGERR_LOCKSTS As debug error mode is enabled, it indicate debug error lock status
[0] R/W 1'b0 B_AX_B0_DBGERR_LOCKEN Debug error mode function enable. If it is set to 1 and there is band0 error flag, then debug error lock is active to stop FSM of txpktctl_cmdpsr

[20] R/W 1'b1 B_AX_B0_IMR_ERR_PRELD_RLSPKTSZERR Error flag mask bit for preload used buffer size is small < released preload packet size

[2] R/W 1'b0 B_AX_B0_IMR_ERR_USRCTL_RDNRLSCMD Error flag mask bit for someone usrctl_unit receiving redudant release command. It indicate usrctl_unit don't have remaining unprocessed WD for release command.

18609F80h R_AX_TXPKTCTL_B1_CFG
[31:25] R/W 7'h0 B_AX_DUMMY_WD080_BYTE3 Dummy
[24] R/W 1'b1 B_AX_B1_PATC_OPT_BRKOFF Option to break off packet airtime countdown as there is no pending packet in PLE_DLE for cmac_dma
[23:16] R/W 8'h0 B_AX_DUMMY_WD080_BYTE2 Dummy
[15:8] R/W 8'h37 B_AX_B1_ATCPAR_REFTU_VAL Reference time unit value for HW to transform one-byte-transfer-time to parameter of packet airtime counter, unit in ns. E.g. it is set to 55ns, then HW calculates N bytes transfered per 55ns as the parameter of packet airtime counter. Packet airtime counter still decreases N byte per 50ns, thus airtime counter timeout value is approximate to 50/55 * oringal packet tx time
*Note this value is range from min='d50 to max='d100
[7:1] R/W 7'h0 B_AX_DUMMY_WD080_BYTE0 Dummy
[0] R/W 1'b0 B_AX_B1_DIS_ACGC Disable auto clock gating control for clock of txpktctl_b0
18609F84h R_AX_TXPKTCTL_B1_CTL

[7:2] R/W 6'h0 B_AX_DUMMY_WD084_BYTE0 Dummy
[1] RO 1'b1 B_AX_B1_CTLST_IDLE Indicate txpktctl FSM stays in IDLE state
[0] R/W 1'b0 B_AX_B1_STOP_REQ Stop function enable. As this bit is set, HW will stop any handshake with CMAC, and start to do flush flow. After flush flow is completed, HW will be into IDLE state until stop function disable.
18609F88h R_AX_TXPKTCTL_B1_PRELD_CFG0
[31] R/W 1'b0 B_AX_B1_PRELD_FEN Band0 preload function enable
[30:26] R/W 5'h0 B_AX_DUMMY_WD088_BYTE3 Dummy
[25:16] R/W 10'h0 B_AX_B1_PRELD_USEMAXSZ Maximum used buffer size of total preload packet's payload, unit in 64bytes. This is soft constraints for total used buffer size. If total used buffer size is larger then this threshold, then preload buffer is deemed full and don't allow adding new packet to preload cam even if cam is not full
[15:13] R/W 3'h0 B_AX_DUMMY_WD088_BYTE1 Dummy
[12:8] R/W 5'h0 B_AX_B1_PRELD_CAM_G1ENTNUM Entry number of preload CAM group1. Group1 is used for MISC queue (excluding 4 AC queue)
[7:5] R/W 3'h0 B_AX_DUMMY_WD088_BYTE0 Dummy
[4:0] R/W 5'h0 B_AX_B1_PRELD_CAM_G0ENTNUM Entry number of preload CAM group0. Group0 is used for 4 AC queue

[11:8] R/W 4'h1 B_AX_B1_PRELD_NXT_TXENDWIN Time window to allow preload next tx packet's payload after phytxon falling edge. After this time window, stop to fetch next tx packet. The definition is as the follow. The definition is as follow
'h0: No limit, 'h1: 1us, 'h2: 2us, …, 'hf:15us
[7:0] R/W 8'h0 B_AX_B1_PRELD_NXT_RSVMINSZ Minimux reserved buffer size to allow next tx preload, unit in 64 bytes. This is soft constraints for available tx buffer page number. If available tx buffer page number is small than this threshold, then stop to fethch next tx packet's payload

1860C07Ch R_AX_GID_POSITION3

[31:12] R/W 0 rsvd
[11:8] R/W 4 B_AX_TXSC_80M Value of Tx sub-carrier mode 80MHz.
[7:4] R/W 4 B_AX_TXSC_40M Value of Tx sub-carrier mode 40MHz.
[3:0] R/W 4 B_AX_TXSC_20M Value of Tx sub-carrier mode 20MHz.
1860C08Ch R_AX_PTCL_RRSR0
[31:24] R/W 0 B_AX_RRSR_HE BIT[31:24] = {(msb) HE 1SSMCS7, 1SSMCS6, …, 1SSMCS0}
[23:16] R/W 0 B_AX_RRSR_VHT BIT[23:16] = {(msb) VHT 1SSMCS7, 1SSMCS6, …, 1SSMCS0}
[15:8] R/W 0 B_AX_RRSR_HT BIT[15:8]={(msb) HT MCS7, MCS6, …, MCS0}
[7:0] R/W 0x15 B_AX_RRSR_OFDM BIT[7:0] = { (msb) OFDM54, OFDM48, …,OFDM6}
1860C090h R_AX_PTCL_RRSR1
[31:12] R/W 0 RSVD
[11:8] R/W 0x1 B_AX_RRSR_RATE_EN Enabled response rate mode BIT[3:0] = {HE rate,VHT rate,HT rate, OFDM/CCK rate}
[7:6] R/W 0 B_AX_RSC Response frame sub-channel configuration. Response frames (CTS, ACK, BA) are transmitted in the following condition. 00: Primary 20Mhz BW(0x483[3:0] ) 01: Follow Rx packet BW mode. 10: Duplicate mode. (ofdm rate only, others bw20) 11: rsvd
[5:4] R/W 0 RSVD
[3:0] R/W 0x5 B_AX_RRSR_CCK BIT[3:0] = {(msb) CCK11, …, CCK1}

1860C100h R_AX_FWC00IMR
[31] R/W 0 RSVD
[30] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_PSTIMER_6_INT_EN Enable PSTIMER6 interrupt source.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_AX_C0_PSTIMER6_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_AX_C0_PSTIMER6_VAL , this interrupt is issued.
[29] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_SND_RDY_INT_EN Issued after BB completes score table computation
[28] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_RP_END_INT_EN Enable the interrupt source that Rx period end.
[27] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_RXBCN_TO_CNT_INT_EN Enable the interrupt source that BCN_TO_CNT >= BCN_TO_CNT_THD.
[26] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_RXBCN_HIT_INT_EN Enable the interrupt source that Rx Bcn hit.
[25] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_RX_MATCH_RTT_INT_EN When HW receive match RTT frame and transmit ACK frame successfully, the BB generate FTM report.
It will generate interrupt to firmware.
[24] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_BCNQ_LOCK_INT_EN Enable BCNQ lock interrupt source.
[23] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P2P1_CTWEnd_INT_EN Enable the CTWindow End 1 interrupt source.
[22] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P2P1_TSF32_TOGGLE_INT_EN For P2P group 1. Enable TSF_BIT32_TOGGLE_P2P1 interrupt source.
[21] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P2P1_RFON_INT_EN Enable P2P NoA RF on time indication 1 interrupt source.
[20] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P2P1_RFOFF_INT_EN Enable P2P NoA RF off time indication 1 interrupt source.
[19] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P2P0_CTWEnd_INT_EN Enable the CTWindow End 0 interrupt source.
[18] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P2P0_TSF32_TOGGLE_INT_EN Enable TSF_BIT32_TOGGLE interrupt source.
[17] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P2P0_RFON_INT_EN Enable P2P NoA RF on time indication 0 interrupt source.
[16] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P2P0_RFOFF_INT_EN Enable P2P NoA RF off time indication 0 interrupt source.
[15] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE3_INT_EN Enable MACID 96~127 power change interrupt source.
[14] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE2_INT_EN Enable MACID 64~95 power change interrupt source.
[13] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE1_INT_EN Enable MACID 32~63 power change interrupt source.
[12] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE0_INT_EN Enable MACID 0~31 power change interrupt source.
[11] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_RXFTMREQ_INT_EN If B_AX_RXFTMREQ_INT_EN =1. When HW receive FTMREQ packet, it will generate interrupt to firmware.
[10] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_RXFTM_INT_EN If B_AX_RXFTM_INT_EN =1. When HW receive FTM and transmit ACK frame successfully, the BB generate FTM report. It will generate interrupt to firmware.
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_FTM_PTT_EN
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_TXFTM_INT_EN If B_AX_TXFTM_INT_EN =1. When HW transmit FTM and receive ACK frame successfully, the BB generate FTM report. It will generate interrupt to firmware.
[7] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_SOUND_DONE_INT_EN Be a beamformer, this interrupt is issued at the time after sounding finish.
[6] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_RXDONE_INT_EN Enable Rx Packet done interrupt source.
[5] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_PSTIMER_5_INT_EN Enable PSTIMER5 interrupt source.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_AX_PSTIMER5_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_AX_PSTIMER5_VAL , this interrupt is issued.
[4] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_PSTIMER_4_INT_EN Enable PSTIMER4 interrupt source.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_AX_PSTIMER4_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_AX_PSTIMER4_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
[3] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_PSTIMER_3_INT_EN Enable PSTIMER3 interrupt source.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_AX_PSTIMER3_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_AX_PSTIMER3_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_PSTIMER_2_INT_EN Enable PSTIMER2 interrupt source.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_AX_PSTIMER2_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_AX_PSTIMER2_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_PSTIMER_1_INT_EN Enable PSTIMER1 interrupt source.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_AX_PSTIMER1_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_AX_PSTIMER1_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_PSTIMER_0_INT_EN Enable PSTIMER0 interrupt source.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_AX_PSTIMER0_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_AX_PSTIMER0_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
1860C104h R_AX_FWC00ISR
[31] R/W1C 0 RSVD
[30] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_PSTIMER_6_INT PSTIMER6 interrupt.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_AX_C0_PSTIMER6_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_AX_C0_PSTIMER6_VAL , this interrupt is issued.
[29] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_SND_RDY_INT Issued after BB completes score table computation
[28] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_RP_END_INT This event means Rx period end, start to enter LPS.
When the below event happened, issue this interrupt.
- ( (Rx Bcn timeout) | (Bcn hit check done) | (BcnNoHit) )
[27] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_RXBCN_TO_CNT_INT When BCN_TO_CNT > BCN_TO_CNT_THD, issue this interrupt to wake WCPU
[26] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_RXBCN_HIT_INT When Rx Bcn and IE_HIT or BCAID_HIT or UNIAID_HIT, this interrupt is issued.
[25] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_RX_MATCH_RTT_INT When HW receive match RTT frame and transmit ACK frame successfully, the BB generate FTM report.
It will generate interrupt to firmware.
[24] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_BCNQ_LOCK_INT BCNQ lock interrupt.
[23] R/W1C 0 RSVD For P2P group1, CTWindow End 1 interrupt.(8852A A cut only, B cut removed)
[22] R/W1C 0 RSVD For P2P group1, TSF Timer BIT32 toggle indication interrupt.(8852A A cut only, B cut removed)
[21] R/W1C 0 RSVD For P2P group1, P2P NoA RF on time indication 1 interrupt.(8852A A cut only, B cut removed)
[20] R/W1C 0 RSVD For P2P group1, P2P NoA RF off time indication 1 interrupt.(8852A A cut only, B cut removed)
[19] R/W1C 0 RSVD For P2P group0, CTWindow End 0 interrupt.(8852A A cut only, B cut removed)
[18] R/W1C 0 RSVD For P2P group0, TSF Timer BIT32 toggle indication interrupt.(8852A A cut only, B cut removed)
[17] R/W1C 0 RSVD For P2P group0, P2P NoA RF on time indication 0 interrupt.(8852A A cut only, B cut removed)
[16] R/W1C 0 RSVD For P2P group0, P2P NoA RF off time indication 0 interrupt.(8852A A cut only, B cut removed)
[15] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE3_INT MACID 96~127 power change interrupt.
[14] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE2_INT MACID 64~95 power change interrupt.
[13] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE1_INT MACID 32~63 power change interrupt.
[12] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE0_INT MACID 0~31 power change interrupt.
[11] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_RXFTMREQ_INT If B_AX_RXFTMREQ_INT_EN =1. When HW receive FTMREQ packet, it will generate interrupt to firmware.
[10] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_RXFTM_INT If B_AX_RXFTM_INT_EN =1. When HW receive FTM and transmit ACK frame successfully, the BB generate FTM report. It will generate interrupt to firmware.
[9] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_FTM_PTT_INT
[8] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_TXFTM_INT If B_AX_TXFTM_INT_EN =1. When HW transmit FTM and receive ACK frame successfully, the BB generate FTM report. It will generate interrupt to firmware.
[7] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_SOUND_DONE_INT Be a beamformer, this interrupt is issued at the time after sounding finish.
[6] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_RXDONE_INT Rx Packet done interrupt.
[5] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_PSTIMER_5_INT PSTIMER5 interrupt.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_AX_PSTIMER5_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_AX_PSTIMER5_VAL , this interrupt is issued.
[4] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_PSTIMER_4_INT PSTIMER4 interrupt.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_AX_PSTIMER4_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_AX_PSTIMER4_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
[3] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_PSTIMER_3_INT PSTIMER3 interrupt.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_AX_PSTIMER3_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_AX_PSTIMER3_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
[2] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_PSTIMER_2_INT PSTIMER2 interrupt.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_AX_PSTIMER2_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_AX_PSTIMER2_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
[1] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_PSTIMER_1_INT PSTIMER1 interrupt.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_AX_PSTIMER1_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_AX_PSTIMER1_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
[0] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_PSTIMER_0_INT PSTIMER0 interrupt.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_AX_PSTIMER0_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_AX_PSTIMER0_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
1860C108h R_AX_FWC01IMR
[31] R/W 0 RSVD
[30] R/W 0 RSVD
[29] R/W 0 RSVD
[28] R/W 0 RSVD
[27] R/W 0 RSVD
[26] R/W 0 RSVD
[25] R/W 0 RSVD
[24] R/W 0 RSVD
[23] R/W 0 RSVD
[22] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P0_RXBCN_NOHIT_INT_EN Enable RX BCN UNIAID and BCAID are no hit (regardless of FCS OK/ERR) interrupt source(Port0)
[21] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P0_RXMTF1MRR0_INT_EN Setting this bit indicates that Rx trigger frame is matched with MoreTF=1 and MoreRARU=0 in user info of RA-RU (Port0)
[20] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P0_RXMTF0_INT_EN Setting this bit indicates that Rx trigger frame is matched with MoreTF=0 (Port0)
[19] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P0_RX_UAPSDMD1_INT_EN Enable interrupt source from receiving pkt matched with that QoS Unicast data frame with MD=1, UAPSD=1 (Port0)
[18] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P0_RX_UAPSDMD0_INT_EN Enable interrupt source from receiving pkt matched with that QoS Unicast data frame with MD=0, UAPSD=1 (Port0)
[17] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P0_TRIGGER_PKT_INT_EN Enable TRIGGER_PKT interrupt source.(Port0)
[16] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P0_EOSP_INT_EN EOSP_INT interrupt mask (HW do not check EOSP, wrong ?).(Port0)
[15] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P0_TXPKTIN_EN
[14] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P0_TX_NULL1_INT_EN Enable TX null 1 packet done interrupt source.(Port0)
[13] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P0_TX_NULL0_INT_EN Enable TX null 0 packet done interrupt source.(Port0)
[12] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P0_RX_UMD0_INT_EN Enable interrupt source from receiving unicast data frame with More Data=0.(Port0)
[11] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P0_RX_UMD1_INT_EN Enable interrupt source from receiving unicast data frame with More Data=1.(Port0)
[10] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P0_RX_BMD0_INT_EN Enable interrupt source from receiving broadcast data frame with More Data=0.(Port0)
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P0_RX_BMD1_INT_EN Enable interrupt source from receiving broadcast data frame with More Data=1.(Port0)
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P0_RXBCNOK_INT_EN When this bit is enable, the interrupt is issued when RX beacon frame occurs.(Port0)
[7] R/W 0 RSVD
[6] R/W 0 RSVD
[5] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P0MB0_TXBCNERR_INT_EN Enable TX beacon Error interrupt source.(Port0 or MBSSID0)
[4] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P0MB0_TXBCNOK_INT_EN Enable TX beacon OK interrupt source.(Port0 or MBSSID0)
[3] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P0MB0_HIQWND_INT_EN Enable HIQ window end interrupt source.(Port0 or MBSSID0)
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P0MB0_TBTT_INT_EN Enable the interrupt source from the exact TBTT time.(Port0 or MBSSID0)
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P0MB0_TBTTERLY_INT_EN This interrupt is issued at the time set by TBTTERLYINT register before TBTT time.(Port0 or MBSSID0)
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P0MB0_BCNERLY_INT_EN This interrupt is issued at the time set by DRVERLYINT register before TBTT time.(Port0 or MBSSID0)
1860C10Ch R_AX_FWC01ISR
[31] R/W1C 0 RSVD
[30] R/W1C 0 RSVD
[29] R/W1C 0 RSVD

[22] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_P0_RXBCN_NOHIT_INT The interrupt is issued while RX BCN UNIAID and BCAID are no hit (regardless of FCS OK/ERR)(Port0)
[21] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_P0_RXMTF1MRR0_INT The interrupt is issued while Rx trigger frame is matched with MoreTF=1 and MoreRARU=0 in user info of RA-RU (Port0)
[20] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_P0_RXMTF0_INT The interrupt is issued while Rx trigger frame is matched with MoreTF=0 (Port0)
[19] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_P0_RX_UAPSDMD1_INT The interrupt is issued while receiving pkt matched with that QoS Unicast data frame with MD=1, UAPSD=1 (Port0)
[18] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_P0_RX_UAPSDMD0_INT The interrupt is issued while receiving pkt matched with that QoS Unicast data frame with MD=0, UAPSD=1 (Port0)
[17] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_P0_TRIGGER_PKT_INT The interrupt is issued while the pkt is Tx ok which Tri_Frame bit of TXDESC is equal to 1.(Port0)
[16] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_P0_EOSP_INT The interrupt is issued while Rx pkt's EOSP bit = 1.(Port0)
[15] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_P0_TXPKTIN_INT
[14] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_P0_TX_NULL1_INT The interrupt is issued while TX null 1 packet done.(Port0)
[13] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_P0_TX_NULL0_INT The interrupt is issued while TX null 0 packet done.(Port0)
[12] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_P0_RX_UMD0_INT The interrupt is issued while receiving unicast data frame with More Data=0.(Port0)
[11] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_P0_RX_UMD1_INT The interrupt is issued while receiving unicast data frame with More Data=1.(Port0)
[10] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_P0_RX_BMD0_INT The interrupt is issued while receiving broadcast data frame with More Data=0.(Port0)
[9] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_P0_RX_BMD1_INT The interrupt is issued while receiving broadcast data frame with More Data=1.(Port0)
[8] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_P0_RXBCNOK_INT The interrupt is issued while receiving beacon frame.(Port0)
[7] R/W1C 0 RSVD
[6] R/W1C 0 RSVD
[5] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_P0MB0_TXBCNERR_INT TX beacon Error interrupt(Port0 or MBSSID0)
[4] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_P0MB0_TXBCNOK_INT TX beacon OK interrupt.(Port0 or MBSSID0)
[3] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_P0MB0_HIQWND_INT HIQ window end interrupt.(Port0 or MBSSID0)
[2] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_P0MB0_TBTT_INT The exact TBTT time interrupt.(Port0 or MBSSID0)
[1] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_P0MB0_TBTTERLY_INT This interrupt is issued at the time set by TBTTERLYINT register before TBTT time.(Port0 or MBSSID0)
[0] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_P0MB0_BCNERLY_INT This interrupt is issued at the time set by DRVERLYINT register before TBTT time.(Port0 or MBSSID0)

[15] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P1_TXPKTIN_INT_EN

[22] R/W 0 RSVD
[21] R/W 0 RSVD
[20] R/W 0 RSVD
[19] R/W 0 RSVD
[18] R/W 0 RSVD
[17] R/W 0 RSVD
[16] R/W 0 B_AX_TBTT_B0P4_INT_EN TBTT HIMR of port 4 band 0
[15] R/W 0 B_AX_TBTT_B0P3_INT_EN TBTT HIMR of port 3 band 0
[14] R/W 0 B_AX_TBTT_B0P2_INT_EN TBTT HIMR of port 2 band 0
[13] R/W 0 B_AX_TBTT_B0P1_INT_EN TBTT HIMR of port 1 band 0
[12] R/W 0 B_AX_TBTT_B0P0_INT_EN TBTT HIMR of port 0 band 0
[11] R/W 0 B_AX_PKT_INFO_ERR_INT_EN packet content error or illegal HIMR (EX: WDINFO_EN = 1 but no WDINFO)
[10] R/W 0 B_AX_BB_STOPRX_INT_EN RX is over when BB stop HIMR
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_TXERR_INT_EN Tx Error Flag HIMR
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_RXERR_INT_EN Rx Error Flag HIMR
[7] R/W 0 B_AX_P2P1_TSF32_TOGG_INT_EN P2P 1 TSF Timer bit 32 toggle indication HIMR
[6] R/W 0 B_AX_P2P0_TSF32_TOGG_INT_EN P2P 0 TSF Timer bit 32 toggle indication HIMR
[5] R/W 0 B_AX_PWR_127to96_INT_EN MACID 127 to 96 power bit change HIMR
[4] R/W 0 B_AX_PWR_95to64_INT_EN MACID 95 to 64 power bit change HIMR
[3] R/W 0 B_AX_PWR_63to32_INT_EN MACID 63 to 32 power bit change HIMR
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_PWR_31to0_INT_EN MACID 31 to 0 power bit change HIMR
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_PSTIMER_5_INT_EN Enable PSTIMER5 interrupt source.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_AX_PSTIMER5_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_AX_PSTIMER5_VAL , this interrupt is issued.
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_PSTIMER_4_INT_EN Enable PSTIMER4 interrupt source.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_AX_PSTIMER4_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_AX_PSTIMER4_VAL, this interrupt is issued.

[16] R/W1C 0 B_AX_TBTT_B0P4_INT TBTT HISR of port 4 band 0
[15] R/W1C 0 B_AX_TBTT_B0P3_INT TBTT HISR of port 3 band 0
[14] R/W1C 0 B_AX_TBTT_B0P2_INT TBTT HISR of port 2 band 0
[13] R/W1C 0 B_AX_TBTT_B0P1_INT TBTT HISR of port 1 band 0
[12] R/W1C 0 B_AX_TBTT_B0P0_INT TBTT HISR of port 0 band 0
[11] R/W1C 0 B_AX_PKT_INFO_ERR_INT packet content error or illegal HISR (EX: WDINFO_EN = 1 but no WDINFO)
[10] R/W1C 0 B_AX_BB_STOPRX_INT RX is over when BB stop HISR
[9] R/W1C 0 B_AX_TXERR_INT Tx Error Flag HISR
[8] R/W1C 0 B_AX_RXERR_INT Rx Error Flag HISR
[7] R/W1C 0 B_AX_P2P1_TSF32_TOGG_INT P2P 1 TSF Timer bit 32 toggle indication HISR
[6] R/W1C 0 B_AX_P2P0_TSF32_TOGG_INT P2P 0 TSF Timer bit 32 toggle indication HISR
[5] R/W1C 0 B_AX_PWR_127to96_INT MACID 127 to 96 power bit change HISR
[4] R/W1C 0 B_AX_PWR_95to64_INT MACID 95 to 64 power bit change HISR
[3] R/W1C 0 B_AX_PWR_63to32_INT MACID 63 to 32 power bit change HISR

[1] R/W1C 0 B_AX_PSTIMER_5_INT PSTIMER5 interrupt.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_AX_PSTIMER5_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_AX_PSTIMER5_VAL , this interrupt is issued.
[0] R/W1C 0 B_AX_PSTIMER_4_INT PSTIMER4 interrupt.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_AX_PSTIMER4_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_AX_PSTIMER4_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
1860C200h R_AX_PPS0_CTRL
[31] W1C 0 B_AX_PPS0_PWR_RST1 Write 1 to reset PPS 0 POF 1
[30] W1C 0 B_AX_PPS0_PWR_RST0 Write 1 to reset PPS 0 POF 0
[29:28] R 0 RSVD RSVD
[27:16] R/W 5 B_AX_PPS0_CTWIN CTWindow width of PPS 0. Unit: 32 us.
[15] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_TXOP_BRK_EN 1: TXOP break at the end of PON. 0: Disable.
[14] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_AGG_BRK_EN 1: AMPDU aggregation break at the end of PON. 0: Disable.
[13] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_POF_AND_EN 1: Decide power off by POF0 & POF1. 0: Decide power off by POF0 | POF1.
[12] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_PSWIND_EN 1: Enable to set PPS 0 PS window for STA_SCH. 0: Disable.
[11] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_TSFB32_RST_EN 1: Enable reset POF 0 and POF 1 when TSF BIT32 toggle for PPS 0. 0: Disable.
[10:8] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_PORT_SEL Port selector for PPS 0.
0 ~ 4 = Port 0 ~ 4, others for none.
[7] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_ALLSLEEP_EN 1: Enable PPS 0 all sleep mode, 0: Disable.
[6] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_OFF_DISTX_EN 1: Enable HW disable TX in whole power off period. 0: Do Nothing.
[5] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_CTWIN_EN 1: Enable PPS 0 CTWINDOW function. 0: Disable.
[4] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_BCNAREA_EN 1: Enable PPS 0 BCN area on function. 0 : Disable.
[3] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_WITHBCNERY 1 : PPS power state decision include BCN early. 0 : Do not include.
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_POF1_EN 1: Enable PPS 0 POF 1, 0: Disable.
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_POF0_EN 1: Enable PPS 0 POF 0, 0: Disable.
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_PWR_MGT_EN Main switch for PPS 0 Power Saving. 1: Enable, 0: Disable.
1860C204h R_AX_PPS0_SPEC_STATE
[7] $RO 0 B_AX_PPS0_SPEC_POW_STATE PPS 0 current spec power state. 1: On. 0: Off.
[6] RO 0 B_AX_PPS0_SPEC_CTWIN_ON Current time is during TBTT to CTWEND.
[5] RO 0 B_AX_PPS0_SPEC_BCNAREA_ON Current time is during TBTT to TXBCN/timeout.
[4] RO 0 B_AX_PPS0_SPEC_BCNERLY Current time is during BCNERLY to TBTT.
[3] RO 0 B_AX_PPS0_SPEC_POF1_OFF_PERD Current time is during POF 1 spec period.
[2] RO 0 B_AX_PPS0_SPEC_FORCE_DOZE1 If POF 1 Count == 1, this value is 1. else 0.
[1] RO 0 B_AX_PPS0_SPEC_POF0_OFF_PERD Current time is during POF 0 spec period.
[0] RO 0 B_AX_PPS0_SPEC_FORCE_DOZE0 If POF 0 Count == 1, this value is 1. else 0.
1860C205h R_AX_PPS0_STATE
[7] $RO 0 B_AX_PPS0_POW_STATE PPS 0 current power state. 1: On. 0: Off.
[6] RO 0 B_AX_PPS0_CTWIN_ON Current time is during TBTT to CTWEND or BCNERLY to CTWEND. Decided by B_AX_PPS0_WITHBCNERY.
[5] RO 0 B_AX_PPS0_BCNAREA_ON Current time is during TBTT to TXBCN/timeout or BCNERLY to TXBCN/timeout. Decided by B_AX_PPS0_WITHBCNERY.
[4] RO 0 B_AX_PPS0_BCNERLY Current time is during BCNERLY to TBTT.
[3] RO 0 B_AX_PPS0_POF1_OFF_PERD Current time is during POF 1 power off early to power on early.
[2] RO 0 B_AX_PPS0_FORCE_DOZE1 If POF 1 Count == 1, this value is 1. else 0.
[1] RO 0 B_AX_PPS0_POF0_OFF_PERD Current time is during POF 0 power off early to power on early.
[0] RO 0 B_AX_PPS0_FORCE_DOZE0 If POF 0 Count == 1, this value is 1. else 0.
1860C206h R_AX_PPS0_PAUSE_CTRL0
[15] RO 0 B_AX_PPS0_POF_STOP_TX_HANG PPSPS_POF_STOP_TX_HANG
[14] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[13] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[12] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[11] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_MGQ_PAUSE_EN 1: Enable PPS 0 MGQ pause. 0: Disable. (dis_tx_case 1 or 2)(mgq backoff will stop)
[10] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_HIQ_PAUSE_EN 1: Enable PPS 0 HIQ pause. 0: Disable. (dis_tx_case 1 or 2)(other ports will be paused too)
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_BCNQ_PAUSE_EN 1: Enable PPS 0 BCNQ pause. 0: Disable. (dis_tx_case 1 or 2)(other ports will be paused too)
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_MACID_PAUSE_EN 1: Enable PPS 0 MACID pause. 0: Disable. (dis_tx_case 1 or 2)
[7:0] R/W 0xFF B_AX_PPS0_PAUSE_MACID PPS 0 MACID selection.
1860C208h R_AX_PPS0_PAUSE_CTRL1
[31:16] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_POWON_DISTX The time of the disable TX period after the PPS 0 Power on interrupt occur. Unit: 32us. (should larger than POF_OFF_EARLY_TIME)
[15:0] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_POWOFF_DISTX The time of the disable TX period after the PPS 0 Power off interrupt occur. Unit: 32us.
1860C20Ch R_AX_PPS0_PAUSE_CTRL2
[31:16] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_POWOFF_ERLY PPS 0 power off early. Unit: 32 us.
[15:0] R/W 0x0 B_AX_PPS0_POWON_ERLY PPS 0 power on early. Unit: 32 us.
1860C210h R_AX_PPS0_POF0_PARAM0
31:0 R/W 0x00001000 B_AX_PPS0_POF0_DUR PPS 0 POF 0 duration. Unit: us.
1860C214h R_AX_PPS0_POF0_PARAM1
[31:0] R/W 0x00003000 B_AX_PPS0_POF0_ITVL PPS 0 POF 0 interval. Unit: us.
1860C218h R_AX_PPS0_POF0_PARAM2
[31:0] R/W 0x00001000 B_AX_PPS0_POF0_START First PPS 0 POF 0 period start TSF(Low 4 bytes).
1860C21Ch R_AX_PPS0_POF0_PARAM3
[31:16] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[15:8] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_POF0_CUR_CNT PPS 0 POF 0 current count.
[7:0] R/W 0x03 B_AX_PPS0_POF0_CNT PPS 0 POF 0 count. 1: Aperiodic POF. 2 ~ 255: Periodic POF.
1860C220h R_AX_PPS0_POF1_PARAM0
31:0 R/W 0x00001000 B_AX_PPS0_POF1_DUR PPS 0 POF 1 duration. Unit: us.
1860C224h R_AX_PPS0_POF1_PARAM1
[31:0] R/W 0x00003000 B_AX_PPS0_POF1_ITVL PPS 0 POF 1 interval. Unit: us.
1860C228h R_AX_PPS0_POF1_PARAM2
[31:0] R/W 0x00001000 B_AX_PPS0_POF1_START First PPS 0 POF 1 period start TSF(Low 4 bytes).
1860C22Ch R_AX_PPS0_POF1_PARAM3
[31:16] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[15:8] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_POF1_CUR_CNT PPS 0 POF 1 current count.
[7:0] R/W 0x03 B_AX_PPS0_POF1_CNT PPS 0 POF 1 count. 1: Aperiodic POF. 2 ~ 255: Periodic POF.
1860C230h R_AX_PPS0_CURR_DOZE0
[31:0] $R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_POF0_CURR_DOZE PPS 0 POF 0 current doze TSF. Need to backup/restore.
1860C234h R_AX_PPS0_CURR_DOZE1
[31:0] $R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_POF1_CURR_DOZE PPS 0 POF 1 current doze TSF. Need to backup/restore.
1860C240h R_AX_PPS1_CTRL
[31] W1C 0 B_AX_PPS1_PWR_RST1 Write 1 to reset PPS 1 POF 1
[30] W1C 0 B_AX_PPS1_PWR_RST0 Write 1 to reset PPS 1 POF 0
[29:28] R 0 RSVD RSVD
[27:16] R/W 5 B_AX_PPS1_CTWIN CTWindow width of PPS 1. Unit: 32 us.
[15] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_TXOP_BRK_EN 1: TXOP break at the end of PON. 0: Disable.
[14] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_AGG_BRK_EN 1: AMPDU aggregation break at the end of PON. 0: Disable.
[13] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_POF_AND_EN 1: Decide power off by POF0 & POF1. 0: Decide power off by POF0 | POF1.
[12] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_PSWIND_EN 1: Enable to set PPS 1 PS window for STA_SCH. 0: Disable.
[11] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_TSFB32_RST_EN 1: Enable reset POF 0 and POF 1 when TSF BIT32 toggle for PPS 1. 0: Disable.
[10:8] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_PORT_SEL Port selector for PPS 1.
0 ~ 4 = Port 0 ~ 4, others for none.
[7] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_ALLSLEEP_EN 1: Enable PPS 1 all sleep mode, 0: Disable.
[6] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_OFF_DISTX_EN 1: Enable HW disable TX in whole power off period. 0: Do Nothing.
[5] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_CTWIN_EN 1: Enable PPS 1 CTWINDOW function. 0: Disable.
[4] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_BCNAREA_EN 1: Enable PPS 1 BCN area on function. 0 : Disable.
[3] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_WITHBCNERY 1 : PPS power state decision include BCN early. 0 : Do not include.
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_POF1_EN 1: Enable PPS 1 POF 1, 0: Disable.
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_POF0_EN 1: Enable PPS 1 POF 0, 0: Disable.
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_PWR_MGT_EN Main switch for PPS 1 Power Saving. 1: Enable, 0: Disable.
1860C244h R_AX_PPS1_SPEC_STATE
[7] $RO 0 B_AX_PPS1_SPEC_POW_STATE PPS 1 current spec power state. 1: On. 0: Off.
[6] RO 0 B_AX_PPS1_SPEC_CTWIN_ON Current time is during TBTT to CTWEND.
[5] RO 0 B_AX_PPS1_SPEC_BCNAREA_ON Current time is during TBTT to TXBCN/timeout.
[4] RO 0 B_AX_PPS1_SPEC_BCNERLY Current time is during BCNERLY to TBTT.
[3] RO 0 B_AX_PPS1_SPEC_POF1_OFF_PERD Current time is during POF 1 spec period.
[2] RO 0 B_AX_PPS1_SPEC_FORCE_DOZE1 If POF 1 Count == 1, this value is 1. else 0.
[1] RO 0 B_AX_PPS1_SPEC_POF0_OFF_PERD Current time is during POF 0 spec period.
[0] RO 0 B_AX_PPS1_SPEC_FORCE_DOZE0 If POF 0 Count == 1, this value is 1. else 0.
1860C245h R_AX_PPS1_STATE
[7] $RO 0 B_AX_PPS1_POW_STATE PPS 1 current power state. 1: On. 0: Off.
[6] RO 0 B_AX_PPS1_CTWIN_ON Current time is during TBTT to CTWEND or BCNERLY to CTWEND. Decided by B_AX_PPS1_WITHBCNERY.
[5] RO 0 B_AX_PPS1_BCNAREA_ON Current time is during TBTT to TXBCN/timeout or BCNERLY to TXBCN/timeout. Decided by B_AX_PPS1_WITHBCNERY.
[4] RO 0 B_AX_PPS1_BCNERLY Current time is during BCNERLY to TBTT.
[3] RO 0 B_AX_PPS1_POF1_OFF_PERD Current time is during POF 1 power off early to power on early.
[2] RO 0 B_AX_PPS1_FORCE_DOZE1 If POF 1 Count == 1, this value is 1. else 0.
[1] RO 0 B_AX_PPS1_POF0_OFF_PERD Current time is during POF 0 power off early to power on early.
[0] RO 0 B_AX_PPS1_FORCE_DOZE0 If POF 0 Count == 1, this value is 1. else 0.
1860C246h R_AX_PPS1_PAUSE_CTRL0
[15] RO 0 B_AX_PPS1_POF_STOP_TX_HANG PPSPS_POF_STOP_TX_HANG
[14] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[13] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[12] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[11] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_MGQ_PAUSE_EN 1: Enable PPS 1 MGQ pause. 0: Disable. (dis_tx_case 1 or 2)(mgq backoff will stop)
[10] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_HIQ_PAUSE_EN 1: Enable PPS 1 HIQ pause. 0: Disable. (dis_tx_case 1 or 2)(other ports will NOT be paused)
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_BCNQ_PAUSE_EN 1: Enable PPS 1 BCNQ pause. 0: Disable. (dis_tx_case 1 or 2)(other ports will NOT be paused too)
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_MACID_PAUSE_EN 1: Enable PPS 1 MACID pause. 0: Disable. (dis_tx_case 1 or 2)
[7:0] R/W 0xFF B_AX_PPS1_PAUSE_MACID PPS 1 MACID selection.
1860C248h R_AX_PPS1_PAUSE_CTRL1
[31:16] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_POWON_DISTX The time of the disable TX period after the PPS 1 Power on interrupt occur. Unit: 32us. (should larger than POF_OFF_EARLY_TIME)
[15:0] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_POWOFF_DISTX The time of the disable TX period after the PPS 1 Power off interrupt occur. Unit: 32us.
1860C24Ch R_AX_PPS1_PAUSE_CTRL2
[31:16] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_POWOFF_ERLY PPS 1 power off early. Unit: 32 us.
[15:0] R/W 0x0 B_AX_PPS1_POWON_ERLY PPS 1 power on early. Unit: 32 us.
1860C250h R_AX_PPS1_POF0_PARAM0
31:0 R/W 0x00001000 B_AX_PPS1_POF0_DUR PPS 1 POF 0 duration. Unit: us.
1860C254h R_AX_PPS1_POF0_PARAM1
[31:0] R/W 0x00003000 B_AX_PPS1_POF0_ITVL PPS 1 POF 0 interval. Unit: us.
1860C258h R_AX_PPS1_POF0_PARAM2
[31:0] R/W 0x00001000 B_AX_PPS1_POF0_START First PPS 1 POF 0 period start TSF(Low 4 bytes).
1860C25Ch R_AX_PPS1_POF0_PARAM3
[31:16] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[15:8] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_POF0_CUR_CNT PPS 1 POF 0 current count.
[7:0] R/W 0x03 B_AX_PPS1_POF0_CNT PPS 1 POF 0 count. 1: Aperiodic POF. 2 ~ 255: Periodic POF.
1860C260h R_AX_PPS1_POF1_PARAM0
31:0 R/W 0x00001000 B_AX_PPS1_POF1_DUR PPS 1 POF 1 duration. Unit: us.
1860C264h R_AX_PPS1_POF1_PARAM1
[31:0] R/W 0x00003000 B_AX_PPS1_POF1_ITVL PPS 1 POF 1 interval. Unit: us.
1860C268h R_AX_PPS1_POF1_PARAM2
[31:0] R/W 0x00001000 B_AX_PPS1_POF1_START First PPS 1 POF 1 period start TSF(Low 4 bytes).
1860C26Ch R_AX_PPS1_POF1_PARAM3
[31:16] R 0 RSVD RSVD
[15:8] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_POF1_CUR_CNT PPS 1 POF 1 current count.
[7:0] R/W 0x03 B_AX_PPS1_POF1_CNT PPS 1 POF 1 count. 1: Aperiodic POF. 2 ~ 255: Periodic POF.
1860C270h R_AX_PPS1_CURR_DOZE0
[31:0] $R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_POF0_CURR_DOZE PPS 1 POF 0 current doze TSF. Need to backup/restore.
1860C274h R_AX_PPS1_CURR_DOZE1
[31:0] $R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_POF1_CURR_DOZE PPS 1 POF 1 current doze TSF. Need to backup/restore.
1860C2A0h R_AX_port_0_tsf_sync
[31] R 0 RSVD
[30] W 0 B_AX_p0_sync_now_p do port sync when this bit is write 1
[29] W 0 B_AX_p0_sync_once_p only do once port sync when tbtt_int
[28] RW 0 B_AX_p0_auto_sync always do port sync when tbtt_int
[27] R 0 RSVD
[26:24] RW 0 B_AX_p0_sync_port_src_sel source port. "0/1/2/3/4" : port 0/1/2/3/4. "5/6/7" : freerun
[23:19] R 0 RSVD
[18:0] RW 0 B_AX_p0_tsftr_sync_offset unit : 32us, bit[18] : "0" pluse , "1" : minus
1860C2A4h R_AX_port_1_tsf_sync
[31] R 0 RSVD
[30] W 0 B_AX_p1_sync_now_p do port sync when this bit is write 1
[29] W 0 B_AX_p1_sync_once_p only do once port sync when tbtt_int
[28] RW 0 B_AX_p1_auto_sync always do port sync when tbtt_int
[27] R 0 RSVD
[26:24] RW 0 B_AX_p1_sync_port_src_sel source port. "0/1/2/3/4" : port 0/1/2/3/4. "5/6/7" : freerun
[23:19] R 0 RSVD
[18:0] RW 0 B_AX_p1_tsftr_sync_offset unit : 32us, bit[18] : "0" pluse , "1" : minus
1860C2A8h R_AX_port_2_tsf_sync
[31] R 0 RSVD
[30] W 0 B_AX_p2_sync_now_p do port sync when this bit is write 1
[29] W 0 B_AX_p2_sync_once_p only do once port sync when tbtt_int
[28] RW 0 B_AX_p2_auto_sync always do port sync when tbtt_int
[27] R 0 RSVD
[26:24] RW 0 B_AX_p2_sync_port_src_sel source port. "0/1/2/3/4" : port 0/1/2/3/4. "5/6/7" : freerun
[23:19] R 0 RSVD
[18:0] RW 0 B_AX_p2_tsftr_sync_offset unit : 32us, bit[18] : "0" pluse , "1" : minus
1860C2ACh R_AX_port_3_tsf_sync
[31] R 0 RSVD
[30] W 0 B_AX_p3_sync_now_p do port sync when this bit is write 1
[29] W 0 B_AX_p3_sync_once_p only do once port sync when tbtt_int
[28] RW 0 B_AX_p3_auto_sync always do port sync when tbtt_int
[27] R 0 RSVD
[26:24] RW 0 B_AX_p3_sync_port_src_sel source port. "0/1/2/3/4" : port 0/1/2/3/4. "5/6/7" : freerun
[23:19] R 0 RSVD
[18:0] RW 0 B_AX_p3_tsftr_sync_offset unit : 32us, bit[18] : "0" pluse , "1" : minus
1860C2B0h R_AX_port_4_tsf_sync
[31] R 0 RSVD
[30] W 0 B_AX_p4_sync_now_p do port sync when this bit is write 1
[29] W 0 B_AX_p4_sync_once_p only do once port sync when tbtt_int
[28] RW 0 B_AX_p4_auto_sync always do port sync when tbtt_int
[27] R 0 RSVD
[26:24] RW 0 B_AX_p4_sync_port_src_sel source port. "0/1/2/3/4" : port 0/1/2/3/4. "5/6/7" : freerun
[23:19] R 0 RSVD
[18:0] RW 0 B_AX_p4_tsftr_sync_offset unit : 32us, bit[18] : "0" pluse , "1" : minus
1860C2C0h R_AX_MACID_SLEEP_0
[31:0] R/W 0x0 B_AX_MACID31_0_SLEEP 1: Macid31~Macid0 sleep (per bit controlled)
1860C2C4h R_AX_MACID_SLEEP_1
[31:0] R/W 0x0 B_AX_MACID63_32_SLEEP 1: Macid63~Macid32 sleep (per bit controlled)

[31:0] R/W 0x0 B_AX_MACID95_64_SLEEP 1: Macid95~Macid64 sleep (per bit controlled)
1860C2CCh R_AX_MACID_SLEEP_3
[31:0] R/W 0x0 B_AX_MACID127_96_SLEEP 1: Macid127~Macid96 sleep (per bit controlled)
1860C2E0h R_AX_CMAC_MACID_DROP_0
[31:0] R/W 0x0 B_AX_CMAC_MGQ_MACID31_0_DROP 1: Macid31~Macid0 MGQ Drop (per bit controlled)
1860C2E4h R_AX_CMAC_MACID_DROP_1
[31:0] R/W 0x0 B_AX_CMAC_MGQ_MACID63_32_DROP 1: Macid63~Macid32 MGQ Drop (per bit controlled)
1860C2E8h R_AX_CMAC_MACID_DROP_2
[31:0] R/W 0x0 B_AX_CMAC_MGQ_MACID95_64_DROP 1: Macid95~Macid64 MGQ Drop (per bit controlled)
1860C2ECh R_AX_CMAC_MACID_DROP_3

1860C300h R_AX_edca_be_param_0
[31:27] RSVD RSVD RSVD RSVD
[26:16] R/W 0x00 B_AX_be_0_txoplmt TXOP Limit
An unsigned integer in units of 32 microseconds. Value of zero indicates that a single MSDU or MMPDU in addition to a protection frame exchange can be transmitted at any rate.
Default: BK = 0h; BE = 0h; VI = 5Eh; VO = 2Fh.
[15:8] R/W 0xA4 B_AX_be_0_cw ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.
[7:0] R/W 0x2B B_AX_be_0_aifs Arbitrary Inter frame space
In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.
1860C304h R_AX_edca_bk_param_0
[31:27] RSVD RSVD RSVD RSVD
[26:16] R/W 0x00 B_AX_bk_0_txoplmt TXOP Limit
An unsigned integer in units of 32 microseconds. Value of zero indicates that a single MSDU or MMPDU in addition to a protection frame exchange can be transmitted at any rate.
Default: BK = 0h; BE = 0h; VI = 5Eh; VO = 2Fh.
[15:8] R/W 0xA5 B_AX_bk_0_cw ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.
[7:0] R/W 0x49 B_AX_bk_0_aifs Arbitrary Inter frame space
In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.
1860C308h R_AX_edca_vi_param_0
[31:27] RSVD RSVD RSVD RSVD
[26:16] R/W 0x5e B_AX_vi_0_txoplmt TXOP Limit
An unsigned integer in units of 32 microseconds. Value of zero indicates that a single MSDU or MMPDU in addition to a protection frame exchange can be transmitted at any rate.
Default: BK = 0h; BE = 0h; VI = 5Eh; VO = 2Fh.
[15:8] R/W 0x43 B_AX_vi_0_cw ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.
[7:0] R/W 0x26 B_AX_vi_0_aifs Arbitrary Inter frame space
In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.
1860C30Ch R_AX_edca_vo_param_0
[31:27] RSVD RSVD RSVD RSVD

An unsigned integer in units of 32 microseconds. Value of zero indicates that a single MSDU or MMPDU in addition to a protection frame exchange can be transmitted at any rate.
Default: BK = 0h; BE = 0h; VI = 5Eh; VO = 2Fh.
[15:8] R/W 0x32 B_AX_vo_0_cw ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.

In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.

[31:27] RSVD RSVD RSVD RSVD

Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.
1860C314h R_AX_edca_bk_param_1
[31:27] RSVD RSVD RSVD RSVD
[26:16] R/W 0x00 B_AX_bk_1_txoplmt TXOP Limit
An unsigned integer in units of 32 microseconds. Value of zero indicates that a single MSDU or MMPDU in addition to a protection frame exchange can be transmitted at any rate.
Default: BK = 0h; BE = 0h; VI = 5Eh; VO = 2Fh.
[15:8] R/W 0xA5 B_AX_bk_1_cw ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.

In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.
1860C318h R_AX_edca_vi_param_1
[31:27] RSVD RSVD RSVD RSVD
[26:16] R/W 0x5e B_AX_vi_1_txoplmt TXOP Limit
An unsigned integer in units of 32 microseconds. Value of zero indicates that a single MSDU or MMPDU in addition to a protection frame exchange can be transmitted at any rate.
Default: BK = 0h; BE = 0h; VI = 5Eh; VO = 2Fh.
[15:8] R/W 0x43 B_AX_vi_1_cw ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.
[7:0] R/W 0x26 B_AX_vi_1_aifs Arbitrary Inter frame space
In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.
1860C31Ch R_AX_edca_vo_param_1
[31:27] RSVD RSVD RSVD RSVD
[26:16] R/W 0x2f B_AX_vo_1_txoplmt TXOP Limit
An unsigned integer in units of 32 microseconds. Value of zero indicates that a single MSDU or MMPDU in addition to a protection frame exchange can be transmitted at any rate.
Default: BK = 0h; BE = 0h; VI = 5Eh; VO = 2Fh.
[15:8] R/W 0x32 B_AX_vo_1_cw ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.
[7:0] R/W 0x24 B_AX_vo_1_aifs Arbitrary Inter frame space
In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.
1860C320h R_AX_edca_mgq_param
[31:24] R/W 0x32 B_AX_cpumgq_cw ( cpumgq)
ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.
[23:16] R/W 0x24 B_AX_cpumgq_aifs ( cpumgq)
Arbitrary Inter frame space
In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.
[15:8] R/W 0x32 B_AX_mgq_cw ( normal mgq and no power save mgq)
ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.
[7:0] R/W 0x24 B_AX_mgq_aifs ( normal mgq and no power save mgq)
Arbitrary Inter frame space
In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.
1860C324h R_AX_edca_bcnq_param
[31:24] R/W 0x44 B_AX_bcnq_cw Beacon Contention Window MAX/MIN
Defines the contention window value for back off before transmitting beacon frame. This field is set to 0 in AP mode to indicate no back off window. In ad hoc mode, its default value is 6. 26-1 = 63 time slots.
[23:16] R/W 0x13 B_AX_bcnq_aifs Beacon Interframe Space
In units of microseconds, this register defines the medium idle time required before transmitting beacon (AP mode) or entering random back off window.
[15:8] R/W 0x1C B_AX_pifs
[7:0] R/W 0x20 B_AX_force_bcn_ifs
1860C328h R_AX_edca_ulq_param
[31:27] RSVD RSVD RSVD RSVD
[26:16] R/W 0x00 B_AX_ulq_txoplmt TXOP Limit
An unsigned integer in units of 32 microseconds. Value of zero indicates that a single MSDU or MMPDU in addition to a protection frame exchange can be transmitted at any rate.
Default: BK = 0h; BE = 0h; VI = 5Eh; VO = 2Fh.
[15:8] R/W 0x32 B_AX_ulq_cw ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.

Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.

1860C338h R_AX_prebkf_cfg_0
[31:29] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[28:24] R/W 0x10 B_AX_100ns_time count for 100ns. (unit: clock cycle) EX: 8 for 80MHz
[23] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[22:16] R/W 0x3c B_AX_rx_air_end_time when rx_air_end == 1, assume air has idle for this setting value. unit: 0.1 us ( EX: 0x3C is 6 us)
[15:11] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[10:8] R/W 0x02 B_AX_mactx_latency assume latency from mactx to phytx. (unit: 1us)
[7:5] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[4:0] R/W 0x09 B_AX_prebkf_time inform ptcl to gen txcmd if backoff remain time less than this setting value. (unit: 1us) (For ACQ and F2PTXCMD)
1860C33Ch R_AX_prebkf_cfg_1
[31:24] RW 0x89 B_AX_sifs_timeout_tb_aggr_V1 if sifs_timer > (rx_air_end+sifs_timeout_tb_aggr), inform ptcl to break aggr.
[23:16] R/W 0x46 B_AX_sifs_prebkf if sifs_prebkf_cnt < prebkf time in burst tx, inform ptcl to gen cmd. unit: 0.1us
[15] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[14:8] R/W 0x2f B_AX_sifs_timeout_t2 if ifstimer > (rx_air_end+t2), inform ptcl sifs timeout unit: 0.1us
[7] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[6:0] R/W 0x48 B_AX_sifs_mactxen_t1 if ifstimer > (rx_air_end+t1), inform wmac txunit: 0.1us
1860C340h R_AX_cca_cfg_0
[31:24] RW 0x96 B_AX_r_sifs_aggr_time_V1 rx_air_end 後, r_sifs_aggr_time[6:0] * 0.1 us PTCL 停止 aggregation
[23:18] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[17] R/W 1 B_AX_TXPKTCTL_RST_EDCA_EN
[16] R/W 1 B_AX_WMAC_RST_EDCA_EN
[15:11] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[10] R/W 1 B_AX_EDCCA_PER20_BITMAP_SIFS_EN 1: TX TB PPDU 會檢查 EDCCA_PER20_BITMAP_SIFS
[9] R/W 1 B_AX_BTCCA_BRK_TXOP_EN 1: BT CCA break txop
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_NAV_BRK_TXOP_EN 1: NAV break txop
[7] R/W 1 B_AX_TX_NAV_EN 1: contention 會看 tx_nav
[6] R/W 1 B_AX_BCN_IGNORE_EDCCA Not ready
[5] R/W 1 B_AX_BTCCA_EN scheduler BTCCA 總開關. "1" scheduler 會看 BTCCA, "0" scheduler 不看. (Debug 用途)
[4] R/W 1 B_AX_EDCCA_EN scheduler EDCCA 總開關. "1" scheduler 會看 EDCCA, "0" scheduler 不看. (Debug 用途)
[3] R/W 1 B_AX_SEC80_EN scheduler SEC 80 總開關. "1" scheduler 會看 SEC 80 CCA, "0" scheduler 不看. (Debug 用途)
[2] R/W 1 B_AX_SEC40_EN scheduler SEC 40 總開關. "1" scheduler 會看 SEC 40 CCA, "0" scheduler 不看. (Debug 用途)
[1] R/W 1 B_AX_SEC20_EN scheduler SEC20 總開關. "1" scheduler 會看 SEC 20 CCA, "0" scheduler 不看. (Debug 用途)
[0] R/W 1 B_AX_CCA_EN scheduler primary 20M CCA 總開關. "1" scheduler 會看 CCA, "0" scheduler 不看. (Debug 用途)
1860C344h R_AX_misc_0
[31:28] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[27:24] R/W 9 B_AX_SCH_DBG_FORCE_ABORT_CNT extend scheduler debug force abort signal. (unit : 1us)
[23:20] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[19:16] R/W 0 B_AX_cmac_share_dbg_sel cmac share debug select
[15] W 0 B_AX_rst_freerun_p Write 1 to reset freerun counter
[14:13] RO 0 RSVD
[12] R/W 1 B_AX_SCH_ABORT_BRK_TB_EN "1" : clear scheduler tb timer logic when tx abort
[11] R/W 1 B_AX_SCH_ABORT_BRK_BURST_EN "1" : clear scheduler burst timer logic when tx abort
[10] R/W 1 B_AX_PORT_FUNC_EN_LOW_AUTO_RST “1” : reset port function logic when port function enable is low
9] R/W 0 B_AX_SCH_CLK_GATING_DIS "1" : scheduler disable dynamic clock gating. "0" : scheduler enable dynamic clock gating
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_en_freerun "1" : enable freerun counter
[7] W 0 B_AX_SCH_DBG_RST_EDCA_CLR_P "1" : clear sch_dbg_rst_edca signal
[6] R/W 0 B_AX_SCH_DBG_RST_EDCA_EN "1" : scheduler creates a sch_dbg_rst_edca signal to reset ifs timer when tx ppdu.
[5:4] R 0 RSVD
[3] W 0 B_AX_SCH_FORCE_ABORT_P "1" : create a pulse to try to abort PTCL/SCH tx.
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_SCH_FORCE_ABORT_AUTO_EN "1" : scheduler creates periodic 32 us pulse to try to abort PTCL/SCH tx. It is a stress test for PTCL/SCH tx abort procedure.
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_TXOP_RESP_EN "1" : allow response tx in txop.
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_en_tbtt_area_for_AX_bb

"1" : Can BO, Can TX
"0" : Can BO, Cannot TX
