[0] R/W 0 B_AX_nav_blk_mgq TBD (Not ready)
1860C350h R_AX_muedca_be_param_0
[31:16] R/W 0x00 B_AX_muedca_be_param_0_timer MU EDCA TIMER, in units of 32 us
Note: SPEC: The MU EDCA Timer field (8b) indicates the duration of time, in units of 8 TUs
[15:8] R/W 0xA4 B_AX_muedca_be_param_0_cw ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.
[7:0] R/W 0x2B B_AX_muedca_be_param_0_aifs Arbitrary Inter frame space
In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.
1860C354h R_AX_muedca_bk_param_0
[31:16] R/W 0x00 B_AX_muedca_bk_param_0_timer MU EDCA TIMER, in units of 32 us
Note: SPEC: The MU EDCA Timer field (8b) indicates the duration of time, in units of 8 TUs
[15:8] R/W 0xA5 B_AX_muedca_bk_param_0_cw ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.
[7:0] R/W 0x49 B_AX_muedca_bk_param_0_aifs Arbitrary Inter frame space
In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.
1860C358h R_AX_muedca_vi_param_0
[31:16] R/W 0x00 B_AX_muedca_vi_param_0_timer MU EDCA TIMER, in units of 32 us
Note: SPEC: The MU EDCA Timer field (8b) indicates the duration of time, in units of 8 TUs
[15:8] R/W 0x43 B_AX_muedca_vi_param_0_cw ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.
[7:0] R/W 0x26 B_AX_muedca_vi_param_0_aifs Arbitrary Inter frame space
In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.
1860C35Ch R_AX_muedca_vo_param_0
[31:16] R/W 0x00 B_AX_muedca_vo_param_0_timer MU EDCA TIMER, in units of 32 us
Note: SPEC: The MU EDCA Timer field (8b) indicates the duration of time, in units of 8 TUs
[15:8] R/W 0x32 B_AX_muedca_vo_param_0_cw ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.
[7:0] R/W 0x24 B_AX_muedca_vo_param_0_aifs Arbitrary Inter frame space
In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.

1860C380h R_AX_MUEDCATIMER_0
[31:16] $R/W 0 B_AX_MUEDCATIMER_BK_0 MUEDCATIMER for backup/restore flow in LPS
HW countdown this timer (until 0) in non-LPS state, and do compensate when restore (0x170[0]=0, clear timer)
Unit: 32 us.
[15:0] $R/W 0 B_AX_MUEDCATIMER_BE_0 MUEDCATIMER for backup/restore flow in LPS
HW countdown this timer (until 0) in non-LPS state, and do compensate when restore (0x170[0]=0, clear timer)
Unit: 32 us.
1860C384h R_AX_MUEDCATIMER_1
[31:16] $R/W 0 B_AX_MUEDCATIMER_VO_0 MUEDCATIMER for backup/restore flow in LPS
HW countdown this timer (until 0) in non-LPS state, and do compensate when restore
Unit: 32 us.
[15:0] $R/W 0 B_AX_MUEDCATIMER_VI_0 MUEDCATIMER for backup/restore flow in LPS
HW countdown this timer (until 0) in non-LPS state, and do compensate when restore
Unit: 32 us.

1860C390h R_AX_cca_control
[31] RW 1 B_AX_TB_CHK_TX_NAV When TX NAV > 0 in the SIFS before HE TB PPDU
0: Can TX
1: Cannot TX
[30] RW 1 B_AX_TB_CHK_BASIC_NAV When TF CS required = 1 and BAISC NAV > 0
in the SIFS before HE TB PPDU TX
0: Can TX
1: Cannot TX
[29] RW 1 B_AX_TB_CHK_BTCCA When TF CS required = 1 and BTCCA assert
in the SIFS before HE TB PPDU TX
0: Can TX
1: Cannot TX
[28] RW 1 B_AX_TB_CHK_EDCCA When TF CS required = 1 and EDCCA assert
in the SIFS before HE TB PPDU TX
0: Can TX
1: Cannot TX
[27] RW 1 B_AX_TB_CHK_CCA_S80 When TF CS required = 1 and SECONDARY_CCA_80 assert
in the SIFS before HE TB PPDU TX
0: Can TX
1: Cannot TX
[26] RW 1 B_AX_TB_CHK_CCA_S40 When TF CS required = 1 and SECONDARY_CCA_40 assert
in the SIFS before HE TB PPDU TX
0: Can TX
1: Cannot TX
[25] RW 1 B_AX_TB_CHK_CCA_S20 When TF CS required = 1 and SECONDARY_CCA_20 assert
in the SIFS before HE TB PPDU TX
0: Can TX
1: Cannot TX
[24] RW 1 B_AX_TB_CHK_CCA_P20 When TF CS required = 1 and CCA assert
in the SIFS before HE TB PPDU TX
0: Can TX
1: Cannot TX

0: Can TX
1: Cannot TX

0: Can TX
1: Cannot TX

1: Cannot TX

[8] RW 1 B_AX_CTN_CHK_TXNAV When TX NAV > 0 in the AIFS/Backoff before active TX
0: Can backoff, can TX
1: Cannot backoff, cannot TX
[7] RW 1 B_AX_CTN_CHK_INTRA_NAV When INTRA NAV > 0 in the AIFS/Backoff before active TX
0: Can backoff, can TX
1: Cannot backoff, cannot TX

0: Can backoff, can TX
1: Cannot backoff, cannot TX

0: Can backoff, can TX
1: Cannot backoff, cannot TX
[4] RW 1 B_AX_CTN_CHK_EDCCA When EDCCA assert in the AIFS/Backoff before active TX
0: Can backoff, can TX
1: Cannot backoff, cannot TX

0: Can backoff, can TX
1: Can backoff, cannot TX

[18] R/W 0 B_AX_DUMMY_18_REG
[17] R/W 0 B_AX_DUMMY_17_REG
[16] R/W 0 B_AX_DUMMY_16_REG
[15] R/W 0 B_AX_DUMMY_15_REG
[14] R/W 0 B_AX_DUMMY_14_REG
[13] R/W 0 B_AX_DUMMY_13_REG
[12] R/W 0 B_AX_DUMMY_12_REG
[11] R/W 0 B_AX_DUMMY_11_REG
[10] R/W 0 B_AX_DUMMY_10_REG
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_TXFIAL_BRK_TXOP_EN This bits control tx fail break/ not break txop.
"0" : tx fail break txop
"1" : tx fail NOT break txop
tx fail indicates receive unexpected frame or acktimeout after transmission.
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_DUMMY_8_REG
[7] R/W 0 B_AX_DUMMY_7_REG
[6] R/W 0 B_AX_DUMMY_6_REG
[5] R/W 0 B_AX_DUMMY_5_REG
[4] R/W 0 B_AX_DUMMY_4_REG
[3] R/W 0 B_AX_DUMMY_3_REG
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_DUMMY_2_REG
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_DUMMY_1_REG
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_DUMMY_0_REG
1860C400h R_AX_PORT_CFG_P0
[31:18] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[17] R/W 0 B_AX_PROHIB_END_CAL_EN_P0 1: Hold time end update TBTT count down
0: Hold time end DO NOT update TBTT count down
[16] R/W 1 B_AX_BRK_SETUP_P0 1: ACQ/ULQ TX breaks at setup time.
0: ACQ/ULQ TX may cross setup time.
[15] R/W 1 B_AX_TBTT_UPD_SHIFT_SEL_P0 1: TBTT count down timer is updated with mod and shift at TBTT.
0: TBTT count down timer is updated to beacon interval at TBTT.
[14] R/W 1 B_AX_BCN_DROP_ALLOW_P0 1: Allow HW drop beacon.
0: NOT allow HW drop beacon.
[13] R/W 1 B_AX_TBTT_PROHIB_EN_P0 1: Enable TBTT prohibit (setup time + hold time)
0: Disable TBTT prohibit and BCN TRX,but TBTT INT still send to FW.
[12] R/W 0 B_AX_BCNTX_EN_P0 1: Enable Beacon TX after TBTT.
0: Disable beacon TX and prohibit time.
[11:10] R/W 0 B_AX_NET_TYPE_P0 Network Type for port 0 (Default: 00b).
00: No link
01: Link in ad hoc network
10: Link in infrastructure network
11 : AP mode
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_FORCETX_EN_P0 1: Enable BCN TX force mode, 0: Disable
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_TXBCN_BTCCA_EN_P0 1: Enable Beacon Tx at TBTT if BT_CCA is enabled
0: Disable
[7] R/W 0 B_AX_BCNERR_CNT_EN_P0 1: Enable BCN error counter
0: Disable BCN error counter and reset counter to 0
[6] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_AGRES_P0 1: BCN PKT aggression TX.
0: BCN PKT normal TX.
[5] W1C 0 B_AX_TSFTR_RST_P0 Write 1 to reset tsft
[4] R/W 1 B_AX_RX_BSSID_FIT_EN_P0 1: HW will handle rx_beacon_pkt and do the following actions
0: HW will ignore rx_beacon_pkt and ignore the following actions
(a). update tsf timer
(b). generate rx bcn report
(c). rx beacon time record
[3] R/W 1 B_AX_TSF_UDT_EN_P0 1: Enable port 0 TSF update when RX beacon frames or probe response frames.
0: Disable port 0 TSF update when RX beacon frames or probe response frames.
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_PORT_FUNC_EN_P0 When this bit is set, TSF and other beacon related functions are then enabled.
1. MAC address of port path. (A1 match_enable)
2. Timestamp enable for port.
3. Interrupt source.(TSF)
[1] R/W 1 B_AX_TXBCN_RPT_EN_P0 1: Enable to issue TXBCN report in ad hoc and AP mode. 0: Disable.
[0] R/W 1 B_AX_RXBCN_RPT_EN_P0 1: Enable RXBCNOK report. 0: Disable.
1860C404h R_AX_TBTT_PROHIB_P0
[31:28] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[27:16] R/W 0xC8 B_AX_TBTT_HOLD_P0 TBTT prohibit hold time. unit: 32 us.
[15:8] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[7:0] R/W 0x02 B_AX_TBTT_SETUP_P0 TBTT prohibit setup time. unit: 32 us.
1860C408h R_AX_BCN_AREA_P0
[31:28] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[27:16] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_MSK_AREA_P0 Mask BCN contention area width. Unit: 32us
[15:12] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[11:0] R/W 0x60 B_AX_BCN_CTN_AREA_P0 BCN contention area 1 width. Unit: 32us ( Not ready)
1860C40Ch R_AX_BCNERLYINT_CFG_P0
[15:12] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[11:0] R/W 0xA0 B_AX_BCNERLY_P0 It is used to wake up early at BCN early time before TBTT and send interrupt to notify FW/SW. Unit: 32 us.
1860C40Eh R_AX_TBTTERLYINT_CFG_P0
[15:12] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[11:0] R/W 0x05 B_AX_TBTTERLY_P0 It is used to config BB/RF early at TBTT early time before TBTT and send interrupt to notify FW/SW. Unit: 1 us.
1860C412h R_AX_TBTT_AGG_P0
[15:8] R/W 1 B_AX_TBTT_AGG_NUM_P0 Set TBTT AGG number for DTIM TBTT. TBTT related INTs are NOT issued at non-DTIM TBTT.
[7:0] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
1860C414h R_AX_BCN_SPACE_CFG_P0
[31:24] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[23:16] R/W 0 B_AX_SUB_BCN_SPACE_P0 BCN interval of the VAP in port 0. Not valid for port 1~4. Unit: TU.
[15:0] R/W 0x64 B_AX_BCN_SPACE_P0 When MBSSID is disable, this field is the beacon interval. When MBSSID is enable, this register is the beacon space of root. Unit: TU.
1860C418h R_AX_BCN_FORCETX_P0
[31:24] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[23:16] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[15:8] R/W 0x01 B_AX_FORCE_BCN_NUM_P0 When BCN TX forced mode is enabled, force mode will be over after BCN TX OK number reaches this threshold. Set to 0 is equal to 1 (Still have 1 BCN in forced mode). (Not ready)
[7:0] R/W 0x10 B_AX_BCN_MAX_ERR_P0 When BCN TX error count goes over this threshold, BCN contention area 2 becomes forced mode (BCN will ignore CCA to TX). Set 0xFF to disable forced mode. (Not ready)
1860C420h R_AX_BCN_ERR_CNT_P0
[31:24] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_CNT_SUM_P0 BCN error total count of port 0
[23:16] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_CNT_NAV_P0 BCN error count caused by NAV of port 0
[15:8] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_CNT_EDCCA_P0 BCN error count caused by EDCCA of port 0
[7:0] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_CNT_CCA_P0 BCN error count caused by CCA of port 0
1860C424h R_AX_BCN_ERR_FLAG_P0
[15:7] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[6] W1C 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_FLAG_OTHERS_P0 BCN error flag caused by others of port 0. Write 1 clear. (Not ready)
[5] W1C 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_FLAG_MAC_P0 BCN error flag caused by MAC of port 0. Write 1 clear. (Not ready)
[4] W1C 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_FLAG_TXON_P0 BCN error flag caused by TXON of port 0. Write 1 clear. (Not ready)
[3] W1C 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_FLAG_SRCHEND_P0 BCN error flag caused by search until hold time end of port 0. Write 1 clear.
[2] W1C 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_FLAG_INVALID_P0 BCN error flag caused by INVALID of port 0. Write 1 clear.
[1] W1C 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_FLAG_CMP_P0 BCN error flag caused by BCN_SRCH_SEQ compare illegal of port 0. Write 1 clear.
[0] W1C 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_FLAG_LOCK_P0 BCN error flag caused by BCNQ locked until hold time end of port 0. Write 1 clear.
1860C426h R_AX_DTIM_CTRL_P0
[15:8] R/W 1 B_AX_DTIM_NUM_P0 Set the DTIM count of port 0.
[7:0] R/W 0 B_AX_DTIM_CURRCNT_P0 Current DTIM count of port 0.
1860C428h R_AX_TBTT_SHIFT_P0
[31:12] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[11:0] R/W 0 B_AX_TBTT_SHIFT_OFST_P0 TBTT shift offset. unit: TU.
Notice that this field is an signed number, it is minus value if MSB is 1.
Next TBTT counter = BCN_ITVL - (current TSF % BCN_ITVL) +- TBTT_SHIFT
1860C434h R_AX_BCN_CNT_TMR_P0
[31:0] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_CNT_TMR_P0 Beacon count down timer of port 0. Unit: us.
1860C438h R_AX_TSFTR_LOW_P0
[31:0] $R/W 1 B_AX_TSFTR_LOW_P0 TSFT TIMER low 32 bits of port 0
(需先寫 Low 32 bits 再寫 High 32 bits)
1860C43Ch R_AX_TSFTR_HIGH_P0
[31:0] $R/W 0 B_AX_TSFTR_HIGH_P0 TSFT TIMER high 32 bits of port 0
(需先寫 Low 32 bits 再寫 High 32 bits)
1860C440h R_AX_PORT_CFG_P1
[31:18] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[17] R/W 0 B_AX_PROHIB_END_CAL_EN_P1 1: Hold time end update TBTT count down
0: Hold time end DO NOT update TBTT count down
[16] R/W 1 B_AX_BRK_SETUP_P1 1: ACQ/ULQ TX breaks at setup time.
0: ACQ/ULQ TX may cross setup time.
[15] R/W 1 B_AX_TBTT_UPD_SHIFT_SEL_P1 1: TBTT count down timer is updated with mod and shift at TBTT.
0: TBTT count down timer is updated to beacon interval at TBTT.
[14] R/W 1 B_AX_BCN_DROP_ALLOW_P1 1: Allow HW drop beacon.
0: NOT allow HW drop beacon.
[13] R/W 1 B_AX_TBTT_PROHIB_EN_P1 1: Enable TBTT prohibit (setup time + hold time)
0: Disable TBTT prohibit and BCN TRX,but TBTT INT still send to FW.
[12] R/W 0 B_AX_BCNTX_EN_P1 1: Enable Beacon TX after TBTT.
0: Disable beacon TX and prohibit time.
[11:10] R/W 0 B_AX_NET_TYPE_P1 Network Type for port 1 (Default: 00b).
00: No link
01: Link in ad hoc network
10: Link in infrastructure network
11 : AP mode
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_FORCETX_EN_P1 1: Enable BCN TX force mode, 0: Disable
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_TXBCN_BTCCA_EN_P1 1: Enable Beacon Tx at TBTT if BT_CCA is enabled
0: Disable
[7] R/W 0 B_AX_BCNERR_CNT_EN_P1 1: Enable BCN error counter
0: Disable BCN error counter and reset counter to 0
[6] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_AGRES_P1 1: BCN PKT aggression TX.
0: BCN PKT normal TX.
[5] W1C 0 B_AX_TSFTR_RST_P1 Write 1 to reset tsft
[4] R/W 1 B_AX_RX_BSSID_FIT_EN_P1 1: HW will handle rx_beacon_pkt and do the following actions
0: HW will ignore rx_beacon_pkt and ignore the following actions
(a). update tsf timer
(b). generate rx bcn report
(c). rx beacon time record
[3] R/W 1 B_AX_TSF_UDT_EN_P1 1: Enable port 1 TSF update when RX beacon frames or probe response frames.
0: Disable port 1 TSF update when RX beacon frames or probe response frames.
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_PORT_FUNC_EN_P1 When this bit is set, TSF and other beacon related functions are then enabled.
1. MAC address of port path. (A1 match_enable)
2. Timestamp enable for port.
3. Interrupt source.(TSF)
[1] R/W 1 B_AX_TXBCN_RPT_EN_P1 1: Enable to issue TXBCN report in ad hoc and AP mode. 0: Disable.
[0] R/W 1 B_AX_RXBCN_RPT_EN_P1 1: Enable RXBCNOK report. 0: Disable.

1860C480h R_AX_PORT_CFG_P2
[30:18] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[17] R/W 0 B_AX_PROHIB_END_CAL_EN_P2 1: Hold time end update TBTT count down

0: TBTT count down timer is updated to beacon interval at TBTT.

0: NOT allow HW drop beacon.

0: Disable TBTT prohibit and BCN TRX,but TBTT INT still send to FW.

0: Disable beacon TX and prohibit time.
[11:10] R/W 0 B_AX_NET_TYPE_P2 Network Type for port 2 (Default: 00b).
00: No link
01: Link in ad hoc network
10: Link in infrastructure network
11 : AP mode
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_FORCETX_EN_P2 1: Enable BCN TX force mode, 0: Disable
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_TXBCN_BTCCA_EN_P2 1: Enable Beacon Tx at TBTT if BT_CCA is enabled
0: Disable

0: Disable BCN error counter and reset counter to 0

0: BCN PKT normal TX.

0: HW will ignore rx_beacon_pkt and ignore the following actions

[31:24] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_CNT_SUM_P2 BCN error total count of port 2

1860C4C0h R_AX_PORT_CFG_P3
[30:18] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[17] R/W 0 B_AX_PROHIB_END_CAL_EN_P3 1: Hold time end update TBTT count down
0: Hold time end DO NOT update TBTT count down
[16] R/W 1 B_AX_BRK_SETUP_P3 1: ACQ/ULQ TX breaks at setup time.
0: ACQ/ULQ TX may cross setup time.
[15] R/W 1 B_AX_TBTT_UPD_SHIFT_SEL_P3 1: TBTT count down timer is updated with mod and shift at TBTT.
0: TBTT count down timer is updated to beacon interval at TBTT.
[14] R/W 1 B_AX_BCN_DROP_ALLOW_P3 1: Allow HW drop beacon.
0: NOT allow HW drop beacon.
[13] R/W 1 B_AX_TBTT_PROHIB_EN_P3 1: Enable TBTT prohibit (setup time + hold time)
0: Disable TBTT prohibit and BCN TRX,but TBTT INT still send to FW.
[12] R/W 0 B_AX_BCNTX_EN_P3 1: Enable Beacon TX after TBTT.
0: Disable beacon TX and prohibit time.
[11:10] R/W 0 B_AX_NET_TYPE_P3 Network Type for port 3 (Default: 00b).
00: No link
01: Link in ad hoc network
10: Link in infrastructure network
11 : AP mode
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_FORCETX_EN_P3 1: Enable BCN TX force mode, 0: Disable
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_TXBCN_BTCCA_EN_P3 1: Enable Beacon Tx at TBTT if BT_CCA is enabled
0: Disable
[7] R/W 0 B_AX_BCNERR_CNT_EN_P3 1: Enable BCN error counter
0: Disable BCN error counter and reset counter to 0
[6] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_AGRES_P3 1: BCN PKT aggression TX.
0: BCN PKT normal TX.
[5] W1C 0 B_AX_TSFTR_RST_P3 Write 1 to reset tsft
[4] R/W 1 B_AX_RX_BSSID_FIT_EN_P3 1: HW will handle rx_beacon_pkt and do the following actions
0: HW will ignore rx_beacon_pkt and ignore the following actions
(a). update tsf timer
(b). generate rx bcn report
(c). rx beacon time record
[3] R/W 1 B_AX_TSF_UDT_EN_P3 1: Enable port 3 TSF update when RX beacon frames or probe response frames.
0: Disable port 3 TSF update when RX beacon frames or probe response frames.
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_PORT_FUNC_EN_P3 When this bit is set, TSF and other beacon related functions are then enabled.
1. MAC address of port path. (A1 match_enable)
2. Timestamp enable for port.
3. Interrupt source.(TSF)
[1] R/W 1 B_AX_TXBCN_RPT_EN_P3 1: Enable to issue TXBCN report in ad hoc and AP mode. 0: Disable.
[0] R/W 1 B_AX_RXBCN_RPT_EN_P3 1: Enable RXBCNOK report. 0: Disable.
1860C4C8h R_AX_BCN_AREA_P3
[31:28] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[27:16] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_MSK_AREA_P3 Mask BCN contention area width. Unit: 32us
[15:12] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[11:0] $RO 0 B_AX_BCN_CTN_AREA_P2 same value as B_AX_BCN_CTN_AREA_P1
1860C4CCh R_AX_BCNERLYINT_CFG_P3
[15:12] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[11:0] R/W 0xA0 B_AX_BCNERLY_P3 It is used to wake up early at BCN early time before TBTT and send interrupt to notify FW/SW. Unit: 32 us.
1860C4CEh R_AX_TBTTERLYINT_CFG_P3
[15:12] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[11:0] R/W 0x05 B_AX_TBTTERLY_P3 It is used to config BB/RF early at TBTT early time before TBTT and send interrupt to notify FW/SW. Unit: 1 us.
1860C4D2h R_AX_TBTT_AGG_P3
[15:8] R/W 1 B_AX_TBTT_AGG_NUM_P3 Set TBTT AGG number for DTIM TBTT. TBTT related INTs are NOT issued at non-DTIM TBTT.
[7:0] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
1860C4D4h R_AX_BCN_SPACE_CFG_P3
[31:16] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[15:0] R/W 0x64 B_AX_BCN_SPACE_P3 Beacon interval. Unit: TU.
1860C4D8h R_AX_BCN_FORCETX_P3
[31:24] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[23:16] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[15:8] R/W 0x01 B_AX_FORCE_BCN_NUM_P3 When BCN TX forced mode is enabled, force mode will be over after BCN TX OK number reaches this threshold. Set to 0 is equal to 1 (Still have 1 BCN in forced mode). (Not ready)
[7:0] R/W 0x10 B_AX_BCN_MAX_ERR_P3 When BCN TX error count goes over this threshold, BCN contention area 2 becomes forced mode (BCN will ignore CCA to TX). Set 0xFF to disable forced mode. (Not ready)
1860C4E0h R_AX_BCN_ERR_CNT_P3
[31:24] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_CNT_SUM_P3 BCN error total count of port 3
[23:16] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_CNT_NAV_P3 BCN error count caused by NAV of port 3
[15:8] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_CNT_EDCCA_P3 BCN error count caused by EDCCA of port 3
[7:0] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_CNT_CCA_P3 BCN error count caused by CCA of port 3
1860C4E4h R_AX_BCN_ERR_FLAG_P3
[15:7] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[6] W1C 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_FLAG_OTHERS_P3 BCN error flag caused by others of port 3. Write 1 clear. (Not ready)
[5] W1C 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_FLAG_MAC_P3 BCN error flag caused by MAC of port 3. Write 1 clear. (Not ready)
[4] W1C 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_FLAG_TXON_P3 BCN error flag caused by TXON of port 3. Write 1 clear. (Not ready)
[3] W1C 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_FLAG_SRCHEND_P3 BCN error flag caused by search until hold time end of port 3. Write 1 clear.
[2] W1C 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_FLAG_INVALID_P3 BCN error flag caused by INVALID of port 3. Write 1 clear.
[1] W1C 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_FLAG_CMP_P3 BCN error flag caused by BCN_SRCH_SEQ compare illegal of port 3. Write 1 clear.
[0] W1C 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_FLAG_LOCK_P3 BCN error flag caused by BCNQ locked until hold time end of port 3. Write 1 clear.
1860C4E6h R_AX_DTIM_CTRL_P3
[15:8] R/W 1 B_AX_DTIM_NUM_P3 Set the DTIM count of port 3.
[7:0] R/W 0 B_AX_DTIM_CURRCNT_P3 Current DTIM count of port 3.
1860C4E8h R_AX_TBTT_SHIFT_P3
[31:12] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[11:0] R/W 0 B_AX_TBTT_SHIFT_OFST_P3 TBTT shift offset. unit: TU.
Notice that this field is an signed number, it is minus value if MSB is 1.
Next TBTT counter = BCN_ITVL - (current TSF % BCN_ITVL) +- TBTT_SHIFT
1860C4F4h R_AX_BCN_CNT_TMR_P3
[31:0] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_CNT_TMR_P3 Beacon count down timer of port 3. Unit: us.
1860C4F8h R_AX_TSFTR_LOW_P3
[31:0] $R/W 1 B_AX_TSFTR_LOW_P3 TSFT TIMER low 32 bits of port 3
需先寫 Low 32 bits, 再寫 High 32 bits
1860C4FCh R_AX_TSFTR_HIGH_P3
[31:0] $R/W 0 B_AX_TSFTR_HIGH_P3 TSFT TIMER high 32 bits of port 3
需先寫 Low 32 bits, 再寫 High 32 bits
1860C500h R_AX_PORT_CFG_P4
[30:18] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[17] R/W 0 B_AX_PROHIB_END_CAL_EN_P4 1: Hold time end update TBTT count down
0: Hold time end DO NOT update TBTT count down

0: ACQ/ULQ TX may cross setup time.
[15] R/W 1 B_AX_TBTT_UPD_SHIFT_SEL_P4 1: TBTT count down timer is updated with mod and shift at TBTT.
0: TBTT count down timer is updated to beacon interval at TBTT.
[14] R/W 1 B_AX_BCN_DROP_ALLOW_P4 1: Allow HW drop beacon.
0: NOT allow HW drop beacon.

0: Disable TBTT prohibit and BCN TRX,but TBTT INT still send to FW.

0: Disable beacon TX and prohibit time.
[11:10] R/W 0 B_AX_NET_TYPE_P4 Network Type for port 4 (Default: 00b).
00: No link
01: Link in ad hoc network
10: Link in infrastructure network

[8] R/W 0 B_AX_TXBCN_BTCCA_EN_P4 1: Enable Beacon Tx at TBTT if BT_CCA is enabled
0: Disable

0: Disable BCN error counter and reset counter to 0
[6] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_AGRES_P4 1: BCN PKT aggression TX.

0: HW will ignore rx_beacon_pkt and ignore the following actions

(b). generate rx bcn report
(c). rx beacon time record
[3] R/W 1 B_AX_TSF_UDT_EN_P4 1: Enable port 4 TSF update when RX beacon frames or probe response frames.
0: Disable port 4 TSF update when RX beacon frames or probe response frames.
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_PORT_FUNC_EN_P4 When this bit is set, TSF and other beacon related functions are then enabled.
1. MAC address of port path. (A1 match_enable)
2. Timestamp enable for port.

[0] R/W 1 B_AX_RXBCN_RPT_EN_P4 1: Enable RXBCNOK report. 0: Disable.

1860C568h R_AX_MBSSID_CTRL
[31:20] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[19:16] R/W 0 B_AX_P0MB_NUM Number of MBSSID is utilized. Only odd number can be set. If even number is set, the last MBSSID will NOT be available.
[15] R/W 1 B_AX_P0MB15_EN 1: Enable auto MBSSID for virtual interface 15 of port 0.
0: Disable beacon TX, prohibit time and related INT for virtual interface 15 of port 0.
[14] R/W 1 B_AX_P0MB14_EN 1: Enable auto MBSSID for virtual interface 14 of port 0.
0: Disable beacon TX, prohibit time and related INT for virtual interface 14 of port 0.

0: Disable beacon TX, prohibit time and related INT for virtual interface 13 of port 0.

0: Disable beacon TX, prohibit time and related INT for virtual interface 12 of port 0.

0: Disable beacon TX, prohibit time and related INT for virtual interface 11 of port 0.

0: Disable beacon TX, prohibit time and related INT for virtual interface 10 of port 0.

0: Disable beacon TX, prohibit time and related INT for virtual interface 9 of port 0.

0: Disable beacon TX, prohibit time and related INT for virtual interface 8 of port 0.

0: Disable beacon TX, prohibit time and related INT for virtual interface 7 of port 0.

0: Disable beacon TX, prohibit time and related INT for virtual interface 6 of port 0.

0: Disable beacon TX, prohibit time and related INT for virtual interface 5 of port 0.

0: Disable beacon TX, prohibit time and related INT for virtual interface 4 of port 0.

1860C574h R_AX_RXBCN_TIME_CTRL
[31] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[30:28] R/W 0 B_AX_RXBCN_TIME_PORT Port selection for RX beacon time. 0 ~ 4: port 0 ~ 4. Others: RSVD.
[27:18] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[17] W1C 0 B_AX_RXBCN_TIME_VLD 1: RX beacon TSF record is valid. 0: Invalid. Write 1 clear valid bit.
[16] R 0 B_AX_RXBCN_TIME_UDFW 1: Difference value is underflow (before > after).
[15:0] R 0 B_AX_RXBCN_TIME_DIFF Difference of TSF between TSF sync before and after. Unit: us.
1860C578h R_AX_RXBCN_TIME_SYNC
[31:0] R 0 B_AX_RXBCN_TIME_SYNC RX beacon TSF record after TSF sync. Unit: us.
1860C57Ch R_AX_TBTT_TSF_INFO
[31:0] R 0 B_AX_TBTT_TSF_INFO Latch TSF[31:0] when tbtt_int occurs. Unit: us.
1860C590h R_AX_p0mb_hgq_window_cfg_0
[31:24] RW 2 B_AX_hgqwnd_3 Set hgq window size of port 0 MBSSID 3, unit : 1TU
[23:16] RW 2 B_AX_hgqwnd_2 Set hgq window size of port 0 MBSSID 2, unit : 1TU
[15:8] RW 2 B_AX_hgqwnd_1 Set hgq window size of port 0 MBSSID 1, unit : 1TU
[7:0] RW 2 B_AX_hgqwnd_0 Set hgq window size of port 0 root, unit : 1TU

[31:24] RW 2 B_AX_hgqwnd_7 Set hgq window size of port 0 MBSSID 7, unit : 1TU

[15:8] RW 2 B_AX_hgqwnd_5 Set hgq window size of port 0 MBSSID 5, unit : 1TU
[7:0] RW 2 B_AX_hgqwnd_4 Set hgq window size of port 0 MBSSID 4, unit : 1TU

[31:24] RW 2 B_AX_hgqwnd_11 Set hgq window size of port 0 MBSSID 11, unit : 1TU
[23:16] RW 2 B_AX_hgqwnd_10 Set hgq window size of port 0 MBSSID 10, unit : 1TU
[15:8] RW 2 B_AX_hgqwnd_9 Set hgq window size of port 0 MBSSID 9, unit : 1TU
[7:0] RW 2 B_AX_hgqwnd_8 Set hgq window size of port 0 MBSSID 8, unit : 1TU
1860C59Ch R_AX_p0mb_hgq_window_cfg_3
[31:24] RW 2 B_AX_hgqwnd_15 Set hgq window size of port 0 MBSSID 15, unit : 1TU

[7:0] RW 2 B_AX_hgqwnd_12 Set hgq window size of port 0 MBSSID 12, unit : 1TU

[31:24] RW 2 B_AX_hgqwnd_19 Set hgq window size of port 4, unit : 1TU

[15:8] RW 2 B_AX_hgqwnd_17 Set hgq window size of port 2, unit : 1TU
[7:0] RW 2 B_AX_hgqwnd_16 Set hgq window size of port 1, unit : 1TU

1860C5B8h R_AX_LPS_RX_PERIOD_CTRL
[31:24] R 0 RSVD
[23:16] RW 0 B_AX_RXBCN_PERIOD Rx Bcn Period:
This field is the period for waiting RX Bcn.
This period starts from TBTT. Unit: 64us
[15:8] RW 0 B_AX_CAT_PERIOD Consider Air Traffic Period
Stop count down RXBCN period if CCA is high during this period.
This period starts from TBTT. Unit: 32us
[7:4] R 0 rsvd
[3] RW 0 B_AX_LPS_RX_CTRL_EN Set this bit to 1 to enable the Rx period ctrl and Bcn count ctrl.
[2:0] RW 0 B_AX_LPS_PORT_SEL Port selection for LPS Rx period end ctrl and LPS_BCN_CNT.
1860C5BCh R_AX_LPS_BCN_CNT
[31:24] RW 0 B_AX_BCN_TO_ACC_CNT Rx Bcn timeout accumulated counter:
Record the accumulated Bcn timeout counter, this counter WON’T be reset when Rx Bcn.
[23:16] RW 0 B_AX_BCN_OK_ACC_CNT Rx Bcn ok accumulated counter :
Record the accumulated Bcn ok counter.
[15:8] RW 0 B_AX_BCN_TO_CNT_THD Rx Bcn timeout counter threshold
When BCN_TO_CNT > BCN_TO_CNT_THD, issue
BCN_TO_CNT_EVENT to wake WCPU.
[7:0] RW 0 B_AX_BCN_TO_CNT Rx Bcn timeout counter
This counter will increase when (“no Rx Bcn” & “count > RXBCN_PERIOD”). Scheduler reset this value when Rx Bcn
1860C5C0h R_AX_freerun_cnt_low
[31:0] $RW 0 B_AX_freerun_cnt_low freerun counter [31:0]
cmac0 and cmac 1 share same freerun counter.
需先寫 Low 32 bits 再寫 High 32 bits
1860C5C4h R_AX_freerun_cnt_high
[31:0] RW 0 B_AX_freerun_cnt_high freerun counter [63:32]
cmac0 and cmac 1 share same freerun counter.
需先寫 Low 32 bits 再寫 High 32 bits
1860C5CCh R_AX_PSTIMER0
[31:0] R/W 0 B_AX_PSTIMER0_VAL This register is set by driver/fw. When the lower 4 bytes of TSF(that select by B_AX_PSTIMER0_SEL) matches the trigger event of this register, the PSTIMER_0 interrupt is issued
1860C5D0h R_AX_PSTIMER1
[31:0] R/W 0 B_AX_PSTIMER1_VAL This register is set by driver/fw. When the lower 4 bytes of TSF(that select by B_AX_PSTIMER1_SEL) matches the trigger event of this register, the PSTIMER_1 interrupt is issued
1860C5D4h R_AX_PSTIMER2
[31:0] R/W 0 B_AX_PSTIMER2_VAL This register is set by driver/fw. When the lower 4 bytes of TSF(that select by B_AX_PSTIMER2_SEL) matches the trigger event of this register, the PSTIMER_2 interrupt is issued
1860C5D8h R_AX_PSTIMER3
[31:0] R/W 0 B_AX_PSTIMER3_VAL This register is set by driver/fw. When the lower 4 bytes of TSF(that select by B_AX_PSTIMER3_SEL) matches the trigger event of this register, the PSTIMER_3 interrupt is issued
1860C5DCh R_AX_PSTIMER4
[31:0] R/W 0 B_AX_PSTIMER4_VAL This register is set by driver/fw. When the lower 4 bytes of TSF(that select by B_AX_PSTIMER4_SEL) matches the trigger event of this register, the PSTIMER_4 interrupt is issued
1860C5E0h R_AX_PSTIMER5
[31:0] R/W 0 B_AX_PSTIMER5_VAL This register is set by driver/fw. When the lower 4 bytes of TSF(that select by B_AX_PSTIMER5_SEL) matches the trigger event of this register, the PSTIMER_5 interrupt is issued
1860C5E4h R_AX_PSTIMER_CTRL
[31:28] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[27] R/W 0 B_AX_PSTIMER6_EN PSTIMER6 Enable
[26:24] R/W 5 B_AX_PSTIMER6_SEL PSTIMER6 Source Select
0 for port 0, 1 for port1, 2 for port2, 3 for port3, 4 for port4, else for freerun counter
[23] R/W 0 B_AX_PSTIMER5_EN PSTIMER5 Enable
[22:20] R/W 5 B_AX_PSTIMER5_SEL PSTIMER5 Source Select
0 for port 0, 1 for port1, 2 for port2, 3 for port3, 4 for port4, else for freerun counter
[19] R/W 0 B_AX_PSTIMER4_EN PSTIMER4 Enable
[18:16] R/W 5 B_AX_PSTIMER4_SEL PSTIMER4 Source Select
0 for port 0, 1 for port1, 2 for port2, 3 for port3, 4 for port4, else for freerun counter
[15] R/W 0 B_AX_PSTIMER3_EN PSTIMER3 Enable
[14:12] R/W 5 B_AX_PSTIMER3_SEL PSTIMER3 Source Select
0 for port 0, 1 for port1, 2 for port2, 3 for port3, 4 for port4, else for freerun counter
[11] R/W 0 B_AX_PSTIMER2_EN PSTIMER2 Enable
[10:8] R/W 5 B_AX_PSTIMER2_SEL PSTIMER2 Source Select
0 for port 0, 1 for port1, 2 for port2, 3 for port3, 4 for port4, else for freerun counter
[7] R/W 0 B_AX_PSTIMER1_EN PSTIMER1 Enable
[6:4] R/W 5 B_AX_PSTIMER1_SEL PSTIMER1 Source Select
0 for port 0, 1 for port1, 2 for port2, 3 for port3, 4 for port4, else for freerun counter
[3] R/W 0 B_AX_PSTIMER0_EN PSTIMER0 Enable
[2:0] R/W 5 B_AX_PSTIMER0_SEL PSTIMER0 Source Select
0 for port 0, 1 for port1, 2 for port2, 3 for port3, 4 for port4, else for freerun counter
1860C5E8h R_AX_timer_compare
[31:8] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[7] W1C 0 B_AX_x_comp_y_tsft_p trigger X Y compare function
[6:4] R/W 0 B_AX_y_comp_sel select Y factor
[3] RO 0 B_AX_x_comp_y_over "1": X < Y. "0": X >= Y
[2:0] R/W 0 B_AX_x_comp_sel select X factor
1860C5ECh R_AX_timer_compare_value_low
[31:0] RO 0 B_AX_x_comp_y_val_low x compare y value bit 31:0
1860C5F0h R_AX_timer_compare_value_high
[31:0] RO 0 B_AX_x_comp_y_val_high x compare y value bit 63:32
1860C5F4h R_AX_PSTIMER6
[31:0] R/W 0 B_AX_PSTIMER6_VAL This register is set by driver/fw. When the lower 4 bytes of TSF(that select by B_AX_PSTIMER6_SEL) matches the trigger event of this register, the PSTIMER_6 interrupt is issued
1860C600h R_AX_PTCL_COMMON_SETTING_0
[31:16] R/W 0 RSVD
[15:14] R/W 0x1 B_AX_PCIE_MODE 2’b01 : GEN1 / 2’b10 : GEN2 / Others : RSVD
[13:9] R/W 0 RSVD
[8] R/W 0x0 B_AX_CPUMGQ_LIFETIME_EN Lifetime function enable bit for MGQ2
[7] R/W 0x0 B_AX_MGQ_LIFETIME_EN Lifetime function enable bit for MGQ0, MGQ1
[6] R/W 0x0 B_AX_LIFETIME_EN Lifetime function enable bit for ACQ, TWTQ, ULQ
[5] R/W 0 B_AX_DIS_PTCL_CLK_GATING
[4] R/W 0x0 B_AX_PTCL_TRIGGER_SS_EN_UL 1: enable PTCL triggering f2p_cmd_done (to STA scheduler), if F2P_CMD.NEXT_QSEL belong to UL
[3] R/W 0x0 B_AX_PTCL_TRIGGER_SS_EN_1 1: enable PTCL triggering f2p_cmd_done (to STA scheduler), if F2P_CMD.NEXT_QSEL belong to WMM1
[2] R/W 0x0 B_AX_PTCL_TRIGGER_SS_EN_0 1: enable PTCL triggering f2p_cmd_done (to STA scheduler), if F2P_CMD.NEXT_QSEL belong to WMM0
[1] R/W 0x1 B_AX_CMAC_TX_MODE_1 PTCL Tx mode for WMM 1
1: HW mode
0: SW mode
[0] R/W 0x1 B_AX_CMAC_TX_MODE_0 PTCL Tx mode for WMM 0
1: HW mode
0: SW mode
1860C604h R_AX_AGG_BK_0
[31:20] R/W 0 RSVD
[19] RW 1'h0 B_AX_EN_MU2SU_CHK_PROTECT_PPDU
[18] RW 1'h1 B_AX_RPT_TXOP_START_PROTECT
[17] RW 1'h0 B_AX_RANDOM_GEN_CMD_ABORT_EN
[16] RW 1'h1 B_AX_PHYTXON_ENDPS_RESP_CHK
[15] RW 1'h1 B_AX_CTN_CHK_SEQ_REQ_EN
[14] RW 1'h0 B_AX_PTCL_RLS_ALLFAIL_EN
[13] R/W 0 B_AX_MAX_AGG_NUM_FIX_MODE_EN 1: PTCL will only use 0xC610[7:0](B_AX_MAX_AGG_NUM) to break AMPDU
0: Disable this fix mode, PTCL uses the original AGG MAX NUM rules
[12] R/W 0 B_AX_DIS_MURU_SEC_Q_EMPTY_CHK 1: Disable check "Whether SEC USERs's ac queue is empty or not, let MURU DATA PPDU TX"
0: Enable check "If SEC USERs's ac queue is empty, Abort MURU DATA PPDU TX"
[11] R/W 0 B_AX_EN_SAMPDU_TXIME_TWT_CHECK 1: Enable check "PPDU which txpktnum = 1's TX time > TWT SP". If Yes, stop tx this f2ptxcmd.
0: Disable check "PPDU which txpktnum = 1's TX time > TWT SP"
[10] R/W 0 B_AX_DIS_SAMPDU_TXIME_P2P_CHECK 1: Disable check "PPDU which txpktnum = 1's TX time > P2P off time".
0: Enable check "PPDU which txpktnum = 1's TX time > P2P off time". If Yes, stop tx this f2ptxcmd.
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_DIS_SAMPDU_TXIME_BCN_CHECK 1: Disable check "PPDU which txpktnum = 1's TX time > BCN SETUP TIME".
0: Enable check "PPDU which txpktnum = 1's TX time > BCN SETUP TIME". If Yes, stop tx this f2ptxcmd.
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_DIS_UL_SEQ_ABORT_CHECK 1: Disable check "UL SEQ's TX time > BCN SETUP TIME/TWT SP/P2P off time".
0: Enable check "UL SEQ's TX time > BCN SETUP TIME/TWT SP/P2P off time". If Yes, abort this f2ptxcmd.
[7] R/W 0 B_AX_DIS_SND_STS_CHECK 1: PTCL will bypass "checking sounding status" step of MU2SU condtion
0: PTCL will check the sounding status of MU2SU condtion
[6] R/W 1 B_AX_NAV_PAUS_PHB_EN 1: Enable TXCMD paused if NAV cross setup time or during prohibit time.
0: Disable pause condition, Trigger sequence may cross into prohibit time.
* Not available in 8852A
[5] R/W 1 B_AX_TXOP_SHT_PHB_EN 1: Enable (protect all) TXOP shorten at setup time, and pause during prohibit time.
0: Disable break condition, (protect all) TXOP may cross into prohibit time.
* Not available in 8852A
[4] R/W 1 B_AX_AGG_BRK_PHB_EN 1: Enable AMPDU AGG break at setup time, (protect next) TXOP will be over at the same time. TX is paused during prohibit time.
0: Disable break condition, AMPDU / (protect next) TXOP may cross into prohibit time.
* Not available in 8852A
[3] R/W 0x0 B_AX_DIS_SSN_CHK Disable check the SSN rule when generating AMPDU TX cmd.
[2] R/W 0x0 B_AX_WDBK_CFG 0: WD.BK mode 0
1: WD.BK mode 1

mode 0:
WD.BK = 0: Aggregation proceed with this MPDU
WD.BK = 1: This MPDU is not aggregated with previous aggregation, but it can be aggregated in a new ARSVDMPDU (depending on the setting of AGG_EN)
mode 1:
only MPDUs with the same WD.BK value can be aggregated. 0 can be aggregated with 0, 1 can be aggregated with 1.
[1] R/W 0x1 B_AX_EN_RTY_BK 0: Follow CR.B_AX_EN_RTY_BK_COD
1: Retried MPDU can not be aggregated with new MPDU
[0] R/W 0x0 B_AX_EN_RTY_BK_COD 0: Retried MPDU can be aggregated with new MPDU
1:
If rate of the first retried MPDU is the same as initial rate, retried MPDU can be aggregated with new MPDU
If rate of the first retried MPDU is different with initial rate, retried MPDU can not be aggregated with new MPDU
1860C608h R_AX_TX_CTRL
[31:24] R/W 0x40 B_AX_DROP_CHK_MAX_NUM maximum number of packet can be check in a MACID drop or lifetime drop event
[23:20] R/W 0x6 B_AX_DROP_CHK_TIMEOUT timeout for MACID drop or lifetime drop event
[19:16] R/W 0x6 B_AX_FWD_SRCH_TIMEOUT forward search timeout (note: ≦ slot time)
unit: 1 us
[15:8] R/W 0 RSVD
[7] R/W 0x0 B_AX_PTCL_STOP_WMM 1: stop WMM Tx path (WMM0/1/2/3), TWT Tx path and UL Tx path
包含主動 Tx (含 spatial reuse), HE TB PPDU Tx
[6:5] R/W 0 RSVD
[4:0] R/W 0x0 B_AX_TXOP_DELAY_TX define W: the maximum Tx delay in TXOP
Tx deadline(PLCP start) = SIFS(16us) + W after CCA falling edge
Unit: 1 us
1860C60Ch R_AX_TB_PPDU_CTRL
[31:16] R/W 0 RSVD
[15] R/W 0x0 B_AX_TB_PPDU_BK_DIS 1: TB PPDU do not Tx this AC
[14] R/W 0x0 B_AX_TB_PPDU_BE_DIS 1: TB PPDU do not Tx this AC
[13] R/W 0x0 B_AX_TB_PPDU_VI_DIS 1: TB PPDU do not Tx this AC
[12] R/W 0x0 B_AX_TB_PPDU_VO_DIS 1: TB PPDU do not Tx this AC
[11:3] R/W 0 RSVD
[2] R/W 0x0 B_AX_TB_BYPASS_TXPWR Note: TXPWR module已有option, 當無法滿足TXPWR時會給PWR上限 or 給不Tx flag, PTCL 此bit 8852A已做了, 但下一顆IC要移除
[1:0] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SW_PREFER_AC HE TB PPDU 將指定 AC priority 提至最高, 其餘依 VO > VI > BE > BK 排序
0: BE (default 排序)
1: BK
2: VI
3: VO
1860C610h R_AX_AMPDU_AGG_LIMIT
[31:24] R/W 0xA5 B_AX_AMPDU_MAX_TIME unit: 32us
[23:16] R/W 0x3F B_AX_RA_TRY_RATE_AGG_LMT The aggregation packet number limit (= B_AX_RA_TRY_RATE_AGG_LMT + 1) for try up rate of rate adaptive when descriptor Try bit is set.
[15:8] R/W 0x3F B_AX_RTS_MAX_AGG_NUM In RTS frame exchange sequence, the maximum aggregation packet number limit = B_AX_RTS_MAX_AGG_NUM + 1
[7:0] R/W 0x3F B_AX_MAX_AGG_NUM the maximum aggregation packet number limit = B_AX_MAX_AGG_NUM + 1
1860C614h R_AX_AGG_LEN_HT_0
[31:16] R/W 0xFFFF B_AX_AMPDU_MAX_LEN_HT HT PPDU 限制, need to support 65,535 octets
Unit: Byte
[15:8] R/W 0 B_AX_RTS_TXTIME_TH RTS packet txtime threshold (unit: 32us)
[7:0] R/W 0 B_AX_RTS LEN_TH RTS packet Length threshold (unit: 16byte).
1860C618h R_AX_AGG_LEN_VHT_0
[31:20] R/W 12'h91A B_AX_OFDM_LEN_TH when rate is OFDM rate and length thrushold default is 2330 bytes(mac header + payload)
[19:0] R/W 0xFFFFF B_AX_AMPDU_MAX_LEN_VHT VHT PPDU 限制, need to support 1,048,575 octets
Unit: Byte
1860C61Ch R_AX_AGG_LEN_HE_0
[31:23] R/W 0 RSVD
[22:0] R/W 0x633117 B_AX_AMPDU_MAX_LEN_HE HE PPDU 限制, need to support 6,500,631 octets
Unit: Byte
1860C620h R_AX_SPECIAL_TX_SETTING
[31] R/W 0x1 B_AX_TRI_PADDING_EXTEND
[30] R/W 0 RSVD
[29:28] R/W 0x0 B_AX_BW_SIGTA
[27] R/W 0x0 B_AX_USE_DATA_BW
[26] R/W 0x1 B_AX_BMC_NAV_PROTECT
[25:24] R/W 0 RSVD
[23:20] RW 4'h4 B_AX_BAR_TXRATE_FOR_NULL_WD
[19:18] R/W 0x0 B_AX_STBC_CFEND
[17:9] R/W 0xC B_AX_STBC_CFEND_RATE
[8:0] R/W 0x4 B_AX_Basic_CFEND_RATE
1860C624h R_AX_SIFS_SETTING
[31:24] R/W 0x8 B_AX_HW_CTS2SELF_PKT_LEN_TH When B_AX_HW_CTS2SELF_EN = 1 & B_AX_HW_CTS2SELF_PKT_LEN_TH > 0 & TXPKTNUM = 1,
If first WD.txpktsize > B_AX_HW_CTS2SELF_PKT_LEN_TH (UNIT : 256B) & SEC_TYPE != WEP/TKIP/WAPI,
PTCL will TX CTS2SELF before that pkt in order to extend the time of DMA fetching payload
[23:18] R/W 0 B_AX_HW_CTS2SELF_PKT_LEN_TH_TWW When B_AX_HW_CTS2SELF_EN = 1 & B_AX_HW_CTS2SELF_PKT_LEN_TH_TWW > 0 & TXPKTNUM = 1,
If first WD.txpktsize > B_AX_HW_CTS2SELF_PKT_LEN_TH (UNIT : 256B) & SEC_TYPE == WEP/TKIP/WAP,
PTCL will TX CTS2SELF before that pkt in order to extend the time of DMA fetching payload
[17] R/W 0 RSVD
[16] R/W 0x0 B_AX_HW_CTS2SELF_EN HW CTS2SELF ENABLE
[15:8] R/W 0x10 B_AX_SPEC_SIFS_OFDM_PTCL
[7:0] R/W 0x10 B_AX_SPEC_SIFS_CCK_PTCL
1860C628h R_AX_TXRATE_CHK
[31:24] R/W 0x0 B_AX_LATENCY_PADDING_PKT_TH SEC USERs組的筆數小於等於CR.LATENCY_PADDING_PKT_TH+1就要補對應的LATENCY_PADDING
[23:16] R/W 0x10 B_AX_PLCP_FETCH_BUFF BB來要payload前MAC可以先搬的時間, 實際約略為22~23 us, CR預設值先預設為16us
[15:7] R/W 0x87 B_AX_DEFT_RATE Default tx rate is HT MCS7 , if invalid band or invalid TxNSS happens change to this CR setting
[6] RW 1'h0 B_AX_OFDM_CCK_ERR_PROC
[5] R/W 0 B_AX_PKT_LAST_TX OFDM rate & >2304B / 1st AMSDU pkt time >5.484ms / Tx NSS > 0xC628[3:2] 上述error case 發生就會把last_tx舉1
[4] R/W 0 B_AX_BAND_MODE Operation band check condition
0: 5GHz; 1:2.4GHz
[3:2] R/W 1 B_AX_MAX_TXNSS Tx Nss check condition
0: 1SS; 1: 2SS, 2: 3SS, 3: 4SS
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_Rts_limit_in_ofdm6 If this bit is set, HW check Tx pkt’s data rate. If Rts rate is CCK rate, RTS is fixed to OFDM6.
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_CHECK_CCK_EN If this bit is set, HW check Tx pkt’s data rate. When data rate is CCK rate, modify the rate to OFDM6
1860C62Ch R_AX_TXCNT
[31] R/W 0 B_AX_ADD_TXCNT_BY 0 : fetch pkt num by TMAC 1: fetch pkt num by CMAC DMA

[23:22] R/W 0 rsvd
[21:16] R/W 0x20 B_AX_L_TXCNT_LMT Long tx cnt limit
[15:0] R/W 0 RSVD

1860C63Ch R_AX_MBSSID_DROP_0
[31] R/W 0 RSVD
[30] R/W 0 B_AX_gi_ltf_fb_sel 0: no GI_LTF fallback
1: GI_LTF fallback option 1 enabled (downgrade GI_LTF first from init. rate)
Others RSVD
[29:24] R/W 0 B_AX_rate_sel New ARFR (REG 0x40) rate group selection:
0: CCK1M – OFDM18M
1: OFDM24MRSVDOFDM54 , other no use
2: HT MCS0~MCS7
3: HT MCS8~MCS15
4: HT MCS16~MC23
5: HT MCS24~MCS31
6:VHT1SS/ MCS0~MCS7
7:VHT1SS/ MCS8~MCS9,other no use
…
…
…
20:VHT 8SS/ MCS0~MCS7
21:VHT 8SS/MCS8~MCS9,other no use
22:HE 1SS /MCS0~MCS7
23:HE 1SS /MCS8~MCS11 ,other no use
…
…
…
36:HE 1SS /MCS0~MCS7
37:HE 1SS /MCS8~MCS11 ,other no use

Others: rsvd
[23:21] R/W 0 RSVD
[20:16] R/W 0x0 B_AX_PORT_DROP_4_0 1: PORT4~PORT0 Drop (per bit controlled)
[15:0] R/W 0x0 B_AX_MBSSID_DROP_15_0 1: BSSID15~BSSID0 Drop (per bit controlled)

1860C654h R_AX_PTCL_ATM
[31] R/W 0x0 B_AX_CHNL_REF_RX_BASIC_NAV Busy time reference RX basic NAV (Rx)
[30] R/W 0x0 B_AX_CHNL_REF_RX_INTRA_NAV Busy time reference RX intra NAV (Rx)
[29] R/W 0x0 B_AX_CHNL_REF_DATA_ON Busy time reference data_on (Rx)
[28] R/W 0x0 B_AX_CHNL_REF_EDCCA_P20 Busy time reference EDCCA (Rx)
[27] R/W 0x0 B_AX_CHNL_REF_CCA_P20 Busy time reference primary 20 CCA (Rx)
[26] R/W 0x0 B_AX_CHNL_REF_CCA_S20 Busy time reference secondary 20 CCA (Rx)
[25] R/W 0x0 B_AX_CHNL_REF_CCA_S40 Busy time reference secondary 40 CCA (Rx)
[24] R/W 0x0 B_AX_CHNL_REF_CCA_S80 Busy time reference secondary 80 CCA (Rx)
[23] R/W 0 B_AX_CHNL_REF_PHY_TXON Busy time reference phy_txon (Tx)
[22:20] R/W 0 RSVD
[19] RW 0x0 B_AX_RST_CHNL_BUSY Write “one” to set the counter to zero. (channel busy time) (由於屬性是 RW, 需要再寫成 0)
[18] RW 0x0 B_AX_RST_CHNL_IDLE Write “one” to set the counter to zero. (channel idle time) (由於屬性是 RW, 需要再寫成 0)
[17] R/W 0x0 B_AX_CHNL_INFO_EN 0: stop counter (no clear counter)
1: start count (no clear counter)
[16] R/W 0x0 B_AX_ATM_AIRTIME_EN 0 : If this bit disable, no need to count air time
1 : If this bit enable, count air time and paste to TXRPT
[15:14] R/W 0 RSVD
[13] R/W 0x1 B_AX_ATM_PRI
[12] R/W 0x1 B_AX_ATM_TF_UD After Trigger frame sequence Tx, update SS_SRAM.quota
0: do not update
1: update UL quota
[11:10] R/W 0x0 B_AX_ATM_SR_UD_1 After WMM1 spatial reuse Tx, update SS_SRAM.quota
0: do not update
1: update DL quota
2: update UL quota
3: update both DL quota and UL quota
[9:8] R/W 0x0 B_AX_ATM_SR_UD_0 After WMM0 spatial reuse Tx, update SS_SRAM.quota
0: do not update
1: update DL quota
2: update UL quota
3: update both DL quota and UL quota
[7:6] R/W 0x0 B_AX_ATM_TB_UD_1 After WMM1 HE TB PPDU Tx, update SS_SRAM.quota
0: do not update
1: update DL quota
2: update UL quota
3: update both DL quota and UL quota
[5:4] R/W 0x0 B_AX_ATM_TB_UD_0 After WMM0 HE TB PPDU Tx, update SS_SRAM.quota
0: do not update
1: update DL quota
2: update UL quota
3: update both DL quota and UL quota
[3:2] R/W 0x1 B_AX_ATM_TX_UD_1 After WMM1 normal Tx, update SS_SRAM.quota
0: do not update
1: update DL quota
2: update UL quota
3: update both DL quota and UL quota
[1:0] R/W 0x1 B_AX_ATM_TX_UD_0 After WMM0 normal Tx, update SS_SRAM.quota
0: do not update
1: update DL quota
2: update UL quota
3: update both DL quota and UL quota

1860C660h R_AX_PTCLRPT_FULL_HDL
[31:22] R/W 0 RSVD
[21:16] RW 6'h20 B_AX_CMAC_DMA_BLOCK_TX_THD
[15:12] R/W 0xA B_AX_RPT_LATCH_PHY_TIME set latch r2t_collision, t2r_collision time after falling edge of normal txon. (unit: us)
[11] R/W 0 RSVD
[10] R/W 0x0 B_AX_TXOP_END_RPT_EN 1 : Generate extra TXRPT(TXOP_END bit = 1)
0 : Do not generate extra TXRPT for TXOP_END
[9] R/W 0x0 B_AX_F2PCMD_FWWD_RLS_MODE 0: basic trigger/BSRP/Sounding to macid_drop queue, he sig-b/MU-RTS/MU-BAR to no report queue (default)
1: all FW PKT ID to no report queue
[8] R/W 0x1 B_AX_F2PCMD_RPT_EN 1 : Generate F2PCMDRPT
0 : Do not generate F2PCMDRPT
[7:6] R/W 0x0 B_AX_BCN_RPT_PATH 0 : To Driver
1 : To WLCPU
2 : To Data CPU (RSVD)
3 : RSVD
[5:4] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SPE_RPT_PATH 0 : To Driver
1 : To WLCPU
2 : To Data CPU (RSVD)
3 : RSVD
[3:2] R/W 0x1 B_AX_TX_RPT_PATH 0 : To Driver
1 : To WLCPU
2 : To Data CPU (RSVD)
3 : RSVD
[1] R/W 0x0 B_AX_F2PCMDRPT_FULL_DROP 1: CMAC_DMA issues full_signal to PTCL (then PTCL drops this F2PCMD report)
0: PTCL wait for quota becoming available (then PTCL blocks the next txcmd)
[0] R/W 0x0 B_AX_NON_F2PCMDRPT_FULL_DROP 1: CMAC_DMA issues full_signal to PTCL (then PTCL drops this nonRSVDF2PCMD report)
0: PTCL wait for quota becoming available (then PTCL blocks the next txcmd)

[15:11] RW 5'h0 RSVD
[10:8] RW 3'h7 B_AX_F2PRLS_PRTID_NO_RPT "7" : WDRLS port
[7:6] RW 2'h0 RSVD
[5:0] RW 6'h4 B_AX_F2PRLS_QUEID_NO_RPT "4" : WDRLS port, No report queue

[15:8] R/W 0x0 B_AX_TXOP_BK_PKT_NUM When aggregation number < BIT_TXOP_LMT_PKT_NUM break TXOP

When TX time < BIT_TXOP_LMT_TX_TIME break TXOP

1860C67Ch R_AX_BT_PLT
31:16 RO 0 B_AX_BT_PLT_PKT_CNT
15:10 R/W 0 RSVD
9 W1C 0 B_AX_BT_PLT_RST reset B_AX_BT_PLT_PKT_CNT
8 R/W 0 B_AX_PLT_EN Enable polluted mechanism
7 R/W 0 B_AX_RX_PLT_GNT_LTE_RX 等Response過程中發現 LTE_RX = 1則為BT polluted
6 R/W 0 B_AX_RX_PLT_GNT_BT_RX 等Response過程中發現 GNT_BT_RX = 1則為BT polluted
5 R/W 0 B_AX_RX_PLT_GNT_BT_TX 等Response過程中發現 GNT_BT_TX = 1則為BT polluted
4 R/W 0 B_AX_RX_PLT_GNT_WL 等Response過程中發現 GNT_WL = 0則為BT polluted
3 R/W 0 B_AX_TX_PLT_GNT_LTE_RX TX 過程中發現 LTE_RX = 1則為BT polluted
2 R/W 0 B_AX_TX_PLT_GNT_BT_RX TX 過程中發現 GNT_BT_RX = 1則為BT polluted
1 R/W 0 B_AX_TX_PLT_GNT_BT_TX TX 過程中發現 GNT_BT_TX = 1則為BT polluted
0 R/W 0 B_AX_TX_PLT_GNT_WL TX 過程中發現 GNT_WL = 0則為BT polluted

1860C690h R_AX_BCNQ_CTRL
[31] $RO 0 B_AX_BCNQ_LOCK_STUS After B_AX_BCNQ_LOCK_B0 is set, this status shows the operation permission is obtained or not.
1: BCNQ operation permission is obtained by FW.
0: HW still has BCNQ operation permission.

[1] R/W 0 B_AX_BCNQ_PKTIN_EN
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_BCNQ_LOCK Set 1 to request to lock band 0 BCNQ operation permission for FW. After FW operation done, this bit shall set to 0.

1860C6C0h R_AX_PTCL_IMR0
[31] R/W 1 B_AX_F2PCMD_PKTID_ERR_INT_EN PTCL GET到一筆 0xfff 的 f2ptxcmd pktid
[30] R/W 1 B_AX_F2PCMD_RD_PKTID_ERR_INT_EN PTCL GET到 f2ptxcmd 中 MURTS/SIGB WD pktid 為 0xfff 無效位置
[29] R/W 1 B_AX_F2PCMD_ASSIGN_PKTID_ERR_INT_EN PTCL GET到 f2ptxcmd 中 某一筆 FW WD pktid為 0xfff 無效位置
[28] R/W 1 B_AX_F2PCMD_USER_ALLC_ERR_INT_EN f2ptxcmd MU/RU時 各user的TX AGG NUM配置相加超過 128 限制
[27] R/W 1 B_AX_RX_SPF_U0_PKTID_ERR_INT_EN 分析 user_0 的第一筆WD時 GET 到 pktid 為 0xfff 無效位置
[26] R/W 1 B_AX_TX_SPF_U1_PKTID_ERR_INT_EN 分析 user_1 的第一筆WD時 GET 到 pktid 為 0xfff 無效位置
[25] R/W 1 B_AX_TX_SPF_U2_PKTID_ERR_INT_EN 分析 user_2 的第一筆WD時 GET 到 pktid 為 0xfff 無效位置
[24] R/W 1 B_AX_TX_SPF_U3_PKTID_ERR_INT_EN 分析 user_3 的第一筆WD時 GET 到 pktid 為 0xfff 無效位置
[23] R/W 1 B_AX_TX_RECORD_PKTID_ERR_INT_EN 要累加TXCNT時從TMAC端時 GET 到 pktid 為 0xfff 無效位置
[22:16] R/W 1 RSVD
[15] R/W 1 B_AX_F2PCMD_EMPTY_ERR_INT_EN 沒有 F2PCMD 可以 TX, DEL ptcl_q_empty[15:8] = 8'hFF.
[14] R/W 1 B_AX_TWTSP_QSEL_ERR_INT_EN F2pcmd for twtsp_start, twtsp_end, but qsel not twtq
[13] R/W 1 RSVD
[12] R/W 1 B_AX_BCNQ_ORDER_ERR_INT_EN BCNQ forward search and fine order bit error value. EX: order = 0 and 2, and not decide which PKTID first push in BCNQ.
[11] R/W 1 B_AX_Q_PKTID_ERR_INT_EN Ptcl q operation display pktid == 0xFFF(null page)
[10] R/W 1 B_AX_D_PKTID_ERR_INT_EN Ptcl d operation display pktid == 0xFFF(null page)
[9] R/W 1 B_AX_TXPRT_FULL_DROP_ERR_INT_EN Ptcl drop txrpt because cmac_dma full
[8] R/W 1 B_AX_F2PCMDRPT_FULL_DROP_ERR_INT_EN Ptcl drop f2pcmdrpt because cmac_dma full
[7:2] R/W 1 RSVD RSVD
[1] R/W 1 B_AX_FSM1_TIMEOUT_ERR_INT_EN State machine of PTCL over 32us, and not retrun idle state
[0] R/W 1 B_AX_FSM_TIMEOUT_ERR_INT_EN State machine of PTCL over 32us, and not retrun idle state
1860C6C4h R_AX_PTCL_ISR0
[31] R/W1C 1 B_AX_F2PCMD_PKTID_ERR PTCL GET到一筆 0xfff 的 f2ptxcmd pktid
[30] R/W1C 1 B_AX_F2PCMD_RD_PKTID_ERR PTCL GET到 f2ptxcmd 中 MURTS/SIGB WD pktid 為 0xfff 無效位置
[29] R/W1C 1 B_AX_F2PCMD_ASSIGN_PKTID_ERR PTCL GET到 f2ptxcmd 中 某一筆 FW WD pktid為 0xfff 無效位置
[28] R/W1C 1 B_AX_F2PCMD_USER_ALLC_ERR f2ptxcmd MU/RU時 各user的TX AGG NUM配置相加超過 128 限制
[27] R/W1C 1 B_AX_RX_SPF_U0_PKTID_ERR 分析 user_0 的第一筆WD時 GET 到 pktid 為 0xfff 無效位置
[26] R/W1C 1 B_AX_TX_SPF_U1_PKTID_ERR 分析 user_1 的第一筆WD時 GET 到 pktid 為 0xfff 無效位置
[25] R/W1C 1 B_AX_TX_SPF_U2_PKTID_ERR 分析 user_2 的第一筆WD時 GET 到 pktid 為 0xfff 無效位置
[24] R/W1C 1 B_AX_TX_SPF_U3_PKTID_ERR 分析 user_3 的第一筆WD時 GET 到 pktid 為 0xfff 無效位置
[23] R/W1C 1 B_AX_TX_RECORD_PKTID_ERR 要累加TXCNT時從TMAC端時 GET 到 pktid 為 0xfff 無效位置
[22:16] R/W1C 0 RSVD
[15] R/W1C 1 B_AX_F2PCMD_EMPTY_ERR 沒有 F2PCMD 可以 TX, DEL ptcl_q_empty[15:8] = 8'hFF.
[14] R/W1C 1 B_AX_TWTSP_QSEL_ERR F2pcmd for twtsp_start, twtsp_end, but qsel not twtq
[13] R/W1C 1 RSVD
[12] R/W1C 1 B_AX_BCNQ_ORDER_ERR BCNQ forward search and fine order bit error value. EX: order = 0 and 2, and not decide which PKTID first push in BCNQ.
[11] R/W1C 1 B_AX_Q_PKTID_ERR Ptcl q operation display pktid == 0xFFF(null page)
[10] R/W1C 1 B_AX_D_PKTID_ERR Ptcl d operation display pktid == 0xFFF(null page)
[9] R/W1C 1 B_AX_TXPRT_FULL_DROP_ERR Ptcl drop txrpt because cmac_dma full
[8] R/W1C 1 B_AX_F2PCMDRPT_FULL_DROP_ERR Ptcl drop f2pcmdrpt because cmac_dma full
[7:1] R/W1C 0 RSVD RSVD
[0] R/W1C 1 B_AX_FSM_TIMEOUT_ERR State machine of PTCL over 32us, and not retrun idle state

[31:0] RW 32'h0 B_AX_PTCL_IMR1

[31:0] RO 0 B_AX_F2PCMD_PKTID_INFO_PRI

[31:0] RO 0 B_AX_F2PCMD_PKTID_INFO_S1_S0

[31:0] RO 0 B_AX_F2PCMD_PKTID_INFO_S5_S4
1860C6E0h R_AX_PTCL_RST_CTRL
[31:25] R/W 0 RSVD
[24] $RO 0 B_AX_PTCL_TX_FINISH_REQ_STATUS "1" : ptcl tx finish job is still processing, enabled by write 1 to 0x00E0[0]. "0" : ptcl tx finish job is done or idle.
[23:10] R/W 0 RSVD
[9:8] RW 1 B_AX_FSM1_TIMEOUT_THB_AX_UNIT FSM1 timeout unit:
0/1/2/3 : 32/64/128/256 ms
[7:5] RW 0 RSVD
[4] W1C 0 B_AX_RPT_ABORT_CNT_RST
[3] R/W 0 B_AX_DUMMY
[2] RW 0 B_AX_TX_ABORT_ALWAYS_END_CMD "1" : Roll back to 52A. Always send end_cmd if tx_abort occurs.
[1] R/W 1 B_AX_PTCL_WDE_EN "1" : enable PTCL to DMAC interface. "0" : disable PTCL to DMAC interface. EX: DLE q/d operation and txpktctl cmd.
[0] W1C 0 B_AX_PTCL_TX_FINISH_REQ Write 1 to enabe tx finish procedure manully.
1860C6E8h R_AX_PTCL_FSM_MON
[31] R/W 0 RSVD
[30] R/W 0x1 B_AX_PTCL_FSM2_TO_MODE
[29:24] R/W 0x20 B_AX_PTCL_FSM2_TO_THR
[23] R/W 0 RSVD
[22] R/W 0x1 B_AX_PTCL_FSM1_TO_MODE
[21:16] R/W 0x20 B_AX_PTCL_FSM1_TO_THR
[15] R/W 0 RSVD
[14] R/W 0x1 B_AX_PTCL_FSM0_TO_MODE
[13:8] R/W 0x20 B_AX_PTCL_FSM0_TO_THR
[7] R/W 0 RSVD
[6] R/W 0x1 B_AX_PTCL_TX_ARB_TO_MODE
[5:0] R/W 0x20 B_AX_PTCL_TX_ARB_TO_THR
1860C6ECh R_AX_PTCL_TX_CTN_SEL
[31:9] RO 0 RSVD
[8] RO 0 B_AX_PTCL_TXOP_STAT 當成功收到 response frame 時, 會設1
EX:
RTS++CTS後TXOP flag = 1
Data++ACK後TXOP flag = 1
CTS2SELF後TXOP flag = 1 (不需response的frame, 則是Tx 成功後設1)
當timer數完, 或queue empty會清0
[7] RO 0 B_AX_PTCL_tx_on_stat queue idx valid "1" : indicates txon
[6] RO 0 RSVD
[5] RO 0 B_AX_PTCL_DROP PTCL drop pkt flag, 1: doing drop
[4:0] RO 0 B_AX_PTCL_tx_QUEUE_IDX queue idx // 定義如下, 0 ~ 15 對應 scheduler 的 backoff engine. 16 是 TB PPDU.
“0" : WMM 0 BE
“1" : WMM 0 BK
“2" : WMM 0 VI
“3" : WMM 0 VO
“4" : WMM 1 BE
“5" : WMM 1 BK
“6" : WMM 1 VI
“7" : WMM 1 VO
“8" : Normal MGQ
“9" : No power save MGQ
"10": Fast EDCA MGQ
"11": HIQ
"12": BCNQ
"13": ULQ
"14": TWTQ0
"15": TWTQ1
"16": TWTQ2
"17": TWTQ3
"18": TB PPDU
Other : RSVD

[12] R/W 1 B_AX_TCR_EOF_BIT_CHK_ACK_POLICY

[9] R/W 0 B_AX_TCR_VHTSIGA1_TXPS
[8] R/W 1 B_AX_TCR_PLCP_ERRHDL_EN
[7] R/W 0 B_AX_TCR_PADSEL 0:Zero Length Delimiter 1: 32'b0
[6] R/W 0 B_AX_TCR_MASK_SIGBCRC
[5] R/W 0 B_AX_TCR_SR_VAL15_ALLOW

[3] R/W 0 B_AX_TCR_EN_SCRAM_INC
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_TCR_EN_20MST
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_TCR_CRC

1860CA04h R_AX_TCR1
[31] R/W 0 B_AX_TCR_AMPDU_FINAL_PAD_CTRL 1 : ampdu final mpdu with eof padding 0 : ampdu final mpdu with 0
[30] R/W 1 B_AX_TCR_EN_BB_PADD_LEN_ERR_FLAG
[29] R/W 0 B_AX_TCR_PSDU_PADD_LEN_UNIT 0 : 8Byte, 1: 16Byte
[28] R/W 0 B_AX_VHT_SIGB_LENGTH
[27] R/W 1'h1 B_AX_TCR_CCK_LOCK_CLK
[26] W1C 1'h0 B_AX_TCR_FORCE_READ_TXDFIFO
[25] R/W 1'h0 B_AX_TCR_BA_RSVD_VAL The value to be filled in the rsvd subfields of BA control field
[24] R/W 1'h0 B_AX_TCR_AIDTID_INFO_RSVD_VAL The value to be filled in the rsvd subfields of Per AID TID Info field
[23:16] R/W 8'hA0 B_AX_TCR_USTIME
[15] R/W 1'h0 B_AX_TCR_SMOOTH_VAL manual HT SIG-A.smooth value
[14] R/W 1'h0 B_AX_TCR_SMOOTH_CTRL HT SIG-A.smooth bit control
0: HW auto sets value, HT SIG-A.smooth = ~beamformed
1: HW copies BIT_SMOOTH_VAL to HT SIG-A.smooth
[13] R/W 1'h0 B_AX_CS_REQ_VAL manual cs required subfield value
[12] R/W 1'h0 B_AX_CS_REQ_SEL 0: HW auto sets CS_required subfield according to 11ax spec
1: HW copies B_AX_CS_REQ_VAL to CS_required subfield
[11:8] R/W 4'h4 B_AX_TCR_BB_PADD_LIMIT
[7:0] R/W 8'h0 B_AX_TCR_TXTIMEOUT

[31:16] R/W 0 B_AX_TSFT_OFS
[15:8] R/W 0 B_AX_STMP_THSD
[7:2] R/W 0 RSVD
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_UPD_HGQMD
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_UPD_TIMIE
1860CA0Ch R_AX_PPWRBIT_SETTING
[31:20] R/W 0 rsvd
[19] R/W 0 B_AX_P4_PWRMGT_CTRL_EN If this bit is set to 1, MAC will overwrite power bit of frame control according to PWR_ST for RTS/CTS/ACK/CFEND/BA/BAR frame.
[18] R/W 0 B_AX_P4_PWRMGT_DATA_EN If this bit is set to 1, MAC will overwrite power bit of frame control according to PWR_ST for data frame.
[17] R/W 0 B_AX_P4_PWRMGT_ACT_EN If this bit is set to 1, MAC will overwrite power bit of frame control according to PWR_ST for action frame.
[16] R/W 0 B_AX_P4_PWR_ST MAC will overwrite this field value to power bit field of frame control if each PWRMGT_DATA_EN (data frame), PWRMGT_CTRL_EN (control frame), and PWRMGT_ACT_EN (action frame) register enable.
[15] R/W 0 B_AX_P3_PWRMGT_CTRL_EN If this bit is set to 1, MAC will overwrite power bit of frame control according to PWR_ST for RTS/CTS/ACK/CFEND/BA/BAR frame.
[14] R/W 0 B_AX_P3_PWRMGT_DATA_EN If this bit is set to 1, MAC will overwrite power bit of frame control according to PWR_ST for data frame.
[13] R/W 0 B_AX_P3_PWRMGT_ACT_EN If this bit is set to 1, MAC will overwrite power bit of frame control according to PWR_ST for action frame.
[12] R/W 0 B_AX_P3_PWR_ST MAC will overwrite this field value to power bit field of frame control if each PWRMGT_DATA_EN (data frame), PWRMGT_CTRL_EN (control frame), and PWRMGT_ACT_EN (action frame) register enable.
[11] R/W 0 B_AX_P2_PWRMGT_CTRL_EN If this bit is set to 1, MAC will overwrite power bit of frame control according to PWR_ST for RTS/CTS/ACK/CFEND/BA/BAR frame.
[10] R/W 0 B_AX_P2_PWRMGT_DATA_EN If this bit is set to 1, MAC will overwrite power bit of frame control according to PWR_ST for data frame.
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_P2_PWRMGT_ACT_EN If this bit is set to 1, MAC will overwrite power bit of frame control according to PWR_ST for action frame.
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_P2_PWR_ST MAC will overwrite this field value to power bit field of frame control if each PWRMGT_DATA_EN (data frame), PWRMGT_CTRL_EN (control frame), and PWRMGT_ACT_EN (action frame) register enable.
[7] R/W 0 B_AX_P1_PWRMGT_CTRL_EN If this bit is set to 1, MAC will overwrite power bit of frame control according to PWR_ST for RTS/CTS/ACK/CFEND/BA/BAR frame.
[6] R/W 0 B_AX_P1_PWRMGT_DATA_EN If this bit is set to 1, MAC will overwrite power bit of frame control according to PWR_ST for data frame.
[5] R/W 0 B_AX_P1_PWRMGT_ACT_EN If this bit is set to 1, MAC will overwrite power bit of frame control according to PWR_ST for action frame.
[4] R/W 0 B_AX_P1_PWR_ST MAC will overwrite this field value to power bit field of frame control if each PWRMGT_DATA_EN (data frame), PWRMGT_CTRL_EN (control frame), and PWRMGT_ACT_EN (action frame) register enable.
[3] R/W 0 B_AX_P0_PWRMGT_CTRL_EN If this bit is set to 1, MAC will overwrite power bit of frame control according to PWR_ST for RTS/CTS/ACK/CFEND/BA/BAR frame.
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_P0_PWRMGT_DATA_EN If this bit is set to 1, MAC will overwrite power bit of frame control according to PWR_ST for data frame.
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_P0_PWRMGT_ACT_EN If this bit is set to 1, MAC will overwrite power bit of frame control according to PWR_ST for action frame.
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_P0_PWR_ST MAC will overwrite this field value to power bit field of frame control if each PWRMGT_DATA_EN (data frame), PWRMGT_CTRL_EN (control frame), and PWRMGT_ACT_EN (action frame) register enable.

[31:0] R/W 0 B_AX_MHDR_HTC
1860CA14h R_AX_SOUNDING
[31:23] RW 9'h0 RSVD

1860CA18h R_AX_BSR_CTRL
[21] R 0 B_AX_RO_MIN_TX_PWR_FLAG Min. tx pwr flag value updated by pwr ctrl module
[20:16] R 0 B_AX_RO_UPH UL power headroom value updated by pwr ctrl module
[15:6] R/W 0 RSVD
[5] R/W 0 B_AX_CAS_PSRT_PPDU_CTRL 1 : When OBSS PD SR Tx, this field fill 1
0 : fill 0
[4] R/W 0 B_AX_BSR_BK_TID_SEL 0:TID=1, 1:TID=2 (BK). Set to QoS ctrl field responding to BSRP.
[3] R/W 0 B_AX_BSR_BE_TID_SEL 0:TID=0, 1:TID=3 (BE). Set to QoS ctrl field responding to BSRP.
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_BSR_VI_TID_SEL 0:TID=4, 1:TID=5 (VI). Set to QoS ctrl field responding to BSRP.
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_BSR_VO_TID_SEL 0: TID=6; 1: TID=7 (VO). Set to QoS ctrl field responding to BSRP.
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_BSR_QOS_SEL 0: queue size update to Qos control field only
1: queue size update to both A-ctrl and Qos control field

[31:29] RW 0 RSVD

002Ch [31:16] RW 0 RSVD
[15:8] RW 0 B_AX_BASIC_TRIG_TSF_COMP_VAL The value indicated timestamp add offset value of mac padding.
Unit: us.
[7:2] RW 0 RSVD
[1:0] RW 0 B_AX_CSI_SEQ_SEL
1860CA34h R_AX_HEPLCP_SR_FIELD
[31:24] RW 0 B_AX_PRI20_BITMAP

[31:24] R 0 B_AX_DBG_CCA_PER20_BITMAP_BB

1860CAE0h R_AX_TX_PPDU_CNT
[31:16] RO 0 B_AX_TX_PPDU_CNT The TX counter of B_AX_PPDU_CNT_IDX
[15:13] R/W 0 RSVD
[12] W1C 0 B_AX_RST_PPDU_CNT Write 1 to reset B_AX_PPDU_CNT_RIDX
[11:8] R/W 0 B_AX_PPDU_CNT_RIDX The PPDU counter index to be reset
[7:4] R/W 0 RSVD
[3:0] R/W 0 B_AX_PPDU_CNT_IDX The PPDU counter index
4'b0000: LCCK
4'b0001: SCCK
4'b0010: OFDM
4'b0011: HT
4'b0100: HTGF
4'b0101: VHT_SU
4'b0110: VHT_MU
4'b0111: HE_SU
4'b1000: HE_ERSU
4'b1001: HE_MU
4'b1010: HE_TB
1860CAE4h R_AX_WMAC_TX_INFO_DEBUG_SEL

[4] R 0 B_AX_TX_NSYM_ERR_FLAG

1860CC00h R_AX_RSP_CHK_SIG
[31] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[30] R/W 1 B_AX_RSP_STATIC_RTS_CHK_SERV_BW_EN
[29] R/W 1 B_AX_RSP_TBPPDU_CHK_PWR
[28:27] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[26] R/W 1 B_AX_RSP_ER_SU_RU106_EN_V1 (B_CUT ECO)
[25] R/W 1 B_AX_RSP_ER_SU_EN_V1 (B_CUT ECO)
[24] R/W 0 B_AX_RESP_TX_ABORT_TEST_EN
[23] RW 1'h0 B_AX_RESP_TSSI_FAST_MODE_EN
[22] RW 1'h1 B_AX_RESP_CHK_TB_EDCCA_PER20_BMP
[21] R/W 1 B_AX_RSP_CHK_BASIC_NAV
[20] R/W 1 B_AX_RSP_CHK_INTRA_NAV
[19] R/W 1 B_AX_RSP_CHK_TXNAV
[18] R/W 0 B_AX_TXDATA_END_PS_OPT
[17] R/W 0 B_AX_CHECK_SOUNDING_SEQ
[16] R/W 0 B_AX_RXBA_IGNOREA2
[15:8] R/W 0x40 B_AX_ACKTO_CCK
[7:0] R/W 0x40 B_AX_ACKTO
1860CC04h R_AX_TRXPTCL_RESP_0
[31] R/W 0 B_AX_WMAC_RESP_STBC_EN For Rx pkt with stbc, enabled response frame with stbc
[30] R/W 0 B_AX_WMAC_RXFTM_TXACK_SC
[29] R/W 0 B_AX_WMAC_RXFTM_TXACKBWEQ
[28] R/W 1 B_AX_RSP_CHK_SEC_CCA_80 When SECONDARY_CCA_80 assert in the SIFS before response to Static-RTS, MU-RTS and MU-BAR(with CS required field = 1)
0: Can TX,
1: Cannot TX
[27] R/W 1 B_AX_RSP_CHK_SEC_CCA_40 When SECONDARY_CCA_40 assert in the SIFS before response to Static-RTS, MU-RTS and MU-BAR(with CS required field = 1)
0: Can TX,
1: Cannot TX
[26] R/W 1 B_AX_RSP_CHK_SEC_CCA_20 When SECONDARY_CCA_20 assert in the SIFS before response to Static-RTS, MU-RTS and MU-BAR (with CS required field = 1)
0: Can TX,
1: Cannot TX
[25] R/W 1 B_AX_RSP_CHK_BTCCA When BTCCA assert in the SIFS before response to Static/Dynamic-RTS, MU-RTS and MU-BAR(with CS required field = 1)
0: Can TX,
1: Cannot TX
[24] R/W 1 B_AX_RSP_CHK_EDCCA When EDCCA assert in the SIFS before response to Static/Dynamic-RTS, MU-RTS and MU-BAR (with CS required field = 1)
0: Can TX,
1: Cannot TX
[23] R/W 1 B_AX_RSP_CHK_CCA When CCA assert in the SIFS before response to Static-Dynamic-RTS, MU-RTS and MU-BAR (with CS required field = 1)
0: Can TX,
1: Cannot TX
[22] R/W 0 B_AX_WMAC_LDPC_EN For Rx pkt with ldpc, enabled response frame with ldpc.
[21] R/W 0 B_AX_WMAC_SGIEN For Rx VHT/HT SGI pkt, enable response frame with SGI
[20] R/W 0 B_AX_WMAC_SPLCPEN For Rx SPLCP CCK pkt, enable Besponse fBame with SPCLP CCK
[19] R/W 0 B_AX_WMAC_RESP_ACK_BA_CHK_CCA "RESP_ACK_BA_CHK_CCA,
0: ack/ba would not check cca/edcca
1: ack/ba would check cca/edcca"
[18] R/W 0 rsvd
[17] R/W 0 B_AX_WMAC_BESP_EARLY_TXBA
[16] R/W 0 B_AX_WMAC_MBA_DUR_FORCE 0: MBA Duration Calculated by ourself, 1:Force MBA Duration to 0
[15:8] R/W 0x10 B_AX_WMAC_SPEC_SIFS_OFDM
1860CC08h R_AX_TRXPTCL_RRSR_CTL_0
[31] R/W 1 B_AX_WMAC_RESP_SR_MODE_EN
[30:28] R/W 0 RSVD
[27:24] R/W 1 B_AX_FTM_RRSR_RATE_EN When receive FTM , response ACK支援的rate
[0] : CCK/OFDM rate enable
[1] : HT rate enable
[2] : VHT rate enable
[3] : HE rate enable
[23:22] R/W 0 B_AX_NESS
[21] R/W 0 B_AX_WMAC_RESP_DOPPLEB_AX_EN For Rx Doppler pkt, enable response frame with Doppler
[20] R/W 0 B_AX_WMAC_RESP_DCM_EN For Rx DCM pkt, enable response frame with DCM
[19:10] R/W 0 RSVD
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_WMAC_RESP_REF_RATE_SEL 0: refer to rx rate and cmac table resp_ref_rate, choose the smaller as resp initial rate
1: refer to rx rate only and use it as resp initial rate
[8:0] R/W 4 B_AX_WMAC_RESP_REF_RATE response reference rate. If addr cam hit, refer to cmac table; otherwise, refer to CR here
1860CC14h R_AX_RESP_TX_NAV_ABORT_COUNTER
[31:24] R 0 B_AX_TB_EDCCA_BMP_ABORT_RESP_TX_CNT

[7:0] R 0 B_AX_TXNAV_ABORT_RESP_TX_CNT
1860CC18h R_AX_RESP_TX_CCA_ABORT_COUNTER

1860CC1Ch R_AX_TRXPTCL_RESP_TX_ABORT_COUNTER
[31:24] R 0 B_AX_WMAC_SEC_CCA80_ABORT_RESP_TX
[23:16] R 0 B_AX_WMAC_SEC_CCA40_ABORT_RESP_TX
[15:8] R 0 B_AX_WMAC_SEC_CCA20_ABORT_RESP_TX
[7:0] R 0 B_AX_WMAC_CCA_ABORT_RESP_TX
1860CC20h R_AX_MAC_LOOPBACK
[31:29] R/W 0 RSVD
[28:17] R/W 28 B_AX_MACLBK_RDY_PERIOD default : 0.5us (500ns/12.5ns=40T)
[16:8] R/W 28 B_AX_MACLBK_PLCP_DLY PLCP delay 4us (4000ns/100ns=40)
[7:3] R/W 0 B_AX_MACLBK_RDY_NUM
[2:1] R/W 2 B_AX_MACLBK_RDY_DUMMY
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_MACLBK_EN
1860CC24h R_AX_TRXPTCL_CTS_RRSR
[31:16] RW 16'h0 RSVD
[15:14] R/W 0 B_AX_WMAC_CTS_RRSR_RSC Response frame sub-channel configuration.
Response frames (CTS) for receiving non-CCA RTS are transmitted in the following condition.
00: Primary 20Mhz BW.
01: Follow RXSC.
10/11:RSVD
[13] R/W 0 RSVD
[12] R/W 0 B_AX_WMAC_CTS_RESP_OPT 0: CTS option follows REG_CTS_RRSR
1: CTS option follows REG_RRSR
[11:8] R/W 1 B_AX_WMAC_CTS_RRSR_CCK The BitMap indicates enabled CCK rates for CTS to be used in this BSS. Each bit is mapped as the following:
Bit[0:3] = {1M, 2M, 5.5M, 11M }
[7:0] R/W 0x53 B_AX_WMAC_CTS_RRSR_OFDM The BitMap indicates enabled OFDM rates for CTS to be used in this BSS. Each bit is mapped as the following:

Bit[0:7] = {6M, 9M, 12M, 18M, 24M, 36M, 48M, 54M}
1860CC28h R_AX_MAC_LOOPBACK_COUNT
[31:16] R 0 B_AX_RO_MACLBK_COUNT
[15:1] R/W 0 RSVD
[0] W1C 0 B_AX_MACLBK_COUNT_CLR
1860CC40h R_AX_CLIENT_OM_CTRL
[31:24 R/W 0 rsvd
[23] R/W 0 B_AX_WMAC_DIS_ALL_RESP
[22:18] R/W 0 rsvd
[17] R/W 0 B_AX_WMAC_TRIGDAT_RESP_NRLACK
[16] R/W 0 B_AX_WMAC_DIS_SIGTA
[15:5] R/W 0 rsvd
[4:0] R/W 0 B_AX_UL_DATA_DIS Disable to respond UL data triggered by basic trigger frame. Per port config.
(BA/ACK/BSR/BQR are still allowed to Tx)
1860CC50h R_AX_WMAC_FTM_CTL
[31:16] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[15] RO 0 B_AX_FTM_RPT_Error When PTCL wait FTM/FTMACK report over 12.5 usec, it indicate FTM process timeout and delete FTM process, It will cause this ERROR FLAG.
[14] R/W 0 B_AX_FTM_TIMEOUT_BYPASS If this bit is set, HW will bypass timeout (12.5 us) of FTM report from BB.
發生此case會舉error flag at B_AX_FTM_T2R_Error
[13:3] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_RXFTM_EN If B_AX_FTM_EN = 1 && B_AX_RXFTM_EN=1,
HW will parsing rx packet, to find FTM frame.
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_RXFTMREQ_EN If B_AX_FTM_EN = 1 && B_AX_RXFTMREQ_EN=1,
HW will parsing rx packet, to find FTM request frame.
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_FTM_EN Fine timing measurement function; 0: Disable 1:enable
1860CC54h R_AX_GET_RTT
[31:24] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[23:16] R/W 0 B_AX_action_field action frame (type/subtype = 0xD0) action field, only valid when type/subtype = 0xD0
[15:8] R/W 0 B_AX_category_field action frame (type/subtype = 0xD0) category field, only valid when type/subtype = 0xD0
[7] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[6:1] R/W 0 B_AX_RTT_type_subtype 要filter的type/subtype
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_RTT_Filter_EN 1 : enable match filter, 當match到時,要發INT給FW
0 : disable match filter
1860CC58h R_AX_FTM_PTT
[31:6] R/W 0 RSVD
[5:3] R/W 0 B_AX_FTM_PTT_TSF_R2T_SEL BIT_FTM_T2_TSF (0x54C[31:16])可以讀到 FTM T2(cca rising edge)發生時, 對應 TSFTimer[15:0]的值.
TSFTimer 由 BIT_FTM_PTT_TSF_R2T_SEL(0x548[24:22])指定.
0 for P0 TSF
1 for P1 TSF
2 for P2 TSF
3 for P3 TSF
4 for P4 TSF
5 for freerun
[2:0] R/W 0 B_AX_FTM_PTT_TSF_T2R_SEL BIT_FTM_T1_TSF (0x54C[15:0])可以讀到 FTM T1(phytxon rising edge)發生時, 對應 TSFTimer[15:0]的值.
TSFTimer 由 BIT_FTM_PTT_TSF_T2R_SEL(0x548[21:19])指定
0 for P0 TSF
1 for P1 TSF
2 for P2 TSF
3 for P3 TSF
4 for P4 TSF
5 for freerun
1860CC5Ch R_AX_FTM_TSF
[31:16] RO 0 B_AX_FTM_T2_TSF BIT_FTM_T2_TSF (0x54C[31:16])可以讀到 FTM T2(cca rising edge)發生時, 對應 TSFTimer[15:0]的值.
TSFTimer 由 BIT_FTM_PTT_TSF_R2T_SEL(0x548[24:22])指定.
unit : us
[15:0] RO 0 B_AX_FTM_T1_TSF BIT_FTM_T1_TSF (0x54C[15:0])可以讀到 FTM T1(phytxon rising edge)發生時, 對應 TSFTimer[15:0]的值.
TSFTimer 由 BIT_FTM_PTT_TSF_T2R_SEL(0x548[21:19])指定.
unit : us
1860CC70h R_AX_WMAC_RX_WMMPS_UAPSD
[31:18] R/W 0 rsvd
[17] R/W 0 B_AX_BC_MD_EN Broadcast data packet more data bit check interrupt enable.
[16] R/W 0 B_AX_UC_MD_EN Unicast data packet more data bit check interrupt enable.
Including below interrupt:
B_AX_FS_P(n)_RX_UMD0_INT、B_AX_FS_P(n)_RX_UMD1_INT、
B_AX_FS_P(n)_RX_UAPSDMD0_INT、B_AX_FS_P(n)_RX_UAPSDMD1_INT
[15:8] R/W 0 RSVD
7 R/W 0 B_AX_WMMPS_UAPSD_TID7 Disable interrupt WLCPU when rx WMMPS UAPSD Qos data with TID7 related FWISR register : B_AX_FS_P(n)_RX_UAPSDMD0_INT,
B_AX_FS_P(n)_RX_UAPSDMD1_INT,
B_AX_FS_P(n)_EOSP_INT
// (n): 0~4
6 R/W 0 B_AX_WMMPS_UAPSD_TID6 Disable interrupt WLCPU when rx WMMPS UAPSD Qos data with TID6 related FWISR register : B_AX_FS_P(n)_RX_UAPSDMD0_INT,
B_AX_FS_P(n)_RX_UAPSDMD1_INT,
B_AX_FS_P(n)_EOSP_INT
// (n): 0~4
5 R/W 0 B_AX_WMMPS_UAPSD_TID5 Disable interrupt WLCPU when rx WMMPS UAPSD Qos data with TID5 related FWISR register : B_AX_FS_P(n)_RX_UAPSDMD0_INT,
B_AX_FS_P(n)_RX_UAPSDMD1_INT,
B_AX_FS_P(n)_EOSP_INT
// (n): 0~4
4 R/W 0 B_AX_WMMPS_UAPSD_TID4 Disable interrupt WLCPU when rx WMMPS UAPSD Qos data with TID4 related FWISR register : B_AX_FS_P(n)_RX_UAPSDMD0_INT,
B_AX_FS_P(n)_RX_UAPSDMD1_INT,
B_AX_FS_P(n)_EOSP_INT
// (n): 0~4
3 R/W 0 B_AX_WMMPS_UAPSD_TID3 Disable interrupt WLCPU when rx WMMPS UAPSD Qos data with TID3 related FWISR register : B_AX_FS_P(n)_RX_UAPSDMD0_INT,
B_AX_FS_P(n)_RX_UAPSDMD1_INT,
B_AX_FS_P(n)_EOSP_INT
// (n): 0~4
2 R/W 0 B_AX_WMMPS_UAPSD_TID2 Disable interrupt WLCPU when rx WMMPS UAPSD Qos data with TID2 related FWISR register : B_AX_FS_P(n)_RX_UAPSDMD0_INT,
B_AX_FS_P(n)_RX_UAPSDMD1_INT,
B_AX_FS_P(n)_EOSP_INT
// (n): 0~4
1 R/W 0 B_AX_WMMPS_UAPSD_TID1 Disable interrupt WLCPU when rx WMMPS UAPSD Qos data with TID1 related FWISR register : B_AX_FS_P(n)_RX_UAPSDMD0_INT,
B_AX_FS_P(n)_RX_UAPSDMD1_INT,
B_AX_FS_P(n)_EOSP_INT
// (n): 0~4
0 R/W 0 B_AX_WMMPS_UAPSD_TID0 Disable interrupt WLCPU when rx WMMPS UAPSD Qos data with TID0 related FWISR register : B_AX_FS_P(n)_RX_UAPSDMD0_INT,
B_AX_FS_P(n)_RX_UAPSDMD1_INT,
B_AX_FS_P(n)_EOSP_INT
// (n): 0~4

[31:4] RW 28'h0 B_AX_wmac_rx_tb_ctrl_info_cfg_dummy_31to4

[31:0] RO 0 B_AX_RX_TB_CTRL_L4B
1860CCD8h R_AX_RX_TB_CTRL_INFO_1
[31:0] RO 0 B_AX_RX_TB_CTRL_H4B
1860CCE0h R_AX_CTRL_FRAME_CNT_CTRL
[31:17] R/W 0x0 RSVD
[16] W1C 0x0 B_AX_WMAC_ALLCNT_RST
[15:12] R/W 0x0 B_AX_CTRL_SUBTYPE 0000 : Indicate all control frame
[11:10] R/W 0x0 RSVD
[9] W1C 0x0 B_AX_WMAC_WDATA_EN
[8] R/W 0x0 B_AX_WMAC_ALLCNT_EN
[7:4] R/W 0x0 RSVD
[3:0] R/W 0x0 B_AX_WMAC_CTRL_CNT_IDX
1860CCE4h R_AX_CTRL_FRAME_CNT_SUBCTRL
[31:12] R/W 0 RSVD
[11:8] RO 0 B_AX_CNT_INDEX Counter index :
0 for counter 0 when B_AX_CTRL_CNT_IDX = 0
1 for counter 1 when B_AX_CTRL_CNT_IDX = 1
2 for counter 2 when B_AX_CTRL_CNT_IDX = 2
3 for counter 3 when B_AX_CTRL_CNT_IDX = 3
4 for counter 4 when B_AX_CTRL_CNT_IDX = 4
5 for counter 5 when B_AX_CTRL_CNT_IDX = 5
6 for counter 6 when B_AX_CTRL_CNT_IDX = 6
7 for counter 7 when B_AX_CTRL_CNT_IDX = 7
8 for counter 8 when B_AX_CTRL_CNT_IDX = 8
………………
15 for counter 15 when B_AX_CTRL_CNT_IDX = 15
[7:2] R/W 0 RSVD
[1] W1C 0 B_AX_CNTRST Write 1 to reset Counter of B_AX_CTRL_CNT_IDX.
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_CNTEN 1 : enable counter of B_AX_CTRL_CNT_IDX
0 : disable counter of B_AX_CTRL_CNT_IDX
1860CCE8h R_AX_CTRL_FRAME_CNT_RPT
[31:16] RO 0 B_AX_RX_CTRL_FRAME_CNT RX Control frame count of index B_AX_CTRL_CNT_IDX. The counter uses saturation arithmetic.
[15:0] RO 0 B_AX_TX_CTRL_FRAME_CNT TX Control frame count of index B_AX_CTRL_CNT_IDX. The counter uses saturation arithmetic.

[11] RW 1'h0 B_AX_RXSTS_FCS_TO_DIS

[5:0] RW 6'h0 B_AX_RXSTS_TIMEOUT_THR

[31:20] R/W 0 RSVD

[2:0] = wmac_state :
0:IDLE 1:TX 2:RX 3:RX2TX 4: TX2RX

[11:8] R/W 0 B_AX_DBGSEL_TRIGCMD_SEL

[31:22] RW 0 RSVD
[21:16] RW 0x20 B_AX_PHYINTF_TIMEOUT_THR_V1
[15:6] RW 0 RSVD
[5] RW 0 B_AX_CSI_ON TIMEOUT EN csi_on single 超過 1860_CCFC[5:0] 沒回到 IDLE
[4] RW 0 B_AX_STS_ON TIMEOUT EN sts_on single 超過 1860_CCFC[5:0] 沒回到 IDLE
[3] RW 0 B_AX_DATA_ON TIMEOUT EN data_on signal 超過 1860_CCFC[5:0] 沒回到 IDLE
[2] RW 0 B_AX_OFDM_CCA TIMEOUT EN ofdm_cca_p20 signal 超過 1860_CCFC[5:0] 沒回到 IDLE
[1] RW 0 B_AX_CCK_CCA TIMEOUT EN cca_cca_p20 signal 超過 1860_CCFC[5:0] 沒回到 IDLE
[0] RW 0 B_AX_PHY_TXON TIMEOUT EN phy_txon signal 超過 1860_CCFC[5:0] 沒回到 IDLE

[31:8] R/W 0 RSVD
[7] W1C 0 RSVD

[2] W1C 0 B_AX_OFDM_CCA TIMEOUT ERR ofdm_cca_p20 timeout event interrupt enable
[1] W1C 0 B_AX_CCK_CCA TIMEOUT ERR cca_cca_p20 timeout event interrupt enable
[0] W1C 0 B_AX_PHY_TXON TIMEOUT ERR phy_txon timeout event interrupt enable

[19:8] R/W 0 B_AX_MER_SND_CSI_BUFF_IDX12 Driver need to fill in Snd_csibuf_id before sounding
HW will update Snd_csibuf_id to Txbf_csibuf_id after sounding.
[7:0] R/W 0 B_AX_MER_CSI_BUFF_MACID_IDX12 MACID of the target beamformee
1860CD60h R_AX_BFMER_CSI_BUFF_IDX13
[31:20] R 0 B_AX_MER_TXBF_CSI_BUFF_IDX13 TXBF use this buffer index.
[19:8] R/W 0 B_AX_MER_SND_CSI_BUFF_IDX13 Driver need to fill in Snd_csibuf_id before sounding
HW will update Snd_csibuf_id to Txbf_csibuf_id after sounding.
[7:0] R/W 0 B_AX_MER_CSI_BUFF_MACID_IDX13 MACID of the target beamformee
1860CD64h R_AX_BFMER_CSI_BUFF_IDX14
[31:20] R 0 B_AX_MER_TXBF_CSI_BUFF_IDX14 TXBF use this buffer index.
[19:8] R/W 0 B_AX_MER_SND_CSI_BUFF_IDX14 Driver need to fill in Snd_csibuf_id before sounding
HW will update Snd_csibuf_id to Txbf_csibuf_id after sounding.
[7:0] R/W 0 B_AX_MER_CSI_BUFF_MACID_IDX14 MACID of the target beamformee
1860CD68h R_AX_BFMER_CSI_BUFF_IDX15
[31:20] R 0 B_AX_MER_TXBF_CSI_BUFF_IDX15 TXBF use this buffer index.
[19:8] R/W 0 B_AX_MER_SND_CSI_BUFF_IDX15 Driver need to fill in Snd_csibuf_id before sounding
HW will update Snd_csibuf_id to Txbf_csibuf_id after sounding.
[7:0] R/W 0 B_AX_MER_CSI_BUFF_MACID_IDX15 MACID of the target beamformee
1860CD6Ch R_AX_BFMER_SND_DEBUG_CNT
[31:28] R/W 0 B_AX_DBG_BFMER_MIMO_CTRL_USER
[27] R/W 0 B_AX_DBG_BFMER_MIMO_CTRL_HIGH_LOW_4BYTE
[26:25] R/W 0 B_AX_DBG_BFMER_MIMO_CTRL_MODE
[24] W1C 0 B_AX_TB_CSI_ERR_FLAG_CLR
[23:21] R/W 0 B_AX_BFMER_BBINFO_DBG_SEL
[20] W1C 0 B_AX_SND_DNGCNT_RST Reset SND_dbg counter. W1C
[19:16] R/W 0 B_AX_MER_SND_DBGCNT_SEL B_AX_SND_DBGCNT_SEL
0000:NDPA_TX_CNT
0001:NDPA_RX_CNT
0010:NDP_TX_CNT
0011:NDP_RX_CNT
0100:CSI_TX_CNT
0101:CSI_RX_CNT
0110:BFRP_TX_CNT
0111:BFRP_RX_CNT
1000:TB_BFRP_TX_CNT
1001:TB_BFRP_RX_CNT
[15:9] RW 0 RSVD
[8] R 0 B_AX_TB_CSI_UL_LENGTH_ERR_FLAG
[7:0] R 0 B_AX_MER_SND_DNGCNT counter with respect to B_AX_SND_DBGCNT_SEL (need set 0xC000[15]=1)
1860CD70h R_AX_BFMER_UPD_MEE_PARA
[31:21] RW 11'h0 RSVD
[20:16] R/W 0 B_AX_MER_UPDMEE_USERID_C USER ID SEL
[15] W1C 0 B_AX_MER_UPDMEE_CSI
[14] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[13:12] R/W 0 B_AX_MER_UPDMEE_FT FBTP
[11:10] R/W 0 B_AX_MER_UPDMEE_BW bandwidth
[9:8] R/W 0 B_AX_MER_UPDMEE_CB HT: CB有2bit
FB TYPE=SU,
CB=0 =>codebook{ϕ,ψ}={3,1}
CB=1 =>codebook{ϕ,ψ}={4,2}
CB=2 =>codebook{ϕ,ψ}={5,3}
CB=3 =>codebook{ϕ,ψ}={6,4}

VHT/HE: CB只有1bit
FB TYPE=SU,
CB=0 =>codebook{ϕ,ψ}={4,2}
CB=1 =>codebook{ϕ,ψ}={6,4}

VHT/HE: CB只有1bit
FB TYPE=MU,
CB=0 =>codebook{ϕ,ψ}={7,5}
CB=1 =>codebook{ϕ,ψ}={9,7}
[7:6] R/W 0 B_AX_MER_UPDMEE_NG 0:AC NG=1
1:AC NG=2
2:RSVD
3:AC NG=4
[5:3] R/W 0 B_AX_MER_UPDMEE_NR Nr
[2:0] R/W 0 B_AX_MER_UPDMEE_NC Nc
1860CD74h R_AX_BFMER_RO_MEE_PARA
[31:24] R/W 0 B_AX_BFMER_CTRLINFO_MACID
[23:21] R/W 0 RSVD
[20:16] R/W 0 B_AX_RO_USER_ID_SEL User ID of associated Bfee, MU/SU: 2~5 ,SU:0~1 (userid 6 and 7 rsvd)
[15:14] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[13:12] RO 0 B_AX_BFMER_RO_MEE_PARA_FT FBTP
[11:10] RO 0 B_AX_BFMER_RO_MEE_PARA_BW bandwidth
[9:8] RO 0 B_AX_BFMER_RO_MEE_PARA_CB HT: CB有2bit
FB TYPE=SU,
CB=0 =>codebook{ϕ,ψ}={3,1}
CB=1 =>codebook{ϕ,ψ}={4,2}
CB=2 =>codebook{ϕ,ψ}={5,3}
CB=3 =>codebook{ϕ,ψ}={6,4}

VHT/HE: CB只有1bit
FB TYPE=SU,
CB=0 =>codebook{ϕ,ψ}={4,2}
CB=1 =>codebook{ϕ,ψ}={6,4}

VHT/HE: CB只有1bit
FB TYPE=MU,
CB=0 =>codebook{ϕ,ψ}={7,5}
CB=1 =>codebook{ϕ,ψ}={9,7}
[7:6] RO 0 B_AX_BFMER_RO_MEE_PARA_NG 0:AC NG=1
1:AC NG=2
2:RSVD
3:AC NG=4
[5:3] RO 0 B_AX_BFMER_RO_MEE_PARA_NR Nr
