1860CD78h R_AX_BFMER_CTRL_0
[31:24] R/W 8'h7 B_AX_BFMER_HE_CSI_OFFSET csi report offset for HE mode (service field length)
[23:16] R/W 8'h5 B_AX_BFMER_VHT_CSI_OFFSET csi report offset for VHT mode (service field length)
[15:8] R/W 8'h8 B_AX_BFMER_HT_CSI_OFFSET csi report offset for HT mode (service field length)
[7:3] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_BFMER_NDP_BFEN when set to 1, disable NDP/NDPA packet use beamforming
[1] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_BFMER_VHT_BFPRT_CHK
1860CD7Ch R_AX_BFMER_DEBUG_MIMO_CTRL_FIELD
[31:0] R 0 B_AX_DBG_BFMER_MIMO_CTRL
1860CD80h R_AX_BFMEE_RESP_OPTION
[31:24] R/W 0x74 B_AX_BFMEE_NDP_RX_TIMEOUT A timeout value for MAC to leave NDP_Rx_standby_state and go back to normal Rx mode. (unit: us)
[23:20] R/W 0xf B_AX_BFMEE_BFRP_RX_STANDBY_TIMER A timeout value for MAC to leave NDP_Rx_standby_state and go back to normal Rx mode. (unit: 16us)
[19] R/W 0 RSVD 1:當 CSI report 有效期間 , 視同 OFDM par20M CCA == 1
0: disable
[18:17] R/W 0 B_AX_MU_BFRPTSEG_SEL Beamforming report segment length select ,
2'h00 :3895 bytes, 2'h01:7991bytes, 2'h10:11454bytes
[16] R/W 0 B_AX_BFMEE_NDP_RXSTDBY_SEL 1: set ndp_rx_standby when rx ppdu of ndpa end;
0: set ndp_rx_standby when rx ndpa packet fcs end;
[15:8] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[7] R/W 0 B_AX_BFMEE_MU_BFEE_DIS If set to 1, HW will be SU only beamformee and not response to NDPA or Beamforming report poll.
[6] R/W 0 B_AX_BFMEE_CHECK_RPTPOLL_MACID_DIS 1: For any A1-matched BF Rpt Poll, send back VHT-CB
0: If A1-matched BF Rpt Poll's A2 fails to match the previous receiving NDPA's A2, do not send VHT-CB
[5] R/W 0 B_AX_BFMEE_NOCHK_BFPOLL_BMP Set this B to ignore retransmission Bmap of rx beamforming report poll
[4:3] R/W 0 RSVD
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_BFMEE_HE_NDPA_EN Set to 1, MAC would inform BB of preparing to receive NDP if the received NDPA is valid.
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_BFMEE_VHT_NDPA_EN Set to 1, MAC would inform BB of preparing to receive NDP if the received NDPA is valid.
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_BFMEE_HT_NDPA_EN Set to 1, MAC would inform BB of preparing to receive NDP if the received NDP Announcement MPDU is valid.
1860CD84h R_AX_BFMEE_OPTION
[31] R 0 B_AX_CSI_IS_HE
[30] R 0 B_AX_CSI_IS_VHT
[29] R 0 B_AX_CSI_IS_HT
[28:16] $RO 0 B_AX_CSI_RPT_LEN
[15:13] R/W 0 RSVD
[12:0] R 0 B_AX_CSI_RPT_CNT_V1
1860CD88h R_AX_TRXPTCL_RESP_CSI_CTRL_0
[31:30] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[29] R/W 0 B_AX_BFMEE_CSISEQ_SEL By which the sequence number of CSI frame is controlled
1: non-QoS SEQ number
0: counter
[28] R/W 0 B_AX_BFMEE_BFPARAM_SEL 1: use beamforming nc/nr/ng parameter from CR_CSI_INFO
0: use beamforming nc/nr/ng parameter from ctrl_info
[27:24] R/W 0 B_AX_BFMEE_OFDM_LEN_TH CSI frame length threshold for using legacy OFDM (unit: 128B). 0 means disabled.
If CSI frame length > threshold, search from HE/VHT/HT Bmap
If CSI frame length < threshold, search from legacy OFDM Bmap
[23] R/W 0 B_AX_BFMEE_BF_PORT_SEL
[22] R/W 0 B_AX_BFMEE_USE_NSTS 1: use Nsts as Nr, 0: use register value as Nr
[21] R/W 0 B_AX_BFMEE_CSI_RATE_FB_EN Enable CSI frame rate fallback (only one step in CSI RRSR)
[20] R/W 0 B_AX_BFMEE_CSI_GID_SEL if 0xCD88[28] B_AX_BFMEE_BFPARAM_SEL = 1
0: CSI frame sig-a group id =63
1: CSI frame sig-a group id =0
[19:18] R/W 0 B_AX_BFMEE_CSI_RSC CSI frame sub-channel configuration
00: Primary 20M BW(0x483[3:0])
01: Follow Rx packet BW.
10: Duplicate mode.
11: Reserved
[17] R/W 0 B_AX_BFMEE_CSI_FORCE_RETE_EN 0: disable CSI force rate. Refer to RRSR Bmask/Ctrl_info
1: CSI frame Tx rate refers to CR_CSI_RATE
[16] R/W 0 B_AX_BFMEE_CSI_USE_NDPARATE 1: use ndpa rx rate and BW to decide csi report rate
0: use ndp rx rate and BW to decide csi report rate
[15] R/W 0 B_AX_BFMEE_CSI_WITHHTC_EN Set to 1, CSI frame would carry HTC in MAC header.
[14] R/W 0 B_AX_BFMEE_CSIINFO0_BF_EN 1: CSI enable BF 0:CSI disable BF
[13] R/W 0 B_AX_BFMEE_CSIINFO0_STBC_EN 1: CSI enable STBC 0:CSI disable STBC
[12] R/W 0 B_AX_BFMEE_CSIINFO0_LDPC_EN 1: CSI enable LDPC 0:CSI disable LDPC
[11:10] R/W 0 B_AX_BFMEE_CSIINFO0_CS coefficient size
[9:8] R/W 0 B_AX_BFMEE_CSIINFO0_CB HT: CB有2bit
FB TYPE=SU,
CB=0 =>codebook{ϕ,ψ}={3,1}
CB=1 =>codebook{ϕ,ψ}={4,2}
CB=2 =>codebook{ϕ,ψ}={5,3}
CB=3 =>codebook{ϕ,ψ}={6,4}

VHT/HE: CB只有1bit
FB TYPE=SU,
CB=0 =>codebook{ϕ,ψ}={4,2}
CB=1 =>codebook{ϕ,ψ}={6,4}

VHT/HE: CB只有1bit
FB TYPE=MU,
CB=0 =>codebook{ϕ,ψ}={7,5}
CB=1 =>codebook{ϕ,ψ}={9,7}
[7:6] R/W 0 B_AX_BFMEE_CSIINFO0_NG 0:AC NG=1
1:AC NG=2
2:AC NG=4
3:RSVD
[5:3] R/W 0 B_AX_BFMEE_CSIINFO0_NR Nr index
[2:0] R/W 0 B_AX_BFMEE_CSIINFO0_NC Nc index
1860CD8Ch R_AX_TRXPTCL_RESP_CSI_RRSC
[31:0] R/W 0x29292911 B_AX_BFMEE_CSI_RRSC_BMAP BMap to indicate the CSI frame rate in this BSS. Each B is mapped as the following:
B[0:7] = {6M, 9M, 12M, 18M, 24M, 36M, 48M, 54M}
B[8:15] = HT MCS0~MCS7
B[16:23] = VHT 1SSMCS0~MCS7
B[24:31] = HE 1SSMCS0~MCS7
1860CD90h R_AX_TRXPTCL_RESP_CSI_RATE
[31:23] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[22:16] R/W 0 B_AX_BFMEE_HE_CSI_RATE HE CSI init rate(NSS + MCS)
[15] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[14:8] R/W 0 B_AX_BFMEE_VHT_CSI_RATE VHT CSI init rate(NSS + MCS)
[7] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[6:0] R/W 0 B_AX_BFMEE_HT_CSI_RATE HT CSI init rate(NSS + MCS)
1860CD94h R_AX_TRXPTCL_RESP_CSI_CTRL_1
[31:24] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[23:16] R/W 0x1E B_AX_BFMEE_CSI_TXTIME_LEN_LIMIT
[15] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[14] R/W 0 B_AX_BFMEE_CSIINFO1_BF_EN BF
[13] R/W 0 B_AX_BFMEE_CSIINFO1_STBC_EN STBC
[12] R/W 0 B_AX_BFMEE_CSIINFO1_LDPC_EN 1: use Nsts as Nr, 0: use register value as Nr
[11:10] R/W 0 B_AX_BFMEE_CSIINFO1_CS coefficient size
[9:8] R/W 0 B_AX_BFMEE_CSIINFO1_CB HT: CB有2bit
FB TYPE=SU,
CB=0 =>codebook{ϕ,ψ}={3,1}
CB=1 =>codebook{ϕ,ψ}={4,2}
CB=2 =>codebook{ϕ,ψ}={5,3}
CB=3 =>codebook{ϕ,ψ}={6,4}

VHT/HE: CB只有1bit
FB TYPE=SU,
CB=0 =>codebook{ϕ,ψ}={4,2}
CB=1 =>codebook{ϕ,ψ}={6,4}

VHT/HE: CB只有1bit
FB TYPE=MU,
CB=0 =>codebook{ϕ,ψ}={7,5}
CB=1 =>codebook{ϕ,ψ}={9,7}
[7:6] R/W 0 B_AX_BFMEE_CSIINFO1_NG 0:AC NG=1/AX NG=4
1:AC NG=2/AX NG=16
2:AC NG=4
3:RSVD
[5:3] R/W 0 B_AX_BFMEE_CSIINFO1_NR Nr index
[2:0] R/W 0 B_AX_BFMEE_CSIINFO1_NC Nc index
1860CE00h R_AX_RCR
[15] R/W 0 B_AX_busy_chksn check SN FIFO before RX close
[14] R/W 0 B_AX_dyn_chen dynamic parser channel enable
[13] R/W 1 B_AX_auto_rst RX auto reset when idle
[12] R/W 0 B_AX_timer_sel RX timer source select
0 : from wmac 1/8 us pluse , 1 : from 32K 1 us pluse
[11] R/W 0 B_AX_STOP_RX_IN Stop RX input
[10:8] R/W 0 B_AX_DRV_INFO_SIZE Driver info size (unit: 16byte)
[7:0] R/W 0xff B_AX_CH_EN_V1 Channel enable for specific RU.
1860CE02h R_AX_DLK_PROTECT_CTL
[15:8] R/W 0x80 B_AX_RX_DLK_CCA_TIME rx dead lock protect time (us) , start from cca falling
[7:4] R/W 0xf B_AX_RX_DLK_DATA_TIME rx dead lock protect time (us) , start from data_on falling
[3] R/W 0 B_AX_rx_dlk_rst_fsm rx dead lock protect reset when rx error status [7:6] != 0
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_rx_dlk_rst_skipdma rx dead lock protect reset will skip rx_end_rst , jump to dis_gclk
[1] R/W 1 B_AX_RX_DLK_RST_EN rx dead lock protect reset enable
[0] R/W 1 B_AX_RX_DLK_INT_EN rx dead lock protect interrupt enable
1860CE04h R_AX_PLCP_HDR_FLTR
[15:12] R/W 0 B_AX_plcp_rxfa_reset_type Reset BB when specified PPDU type assert false alarm
4'd15 : all ppdu type
4'd0~14 : specified PPDU type
[11] R/W 0 B_AX_plcp_rxfa_reset_en Reset BB when assert false alarm enable
[10:9] R/W 0 RSVD
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_DIS_CHK_MIN_LEN CCK/OFDM/HT min length (14Bytes:ACK) check disable
[7] R/W 0 RSVD
[6] R/W 1 B_AX_HE_SIGB_CRC_CHK HE MU SIGB common part CRC4 check enable
[5] R/W 1 B_AX_VHT_MU_SIGB_CRC_CHK VHT MU SIGB CRC8 check enable
[4] R/W 1 B_AX_VHT_SU_SIGB_CRC_CHK VHT SU SIGB CRC8 check enable
[3] R/W 1 B_AX_SIGA_CRC_CHK HT/VHT SIGA CRC8 & HE SIGA CRC4 check enable
[2] R/W 1 B_AX_LSIG_PARITY_CHK_EN OFDM/HT/VHT/HE rate parity bit check enable
[1] R/W 1 B_AX_CCK_SIG_CHK CCK rate signal field check enable
[0] R/W 1 B_AX_CCK_CRC_CHK CCK rate CRC16 check enable
1860CE06h R_AX_RXGCK_CTRL
[15:10] R/W 0 RSVD
[9:8] R/W 0 B_AX_RXGCK_GCK_RATE_LIMIT PPDU limint of MAC_RX enable clcok / per rxd
0 : CCK only
1 : CCK + OFDM
others : RSVD
[7] R/W 0 RSVD
[6:4] R/W 0 B_AX_RXGCK_ENTRY_DELAY MAC_RX time delay to gate clock after making the decision.
Unit: T. 0 / 2 / 4 / 8 / 16 / 32 / 64 / 128 T.
[3:2] R/W 3 B_AX_RXGCK_GCK_CYCLE MAC_RX enable clcok / per rxd
0 : 32 cycle / 1 : 64 cycle / 2 : 128 cycle / 3: disable
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_RXGCK_CCA_EN This bit is set to 1 to let CCA be one of the signals that can wakeup
MAC from Rx_idle
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_DISGCLK Disable macrx clock gating control. Before accessing Rx circuit,
SW needs to set this bit to 1.
1860CE08h R_AX_RXPSF_CTRL
[31:20] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[19:16] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_PKT_TIME_THR RX packet time of PPDU longer than threshold will trigger invalid_pkt pulse. Unit: us.
0~12:0 / 2 / 4 / 8 / 16 / 32 / 64 / 128 / 256 / 512 / 1024 / 2048 us.
13~15: 0 us.
[15] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[14:12] R/W 7 B_AX_RXPSF_ERRTHR Continuous FCS error packet threshold. Unit: number.
1 / 4 / 8 / 12 / 16 / 20 / 24 / 28 packets.
[11:10] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[9:8] R/W 2 B_AX_INVALID_WIDTH Config invalid_pkt pulse width. Unit: T.
4 / 8 / 16 / 32 T.
[7:5] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[4] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_PLCP_CHKEN Set 1 to enable MAC to issue invalid_pkt when PLCP error or interBSS (invalid).
[3] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_BSS_CHKEN This bit is set to 1 to enable MAC to consider trigging invalid_pkt as rx packet is inter BSS
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_MHCHKEN This bit is set to 1 to enable MAC to consider trigging invalid_pkt as rx packet unmatch rate/type/rx filter results
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_CONT_ERRCHKEN This bit is set to 1 to enable MAC to inform BB enter power saving mode as continuous rx FCS error packets number in a PPDU is large than the FCS error packet threshold defined by BBPSF_ERRTHR. This function is independent from rate, type and IDs.
[0] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
1860CE0Ch R_AX_RXPSF_DATA_TYPE
[15] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_DATA15_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=10 and subtype=1111.
[14] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_DATA14_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=10 and subtype=1110.
[13] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_DATA13_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=10 and subtype=1101.
[12] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_DATA12_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=10 and subtype=1100.
[11] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_DATA11_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=10 and subtype=1011.
[10] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_DATA10_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=10 and subtype=1010.
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_DATA9_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=10 and subtype=1001.
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_DATA8_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=10 and subtype=1000.
[7] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_DATA7_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=10 and subtype=0111.
[6] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_DATA6_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=10 and subtype=0110.
[5] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_DATA5_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=10 and subtype=0101.
[4] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_DATA4_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=10 and subtype=0100.
[3] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_DATA3_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=10 and subtype=0011.
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_DATA2_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=10 and subtype=0010.
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_DATA1_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=10 and subtype=0001.
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_DATA_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=10 and subtype=0000.
1860CE0Eh R_AX_RXPSF_MGT_TYPE
[15] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_MGT15_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=00 and subtype=1111.
[14] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_MGT14_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=00 and subtype=1110.
[13] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_MGT13_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=00 and subtype=1101.
[12] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_MGT12_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=00 and subtype=1100.
[11] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_MGT11_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=00 and subtype=1011.
[10] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_MGT10_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=00 and subtype=1010.
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_MGT9_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=00 and subtype=1001.
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_MGT8_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=00 and subtype=1000.
[7] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_MGT7_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=00 and subtype=0111.
[6] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_MGT6_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=00 and subtype=0110.
[5] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_MGT5_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=00 and subtype=0101.
[4] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_MGT4_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=00 and subtype=0100.
[3] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_MGT3_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=00 and subtype=0011.
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_MGT2_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=00 and subtype=0010.
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_MGT1_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=00 and subtype=0001.
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_MGT0_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=00 and subtype=0000.
1860CE10h R_AX_RXPSF_CTRL_TYPE
[15:1] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_CTRL_PRSV This bit is set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type = 01.
1860CE12h R_AX_RXPSF_RATE
[15:9] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_HETB_PRSV This bit is set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet rate = HE TB
[7] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_HEMU_PRSV This bit is set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet rate = HE MU
[6] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_HEERSU_PRSV This bit is set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet rate = HE ERSU
[5] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_HESU_PRSV This bit is set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet rate = HE SU
[4] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_VHTMU_PRSV This bit is set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet rate = VHT MU
[3] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_VHTSU_PRSV This bit is set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet rate = VHT SU
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_HT_PRSV This bit is set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet rate = HT
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_OFDM_PRSV This bit is set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet rate = OFDM
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_RXPSF_CCK_PRSV This bit is set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet rate = CCK
1860CE14h R_AX_RXAI_CTRL
[31:8] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[7] W1C 0 B_AX_RXAI_INFO_RST Write 1 to reset the RXAI events
[6] RO 0 B_AX_RXAI_PRTCT_REL If recca_protect is set to 0 by MAC decision circuit (address/A-MPDU checking), set this bit to 1. Reset by BIT_RXAI_INFO_RST = 1
[5] RO 0 B_AX_RXAI_PRTCT_VIO If MAC gets BB_reset_MAC pulse when recca_protect = 1, set this bit to 1. Reset by BIT_RXAI_INFO_RST = 1
[4:3] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_rxai_recca_dis 0 : enable phy recca
1 : disable phy recca
[1] R/W 1 B_AX_RXAI_PRTCT_SEL recca_protect rises at
0: DATA_ON rises
1: MAC header and FCS check done (HW default)
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_RXAI_PRTCT_EN Set to 1 to enable MAC to inform BB not doing reCCA during receiving the address matched PPDU.
1860CE18h R_AX_RX_FIFO_STATUS
[31] W1C 0 B_AX_RXDFIFO_ADDR_CLR addr mode = 2'd0 : write 1 to clear read/write address
addr mode = 2'd1 : write 1 to clear last normail rx mode read/write pointer
addr mode = 2'd2 : write 1 to clear last csi mode read/write pointer
[30] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[29:28] R/W 0 B_AX_RXDFIFO_ADDR_MODE 0 : current pointer
1 : last normail rx mode read/write pointer
2.: last csi mode read/write pointer
[27:16] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[15:8] RO 0 B_AX_RXDFIFO_RADDR RXD FIFO read pointer
[7:0] RO 0 B_AX_RXDFIFO_WADDR RXD FIFO write pointer
1860CE1Ch R_AX_RX_FIFO_CTRL
[31:25] R/W 0 RSVD
[24] R/W 0 B_AX_RXS_FIFO_IORST 0: io related function reset with register only
1: io related function reset with register & fuction enable
[23] W1C 0 B_AX_RXD_FIFO_MAX_LEV_CLR clear rxd fifo maximum data level
[22:16] R/W 0 RSVD
[15:8] R 0 B_AX_RXD_FIFO_MAX_LEV maximum data level of rxd fifo
[7:0] R/W 0xff B_AX_RXD_FIFO_FULL_TH RXD FIFO full threshold
1860CE20h R_AX_RX_FLTR_OPT
[31:24] R/W 0xf B_AX_UID_FILTER user id filter
[23:22] R/W 0 B_AX_UNSPT_FILTER unsupported type filter
[21:16] R/W 0x1f B_AX_RX_MPDU_MAX_LEN RX packets upper limit. The unit is 512 bytes. Set to“0", no RX limit is forced.
[15] R/W 0 RSVD
[14] R/W 0 B_AX_A_FTM_REQ Accept FTM REQ packets.
1: Accept
0: Reject
[13] R/W 0 B_AX_A_ERR_PKT Accept error packets.
Protocol Version set to nonzero.
Encrypted pkts IV to short.
1: Accept
0: Reject
[12] R/W 0 B_AX_A_UNSUP_PKT Accept upsupport packets.
1: Accept
0: Reject
[11] R/W 0 B_AX_A_CRC32_ERR Accept CRC32 Error packets.
1: Accept
0: Reject
[10] R/W 0 B_AX_A_PWR_MGNT Accept Power Management Packet.
This bit determines to accept or reject packets with the power management bit set to 1.
1: Accept
0: Reject
[9:8] R/W 0 B_AX_A_BCN_CHK_RULE Beacon or probe response check rule. Only valid when B_AX_A_BCN_CHK_EN=1
0: A3 hit
1: A2 hit
2: A2 & A3 hit
3: A2 | A3 hit
[7] R/W 0 B_AX_A_BCN_CHK_EN Determine whether HW needs to check B_AX_A_BCN_CHK_RULE when receiving beacon or probe response.
1: Need to check
0: No need to check
[6] R/W 0 B_AX_A_MC_LIST_CAM_MATCH Receive specific MC packets. Only valid when B_A_MC=1.
1: Whitelist. If cam_srch_hit=1, this MC packet should be received;
otherwise, drop this packet.
0: Blacklist. If cam_srch_hit=1, this MC packet should be dropped;
otherwise, receive this packet.
[5] R/W 0 B_AX_A_BC_CAM_MATCH Determine whether HW need to check cam_srch_hit=1 when receiving BC packets. Only valid when B_A_BC=1.
1: If cam_srch_hit=1, this packet should be received; otherwise, drop this packet.
0: No need to check cam_srch_hit when receiving BC packets
[4] R/W 0 B_AX_A_UC_CAM_MATCH Determine whether HW need to check cam_srch_hit=1 when receiving UC packets. Only valid when B_A_UC=1.
1: If cam_srch_hit=1, this packet should be received; otherwise, drop this packet.
0: No need to check cam_srch_hit when receiving UC packets.
[3] R/W 0 B_AX_A_MC 0: Accept
1: Depends on B_AX_A_MC_CAM_MATCH
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_A_BC 0: Accept
1: Depends on B_AX_A_BC_CAM_MATCH.
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_A_A1_MATCH 0: Accept
1: If a1_match = 1 depends on B_AX_A_UC_CAM_MATCH; Else Drop.
[0] R/W 1 B_AX_SNIFFER_MODE Sniffer mode. No matter the result of ADDR_CAM search, all packets will be received.
1: Enable
0: Disable
1860CE24h R_AX_CTRL_FLTR
[31:30] R/W 0 B_AX_A_CTRL15 When set, frames with type=01 and subtype=1111 are received. (RSVD)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[29:28] R/W 0 B_AX_A_CTRL14 When set, frames with type=01 and subtype=1110 are received. (CF-End)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[27:26] R/W 0 B_AX_A_CTRL13 When set, frames with type=01 and subtype=1101 are received. (Ack)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[25:24] R/W 0 B_AX_A_CTRL12 When set, frames with type=01 and subtype=1100 are received. (CTS)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[23:22] R/W 0 B_AX_A_CTRL11 When set, frames with type=01 and subtype=1011 are received. (RTS)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[21:20] R/W 0 B_AX_A_CTRL10 When set, frames with type=01 and subtype=1010 are received. (PS-Poll)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[19:18] R/W 0 B_AX_A_CTRL9 When set, frames with type=01 and subtype=1001 are received. (Block Ack)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[17:16] R/W 0 B_AX_A_CTRL8 When set, frames with type=01 and subtype=1000 are received. (Block Ack Request)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[15:14] R/W 0 B_AX_A_CTRL7 When set, frames with type=01 and subtype=0111 are received. (Control Wrapper)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[13:12] R/W 0 B_AX_A_CTRL6 When set, frames with type=01 and subtype=0110 are received. (Control Frame Extension)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[11:10] R/W 0 B_AX_A_CTRL5 When set, frames with type=01 and subtype=0101 are received. (VHT/HE NDP Announcement)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[9:8] R/W 0 B_AX_A_CTRL4 When set, frames with type=01 and subtype=0100 are received. (Beamforming Report Poll)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[7:6] R/W 0 B_AX_A_CTRL3 When set, frames with type=01 and subtype=0011 are received. (TACK)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[5:4] R/W 0 B_AX_A_CTRL2 When set, frames with type=01 and subtype=0010 are received. (Trigger)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[3:2] R/W 0 B_AX_A_CTRL1 When set, frames with type=01 and subtype=0001 are received. (RSVD)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[1:0] R/W 0 B_AX_A_CTRL0 When set, frames with type=01 and subtype=0000 are received. (RSVD)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
1860CE28h R_AX_MGNT_FLTR
[31:30] R/W 1 B_AX_A_MGNT15 When set, frames with type=00 and subtype=1111 are received. (RSVD)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[29:28] R/W 1 B_AX_A_MGNT14 When set, frames with type=00 and subtype=1110 are received. (Action No Ack)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[27:26] R/W 1 B_AX_A_MGNT13 When set, frames with type=00 and subtype=1101 are received. (Action)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[25:24] R/W 1 B_AX_A_MGNT12 When set, frames with type=00 and subtype=1100 are received. (Deauthentication)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[23:22] R/W 1 B_AX_A_MGNT11 When set, frames with type=00 and subtype=1011 are received. (Authentication)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[21:20] R/W 1 B_AX_A_MGNT10 When set, frames with type=00 and subtype=1010 are received. (Disassociation)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[19:18] R/W 1 B_AX_A_MGNT9 When set, frames with type=00 and subtype=1001 are received. (ATIM)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[17:16] R/W 1 B_AX_A_MGNT8 When set, frames with type=00 and subtype=1000 are received. (Beacon)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[15:14] R/W 1 B_AX_A_MGNT7 When set, frames with type=00 and subtype=0111 are received. (RSVD)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[13:12] R/W 1 B_AX_A_MGNT6 When set, frames with type=00 and subtype=0110 are received. (Timing Advertisement)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[11:10] R/W 1 B_AX_A_MGNT5 When set, frames with type=00 and subtype=0101 are received. (Probe Response)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[9:8] R/W 1 B_AX_A_MGNT4 When set, frames with type=00 and subtype=0100 are received. (Probe Request)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[7:6] R/W 1 B_AX_A_MGNT3 When set, frames with type=00 and subtype=0011 are received. (Reassociation Response)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[5:4] R/W 1 B_AX_A_MGNT2 When set, frames with type=00 and subtype=0010 are received. (Reassociation Requestt)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[3:2] R/W 1 B_AX_A_MGNT1 When set, frames with type=00 and subtype=0001 are received. (Association Response)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[1:0] R/W 1 B_AX_A_MGNT0 When set, frames with type=00 and subtype=0000 are received. (Association Request)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
1860CE2Ch R_AX_DATA_FLTR
[31:30] R/W 1 B_AX_A_DATA15 When set, frames with type=10 and subtype=1111 are received. (QoS CF-Ack + CF-Poll)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[29:28] R/W 1 B_AX_A_DATA14 When set, frames with type=10 and subtype=1110 are received. (QoS CF-Poll)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[27:26] R/W 1 B_AX_A_DATA13 When set, frames with type=10 and subtype=1101 are received. (RSVD)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[25:24] R/W 1 B_AX_A_DATA12 When set, frames with type=10 and subtype=1100 are received. (QoS Null)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[23:22] R/W 1 B_AX_A_DATA11 When set, frames with type=10 and subtype=1011 are received. (QoS Data + CF-Ack + CF-Poll)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[21:20] R/W 1 B_AX_A_DATA10 When set, frames with type=10 and subtype=1010 are received. (QoS Data + CF-Poll)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[19:18] R/W 1 B_AX_A_DATA9 When set, frames with type=10 and subtype=1001 are received. (QoS Data + CF-Ack)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[17:16] R/W 1 B_AX_A_DATA8 When set, frames with type=10 and subtype=1000 are received. (QoS Data)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[15:14] R/W 1 B_AX_A_DATA7 When set, frames with type=10 and subtype=0111 are received. (RSVD)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[13:12] R/W 1 B_AX_A_DATA6 When set, frames with type=10 and subtype=0110 are received. (RSVD)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[11:10] R/W 1 B_AX_A_DATA5 When set, frames with type=10 and subtype=0101 are received. (RSVD)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[9:8] R/W 1 B_AX_A_DATA4 When set, frames with type=10 and subtype=0100 are received. (Null)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[7:6] R/W 1 B_AX_A_DATA3 When set, frames with type=10 and subtype=0011 are received. (RSVD)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[5:4] R/W 1 B_AX_A_DATA2 When set, frames with type=10 and subtype=0010 are received. (RSVD)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[3:2] R/W 1 B_AX_A_DATA1 When set, frames with type=10 and subtype=0001 are received. (RSVD)
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
[1:0] R/W 1 B_AX_A_DATA0 When set, frames with type=10 and subtype=0000 are received. (Data)

2: To wlan CPU.
3: RSVD.
1860CE30h R_AX_ZLENDEL_COUNT
[31:16] R/W 0 RSVD
[15:8] R 0 B_AX_RXD_DELI_NUM Delimiter count value of last MPDU
[7:4] R/W 0 B_AX_RXD_DELI_NUM_SEL USER select (UID) of B_AX_RXD_DELI_NUM
[3] R/W 0 RSVD
[2:1] R/W 0 B_AX_RXD_DELI_UNIT zero length delimiter count unit
2'd0 : 4 Bytes
2'd1 : 16 Bytes
2'd2 : 128 Bytes
2'd3 : 8192 Bytes
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_RXD_DELI_EN zero length delimiter count enable
1860CE34h R_AX_ADDR_CAM_CTRL
[31:24] R/W 0 RSVD
[23:16] R/W 0x7f B_AX_ADDR_CAM_RANGE Indicate how many entries do HW searches, which can be used to decrease HW search time.
[15:12] R/W 0 B_AX_ADDR_CAM_CMPLIMT address cam search limit (timeout)
0 : no limit
limit = 2^[11:8]
[11] R/W 0 RSVD
[10] R/W 0 B_AX_ADDR_CAM_IORST 0: io related function reset with register only
1: io related function reset with register & fuction enable
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_DIS_ADDR_CLK_GATED 1: disable address CAM clock gated
0: enable address CAM clock gated
[8] W1C 0 B_AX_ADDR_CAM_CLR Clear all address CAM contents. Set VALID of all ADDR_CAM entries to 0.
Write '1' to trigger clear and read '0' to check clear done
[7:3] R/W 0 RSVD
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_ADDR_CAM_A2_B0_CHK address cam search enable A2 Bit0 compare
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_ADDR_CAM_SRCH_PERPKT address cam search per MPDU.
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_ADDR_CAM_EN Enable address CAM.
1: Enable
0: Disable
1860CE38h R_AX_ADDR_CAM_DIS_INFO
[31:24] R/W 0 B_AX_ADDR_CAM_DIS_MACID address cam info macid
[23:16] R/W 0 B_AX_ADDR_CAM_DIS_SEC_IDX address cam security index
[15] R/W 0 RSVD
[14:12] R/W 0 B_AX_ADDR_CAM_DIS_PORT address cam port select
[11] R/W 0 B_AX_ADDR_CAM_DIS_A3_HIT address cam A1 hit flag
0 : A3 not hit
1 : A3 hit
[10] R/W 0 B_AX_ADDR_CAM_DIS_A2_HIT address cam A1 hit flag
0 : A2 not hit
1 : A2 hit
[9] R/W 1 B_AX_ADDR_CAM_DIS_A1_HIT address cam A1 hit flag
0 : A1 not hit
1 : A1 hit
[8] R/W 1 B_AX_ADDR_CAM_DIS_CAM_HIT address cam hit flag
0 : addr cam not hit
1 : addr cam hit
[7:0] R/W 0 B_AX_ADDR_CAM_DIS_IDX address cam search report
1860CE3Ch R_AX_RESPBA_CAM_CTRL
[31:25] R/W 0 RSVD
[24] R/W 0 B_AX_BACAM_SKIP_ALL_QOSNULL 1: ignore all SN from qosnull
0: just skip qosnull when SN = 0
[23:16] R/W 0 RSVD
[15:12] R/W 0 B_AX_DEST_ENTRY_IDX Entry index of destination
[11:8] R/W 0 B_AX_SRC_ENTRY_IDX Entry index of source
[7] W1C 0 B_AX_BACAM_SHIFT_POLL Write 1’b1 to trigger HW moving BA CAM control field and BA bitmap content from src_entry_idx (temp) to dest_entry_idx (std).
HW sets to 0 after completion.
[6] R/W 0 B_AX_BACAM_IORST 0: io related function reset with register only
1: io related function reset with register & fuction enable
[5] R/W 0 B_AX_BACAM_GCK_DIS Disable ba cam clock gating control
[4] R/W 0 RSVD
[3] R/W 0 B_AX_COMPL_VAL Within BA window size, the value of bitmap outside of the range between min. SN and max. SN:
0: set to all 0
1: set to all 1
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_SSN_SEL The way to decide SSN of BA.
0: SSN = max. Rx SN – window size
1: SSN = min. Rx SN
[1:0] W1C 0 B_AX_BACAM_RST 0: no reset
1: reset specific BA CAM entry (indicated in BIT[11:8] B_AX_SRC_ENTRY_IDX)
2: reset all BA CAM entry
3: rsvd
1860CE40h R_AX_PPDU_STAT
[15:12] R/W 0 RSVD
[11:10] R/W 0x3 B_AX_PPDU_STAT_WR_BW status report write bandwidth option
2'd0 : 5.12Gbps
2'd1 : 7/(1+7) * 5.12 = 4.48Gbps
2'd2 : 5/(1+5) * 5.12 = 4.267Gbps
2'd3 : 4/(1+4) * 5.12 = 4.096Gbps
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_PPDU_STAT_DMA_MODE 1 : write data start from mac info -> phy status
0 : write data start from phy status -> mac info
[8] W1C 0 B_AX_PPDU_STAT_RPT_TRIG (For debug use)
Write one would trigger a pulse to HW. HW would send a PPDU status to host/WLCPU. The PHY status in the PPDU status is removed and the others are valid (if has).
[7:6] R/W 0 RSVD
[5] R/W 0 B_AX_PPDU_STAT_RPT_CRC32 1: Only generate PPDU_STATUS_RPT when there is at least a CRC-OK MPDU(HW would ignore this setting when receiving NDP PPDU status)
0: Always generate PPDU_STATUS_RPT, and don't care whether CRC OK or not.
[4] R/W 0 B_AX_PPDU_STAT_RPT_ADDR 1: Only generate PPDU_STATUS_RPT when there is at least a AddressCAM-hit MPDU(HW would ignore this setting when receiving NDP PPDU status)
0: don't care
[3] R/W 0 B_AX_APP_PLCP_HDR_RPT Append PLCP_HDR after MAC_INFO. Only valid when B_AX_APP_MAC_INFO_RPT = 1.
1: Append, 0: Not append.
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_APP_RX_CNT_RPT Append RX_CNT_RPT after MAC_INFO. Only valid when B_AX_APP_MAC_INFO_RPT = 1.
1: Append, 0: Not append.
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_APP_MAC_INFO_RPT Append MAC_INFO to PPDU status report.
1: Append, 0: Not append.
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_PPDU_STAT_RPT_EN Enable PPDU status report function.
1: Enabe, 0: Disable.
1860CE42h R_AX_PPDU_STAT_ERR
[15:8] RO 0 B_AX_PPDU_STAT_CNTR PPDU status_counter
[7:0] W1C 0 B_AX_PPDU_STAT_err_flag error flag of status write
[0] : status idle but dma busy & phy status trigger
[1] : input buffer overflow
[2] : status active & phy status trigger
[7:3] : rsvd
1860CE44h R_AX_CH_INFO_QRY
[31:24] RO 0 B_AX_CH_INFO_TIME The period CMAC requests channel info to DMAC
Unit: 1us
[23:21] RO 0 B_AX_CH_INFO_CNT The times of requesting channel info
[20] RO 0 B_AX_CH_INFO_REQUSTING Indicate CMAC has sent the channel info request to DMAC
[19] R/W 0 B_AX_CH_INFO_MGNT_FRM 1: Indicate the management frame would trigger get-channel-info operation
[18] R/W 0 B_AX_CH_INFO_CTRL_FRM 1: Indicate the control frame would trigger get-channel-info operation
[17] R/W 0 B_AX_CH_INFO_DATA_FRM 1: Indicate the data frame would trigger get-channel-info operation
[16] R/W 0 B_AX_CH_INFO_CRC_FAIL 1: Indicate the CRC-fail packet would trigger get-channel-info operation
[15:8] R/W 0 B_AX_CH_INFO_MACID MAC ID of channel info.
[7:4] R/W 0 RSVD
[3:1] R/W 0 B_AX_CH_INFO_MODE 0: MACID trigger.
1: MACID + NDPA + NDP trigger.
2: MACID + Sounding PPDU
Else: RSVD
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_GET_CH_INFO_EN 1: Start to get channel info if B_AX_CH_INFO_MACID equals received packet.
0: Do not get channel info
1860CE48h R_AX_MACID_MATCH
[15:8] R/W 0 B_AX_MACID_MATCH (Valid when B_AX_MACID_MATCH_EN = 1)
The MACID which would trigger mac_id_match signal to BB.
[7:2] R/W 0 RSVD
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_MACID_MATCH_MODE (Valid when B_AX_MACID_MATCH_EN = 1)
0: (smart antenna, check CRC)sends the mac_id_match signal every PPDU
1: (LA mode, DO NOT check CRC)sends the mac_id_match signal every MPDU
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_MACID_MATCH_EN Enable MAC sends the mac_id_match signal to BB. 1: Enable, 0: Disable
1860CE4Ah R_AX_RX_SR_CTRL
[7:6] R/W 0 RSVD
[5:4] R/W 0 B_AX_SR_OP_MODE Set the OP_MODE for Inter/Intra decision use. The OP_MODE is same as
NETYPE.
[3] R/W 0 RSVD
[2] R/W 1 B_AX_SRG_CHK_EN Enable SRG decision module. If this bit = 0, all PPDU decide to non-SRG
PPDU.
[1] R/W 1 B_AX_SR_CTRL_PLCP_EN When this bit enable, 802.11AX Spatial Reuse PLCP RX parsing enable.
Otherwise, all SR RX related decision by MACHDR.
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_SR_EN When this bit enable, 802.11AX Spatial Reuse function enable.
1860CE4Bh R_AX_BSSID_SRC_CTRL
[7:4] R/W 0 RSVD
[3] R/W 1 B_AX_BSSID_MATCH if B_AX_ADDR_CAM_EN = 1 ADDRESSCAM will use MACHDR information to decide BSSID match or not.
If B_AX_ADDR_CAM_EN = 0 ADDRESSCAM will output this bit as a search result.
0: BSSID not match.
1: BSSID match.
[2] R/W 1 B_AX_PARTIAL_AID_MATCH This bit will be set as the result of PATIAL_AID search when B_AX_PLCP_SRC_EN = 0.
0: PATIAL AID not match.
1: PATIAL AID match.
[1] R/W 1 B_AX_BSSCOLOR_MATCH This bit will be set as the result of BSSID_COLOR search when B_AX_PLCP_SRC_EN = 0.
0: BSSID_COLOR not match.
1: BSSID_COLOR match.
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_PLCP_SRC_EN if this bit is 1 ADDRESSCAM will use PLCP information to decide BSSID_COLOR, PATIAL_AID match or not.
if this bit is 0 ADDRESSCAM will output B_AX_BSSCOLOR_MATCH and B_AX_PARTIAL_AID_MATCH as search results
1860CE4Ch R_AX_SR_OBSS_PD
[31:24] R/W 0xC0 B_AX_SRG_OBSS_PD_MAX For Spatial Reuse RPL calculation used. This field is equals -62dbm + SRG OBSS PD Max Offset which in Spatial Reuse Parameter Set element.
[23:16] R/W 0x70 B_AX_SRG_OBSS_PD_MIN For Spatial Reuse RPL calculation used. This field is equals -82dbm + SRG OBSS PD Min Offset which in Spatial Reuse Parameter Set element.
[15:8] R/W 0xC0 B_AX_NONSRG_OBSS_PD_MAX For Spatial Reuse RPL calculation used. This field is equals -62dbm + Non-SRG OBSS PD Max Offset which in Spatial Reuse Parameter Set element.
[7:0] R/W 0x70 B_AX_NONSRG_OBSS_PD_MIN For Spatial Reuse RPL calculation used. This field is equals -82dbm.
1860CE50h R_AX_SR_BSSCOLOR_BITMAP
[31:0] R/W 0 B_AX_BSSCOLOR_BITMAP For Spatial Reuse SRG/non-SRG decision used. When STA associated with
AP. Fill the R_SR_PARTIAL_BSSID_BITMAP from Spatial Reuse Parameter Set element.
1860CE54h R_AX_SR_BSSCOLOR_BITMAP_H
[31:0] R/W 0 B_AX_BSSCOLOR_BITMAP_H For Spatial Reuse SRG/non-SRG decision used. When STA associated with
AP. Fill the R_SR_PARTIAL_BSSID_BITMAP from Spatial Reuse Parameter Set element.
1860CE58h R_AX_SR_PARTIAL_BSSCOLOR_BITMAP
[31:0] R/W 0 B_AX_PARTIAL_BSSID_BITMAP For Spatial Reuse SRG/non-SRG decision used. When STA associated with
AP. Fill the R_SR_PARTIAL_BSSID_BITMAP from Spatial Reuse Parameter Set element.
1860CE5Ch R_AX_SR_PARTIAL_BSSCOLOR_BITMAP_H
[31:0] R/W 0 B_AX_PARTIAL_BSSID_BITMAP_H For Spatial Reuse SRG/non-SRG decision used. When STA associated with
AP. Fill the R_SR_PARTIAL_BSSID_BITMAP from Spatial Reuse Parameter Set element.
1860CE60h R_AX_SCOPE_CTRL
[31:12] R/W 0 RSVD
[11:8] R/W 0 B_AX_SCOPE_LEN sgement length (Unit : 1K *2^[7:4])
[7:6] R/W 0 RSVD
[5:4] R/W 0 B_AX_SCOPE_FILTER scope packet target
0 : drop
1 : to host
2 : to WLCPU
3 : rsvd
[3] R/W 0 B_AX_SCOPE_APPZERO scope mode append zero when data is not enough
[2:0] R/W 0 B_AX_SCOPE_MODE scope mode
0 : disable
1 : BB scope
2 : MAC RXD dump
3 : MAC PSDU segment
1860CE64h R_AX_CSIRPT_OPTION
[31] R 0 B_AX_CSIRPT_CHKSUM_ERROR Indicate MAC Rx csi rpt checksum error
[30] R 0 B_AX_CSIRPT_BBLEN_LT_MAC Indicate MAC Rx csi rxd number underflow
[29] R 0 B_AX_CSIRPT_BBLEN_GT_MAC Indicate MAC Rx csi rxd number overflow
[28:26] R/W 0 RSVD
[25] R/W 0 B_AX_CSIPRT_HESU_AID_EN 0:check AID 1:bypass HE NONTB SU AID check
[24] R/W 0 B_AX_CSIPRT_VHTSU_AID_EN 0:check AID 1:bypass VHT SU AID check
[23:16] R/W 0x20 B_AX_CSIRPT_FIFO_RESUME_THR mac resume csi data when fifo data last than threshold
[15:8] R/W 0xA0 B_AX_CSIRPT_FIFO_PAUSE_THR mac pause csi data when fifo data more than threshold
[7] R/W 0 RSVD
[6] R/W 1 B_AX_CSIRPT_LEN_MISMATCH destory fcs when bb length mismatch rdrdy number
[5] R/W 1 B_AX_CSIRPT_DMAFULL_IGNORE pause data write when dma assert fifo full
[4:3] R/W 0 B_AX_CSIRPT_FILTER CSI report filter
0 : drop
1 : To Host
2 : To WLCPU
3 : Rsvd
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_CSIRPT_CHECKSUM_DIS Disable CSI checksum
[1] R/W 1 B_AX_CSIRPT_EMPTY_APPZERO Append zero if csi data from BB is sharter than mac expectation
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_CSIRPT_NDPPLCP_CHK_EN NDP PLCP check enable
1860CE68h R_AX_BSR_UPD_CTRL
[31:1] R/W 0 RSVD
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_QSIZE_UPD If received Queue Size Subfield = 255,
0: report queue size 0 to STA_SCH (ac_type follows TID subfield of OoS ctrl)
1: ignore to report queue size
1860CE6Ch R_AX_WMRX_LA_EVENT_OPTION
[31:27] RW 5'h0 RSVD
[26] RW 1'h0 B_AX_RXPSR_PV_CHK_EN enable of parser bypass check if frame control.version != "2'd0"
0 : disable check
1 : enable check
[25] RW 1'h0 B_AX_RXPSR_STP_CHK_EN enable of parser bypass check if packet type is
data & subtype = 4'b1101
management & subtype = 4'b0111 or 4'b1111
control & subtype = 4'b0000 or 4'b0001 or 4'b0011
0 : disable check
1 : enable check
[24] RW 1'h0 B_AX_RXPSR_TP_CHK_EN enable of parser bypass check if packet type = "2'b11"
0 : disable check
1 : enable check
[23:17] RW 7'h0 RSVD
[16] RW 1'h0 B_AX_RX_DBG_IGNORE_UNEXPRX 1: ignore unexpected rx
0: do nothing
[15:6] RW 10'h0 RSVD
[5:4] RW 2'h0 B_AX_LASTOP_CONT_FCS_ERROR stop LA record when continue fcs error > threshold
0 : disable
1 : 4
2 : 8
3 : 16
[3] RW 1'h0 B_AX_LASTOP_RX_FSM_HANG stop LA record when FSM timeout
[2] RW 1'h0 B_AX_LASTOP_RX_SELF_RST stop LA record when RX self reset
[1] RW 1'h0 B_AX_LASTOP_PLCP_ERROR stop LA record when RX PLCP with parity or CRC error
[0] RW 1'h0 B_AX_LASTOP_PLCP_INCOMP stop LA record when RX PLCP content is incompleted
1860CE70h R_AX_DRV_INFO_OPTION
[31:1] R/W 0 RSVD
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_DRV_INFO_PHYRPT_EN Fill phy report into driver informatation (first 32 bytes)
1860CE80h R_AX_BCN_PSR_CTRL
[15:8] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[7:4] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_HIT_INT_PORT Port selection of RX BCN HIT INT of band 0.
[3] R/W 0 B_AX_BCAID_HIT_INT_EN 1: Issue INT if broadcast AID is hit in PVB or BitmapControl field of RX BCN
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_UNIAID_HIT_INT_EN 1: Issue INT if unicast AID bit is hit in PVB field of RX BCN
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_IE_HIT_INT_EN 1: Issue INT if BCN IE is hit by BCN IE CAM
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_TIM_PARSER_EN 1: Enable RX Beacon TIM Parser of band 0.
1860CE82h R_AX_BCN_IECAM_CTRL
[15] RO 0 B_AX_BCN_PSR_BUSY 1: Beacon parser is busy. 0: idle.
[14] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_IECAM_IORST 0: io related function reset with register only
1: io related function reset with register & fuction enable
[13:12] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[11:10] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_IE_NOHIT_FRWD Forwarding selection when BCN IE no hit in band 0.
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To WLAN CPU.
3: RSVD.
[9:8] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_IE_HIT_FRWD Forwarding selection when BCN IE hit in band 0.
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To WLAN CPU.
3: RSVD.
[7:4] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_IECAM_PORT Port selection of BCN IE CAM of band 0.
[3] W1C 0 B_AX_BCN_IECAM_CLR
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_IE_NOHIT_FRWD_EN 1: Enable BCN forwarding overwrites when IE no hit in band 0. 0: Disable.
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_IE_HIT_FRWD_EN 1: Enable BCN forwarding overwrites when IE hit in band 0. 0: Disable.
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_IECAM_EN 1: Enable BCN IE CAM detection of band 0. 0: Disable.
1860CE84h R_AX_BCN_PSR_RPT_P0
[31:24] R 0 B_AX_DTIM_CNT_P0 DTIM count field of the TIM element of RX BCN
[23:16] R 0 B_AX_DTIM_PERIOD_P0 DTIM period field of the TIM element of RX BCN
[15] R 0 B_AX_BCAID_HIT_P0 1: Broadcast AID is hit in PVB or BitmapControl field of RX BCN
[14] R 0 B_AX_UNIAID_HIT_P0 1: Unicast AID bit is hit in PVB field of RX BCN
[13] R 0 B_AX_IE_HIT_P0 1: BCN IE is hit by BCN IE CAM
[12] R 0 B_AX_TIM_ILEGAL_P0 1: TIM IE is illegal.
[11] W1C 0 B_AX_RPT_VALID_P0 1: BCN parser report is valid. 0: invalid. Write 1 to clear report value (bit [31:11]).
[10:0] R/W 0 B_AX_BCAID_P0 Broadcast AID of band 0 port 0.
1860CE88h R_AX_BCN_PSR_RPT_P1
[31:24] R 0 B_AX_DTIM_CNT_P1 DTIM count field of the TIM element of RX BCN
[23:16] R 0 B_AX_DTIM_PERIOD_P1 DTIM period field of the TIM element of RX BCN
[15] R 0 B_AX_BCAID_HIT_P1 1: Broadcast AID is hit in PVB or BitmapControl field of RX BCN
[14] R 0 B_AX_UNIAID_HIT_P1 1: Unicast AID bit is hit in PVB field of RX BCN
[13] R 0 B_AX_IE_HIT_P1 1: BCN IE is hit by BCN IE CAM
[12] R 0 B_AX_TIM_ILEGAL_P1 1: TIM IE is illegal.
[11] W1C 0 B_AX_RPT_VALID_P1 1: BCN parser report is valid. 0: invalid. Write 1 to clear report value (bit [31:11]).
[10:0] R/W 0 B_AX_BCAID_P1 Broadcast AID of band 0 port 1.
1860CE8Ch R_AX_BCN_PSR_RPT_P2
[31:24] R 0 B_AX_DTIM_CNT_P2 DTIM count field of the TIM element of RX BCN
[23:16] R 0 B_AX_DTIM_PERIOD_P2 DTIM period field of the TIM element of RX BCN
[15] R 0 B_AX_BCAID_HIT_P2 1: Broadcast AID is hit in PVB or BitmapControl field of RX BCN
[14] R 0 B_AX_UNIAID_HIT_P2 1: Unicast AID bit is hit in PVB field of RX BCN
[13] R 0 B_AX_IE_HIT_P2 1: BCN IE is hit by BCN IE CAM
[12] R 0 B_AX_TIM_ILEGAL_P2 1: TIM IE is illegal.
[11] W1C 0 B_AX_RPT_VALID_P2 1: BCN parser report is valid. 0: invalid. Write 1 to clear report value (bit [31:11]).
[10:0] R/W 0 B_AX_BCAID_P2 Broadcast AID of band 0 port 2.
1860CE90h R_AX_BCN_PSR_RPT_P3
[31:24] R 0 B_AX_DTIM_CNT_P3 DTIM count field of the TIM element of RX BCN
[23:16] R 0 B_AX_DTIM_PERIOD_P3 DTIM period field of the TIM element of RX BCN
[15] R 0 B_AX_BCAID_HIT_P3 1: Broadcast AID is hit in PVB or BitmapControl field of RX BCN
[14] R 0 B_AX_UNIAID_HIT_P3 1: Unicast AID bit is hit in PVB field of RX BCN
[13] R 0 B_AX_IE_HIT_P3 1: BCN IE is hit by BCN IE CAM
[12] R 0 B_AX_TIM_ILEGAL_P3 1: TIM IE is illegal.
[11] W1C 0 B_AX_RPT_VALID_P3 1: BCN parser report is valid. 0: invalid. Write 1 to clear report value (bit [31:11]).
[10:0] R/W 0 B_AX_BCAID_P3 Broadcast AID of band 0 port 3.
1860CE94h R_AX_BCN_PSR_RPT_P4
[31:24] R 0 B_AX_DTIM_CNT_P4 DTIM count field of the TIM element of RX BCN
[23:16] R 0 B_AX_DTIM_PERIOD_P4 DTIM period field of the TIM element of RX BCN
[15] R 0 B_AX_BCAID_HIT_P4 1: Broadcast AID is hit in PVB or BitmapControl field of RX BCN
[14] R 0 B_AX_UNIAID_HIT_P4 1: Unicast AID bit is hit in PVB field of RX BCN
[13] R 0 B_AX_IE_HIT_P4 1: BCN IE is hit by BCN IE CAM
[12] R 0 B_AX_TIM_ILEGAL_P4 1: TIM IE is illegal.
[11] W1C 0 B_AX_RPT_VALID_P4 1: BCN parser report is valid. 0: invalid. Write 1 to clear report value (bit [31:11]).
[10:0] R/W 0 B_AX_BCAID_P4 Broadcast AID of band 0 port 4.
1860CEA0h R_AX_PS_RXINFO
[31:15] R/W 0 rsvd
[14] R/W1C 0 B_AX_P4_RXCTRL It is set to 1 if NIC received ctrl frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
[13] R/W1C 0 B_AX_P4_RXMGT It is set to 1 if NIC received mgnt frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
[12] R/W1C 0 B_AX_P4_RXDATA It is set to 1 if NIC received data frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
[11] R/W1C 0 B_AX_P3_RXCTRL It is set to 1 if NIC received ctrl frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
[10] R/W1C 0 B_AX_P3_RXMGT It is set to 1 if NIC received mgnt frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
[9] R/W1C 0 B_AX_P3_RXDATA It is set to 1 if NIC received data frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
[8] R/W1C 0 B_AX_P2_RXCTRL It is set to 1 if NIC received ctrl frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
[7] R/W1C 0 B_AX_P2_RXMGT It is set to 1 if NIC received mgnt frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
[6] R/W1C 0 B_AX_P2_RXDATA It is set to 1 if NIC received data frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
[5] R/W1C 0 B_AX_P1_RXCTRL It is set to 1 if NIC received ctrl frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
[4] R/W1C 0 B_AX_P1_RXMGT It is set to 1 if NIC received mgnt frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
[3] R/W1C 0 B_AX_P1_RXDATA It is set to 1 if NIC received data frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
[2] R/W1C 0 B_AX_P0_RXCTRL It is set to 1 if NIC received ctrl frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
[1] R/W1C 0 B_AX_P0_RXMGT It is set to 1 if NIC received mgnt frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
[0] R/W1C 0 B_AX_P0_RXDATA It is set to 1 if NIC received data frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
1860CEACh R_AX_PWRINT_CTRL
[31:16] RO 0 B_AX_SEQNUM_MACID The sequence number for the selected macid for power bit check[31:28] is the segment
[15] R/W 0 RSVD rsvd
[14:8] R/W 0 B_AX_REF_MACID the selected macid to check the seqnumber of the power bit
[7:1] R/W 0 RSVD rsvd
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_PWRINT_EN When this bit set, HW auto detect power state per MACID by check every RX packets. And HW will fill power state to power state register. If power state change, generate interrupt to host.
1860CEB0h R_AX_SPWR0
[31:0] R/W 0 B_AX_MID_31to0 MICID 31 ~ 0 power bit value
1860CEB4h R_AX_SPWR1
[31:0] R/W 0 B_AX_MID_63to32 MICID 63 ~ 32 power bit value
1860CEB8h R_AX_SPWR2
[31:0] R/W 0 B_AX_MID_95o64 MICID 95 ~ 64 power bit value
1860CEBCh R_AX_SPWR3
[31:0] R/W 0 B_AX_MID_127to96 MICID 127 ~ 96 power bit value
1860CEC0h R_AX_SNIFFER_MODE_CTRL
[31:4] R/W 0 RSVD
[3] R/W 0 B_AX_AID3_ENABLE Enable bit for fourth AID register
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_AID2_ENABLE Enable bit for third AID register
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_AID1_ENABLE Enable bit for second AID register
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_AID0_ENABLE Enable bit for first AID register
1860CEC4h R_AX_SNIFFER_MODE_CFG0
[31:28] R/W 0 RSVD
[27:16] R/W 0 B_AX_SNIFFER_MODE_AID1 It is used for SW or FW to fill the AID, which it want to capture the specific station 1.
[15:12] R/W 0 RSVD
1860CEC8h R_AX_SNIFFER_MODE_CFG1
[31:28] R/W 0 RSVD
[27:16] R/W 0 B_AX_SNIFFER_MODE_AID3 It is used for SW or FW to fill the AID, which it want to capture the specific station 0.
[15:12] R/W 0 RSVD
[11:0] R/W 0 B_AX_SNIFFER_MODE_AID2 It is used for SW or FW to fill the AID, which it want to capture the specific station 0.
1860CECCh R_AX_RPL_CFG
[31] R/W 0 B_AX_rplcfg_uppeB_AX_en repleace upper 80M RPL for BW = 80M + 80M
[30:25] RW 0 RSVD
[24:16] RW 0 B_AX_rplcfg_uppeB_AX_dbm b"[8:0] = upper RPL dBm/(20Mhz*path) + 110 unit : dbm
repleace RPL from BB when [31] = 1
[15] RW 0 B_AX_rplcfg_en rpl repleace enable for BW <= 80 M
[14:9] RW 0 RSVD
[8:0] RW 0 B_AX_rplcfg_dbm b"[8:0] = RPL dBm/(20Mhz*path) + 110 unit : dbm
repleace RPL from BB when [15] = 1
1860CED0h R_AX_RX_TO_BRK_OPT
[31:30] R/W 0 RSVD
[29:24] RW 3 B_AX_rxpsr_pause_frmtype pause parser when match specific frame type
[23:22] RW 0 RSVD
[21] RW 0 B_AX_rxpsr_pause_beacon pause parser when reecive beacon
[20] RW 0 B_AX_rxpsr_pause_trigger pause parser when reecive trigger
[19] RW 0 B_AX_rxpsr_pause_bar pause parser when reecive bar
[18] RW 0 B_AX_rxpsr_pause_ba pause parser when reecive ba
[17:16] RW 0 B_AX_rxpsr_pause_mode pause parser dependent on frame type
00 : disable
01 : 1/2 * 80M * 64bit = 2.56Gbps
10 : 1/3 * 80M * 64bit = 1.706Gbps
11 : 1/4 * 80M * 64bit = 1.28Gbps
[15:13] RW 0 RSVD
[12:8] RW 0 B_AX_rxbrk_tb_time RX TB will drop remain data in 2p ram when break timeout
5'd0 : disable others : unit us
[7:4] RW 0 RSVD
[3:0] RW 0 B_AX_rxbrk_time RX will drop remain data in 2p ram when break timeout (except TB)
4'd0 : disable others : unit us
1860CEE0h R_AX_RX_DBG_CNT_SEL
31:16 RO 0 B_AX_RX_DBG_CNT The counter value corresponding to B_AX_RX_CNT_IDX.
15:9 R/W 0 RSVD
8 W1C 0 B_AX_RXERR_RPT_RST Write “one” to set the counter to zero.
7:6 R/W 0 RSVD
5:0 R/W 0 B_AX_RX_CNT_IDX 6'd0: OFDM MPDU OK counter
6'd1: OFDM MPDU Fail counter
6'd2: OFDM False Alarm counter
6'd3: CCK MPDU OK counter
6'd4: CCK MPDU Fail counter
6'd5: CCK False Alarm counter;
6'd6: HT MPDU OK counter
6'd7: HT MPDU Fail counter
6'd8: HT PPDU counter
6'd9: HT False Alarm counter
6'd10: VHT SU MPDU OK counter
6'd11: VHT SU MPDU Fail counter
6'd12: VHT SU PPDU counter
6'd13: VHT SU False Alarm counter
6'd14: VHT MU MPDU OK counter
6'd15: VHT MU MPDU Fail counter
6'd16: VHT MU PPDU counter
6'd17: VHT MU False Alarm counter
6'd18: HE SU MPDU OK counter
6'd19: HE SU MPDU Fail counter
6'd20: HE SU PPDU counter
6'd21: HE SU False Alarm counter
6'd22: HE MU MPDU OK counter
6'd23: HE MU MPDU Fail counter
6'd24: HE MU PPDU counter
6'd25: HE MU False Alarm counter
6'd26: HE TB MPDU OK counter
6'd27: HE TB MPDU Fail counter
6'd28: HE TB PPDU counter
6'd29: HE TB False Alarm counter
6'd30: invalid_pkt counter
6'd31: RE_CCA counterRx full drop packet counter
6'd32: Rx full drop counter
6'd33: RX full drop packet counter
6'd34: RX DMA OK counter
6'd35: RX packet filter drop counter
6'd36: CSI packet dma ok counter
6'd37: CSI packet dma drop counter
6'd38: RX NDP PPDU counter
6'd39: (HW internel used) 連續 FCS error packet 數(一有 FCS ok 就 reset)
6'd40: User Define 0
6'd41: User Define 1
6'd42: User Define 2
6'd43: User Define 3
6'd44: User Define 4
6'd45: User Define 5
6'd46: User Define 6
6'd47: User Define 7
1860CEE4h R_AX_RX_CNT_RPT_CFG
[31] W1C 0 B_AX_UD_W1S write 1 to set user define counter
30:28 $W 0 B_AX_UD_CNT_MODE UD_MODE:
3'd0: User full drop
3'd1: User filter
3'd2: User FCS OK
3'd3: User FCS fail
3'd4: Host defined
3'd5: dbg index
others: RSVD
27 $W 0 B_AX_UD_MSK_RUTONE 1: Ignore B_AX_UD_RUTONE
0: Do not ignore B_AX_UD_RUTONE
26 $W 0 B_AX_UD_MSK_RATE 1: Ignore B_AX_UD_RATE and B_AX_UD_GI_TYPE
0: Do not ignore B_AX_UD_RATE and B_AX_UD_GI_TYPE
25 $W 0 B_AX_UD_MSK_BSSID 1: Ignore B_AX_UD_Select_BSSID
0: Do not ignore B_AX_UD_Select_BSSID
24 $W 0 B_AX_UD_MSK_FC 1: Ignore B_AX_UD_Type and B_AX_UD_Sub_Type
0: Do not ignore B_AX_UD_Type and B_AX_UD_Sub_Type
23:20 $W 0 B_AX_UD_Sub_Type User defined: SubType
19:18 $W 0 B_AX_UD_Type User defined: Type
17:15 $W 0 B_AX_UD_RUTONE RU-tone (valid if model_ctrl = HE)
14:12 $W 0 B_AX_UD_Select_BSSID Select BSSID(port)
11:9 $W 0 B_AX_UD_GI_TYPE B_AX_UD_RATE[8:7] = 0, [11:10] = RSVD, [9] = GI
B_AX_UD_RATE[8:7] = 1, [11:10] = RSVD, [9] = GI
B_AX_UD_RATE[8:7] = 2, [11:10] = RSVD, [9] = GI
B_AX_UD_RATE[8:7] = 3, [11:10] = RSVD, [9] = GI_LTF
8:0 $W 0 B_AX_UD_RATE B_AX_UD_RATE[8:7] = mode_ctrl, B_AX_UD_RATE[6:0] = CCK+OFDM index[3:0] or HT index[4:0] /
SS[6:4] + mcs index[3:0]
B_AX_UD_RATE[8:7] = 0 (CCK + OFDM mode), B_AX_UD_RATE[6:4] = RSVD, B_AX_UD_RATE[3:0] = CCK + OFDM
B_AX_UD_RATE[8:7] = 1 (HT), B_AX_UD_RATE[6:5] = RSVD, B_AX_UD_RATE[4:0] = HT MCS0~31
B_AX_UD_RATE[8:7] = 2 (VHT), B_AX_UD_RATE[6:4] = SS, B_AX_UD_RATE[3:0] = VHT MSC index
B_AX_UD_RATE[8:7] = 3 (HE), B_AX_UD_RATE[6:4] = SS, B_AX_UD_RATE[3:0] = HE MSC index
1860CEE8h R_AX_RX_PLCP_MON
[31:28] RW 0 B_AX_RX_PLCP_MON_SEL RX PLCP content select
[27:0] $RO 0 B_AX_RX_PLCP_CONT RX PLCP content
[27:24] : ppdu type
[23:0] : PLCP content
1860CEECh R_AX_RX_TIME_MON
[31:28] R 0 B_AX_DMA_WR_TIME maximum time of Rx write dma fifo (us)
[27:24] R/W 0 B_AX_DMA_WR_TIMEOUT timeout value of dma access (us). 0: timeout disable
[23:22] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[21:16] R/W 0x20 B_AX_INTF_TIMEOUT_THR timeout value of rx interface (ms). 0: timeout disable
[15:12] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[11:8] R 0 B_AX_LATENCY_TIME maximum time of data_on raising to rx idle time (us)
[7:0] R 0 B_AX_CCA2DAT_TIME maximum time of cca raising to data_on raising (us)
1860CEF0h R_AX_RX_STATE_MONITOR
[31:16] $RO 0 B_AX_STATE_CUR current state
[15:14] R/W 0 B_AX_STATE_EXSEL parser internal select
2'd0~2 : mpdu write
2'd3 : segement control
[13:8] R/W 0 B_AX_STATE_NXT sw configure state
[7] W1C 0 B_AX_STATE_UPD write 1 to overwrite current state
[6:5] R/W 0 B_AX_STATE_MODE 2'd0 : write state immediately
2'd1 : continue write until state match
2'd2 : continue write until state match when rx PSDU
2'd3 : RSVD
[4:0] R/W 0 B_AX_STATE_SEL module select
5'd0 : macrx_ctl
5'd1 : macrx_in
5'd2 : macrx_rxd_fifo
5'd3 : macrx_plcp
5'd4 : macrx_protocol
5'd5 : macrx_dma_intf
5'd6 : macrx_sts_write
5'd7~15 : rsvd
5'd16~31 : parser - user0~15
1860CEF4h R_AX_RX_ERR_ISR
[31:10] W1C 0 RSVD
[9] W1C 0 B_AX_RX_ERR_TRIG_ACT_TO rx trigger state time out (ms) >= r_fsm_timeout_thr
[8] W1C 0 B_AX_RX_ERR_STS_ACT_TO rx status write state time out (ms) >= r_fsm_timeout_thr
[7] W1C 0 B_AX_RX_ERR_CSI_ACT_TO rx state csi mode time out (ms) >= r_fsm_timeout_thr
[6] W1C 0 B_AX_RX_ERR_ACT_TO rx state active time out (ms) >= r_fsm_timeout_thr
[5] W1C 0 B_AX_CSI_DATAON_ASSERT_TO csi_data_on assert time >= (0xCEEC[21:16] : r_intf_timeout_thr)
[4] W1C 0 B_AX_DATAON_ASSERT_TO data_on assert time >= (0xCEEC[21:16] : r_intf_timeout_thr)
[3] W1C 0 B_AX_CCA_ASSERT_TO cca assert time >= (0xCEEC[21:16] : r_intf_timeout_thr)
[2] W1C 0 B_AX_RX_ERR_DMA_TO rxdma access time out (us) , start from dma_wreq = 1 , clear by dma_wgnt
[1] W1C 0 B_AX_RX_ERR_DATA_TO rx dead lock protect time out (us) , start from cca falling
[0] W1C 0 B_AX_RX_ERR_CCA_TO rx dead lock protect time out (us) , start from data_on falling
1860CEF8h R_AX_RX_ERR_IMR
[31:10] R/W 0 RSVD
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_RX_ERR_TRIG_ACT_TO_MSK
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_RX_ERR_STS_ACT_TO_MSK
[7] R/W 0 B_AX_RX_ERR_CSI_ACT_TO_MSK
[6] R/W 0 B_AX_RX_ERR_ACT_TO_MSK
[5] R/W 0 B_AX_CSI_DATAON_ASSERT_TO_MSK
[4] R/W 0 B_AX_DATAON_ASSERT_TO_MSK
[3] R/W 0 B_AX_CCA_ASSERT_TO_MSK
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_RX_ERR_DMA_TO_MSK
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_RX_ERR_DATA_TO_MSK
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_RX_ERR_CCA_TO_MSK
1860CEFCh R_AX_RX_DEBUG_SELECT
[31:8] R/W 0 RSVD
[7:0] R/W 0 B_AX_DEBUG_SEL [7:3] : module select
0 : macrx_ctl
1 : macrx_in
2 : macrx_rxd_fifo
3 : macrx_plcp
4 : macrx_protocol
5 : macrx_dma_intf
6 : macrx_sts_write
7 : rsvd
8 : parser - user0
9 : parser - user1
10 : parser - user2
11 : parser - user3

[2:0] : sub module/dbg select

1860D9FCh R_AX_TXPWR_DBG
[31:0] R/W 0 B_AX_TXPWR_CTRL_DBG
1860DA00h R_AX_BTC_CFG
31 R/W 0 B_AX_BTC_EN Enable BT coex
30 RO 0 RSVD
29 R/W 0 B_AX_EN_EXT_BT_PINMUX Enable external interface
28 W1C 0 B_AX_BTC_RST Reset BTC circuit state
27 R/W 0 B_AX_BTC_DBG_SRC_SEL 0: Debug port is from BT1
1: Debug port is from BT2
26 RO 0 RSVD
25:24 R/W 9 B_AX_BTC_MODE 0: RTK mode
1: CSR 3-wire mode
2, 3: RSVD
23:19 RO 0 RSVD
18 R/W 1 B_AX_IGN_GNT_WL2
17 R/W 0 B_AX_INV_WL_ACT2 0: wl_act2 = wl_act2
1: wl_act2 = ~wl_act2
16 R/W 0 B_AX_BTG_LNA1_GAIN_SEL 影響 WLS1_SEL_BTG_MUX 輸出
(WLS1_SEL_BTG_MUX = GNT_BT_RFC_S0 & BTS1_BB_SEL_S1_TRX & R_AX_BTG_LNA1_GAIN_SEL)
15:8 R/W 4 B_AX_COEX_DLY_CLK WL module 參考 PTA 訊號所需的 delay 時間
7 R/W 1 B_AX_IGN_GNT_BT2_RX 1: Ignore GNT_BT2_RX
6 R/W 1 B_AX_IGN_GNT_BT2_TX 1: Ignore GNT_BT2_TX
5 R/W 1 B_AX_IGN_GNT_BT2 1: Ignore GNT_BT2
4:3 R/W 0 B_AX_BTC_DBG_SEL
2 R/W 0 B_AX_DIS_BTC_CLK_G Control BTCOEX module clk gating disable
0:clok gating
1:disable clock gating
1 R/W 1 B_AX_GNT_WL_RX_CTRL 0 : GNT_WL_RX = WL_RX
1 : GNT_WL_RX = WL_RX & GNT_WL
0 R/W 0 B_AX_WL_SRC 0: WL_TX, WL_RX, WL_PRI come from MAC0
1: WL_TX, WL_RX, WL_PRI come from MAC1
1860DA04h R_AX_RTK_MODE_CFG_V1
31:25 RO 0 RSVD
24 R/W 0 B_AX_BT_BLE_EN_V1 0: GNT_BT_TX = GNT_BT & BT_TX, GNT_BT_RX = GNT_BT & BT_RX
1: GNT_BT_TX = GNT_BT & (BT_TX | BT_BLE), GNT_BT_RX = GNT_BT & (BT_RX | BT_BLE)
23:17 RO 0 RSVD
16 R/W 0 B_AX_BT_ULTRA_EN Config GNT_BT & GNT_WL when BT_CMD_ID = 0 & BT_CMD_DATA[3] = 1
15:14 R/W 1 B_AX_BT_L_RX_ULTRA 2'b00: GNT_BT = 0, GNT_WL = 0
2'b01: GNT_BT = 1, GNT_WL = 0
2'b10: GNT_BT = 0, GNT_WL = 1
2'b11: GNT_BT = 1, GNT_WL = 1
13:12 R/W 1 B_AX_BT_L_TX_ULTRA 2'b00: GNT_BT = 0, GNT_WL = 0
2'b01: GNT_BT = 1, GNT_WL = 0
2'b10: GNT_BT = 0, GNT_WL = 1
2'b11: GNT_BT = 1, GNT_WL = 1
11:10 R/W 1 B_AX_BT_H_RX_ULTRA 2'b00: GNT_BT = 0, GNT_WL = 0
2'b01: GNT_BT = 1, GNT_WL = 0
2'b10: GNT_BT = 0, GNT_WL = 1
2'b11: GNT_BT = 1, GNT_WL = 1
9:8 R/W 1 B_AX_BT_H_TX_ULTRA 2'b00: GNT_BT = 0, GNT_WL = 0
2'b01: GNT_BT = 1, GNT_WL = 0
2'b10: GNT_BT = 0, GNT_WL = 1
2'b11: GNT_BT = 1, GNT_WL = 1
7:0 R/W 0 B_AX_SAMPLE_CLK The number of clocks HW detects RTK-command is 0 or 1
1860DA08h R_AX_CSR_MODE_CFG
31:24 RO 0 RSVD
23:16 R/W 0 B_AX_BT_TIME_CNT_V1 The number of clocks of 1us
15:12 RO 0 RSVD Indicate the RTK mode command is incomplete
11:8 R/W 0 B_AX_CSR_DELAY The number of clocks of BT_STATE delay
7:4 R/W 0 B_AX_CSR_TRX The number of clocks of CSR-TRX(T2)
3:0 R/W 0 B_AX_CSR_PRI The number of clocks of CSR-PRI(T1)
1860DA10h R_AX_BT_CNT_CFG
31:2 RO 0 RSVD
1 R/W 0 B_AX_BT_CNT_RST_V1 Write 1 to reset BT_ACT_STATISTICS counters
0 R/W 0 B_AX_BT_CNT_EN When this bit is set, the BT_CNT starts counting
1860DA14h R_AX_BT_CNT_HI
31:16 R 0 B_AX_BT_HI_RX Counters for BT high priority RX. It counts up when B_AX_BT_CNT_EN is set. This counter will reset when B_AX_BT_CNT_RST_V1 is written by 1 pulse. This counter cannot wrap around when overflow occurs. Under overflow, this counter is kept with 0xFFFF.
15:0 R 0 B_AX_BT_HI_TX Counters for BT high priority TX. It counts up when B_AX_BT_CNT_EN is set. This counter will reset when B_AX_BT_CNT_RST_V1 is written by 1 pulse. This counter cannot wrap around when overflow occurs. Under overflow, this counter is kept with 0xFFFF.
1860DA18h R_AX_BT_CNT_LOW
31:16 R 0 B_AX_BT_LOW_RX Counters for BT low RX. It counts up when B_AX_BT_CNT_EN is set. This counter will reset when B_AX_BT_CNT_RST_V1 is written by 1 pulse. This counter cannot wrap around when overflow occurs. Under overflow, this counter is kept with 0xFFFF.
15:0 R 0 B_AX_BT_LOW_TX Counters for BT low TX. It counts up when B_AX_BT_CNT_EN is set. This counter will reset when B_AX_BT_CNT_RST_V1 is written by 1 pulse. This counter cannot wrap around when overflow occurs. Under overflow, this counter is kept with 0xFFFF.
1860DA20h R_AX_RTK_CMD_ERR_RPT
31:2 RO 0 RSVD
1 W1C 0 B_AX_RTK_CMD_CRC Indicate the RTK mode command is CRC error
0 W1C 0 B_AX_RTK_CMD_INC Indicate the RTK mode command is incomplete
1860DA24h R_AX_COEX_WL_REQ
31:24 RO 0 RSVD
23 R/W 0 B_AX_TX_NULL_HI WL TX NULL 時為 High-priority TX
22 R/W 0 B_AX_TX_BCN_HI WL TX Beacon 時為 High-priority TX
21 R/W 0 B_AX_TX_NDP_HI WL TX NDPA/NDP 時為 High-priority TX
20 R/W 0 B_AX_TX_PROT_HI WL TX RTS/CTS2SELF 時為 High-priority TX
19 R/W 0 B_AX_TX_CF_END_HI WL TX CF-END 時為 High-priority TX
18 R/W 0 B_AX_TX_BAR_HI WL TX BAR/MBAR 時為 High-priority TX
17 R/W 0 B_AX_TX_TRI_HI WL TX Trigger/Basic Trigger Frame 時為 High-priority TX
16 R/W 0 B_AX_TX_VOQ_HI WL TX VO-queue packets 時為 High-priority TX
15 R/W 0 B_AX_TX_VIQ_HI WL TX VI-queue packets 時為 High-priority TX
14 R/W 0 B_AX_TX_BEQ_HI WL TX BE-queue packets 時為 High-priority TX
13 R/W 0 B_AX_TX_BKQ_HI WL TX BK-queue packets 時為 High-priority TX
12 R/W 0 B_AX_TX_MGQ_HI WL TX MGNT-queue packets 時為 High-priority TX
11 R/W 0 B_AX_TX_HIQ_HI WL TX Hi-queue packets 時為 High-priority TX
10 R/W 0 B_AX_RSP_ACK_HI WL TX CBA/MBA/ACK/CTS 時為 High-priority TX
9 R/W 0 B_AX_RSP_CSI_HI WL TX CSI 時為 High-priority TX
8 R/W 0 B_AX_RSP_BSR_BQR_HI WL TX BSR/BQR 時為 High-priority TX
7:5 RO 0 RSVD
4:3 R/W 0 B_AX_PRI_MASK_TX_TIME If the estimate TX time larger than B_AX_PRI_MASK_TX_TIME, the TX is high priority TX.
2'b00: disable
2'b01: 1 ms
2'b10: 3 ms
2'b11: 5 ms
2:1 R/W 0 B_AX_PRI_MASK_RX_TIME_V1 If the estimate RX time larger than B_AX_PRI_MASK_RX_TIME, the RX is high priority RX.
2'b00: disable
2'b01: 1 ms
2'b10: 3 ms
2'b11: 5 ms
0 R/W 0 B_AX_WL_RX 0: CCA-RX
1: Idle RX
1860DA28h R_AX_ZB_COEX_TABLE_0
31:0 R/W 0 B_AX_ZB_COEX_TBL_0

31:3 RO 0 RSVD
2 R/W 0 B_AX_ZB_COEX_TBL_SEL zigbee coex table selection
1:0 R/W 0 B_AX_COEX_TBL_SEL 2'b00: coex table = B_AX_BT_COEX_TBL_0
2'b01: coex table = B_AX_BT_COEX_TBL_1
2'b10: coex table = B_AX_BT_COEX_TBL_2
2'b11: coex table = B_AX_BT_COEX_TBL_3
1860DA34h R_AX_BT_COEX_TABLE_0
31:0 R/W 0 B_AX_BT_COEX_TBL_0

1860DA48h R_AX_GNT_SW_CTRL
31:22 RO 0 RSVD
21 R/W 0 B_AX_WL_ACT2_VAL Valid when B_AX_WL_ACT2_CTRL = 1
0: wl_act2 = 0
1: wl_act2 = 1
20 R/W 1 B_AX_WL_ACT2_SWCTRL 0: Disable SW control wl_act2
1: Enable SW control wl_act2
19 R/W 0 B_AX_WL_ACT_VAL Valid when B_AX_WL_ACT_CTRL = 1
0: wl_act = 0
1: wl_act = 1
18 R/W 1 B_AX_WL_ACT_SWCTRL 0: Disable SW control wl_act
1: Enable SW control wl_act
17 R/W 1 B_AX_GNT_BT_RX_VAL Valid when B_AX_GNT_BT_RX_CTRL = 1
0: gnt_bt_rx = 0
1: gnt_bt_rx = 1
16 R/W 1 B_AX_GNT_BT_RX_SWCTRL 0: Disable SW control gnt_bt_rx
1: Enable SW control gnt_bt_rx
15 R/W 0 B_AX_GNT_BT_TX_VAL Valid when B_AX_GNT_BT_TX_CTRL = 1
0: gnt_bt_tx = 0
1: gnt_bt_tx = 1
14 R/W 1 B_AX_GNT_BT_TX_SWCTRL 0: Disable SW control gnt_bt_tx
1: Enable SW control gnt_bt_tx
13 R/W 0 B_AX_GNT_WL_RX_VAL Valid when B_AX_GNT_WL_RX_CTRL = 1
0: gnt_wl_rx = 0
1: gnt_wl_rx = 1
12 R/W 1 B_AX_GNT_WL_RX_SWCTRL 0: Disable SW control gnt_wl_rx
1: Enable SW control gnt_wl_rx
11 R/W 0 B_AX_GNT_WL_TX_VAL Valid when B_AX_GNT_WL_TX_CTRL = 1
0: gnt_wl_tx = 0
1: gnt_wl_tx = 1
10 R/W 1 B_AX_GNT_WL_TX_SWCTRL 0: Disable SW control gnt_wl_tx
1: Enable SW control gnt_wl_tx
9 R/W 1 B_AX_GNT_BT_RFC_S1_VAL Valid when B_AX_GNT_BT_RFC_S1_CTRL = 1
0: gnt_bt_rfc_s1 = 0
1: gnt_bt_rfc_s1 = 1

1: Enable SW control gnt_bt_rfc_s1
7 R/W 0 B_AX_GNT_WL_RFC_S1_VAL Valid when B_AX_GNT_WL_RFC_S1_CTRL = 1
0: gnt_wl_rfc_s1 = 0
1: gnt_wl_rfc_s1 = 1

1: Enable SW control gnt_wl_rfc_s1
5 R/W 1 B_AX_GNT_BT_RFC_S0_VAL Valid when B_AX_GNT_BT_RFC_S0_CTRL = 1
0: gnt_bt_rfc_s0 = 0
1: gnt_bt_rfc_s0 = 1

1: Enable SW control gnt_bt_rfc_s0

0: gnt_wl_rfc_s0 = 0
1: gnt_wl_rfc_s0 = 1

1: gnt_wl_bb = 1

31 R/W 0 B_AX_BTC_EN Enable BT coex

29 R/W 0 B_AX_EN_EXT_BT_PINMUX Enable external interface
28 W1C 0 B_AX_BTC_RST Reset BTC circuit state
27 R/W 0 B_AX_BTC_DBG_SRC_SEL 0: Debug port is from BT1
1: Debug port is from BT2
26 RO 0 RSVD
25:24 R/W 0 B_AX_BTC_MODE 0: RTK mode
1: CSR 3-wire mode
2, 3: RSVD
23:19 RO 0 RSVD
18 R/W 1 B_AX_IGN_GNT_WL2
17 R/W 0 B_AX_INV_WL_ACT2 0: wl_act2 = wl_act2
1: wl_act2 = ~wl_act2
16 R/W 0 B_AX_BTG_LNA1_GAIN_SEL 影響 WLS1_SEL_BTG_MUX 輸出
(WLS1_SEL_BTG_MUX = GNT_BT_RFC_S0 & BTS1_BB_SEL_S1_TRX & R_AX_BTG_LNA1_GAIN_SEL)
15:8 R/W 4 B_AX_COEX_DLY_CLK WL module 參考 PTA 訊號所需的 delay 時間
7 R/W 1 B_AX_IGN_GNT_BT2_RX 1: Ignore GNT_BT2_RX
6 R/W 1 B_AX_IGN_GNT_BT2_TX 1: Ignore GNT_BT2_TX
5 R/W 1 B_AX_IGN_GNT_BT2 1: Ignore GNT_BT2
4:3 R/W 0 B_AX_BTC_DBG_SEL
2 R/W 0 B_AX_DIS_BTC_CLK_G Control BTCOEX module clk gating disable
0:clok gating
1:disable clock gating
1 R/W 1 B_AX_GNT_WL_RX_CTRL 0 : GNT_WL_RX = WL_RX
1 : GNT_WL_RX = WL_RX & GNT_WL
0 R/W 0 B_AX_WL_SRC 0: WL_TX, WL_RX, WL_PRI come from MAC0
1: WL_TX, WL_RX, WL_PRI come from MAC1
1860DB04h R_AX_RTK_MODE_CFG2
31:25 RO 0 RSVD
24 R/W 0 B_AX_BT2_BLE_EN_V1 0: GNT_BT_TX = GNT_BT & BT_TX, GNT_BT_RX = GNT_BT & BT_RX
1: GNT_BT_TX = GNT_BT & (BT_TX | BT_BLE), GNT_BT_RX = GNT_BT & (BT_RX | BT_BLE)

16 R/W 0 B_AX_BT2_ULTRA_EN Config GNT_BT & GNT_WL when BT_CMD_ID = 0 & BT_CMD_DATA[3] = 1

1860DB08h R_AX_CSR_MODE_CFG2

3:0 R/W 0 B_AX_CSR_PRI_2 The number of clocks of CSR-PRI(T1)
31:0 RO 0xDEAD_BEEF RSVD
1860DB10h R_AX_BT_CNT_CFG2
31:2 RO 0 RSVD
1 R/W 0 B_AX_BT2_CNT_RST_V1 Write 1 to reset BT_ACT_STATISTICS counters
0 R/W 0 B_AX_BT2_CNT_EN When this bit is set, the BT_CNT starts counting
1860DB14h R_AX_BT_CNT_HI2
31:16 R 0 B_AX_BT2_HI_RX Counters for BT high priority RX. It counts up when B_AX_BT_CNT_EN is set. This counter will reset when B_AX_BT_CNT_RST_V1 is written by 1 pulse. This counter cannot wrap around when overflow occurs. Under overflow, this counter is kept with 0xFFFF.
15:0 R 0 B_AX_BT2_HI_TX Counters for BT high priority TX. It counts up when B_AX_BT_CNT_EN is set. This counter will reset when B_AX_BT_CNT_RST_V1 is written by 1 pulse. This counter cannot wrap around when overflow occurs. Under overflow, this counter is kept with 0xFFFF.
1860DB18h R_AX_BT_CNT_LOW2
31:16 R 0 B_AX_BT2_LOW_RX Counters for BT low RX. It counts up when B_AX_BT_CNT_EN is set. This counter will reset when B_AX_BT_CNT_RST_V1 is written by 1 pulse. This counter cannot wrap around when overflow occurs. Under overflow, this counter is kept with 0xFFFF.
15:0 R 0 B_AX_BT2_LOW_TX Counters for BT low TX. It counts up when B_AX_BT_CNT_EN is set. This counter will reset when B_AX_BT_CNT_RST_V1 is written by 1 pulse. This counter cannot wrap around when overflow occurs. Under overflow, this counter is kept with 0xFFFF.
1860DB20h R_AX_RTK_CMD_ERR_RPT2
31:2 RO 0 RSVD
1 W1C 0 B_AX_RTK_CMD_CRC_2 Indicate the RTK mode command is CRC error
0 W1C 0 B_AX_RTK_CMD_INC_2 Indicate the RTK mode command is incomplete

1860E08Ch R_AX_PTCL_RRSR0_C1
[31:24] R/W 0 B_AX_RRSR_HE BIT[31:24] = {(msb) HE 1SSMCS7, 1SSMCS6, …, 1SSMCS0}
[23:16] R/W 0 B_AX_RRSR_VHT BIT[23:16] = {(msb) VHT 1SSMCS7, 1SSMCS6, …, 1SSMCS0}
[15:8] R/W 0 B_AX_RRSR_HT BIT[15:8]={(msb) HT MCS7, MCS6, …, MCS0}
[7:0] R/W 0x15 B_AX_RRSR_OFDM BIT[7:0] = { (msb) OFDM54, OFDM48, …,OFDM6}
1860E090h R_AX_PTCL_RRSR1_C1
[31:12] R/W 0 RSVD
[11:8] R/W 0x1 B_AX_RRSR_RATE_EN Enabled response rate mode BIT[3:0] = {HE rate,VHT rate,HT rate, OFDM/CCK rate}
[7:6] R/W 0 B_AX_RSC Response frame sub-channel configuration. Response frames (CTS, ACK, BA) are transmitted in the following condition. 00: Primary 20Mhz BW(0x483[3:0] ) 01: Follow Rx packet BW mode. 10: Duplicate mode. (ofdm rate only, others bw20) 11: rsvd
[5:4] R/W 0 RSVD
[3:0] R/W 0x5 B_AX_RRSR_CCK BIT[3:0] = {(msb) CCK11, …, CCK1}

1860E100h R_AX_FWC00IMR_C1
[31] R/W 0 RSVD
[30] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_PSTIMER_6_INT_EN Enable PSTIMER6 interrupt source.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_AX_C0_PSTIMER6_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_AX_C0_PSTIMER6_VAL , this interrupt is issued.
[29] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_SND_RDY_INT_EN Issued after BB completes score table computation
[28] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_RP_END_INT_EN Enable the interrupt source that Rx period end.
[27] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_RXBCN_TO_CNT_INT_EN Enable the interrupt source that BCN_TO_CNT >= BCN_TO_CNT_THD.
[26] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_RXBCN_HIT_INT_EN Enable the interrupt source that Rx Bcn hit.
[25] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_RX_MATCH_RTT_INT_EN When HW receive match RTT frame and transmit ACK frame successfully, the BB generate FTM report.
It will generate interrupt to firmware.
[24] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_BCNQ_LOCK_INT_EN Enable BCNQ lock interrupt source.
[23] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P2P1_CTWEnd_INT_EN Enable the CTWindow End 1 interrupt source.
[22] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P2P1_TSF32_TOGGLE_INT_EN For P2P group 1. Enable TSF_BIT32_TOGGLE_P2P1 interrupt source.
[21] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P2P1_RFON_INT_EN Enable P2P NoA RF on time indication 1 interrupt source.
[20] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P2P1_RFOFF_INT_EN Enable P2P NoA RF off time indication 1 interrupt source.
[19] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P2P0_CTWEnd_INT_EN Enable the CTWindow End 0 interrupt source.
[18] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P2P0_TSF32_TOGGLE_INT_EN Enable TSF_BIT32_TOGGLE interrupt source.
[17] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P2P0_RFON_INT_EN Enable P2P NoA RF on time indication 0 interrupt source.
[16] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P2P0_RFOFF_INT_EN Enable P2P NoA RF off time indication 0 interrupt source.
[15] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE3_INT_EN Enable MACID 96~127 power change interrupt source.
[14] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE2_INT_EN Enable MACID 64~95 power change interrupt source.
[13] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE1_INT_EN Enable MACID 32~63 power change interrupt source.
[12] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE0_INT_EN Enable MACID 0~31 power change interrupt source.
[11] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_RXFTMREQ_INT_EN If B_AX_RXFTMREQ_INT_EN =1. When HW receive FTMREQ packet, it will generate interrupt to firmware.
[10] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_RXFTM_INT_EN If B_AX_RXFTM_INT_EN =1. When HW receive FTM and transmit ACK frame successfully, the BB generate FTM report. It will generate interrupt to firmware.
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_FTM_PTT_EN
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_TXFTM_INT_EN If B_AX_TXFTM_INT_EN =1. When HW transmit FTM and receive ACK frame successfully, the BB generate FTM report. It will generate interrupt to firmware.
[7] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_SOUND_DONE_INT_EN Be a beamformer, this interrupt is issued at the time after sounding finish.
[6] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_RXDONE_INT_EN Enable Rx Packet done interrupt source.
[5] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_PSTIMER_5_INT_EN Enable PSTIMER5 interrupt source.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_AX_PSTIMER5_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_AX_PSTIMER5_VAL , this interrupt is issued.
[4] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_PSTIMER_4_INT_EN Enable PSTIMER4 interrupt source.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_AX_PSTIMER4_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_AX_PSTIMER4_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
[3] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_PSTIMER_3_INT_EN Enable PSTIMER3 interrupt source.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_AX_PSTIMER3_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_AX_PSTIMER3_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_PSTIMER_2_INT_EN Enable PSTIMER2 interrupt source.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_AX_PSTIMER2_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_AX_PSTIMER2_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_PSTIMER_1_INT_EN Enable PSTIMER1 interrupt source.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_AX_PSTIMER1_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_AX_PSTIMER1_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_PSTIMER_0_INT_EN Enable PSTIMER0 interrupt source.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_AX_PSTIMER0_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_AX_PSTIMER0_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
1860E104h R_AX_FWC00ISR_C1
[31] R/W1C 0 RSVD
[30] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_PSTIMER_6_INT PSTIMER6 interrupt.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_AX_C0_PSTIMER6_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_AX_C0_PSTIMER6_VAL , this interrupt is issued.
[29] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_SND_RDY_INT Issued after BB completes score table computation
[28] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_RP_END_INT This event means Rx period end, start to enter LPS.
When the below event happened, issue this interrupt.
- ( (Rx Bcn timeout) | (Bcn hit check done) | (BcnNoHit) )
[27] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_RXBCN_TO_CNT_INT When BCN_TO_CNT > BCN_TO_CNT_THD, issue this interrupt to wake WCPU
[26] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_RXBCN_HIT_INT When Rx Bcn and IE_HIT or BCAID_HIT or UNIAID_HIT, this interrupt is issued.
[25] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_RX_MATCH_RTT_INT When HW receive match RTT frame and transmit ACK frame successfully, the BB generate FTM report.
It will generate interrupt to firmware.
[24] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_BCNQ_LOCK_INT BCNQ lock interrupt.
[23] R/W1C 0 RSVD For P2P group1, CTWindow End 1 interrupt.(8852A A cut only, B cut removed)
[22] R/W1C 0 RSVD For P2P group1, TSF Timer BIT32 toggle indication interrupt.(8852A A cut only, B cut removed)
[21] R/W1C 0 RSVD For P2P group1, P2P NoA RF on time indication 1 interrupt.(8852A A cut only, B cut removed)
[20] R/W1C 0 RSVD For P2P group1, P2P NoA RF off time indication 1 interrupt.(8852A A cut only, B cut removed)
[19] R/W1C 0 RSVD For P2P group0, CTWindow End 0 interrupt.(8852A A cut only, B cut removed)
[18] R/W1C 0 RSVD For P2P group0, TSF Timer BIT32 toggle indication interrupt.(8852A A cut only, B cut removed)
[17] R/W1C 0 RSVD For P2P group0, P2P NoA RF on time indication 0 interrupt.(8852A A cut only, B cut removed)
[16] R/W1C 0 RSVD For P2P group0, P2P NoA RF off time indication 0 interrupt.(8852A A cut only, B cut removed)
[15] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE3_INT MACID 96~127 power change interrupt.
[14] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE2_INT MACID 64~95 power change interrupt.
[13] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE1_INT MACID 32~63 power change interrupt.
[12] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE0_INT MACID 0~31 power change interrupt.
[11] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_RXFTMREQ_INT If B_AX_RXFTMREQ_INT_EN =1. When HW receive FTMREQ packet, it will generate interrupt to firmware.
[10] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_RXFTM_INT If B_AX_RXFTM_INT_EN =1. When HW receive FTM and transmit ACK frame successfully, the BB generate FTM report. It will generate interrupt to firmware.
[9] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_FTM_PTT_INT
[8] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_TXFTM_INT If B_AX_TXFTM_INT_EN =1. When HW transmit FTM and receive ACK frame successfully, the BB generate FTM report. It will generate interrupt to firmware.
[7] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_SOUND_DONE_INT Be a beamformer, this interrupt is issued at the time after sounding finish.
[6] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_RXDONE_INT Rx Packet done interrupt.
[5] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_PSTIMER_5_INT PSTIMER5 interrupt.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_AX_PSTIMER5_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_AX_PSTIMER5_VAL , this interrupt is issued.
[4] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_PSTIMER_4_INT PSTIMER4 interrupt.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_AX_PSTIMER4_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_AX_PSTIMER4_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
[3] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_PSTIMER_3_INT PSTIMER3 interrupt.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_AX_PSTIMER3_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_AX_PSTIMER3_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
[2] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_PSTIMER_2_INT PSTIMER2 interrupt.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_AX_PSTIMER2_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_AX_PSTIMER2_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
[1] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_PSTIMER_1_INT PSTIMER1 interrupt.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_AX_PSTIMER1_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_AX_PSTIMER1_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
[0] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_PSTIMER_0_INT PSTIMER0 interrupt.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_AX_PSTIMER0_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_AX_PSTIMER0_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
1860E108h R_AX_FWC01IMR_C1
[31] R/W 0 RSVD
[30] R/W 0 RSVD
[29] R/W 0 RSVD
[28] R/W 0 RSVD
[27] R/W 0 RSVD
[26] R/W 0 RSVD
[25] R/W 0 RSVD
[24] R/W 0 RSVD
[23] R/W 0 RSVD
[22] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P0_RXBCN_NOHIT_INT_EN Enable RX BCN UNIAID and BCAID are no hit (regardless of FCS OK/ERR) interrupt source(Port0)
[21] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P0_RXMTF1MRR0_INT_EN Setting this bit indicates that Rx trigger frame is matched with MoreTF=1 and MoreRARU=0 in user info of RA-RU (Port0)
[20] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P0_RXMTF0_INT_EN Setting this bit indicates that Rx trigger frame is matched with MoreTF=0 (Port0)
[19] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P0_RX_UAPSDMD1_INT_EN Enable interrupt source from receiving pkt matched with that QoS Unicast data frame with MD=1, UAPSD=1 (Port0)
[18] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P0_RX_UAPSDMD0_INT_EN Enable interrupt source from receiving pkt matched with that QoS Unicast data frame with MD=0, UAPSD=1 (Port0)
[17] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P0_TRIGGER_PKT_INT_EN Enable TRIGGER_PKT interrupt source.(Port0)
[16] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P0_EOSP_INT_EN EOSP_INT interrupt mask (HW do not check EOSP, wrong ?).(Port0)
[15] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P0_TXPKTIN_EN
[14] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P0_TX_NULL1_INT_EN Enable TX null 1 packet done interrupt source.(Port0)
[13] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P0_TX_NULL0_INT_EN Enable TX null 0 packet done interrupt source.(Port0)
[12] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P0_RX_UMD0_INT_EN Enable interrupt source from receiving unicast data frame with More Data=0.(Port0)
[11] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P0_RX_UMD1_INT_EN Enable interrupt source from receiving unicast data frame with More Data=1.(Port0)
[10] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P0_RX_BMD0_INT_EN Enable interrupt source from receiving broadcast data frame with More Data=0.(Port0)
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P0_RX_BMD1_INT_EN Enable interrupt source from receiving broadcast data frame with More Data=1.(Port0)
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P0_RXBCNOK_INT_EN When this bit is enable, the interrupt is issued when RX beacon frame occurs.(Port0)
[7] R/W 0 RSVD
[6] R/W 0 RSVD
[5] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P0MB0_TXBCNERR_INT_EN Enable TX beacon Error interrupt source.(Port0 or MBSSID0)
[4] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P0MB0_TXBCNOK_INT_EN Enable TX beacon OK interrupt source.(Port0 or MBSSID0)
[3] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P0MB0_HIQWND_INT_EN Enable HIQ window end interrupt source.(Port0 or MBSSID0)
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P0MB0_TBTT_INT_EN Enable the interrupt source from the exact TBTT time.(Port0 or MBSSID0)
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P0MB0_TBTTERLY_INT_EN This interrupt is issued at the time set by TBTTERLYINT register before TBTT time.(Port0 or MBSSID0)
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P0MB0_BCNERLY_INT_EN This interrupt is issued at the time set by DRVERLYINT register before TBTT time.(Port0 or MBSSID0)
1860E10Ch R_AX_FWC01ISR_C1
[31] R/W1C 0 RSVD
[30] R/W1C 0 RSVD
[29] R/W1C 0 RSVD
[28] R/W1C 0 RSVD
[27] R/W1C 0 RSVD
[26] R/W1C 0 RSVD
[25] R/W1C 0 RSVD

[11] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_P0_RX_UMD1_INT The interrupt is issued while receiving unicast data frame with More Data=1.(Port0)

[16] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P4_EOSP_INT_EN EOSP_INT interrupt mask (HW do not check EOSP, wrong ?).(Port4)
[15] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P4_TXPKTIN_INT_EN
[14] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P4_TX_NULL1_INT_EN Enable TX null 1 packet done interrupt source.(Port4)
[13] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P4_TX_NULL0_INT_EN Enable TX null 0 packet done interrupt source.(Port4)
[12] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P4_RX_UMD0_INT_EN Enable interrupt source from receiving unicast data frame with More Data=0.(Port4)
[11] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P4_RX_UMD1_INT_EN Enable interrupt source from receiving unicast data frame with More Data=1.(Port4)
[10] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P4_RX_BMD0_INT_EN Enable interrupt source from receiving broadcast data frame with More Data=0.(Port4)
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P4_RX_BMD1_INT_EN Enable interrupt source from receiving broadcast data frame with More Data=1.(Port4)
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_FS_P4_RXBCNOK_INT_EN When this bit is enable, the interrupt is issued when RX beacon frame occurs. (Port4)

[22] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_P4_RXBCN_NOHIT_INT The interrupt is issued while RX BCN UNIAID and BCAID are no hit (regardless of FCS OK/ERR)(Port4)
[21] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_P4_RXMTF1MRR0_INT The interrupt is issued while Rx trigger frame is matched with MoreTF=1 and MoreRARU=0 in user info of RA-RU (Port4)
[20] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_P4_RXMTF0_INT The interrupt is issued while Rx trigger frame is matched with MoreTF=0 (Port4)
[19] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_P4_RX_UAPSDMD1_INT The interrupt is issued while receiving pkt matched with that QoS Unicast data frame with MD=1, UAPSD=1 (Port4)
[18] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_P4_RX_UAPSDMD0_INT The interrupt is issued while receiving pkt matched with that QoS Unicast data frame with MD=0, UAPSD=1 (Port4)
[17] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_P4_TRIGGER_PKT_INT The interrupt is issued while the pkt is Tx ok which Tri_Frame bit of TXDESC is equal to 1.(Port4)
[16] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_P4_EOSP_INT The interrupt is issued while Rx pkt's EOSP bit = 1.(Port4)
[15] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_P4_TXPKTIN_INT
[14] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_P4_TX_NULL1_INT The interrupt is issued while TX null 1 packet done.(Port4)
[13] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_P4_TX_NULL0_INT The interrupt is issued while TX null 0 packet done.(Port4)
[12] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_P4_RX_UMD0_INT The interrupt is issued while receiving unicast data frame with More Data=0.(Port4)
[11] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_P4_RX_UMD1_INT The interrupt is issued while receiving unicast data frame with More Data=1.(Port4)
[10] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_P4_RX_BMD0_INT The interrupt is issued while receiving broadcast data frame with More Data=0.(Port4)
[9] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_P4_RX_BMD1_INT The interrupt is issued while receiving broadcast data frame with More Data=1.(Port4)
[8] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FS_P4_RXBCNOK_INT The interrupt is issued while receiving beacon frame.(Port4)

[21] R/W 0 RSVD
[20] R/W 0 RSVD
[19] R/W 0 RSVD
[18] R/W 0 RSVD
[17] R/W 0 RSVD
[16] R/W 0 B_AX_TBTT_B0P4_INT_EN TBTT HIMR of port 4 band 0
[15] R/W 0 B_AX_TBTT_B0P3_INT_EN TBTT HIMR of port 3 band 0
[14] R/W 0 B_AX_TBTT_B0P2_INT_EN TBTT HIMR of port 2 band 0
[13] R/W 0 B_AX_TBTT_B0P1_INT_EN TBTT HIMR of port 1 band 0
[12] R/W 0 B_AX_TBTT_B0P0_INT_EN TBTT HIMR of port 0 band 0
[11] R/W 0 B_AX_PKT_INFO_ERR_INT_EN packet content error or illegal HIMR (EX: WDINFO_EN = 1 but no WDINFO)
[10] R/W 0 B_AX_BB_STOPRX_INT_EN RX is over when BB stop HIMR
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_TXERR_INT_EN Tx Error Flag HIMR
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_RXERR_INT_EN Rx Error Flag HIMR
[7] R/W 0 B_AX_P2P1_TSF32_TOGG_INT_EN P2P 1 TSF Timer bit 32 toggle indication HIMR
[6] R/W 0 B_AX_P2P0_TSF32_TOGG_INT_EN P2P 0 TSF Timer bit 32 toggle indication HIMR
[5] R/W 0 B_AX_PWR_127to96_INT_EN MACID 127 to 96 power bit change HIMR
[4] R/W 0 B_AX_PWR_95to64_INT_EN MACID 95 to 64 power bit change HIMR
[3] R/W 0 B_AX_PWR_63to32_INT_EN MACID 63 to 32 power bit change HIMR
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_PWR_31to0_INT_EN MACID 31 to 0 power bit change HIMR
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_PSTIMER_5_INT_EN Enable PSTIMER5 interrupt source.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_AX_PSTIMER5_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_AX_PSTIMER5_VAL , this interrupt is issued.
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_PSTIMER_4_INT_EN Enable PSTIMER4 interrupt source.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_AX_PSTIMER4_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_AX_PSTIMER4_VAL, this interrupt is issued.

[16] R/W1C 0 B_AX_TBTT_B0P4_INT TBTT HISR of port 4 band 0

[14] R/W1C 0 B_AX_TBTT_B0P2_INT TBTT HISR of port 2 band 0
