[12] R/W1C 0 B_AX_TBTT_B0P0_INT TBTT HISR of port 0 band 0
[11] R/W1C 0 B_AX_PKT_INFO_ERR_INT packet content error or illegal HISR (EX: WDINFO_EN = 1 but no WDINFO)
[10] R/W1C 0 B_AX_BB_STOPRX_INT RX is over when BB stop HISR
[9] R/W1C 0 B_AX_TXERR_INT Tx Error Flag HISR
[8] R/W1C 0 B_AX_RXERR_INT Rx Error Flag HISR
[7] R/W1C 0 B_AX_P2P1_TSF32_TOGG_INT P2P 1 TSF Timer bit 32 toggle indication HISR
[6] R/W1C 0 B_AX_P2P0_TSF32_TOGG_INT P2P 0 TSF Timer bit 32 toggle indication HISR
[5] R/W1C 0 B_AX_PWR_127to96_INT MACID 127 to 96 power bit change HISR
[4] R/W1C 0 B_AX_PWR_95to64_INT MACID 95 to 64 power bit change HISR
[3] R/W1C 0 B_AX_PWR_63to32_INT MACID 63 to 32 power bit change HISR

[1] R/W1C 0 B_AX_PSTIMER_5_INT PSTIMER5 interrupt.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_AX_PSTIMER5_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_AX_PSTIMER5_VAL , this interrupt is issued.
[0] R/W1C 0 B_AX_PSTIMER_4_INT PSTIMER4 interrupt.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_AX_PSTIMER4_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_AX_PSTIMER4_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
1860E200h R_AX_PPS0_CTRL_C1
[31] W1C 0 B_AX_PPS0_PWR_RST1 Write 1 to reset PPS 0 POF 1
[30] W1C 0 B_AX_PPS0_PWR_RST0 Write 1 to reset PPS 0 POF 0
[29:28] R 0 RSVD RSVD
[27:16] R/W 5 B_AX_PPS0_CTWIN CTWindow width of PPS 0. Unit: 32 us.
[15] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_TXOP_BRK_EN 1: TXOP break at the end of PON. 0: Disable.
[14] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_AGG_BRK_EN 1: AMPDU aggregation break at the end of PON. 0: Disable.
[13] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_POF_AND_EN 1: Decide power off by POF0 & POF1. 0: Decide power off by POF0 | POF1.
[12] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_PSWIND_EN 1: Enable to set PPS 0 PS window for STA_SCH. 0: Disable.
[11] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_TSFB32_RST_EN 1: Enable reset POF 0 and POF 1 when TSF BIT32 toggle for PPS 0. 0: Disable.
[10:8] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_PORT_SEL Port selector for PPS 0.
0 ~ 4 = Port 0 ~ 4, others for none.
[7] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_ALLSLEEP_EN 1: Enable PPS 0 all sleep mode, 0: Disable.
[6] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_OFF_DISTX_EN 1: Enable HW disable TX in whole power off period. 0: Do Nothing.
[5] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_CTWIN_EN 1: Enable PPS 0 CTWINDOW function. 0: Disable.
[4] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_BCNAREA_EN 1: Enable PPS 0 BCN area on function. 0 : Disable.
[3] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_WITHBCNERY 1 : PPS power state decision include BCN early. 0 : Do not include.
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_POF1_EN 1: Enable PPS 0 POF 1, 0: Disable.
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_POF0_EN 1: Enable PPS 0 POF 0, 0: Disable.
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_PWR_MGT_EN Main switch for PPS 0 Power Saving. 1: Enable, 0: Disable.
1860E204h R_AX_PPS0_SPEC_STATE_C1
[7] $RO 0 B_AX_PPS0_SPEC_POW_STATE PPS 0 current spec power state. 1: On. 0: Off.
[6] RO 0 B_AX_PPS0_SPEC_CTWIN_ON Current time is during TBTT to CTWEND.
[5] RO 0 B_AX_PPS0_SPEC_BCNAREA_ON Current time is during TBTT to TXBCN/timeout.
[4] RO 0 B_AX_PPS0_SPEC_BCNERLY Current time is during BCNERLY to TBTT.
[3] RO 0 B_AX_PPS0_SPEC_POF1_OFF_PERD Current time is during POF 1 spec period.
[2] RO 0 B_AX_PPS0_SPEC_FORCE_DOZE1 If POF 1 Count == 1, this value is 1. else 0.
[1] RO 0 B_AX_PPS0_SPEC_POF0_OFF_PERD Current time is during POF 0 spec period.
[0] RO 0 B_AX_PPS0_SPEC_FORCE_DOZE0 If POF 0 Count == 1, this value is 1. else 0.
1860E205h R_AX_PPS0_STATE_C1
[7] $RO 0 B_AX_PPS0_POW_STATE PPS 0 current power state. 1: On. 0: Off.
[6] RO 0 B_AX_PPS0_CTWIN_ON Current time is during TBTT to CTWEND or BCNERLY to CTWEND. Decided by B_AX_PPS0_WITHBCNERY.
[5] RO 0 B_AX_PPS0_BCNAREA_ON Current time is during TBTT to TXBCN/timeout or BCNERLY to TXBCN/timeout. Decided by B_AX_PPS0_WITHBCNERY.
[4] RO 0 B_AX_PPS0_BCNERLY Current time is during BCNERLY to TBTT.
[3] RO 0 B_AX_PPS0_POF1_OFF_PERD Current time is during POF 1 power off early to power on early.
[2] RO 0 B_AX_PPS0_FORCE_DOZE1 If POF 1 Count == 1, this value is 1. else 0.
[1] RO 0 B_AX_PPS0_POF0_OFF_PERD Current time is during POF 0 power off early to power on early.
[0] RO 0 B_AX_PPS0_FORCE_DOZE0 If POF 0 Count == 1, this value is 1. else 0.
1860E206h R_AX_PPS0_PAUSE_CTRL0_C1
[15] RO 0 B_AX_PPS0_POF_STOP_TX_HANG PPSPS_POF_STOP_TX_HANG
[14] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[13] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[12] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[11] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_MGQ_PAUSE_EN 1: Enable PPS 0 MGQ pause. 0: Disable. (dis_tx_case 1 or 2)(mgq backoff will stop)
[10] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_HIQ_PAUSE_EN 1: Enable PPS 0 HIQ pause. 0: Disable. (dis_tx_case 1 or 2)(other ports will be paused too)
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_BCNQ_PAUSE_EN 1: Enable PPS 0 BCNQ pause. 0: Disable. (dis_tx_case 1 or 2)(other ports will be paused too)
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_MACID_PAUSE_EN 1: Enable PPS 0 MACID pause. 0: Disable. (dis_tx_case 1 or 2)
[7:0] R/W 0xFF B_AX_PPS0_PAUSE_MACID PPS 0 MACID selection.
1860E208h R_AX_PPS0_PAUSE_CTRL1_C1
[31:16] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_POWON_DISTX The time of the disable TX period after the PPS 0 Power on interrupt occur. Unit: 32us. (should larger than POF_OFF_EARLY_TIME)
[15:0] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_POWOFF_DISTX The time of the disable TX period after the PPS 0 Power off interrupt occur. Unit: 32us.
1860E20Ch R_AX_PPS0_PAUSE_CTRL2_C1
[31:16] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_POWOFF_ERLY PPS 0 power off early. Unit: 32 us.
[15:0] R/W 0x0 B_AX_PPS0_POWON_ERLY PPS 0 power on early. Unit: 32 us.
1860E210h R_AX_PPS0_POF0_PARAM0_C1
31:0 R/W 0x00001000 B_AX_PPS0_POF0_DUR PPS 0 POF 0 duration. Unit: us.
1860E214h R_AX_PPS0_POF0_PARAM1_C1
[31:0] R/W 0x00003000 B_AX_PPS0_POF0_ITVL PPS 0 POF 0 interval. Unit: us.
1860E218h R_AX_PPS0_POF0_PARAM2_C1
[31:0] R/W 0x00001000 B_AX_PPS0_POF0_START First PPS 0 POF 0 period start TSF(Low 4 bytes).
1860E21Ch R_AX_PPS0_POF0_PARAM3_C1
[31:16] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[15:8] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_POF0_CUR_CNT PPS 0 POF 0 current count.
[7:0] R/W 0x03 B_AX_PPS0_POF0_CNT PPS 0 POF 0 count. 1: Aperiodic POF. 2 ~ 255: Periodic POF.
1860E220h R_AX_PPS0_POF1_PARAM0_C1
31:0 R/W 0x00001000 B_AX_PPS0_POF1_DUR PPS 0 POF 1 duration. Unit: us.
1860E224h R_AX_PPS0_POF1_PARAM1_C1
[31:0] R/W 0x00003000 B_AX_PPS0_POF1_ITVL PPS 0 POF 1 interval. Unit: us.
1860E228h R_AX_PPS0_POF1_PARAM2_C1
[31:0] R/W 0x00001000 B_AX_PPS0_POF1_START First PPS 0 POF 1 period start TSF(Low 4 bytes).
1860E22Ch R_AX_PPS0_POF1_PARAM3_C1
[31:16] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[15:8] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_POF1_CUR_CNT PPS 0 POF 1 current count.
[7:0] R/W 0x03 B_AX_PPS0_POF1_CNT PPS 0 POF 1 count. 1: Aperiodic POF. 2 ~ 255: Periodic POF.
1860E230h R_AX_PPS0_CURR_DOZE0_C1
[31:0] $R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_POF0_CURR_DOZE PPS 0 POF 0 current doze TSF. Need to backup/restore.
1860E234h R_AX_PPS0_CURR_DOZE1_C1
[31:0] $R/W 0 B_AX_PPS0_POF1_CURR_DOZE PPS 0 POF 1 current doze TSF. Need to backup/restore.
1860E240h R_AX_PPS1_CTRL_C1
[31] W1C 0 B_AX_PPS1_PWR_RST1 Write 1 to reset PPS 1 POF 1
[30] W1C 0 B_AX_PPS1_PWR_RST0 Write 1 to reset PPS 1 POF 0
[29:28] R 0 RSVD RSVD
[27:16] R/W 5 B_AX_PPS1_CTWIN CTWindow width of PPS 1. Unit: 32 us.
[15] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_TXOP_BRK_EN 1: TXOP break at the end of PON. 0: Disable.
[14] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_AGG_BRK_EN 1: AMPDU aggregation break at the end of PON. 0: Disable.
[13] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_POF_AND_EN 1: Decide power off by POF0 & POF1. 0: Decide power off by POF0 | POF1.
[12] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_PSWIND_EN 1: Enable to set PPS 1 PS window for STA_SCH. 0: Disable.
[11] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_TSFB32_RST_EN 1: Enable reset POF 0 and POF 1 when TSF BIT32 toggle for PPS 1. 0: Disable.
[10:8] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_PORT_SEL Port selector for PPS 1.
0 ~ 4 = Port 0 ~ 4, others for none.
[7] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_ALLSLEEP_EN 1: Enable PPS 1 all sleep mode, 0: Disable.
[6] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_OFF_DISTX_EN 1: Enable HW disable TX in whole power off period. 0: Do Nothing.
[5] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_CTWIN_EN 1: Enable PPS 1 CTWINDOW function. 0: Disable.
[4] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_BCNAREA_EN 1: Enable PPS 1 BCN area on function. 0 : Disable.
[3] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_WITHBCNERY 1 : PPS power state decision include BCN early. 0 : Do not include.
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_POF1_EN 1: Enable PPS 1 POF 1, 0: Disable.
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_POF0_EN 1: Enable PPS 1 POF 0, 0: Disable.
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_PWR_MGT_EN Main switch for PPS 1 Power Saving. 1: Enable, 0: Disable.
1860E244h R_AX_PPS1_SPEC_STATE_C1
[7] $RO 0 B_AX_PPS1_SPEC_POW_STATE PPS 1 current spec power state. 1: On. 0: Off.
[6] RO 0 B_AX_PPS1_SPEC_CTWIN_ON Current time is during TBTT to CTWEND.
[5] RO 0 B_AX_PPS1_SPEC_BCNAREA_ON Current time is during TBTT to TXBCN/timeout.
[4] RO 0 B_AX_PPS1_SPEC_BCNERLY Current time is during BCNERLY to TBTT.
[3] RO 0 B_AX_PPS1_SPEC_POF1_OFF_PERD Current time is during POF 1 spec period.
[2] RO 0 B_AX_PPS1_SPEC_FORCE_DOZE1 If POF 1 Count == 1, this value is 1. else 0.
[1] RO 0 B_AX_PPS1_SPEC_POF0_OFF_PERD Current time is during POF 0 spec period.
[0] RO 0 B_AX_PPS1_SPEC_FORCE_DOZE0 If POF 0 Count == 1, this value is 1. else 0.
1860E245h R_AX_PPS1_STATE_C1
[7] $RO 0 B_AX_PPS1_POW_STATE PPS 1 current power state. 1: On. 0: Off.
[6] RO 0 B_AX_PPS1_CTWIN_ON Current time is during TBTT to CTWEND or BCNERLY to CTWEND. Decided by B_AX_PPS1_WITHBCNERY.
[5] RO 0 B_AX_PPS1_BCNAREA_ON Current time is during TBTT to TXBCN/timeout or BCNERLY to TXBCN/timeout. Decided by B_AX_PPS1_WITHBCNERY.
[4] RO 0 B_AX_PPS1_BCNERLY Current time is during BCNERLY to TBTT.
[3] RO 0 B_AX_PPS1_POF1_OFF_PERD Current time is during POF 1 power off early to power on early.
[2] RO 0 B_AX_PPS1_FORCE_DOZE1 If POF 1 Count == 1, this value is 1. else 0.
[1] RO 0 B_AX_PPS1_POF0_OFF_PERD Current time is during POF 0 power off early to power on early.
[0] RO 0 B_AX_PPS1_FORCE_DOZE0 If POF 0 Count == 1, this value is 1. else 0.
1860E246h R_AX_PPS1_PAUSE_CTRL0_C1
[15] RO 0 B_AX_PPS1_POF_STOP_TX_HANG PPSPS_POF_STOP_TX_HANG
[14] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[13] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[12] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[11] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_MGQ_PAUSE_EN 1: Enable PPS 1 MGQ pause. 0: Disable. (dis_tx_case 1 or 2)(mgq backoff will stop)
[10] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_HIQ_PAUSE_EN 1: Enable PPS 1 HIQ pause. 0: Disable. (dis_tx_case 1 or 2)(other ports will NOT be paused)
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_BCNQ_PAUSE_EN 1: Enable PPS 1 BCNQ pause. 0: Disable. (dis_tx_case 1 or 2)(other ports will NOT be paused too)
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_MACID_PAUSE_EN 1: Enable PPS 1 MACID pause. 0: Disable. (dis_tx_case 1 or 2)
[7:0] R/W 0xFF B_AX_PPS1_PAUSE_MACID PPS 1 MACID selection.
1860E248h R_AX_PPS1_PAUSE_CTRL1_C1
[31:16] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_POWON_DISTX The time of the disable TX period after the PPS 1 Power on interrupt occur. Unit: 32us. (should larger than POF_OFF_EARLY_TIME)
[15:0] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_POWOFF_DISTX The time of the disable TX period after the PPS 1 Power off interrupt occur. Unit: 32us.
1860E24Ch R_AX_PPS1_PAUSE_CTRL2_C1
[31:16] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_POWOFF_ERLY PPS 1 power off early. Unit: 32 us.
[15:0] R/W 0x0 B_AX_PPS1_POWON_ERLY PPS 1 power on early. Unit: 32 us.
1860E250h R_AX_PPS1_POF0_PARAM0_C1
31:0 R/W 0x00001000 B_AX_PPS1_POF0_DUR PPS 1 POF 0 duration. Unit: us.
1860E254h R_AX_PPS1_POF0_PARAM1_C1
[31:0] R/W 0x00003000 B_AX_PPS1_POF0_ITVL PPS 1 POF 0 interval. Unit: us.
1860E258h R_AX_PPS1_POF0_PARAM2_C1
[31:0] R/W 0x00001000 B_AX_PPS1_POF0_START First PPS 1 POF 0 period start TSF(Low 4 bytes).
1860E25Ch R_AX_PPS1_POF0_PARAM3_C1
[31:16] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[15:8] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_POF0_CUR_CNT PPS 1 POF 0 current count.
[7:0] R/W 0x03 B_AX_PPS1_POF0_CNT PPS 1 POF 0 count. 1: Aperiodic POF. 2 ~ 255: Periodic POF.
1860E260h R_AX_PPS1_POF1_PARAM0_C1
31:0 R/W 0x00001000 B_AX_PPS1_POF1_DUR PPS 1 POF 1 duration. Unit: us.
1860E264h R_AX_PPS1_POF1_PARAM1_C1
[31:0] R/W 0x00003000 B_AX_PPS1_POF1_ITVL PPS 1 POF 1 interval. Unit: us.
1860E268h R_AX_PPS1_POF1_PARAM2_C1
[31:0] R/W 0x00001000 B_AX_PPS1_POF1_START First PPS 1 POF 1 period start TSF(Low 4 bytes).
1860E26Ch R_AX_PPS1_POF1_PARAM3_C1
[31:16] R 0 RSVD RSVD
[15:8] R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_POF1_CUR_CNT PPS 1 POF 1 current count.
[7:0] R/W 0x03 B_AX_PPS1_POF1_CNT PPS 1 POF 1 count. 1: Aperiodic POF. 2 ~ 255: Periodic POF.
1860E270h R_AX_PPS1_CURR_DOZE0_C1
[31:0] $R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_POF0_CURR_DOZE PPS 1 POF 0 current doze TSF. Need to backup/restore.
1860E274h R_AX_PPS1_CURR_DOZE1_C1
[31:0] $R/W 0 B_AX_PPS1_POF1_CURR_DOZE PPS 1 POF 1 current doze TSF. Need to backup/restore.
1860E2A0h R_AX_port_0_tsf_sync_C1
[31] R 0 RSVD
[30] W 0 B_AX_p0_sync_now_p do port sync when this bit is write 1
[29] W 0 B_AX_p0_sync_once_p only do once port sync when tbtt_int
[28] RW 0 B_AX_p0_auto_sync always do port sync when tbtt_int
[27] R 0 RSVD
[26:24] RW 0 B_AX_p0_sync_port_src_sel source port. "0/1/2/3/4" : port 0/1/2/3/4. "5/6/7" : freerun
[23:19] R 0 RSVD
[18:0] RW 0 B_AX_p0_tsftr_sync_offset unit : 32us, bit[18] : "0" pluse , "1" : minus
1860E2A4h R_AX_port_1_tsf_sync_C1
[31] R 0 RSVD
[30] W 0 B_AX_p1_sync_now_p do port sync when this bit is write 1
[29] W 0 B_AX_p1_sync_once_p only do once port sync when tbtt_int
[28] RW 0 B_AX_p1_auto_sync always do port sync when tbtt_int
[27] R 0 RSVD
[26:24] RW 0 B_AX_p1_sync_port_src_sel source port. "0/1/2/3/4" : port 0/1/2/3/4. "5/6/7" : freerun
[23:19] R 0 RSVD
[18:0] RW 0 B_AX_p1_tsftr_sync_offset unit : 32us, bit[18] : "0" pluse , "1" : minus

[29] W 0 B_AX_p2_sync_once_p only do once port sync when tbtt_int
[28] RW 0 B_AX_p2_auto_sync always do port sync when tbtt_int
[27] R 0 RSVD
[26:24] RW 0 B_AX_p2_sync_port_src_sel source port. "0/1/2/3/4" : port 0/1/2/3/4. "5/6/7" : freerun
[23:19] R 0 RSVD
[18:0] RW 0 B_AX_p2_tsftr_sync_offset unit : 32us, bit[18] : "0" pluse , "1" : minus

[18:0] RW 0 B_AX_p3_tsftr_sync_offset unit : 32us, bit[18] : "0" pluse , "1" : minus

[31] R 0 RSVD
[30] W 0 B_AX_p4_sync_now_p do port sync when this bit is write 1
[29] W 0 B_AX_p4_sync_once_p only do once port sync when tbtt_int
[28] RW 0 B_AX_p4_auto_sync always do port sync when tbtt_int

[31:0] R/W 0x0 B_AX_MACID31_0_SLEEP 1: Macid31~Macid0 sleep (per bit controlled)
1860E2C4h R_AX_MACID_SLEEP_1_C1
[31:0] R/W 0x0 B_AX_MACID63_32_SLEEP 1: Macid63~Macid32 sleep (per bit controlled)
1860E2C8h R_AX_MACID_SLEEP_2_C1
[31:0] R/W 0x0 B_AX_MACID95_64_SLEEP 1: Macid95~Macid64 sleep (per bit controlled)
1860E2CCh R_AX_MACID_SLEEP_3_C1
[31:0] R/W 0x0 B_AX_MACID127_96_SLEEP 1: Macid127~Macid96 sleep (per bit controlled)
1860E2E0h R_AX_CMAC_MACID_DROP_0_C1
[31:0] R/W 0x0 B_AX_CMAC_MGQ_MACID31_0_DROP 1: Macid31~Macid0 MGQ Drop (per bit controlled)
1860E2E4h R_AX_CMAC_MACID_DROP_1_C1
[31:0] R/W 0x0 B_AX_CMAC_MGQ_MACID63_32_DROP 1: Macid63~Macid32 MGQ Drop (per bit controlled)
1860E2E8h R_AX_CMAC_MACID_DROP_2_C1
[31:0] R/W 0x0 B_AX_CMAC_MGQ_MACID95_64_DROP 1: Macid95~Macid64 MGQ Drop (per bit controlled)

1860E300h R_AX_edca_be_param_0_C1
[31:27] RSVD RSVD RSVD RSVD
[26:16] R/W 0x00 B_AX_be_0_txoplmt TXOP Limit
An unsigned integer in units of 32 microseconds. Value of zero indicates that a single MSDU or MMPDU in addition to a protection frame exchange can be transmitted at any rate.
Default: BK = 0h; BE = 0h; VI = 5Eh; VO = 2Fh.
[15:8] R/W 0xA4 B_AX_be_0_cw ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.
[7:0] R/W 0x2B B_AX_be_0_aifs Arbitrary Inter frame space
In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.
1860E304h R_AX_edca_bk_param_0_C1
[31:27] RSVD RSVD RSVD RSVD
[26:16] R/W 0x00 B_AX_bk_0_txoplmt TXOP Limit
An unsigned integer in units of 32 microseconds. Value of zero indicates that a single MSDU or MMPDU in addition to a protection frame exchange can be transmitted at any rate.
Default: BK = 0h; BE = 0h; VI = 5Eh; VO = 2Fh.
[15:8] R/W 0xA5 B_AX_bk_0_cw ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.
[7:0] R/W 0x49 B_AX_bk_0_aifs Arbitrary Inter frame space
In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.
1860E308h R_AX_edca_vi_param_0_C1
[31:27] RSVD RSVD RSVD RSVD
[26:16] R/W 0x5e B_AX_vi_0_txoplmt TXOP Limit
An unsigned integer in units of 32 microseconds. Value of zero indicates that a single MSDU or MMPDU in addition to a protection frame exchange can be transmitted at any rate.
Default: BK = 0h; BE = 0h; VI = 5Eh; VO = 2Fh.
[15:8] R/W 0x43 B_AX_vi_0_cw ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.
[7:0] R/W 0x26 B_AX_vi_0_aifs Arbitrary Inter frame space
In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.
1860E30Ch R_AX_edca_vo_param_0_C1
[31:27] RSVD RSVD RSVD RSVD

Default: BK = 0h; BE = 0h; VI = 5Eh; VO = 2Fh.
[15:8] R/W 0x32 B_AX_vo_0_cw ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.

In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.

1860E31Ch R_AX_edca_vo_param_1_C1
[31:27] RSVD RSVD RSVD RSVD
[26:16] R/W 0x2f B_AX_vo_1_txoplmt TXOP Limit
An unsigned integer in units of 32 microseconds. Value of zero indicates that a single MSDU or MMPDU in addition to a protection frame exchange can be transmitted at any rate.
Default: BK = 0h; BE = 0h; VI = 5Eh; VO = 2Fh.
[15:8] R/W 0x32 B_AX_vo_1_cw ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.
[7:0] R/W 0x24 B_AX_vo_1_aifs Arbitrary Inter frame space
In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.
1860E320h R_AX_edca_mgq_param_C1
[31:24] R/W 0x32 B_AX_cpumgq_cw ( cpumgq)
ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.
[23:16] R/W 0x24 B_AX_cpumgq_aifs ( cpumgq)
Arbitrary Inter frame space
In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.
[15:8] R/W 0x32 B_AX_mgq_cw ( normal mgq and no power save mgq)
ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.
[7:0] R/W 0x24 B_AX_mgq_aifs ( normal mgq and no power save mgq)
Arbitrary Inter frame space
In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.
1860E324h R_AX_edca_bcnq_param_C1
[31:24] R/W 0x44 B_AX_bcnq_cw Beacon Contention Window MAX/MIN
Defines the contention window value for back off before transmitting beacon frame. This field is set to 0 in AP mode to indicate no back off window. In ad hoc mode, its default value is 6. 26-1 = 63 time slots.
[23:16] R/W 0x13 B_AX_bcnq_aifs Beacon Interframe Space
In units of microseconds, this register defines the medium idle time required before transmitting beacon (AP mode) or entering random back off window.
[15:8] R/W 0x1C B_AX_pifs
[7:0] R/W 0x20 B_AX_force_bcn_ifs
1860E328h R_AX_edca_ulq_param_C1
[31:27] RSVD RSVD RSVD RSVD
[26:16] R/W 0x00 B_AX_ulq_txoplmt TXOP Limit
An unsigned integer in units of 32 microseconds. Value of zero indicates that a single MSDU or MMPDU in addition to a protection frame exchange can be transmitted at any rate.
Default: BK = 0h; BE = 0h; VI = 5Eh; VO = 2Fh.
[15:8] R/W 0x32 B_AX_ulq_cw ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.
[7:0] R/W 0x24 B_AX_ulq_aifs Arbitrary Inter frame space
In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.

[31:27] RSVD RSVD RSVD RSVD
[26:16] R/W 0x00 B_AX_twt_0_txoplmt TXOP Limit
An unsigned integer in units of 32 microseconds. Value of zero indicates that a single MSDU or MMPDU in addition to a protection frame exchange can be transmitted at any rate.
Default: BK = 0h; BE = 0h; VI = 5Eh; VO = 2Fh.
[15:8] R/W 0x32 B_AX_twt_0_cw ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.
[7:0] R/W 0x24 B_AX_twt_0_aifs Arbitrary Inter frame space
In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.

An unsigned integer in units of 32 microseconds. Value of zero indicates that a single MSDU or MMPDU in addition to a protection frame exchange can be transmitted at any rate.
Default: BK = 0h; BE = 0h; VI = 5Eh; VO = 2Fh.
[15:8] R/W 0x32 B_AX_twt_1_cw ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1

In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission

1860E334h R_AX_slottime_cfg_C1
[31:28] RO 0 RSVD
[27:24] R/W 4'h7 B_AX_SLOT_EXT_THD
[23] RO 0 RSVD
[22:16] R/W 7'h19 B_AX_BURST_CNT_DOWN_TIME
[15:8] R/W 8'h50 B_AX_US_TIME
[7:0] R/W 8'h09 B_AX_SLOT_TIME count for 1 slot (unit: 1us)
1860E338h R_AX_prebkf_cfg_0_C1
[31:29] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[28:24] R/W 0x10 B_AX_100ns_time count for 100ns. (unit: clock cycle) EX: 8 for 80MHz
[23] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[22:16] R/W 0x3c B_AX_rx_air_end_time when rx_air_end == 1, assume air has idle for this setting value. unit: 0.1 us ( EX: 0x3C is 6 us)
[15:11] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[10:8] R/W 0x02 B_AX_mactx_latency assume latency from mactx to phytx. (unit: 1us)
[7:5] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[4:0] R/W 0x09 B_AX_prebkf_time inform ptcl to gen txcmd if backoff remain time less than this setting value. (unit: 1us) (For ACQ and F2PTXCMD)
1860E33Ch R_AX_prebkf_cfg_1_C1
[31:24] RW 0x89 B_AX_sifs_timeout_tb_aggr_V1 if sifs_timer > (rx_air_end+sifs_timeout_tb_aggr), inform ptcl to break aggr.
[23:16] R/W 0x46 B_AX_sifs_prebkf if sifs_prebkf_cnt < prebkf time in burst tx, inform ptcl to gen cmd. unit: 0.1us
[15] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[14:8] R/W 0x2f B_AX_sifs_timeout_t2 if ifstimer > (rx_air_end+t2), inform ptcl sifs timeout unit: 0.1us
[7] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[6:0] R/W 0x48 B_AX_sifs_mactxen_t1 if ifstimer > (rx_air_end+t1), inform wmac txunit: 0.1us
1860E340h R_AX_cca_cfg_0_C1
[31:24] RW 0x96 B_AX_r_sifs_aggr_time_V1 rx_air_end 後, r_sifs_aggr_time[6:0] * 0.1 us PTCL 停止 aggregation
[23:18] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[17] R/W 1 B_AX_TXPKTCTL_RST_EDCA_EN
[16] R/W 1 B_AX_WMAC_RST_EDCA_EN
[15:11] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[10] R/W 1 B_AX_EDCCA_PER20_BITMAP_SIFS_EN 1: TX TB PPDU 會檢查 EDCCA_PER20_BITMAP_SIFS
[9] R/W 1 B_AX_BTCCA_BRK_TXOP_EN 1: BT CCA break txop
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_NAV_BRK_TXOP_EN 1: NAV break txop
[7] R/W 1 B_AX_TX_NAV_EN 1: contention 會看 tx_nav
[6] R/W 1 B_AX_BCN_IGNORE_EDCCA Not ready
[5] R/W 1 B_AX_BTCCA_EN scheduler BTCCA 總開關. "1" scheduler 會看 BTCCA, "0" scheduler 不看. (Debug 用途)
[4] R/W 1 B_AX_EDCCA_EN scheduler EDCCA 總開關. "1" scheduler 會看 EDCCA, "0" scheduler 不看. (Debug 用途)
[3] R/W 1 B_AX_SEC80_EN scheduler SEC 80 總開關. "1" scheduler 會看 SEC 80 CCA, "0" scheduler 不看. (Debug 用途)
[2] R/W 1 B_AX_SEC40_EN scheduler SEC 40 總開關. "1" scheduler 會看 SEC 40 CCA, "0" scheduler 不看. (Debug 用途)
[1] R/W 1 B_AX_SEC20_EN scheduler SEC20 總開關. "1" scheduler 會看 SEC 20 CCA, "0" scheduler 不看. (Debug 用途)
[0] R/W 1 B_AX_CCA_EN scheduler primary 20M CCA 總開關. "1" scheduler 會看 CCA, "0" scheduler 不看. (Debug 用途)
1860E344h R_AX_misc_0_C1
[31:28] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[27:24] R/W 9 B_AX_SCH_DBG_FORCE_ABORT_CNT extend scheduler debug force abort signal. (unit : 1us)
[23:20] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[19:16] R/W 0 B_AX_cmac_share_dbg_sel cmac share debug select
[15] W 0 B_AX_rst_freerun_p Write 1 to reset freerun counter
[14:13] RO 0 RSVD
[12] R/W 1 B_AX_SCH_ABORT_BRK_TB_EN "1" : clear scheduler tb timer logic when tx abort
[11] R/W 1 B_AX_SCH_ABORT_BRK_BURST_EN "1" : clear scheduler burst timer logic when tx abort
[10] R/W 1 B_AX_PORT_FUNC_EN_LOW_AUTO_RST “1” : reset port function logic when port function enable is low
9] R/W 0 B_AX_SCH_CLK_GATING_DIS "1" : scheduler disable dynamic clock gating. "0" : scheduler enable dynamic clock gating
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_en_freerun "1" : enable freerun counter
[7] W 0 B_AX_SCH_DBG_RST_EDCA_CLR_P "1" : clear sch_dbg_rst_edca signal
[6] R/W 0 B_AX_SCH_DBG_RST_EDCA_EN "1" : scheduler creates a sch_dbg_rst_edca signal to reset ifs timer when tx ppdu.
[5:4] R 0 RSVD
[3] W 0 B_AX_SCH_FORCE_ABORT_P "1" : create a pulse to try to abort PTCL/SCH tx.
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_SCH_FORCE_ABORT_AUTO_EN "1" : scheduler creates periodic 32 us pulse to try to abort PTCL/SCH tx. It is a stress test for PTCL/SCH tx abort procedure.
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_TXOP_RESP_EN "1" : allow response tx in txop.
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_en_tbtt_area_for_AX_bb
1860E348h R_AX_ctn_txen_C1
[31:18] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[17] R/W 1 B_AX_ctn_txen_twt_3 "1" : twt1 contention enable "0" : twt3 contention disable
[16] R/W 1 B_AX_ctn_txen_twt_2 "1" : twt1 contention enable "0" : twt2 contention disable
[15] R/W 1 B_AX_ctn_txen_twt_1 "1" : twt1 contention enable "0" : twt1 contention disable
[14] R/W 1 B_AX_ctn_txen_twt_0 "1" : twt0 contention enable "0" : twt0 contention disable
[13] R/W 1 B_AX_ctn_txen_ulq "1" : ulq contention enable "0" : ulq contention disable
[12] R/W 1 B_AX_ctn_txen_bcnq "1" : bcnq contention enable "0" : bcnq contention disable
[11] R/W 1 B_AX_ctn_txen_hgq "1" : hiq contention enable "0" : hiq contention disable
[10] R/W 1 B_AX_ctn_txen_cpumgq "1" : cpumgq contention enable "0" : cpumgq contention disable
[9] R/W 1 B_AX_ctn_txen_mgq1 "1" : mgq1 contention enable "0" : mgq1 contention disable
[8] R/W 1 B_AX_ctn_txen_mgq "1" : mgq contention enable "0" : mgq contention disable
[7] R/W 1 B_AX_ctn_txen_vo_1 "1" : wmm1 voq contention enable "0" : wmm1 voq contention disable
[6] R/W 1 B_AX_ctn_txen_vi_1 "1" : wmm1 viq contention enable "0" : wmm1 viq contention disable
[5] R/W 1 B_AX_ctn_txen_bk_1 "1" : wmm1 bkq contention enable "0" : wmm1 bkq contention disable

[0] R/W 1 B_AX_ctn_txen_be_0 "1" : wmm0 beq contention enable "0" : wmm0 beq contention disable

1860E350h R_AX_muedca_be_param_0_C1
[31:16] R/W 0x00 B_AX_muedca_be_param_0_timer MU EDCA TIMER, in units of 32 us
Note: SPEC: The MU EDCA Timer field (8b) indicates the duration of time, in units of 8 TUs
[15:8] R/W 0xA4 B_AX_muedca_be_param_0_cw ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.
[7:0] R/W 0x2B B_AX_muedca_be_param_0_aifs Arbitrary Inter frame space
In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.

"1" : wmm 1 支援 mu edca
[7:6] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[5] R/W 0 B_AX_set_muedcatimer_tf_1 RSVD
[4] R/W 0 B_AX_set_muedcatimer_tf_0 1: enable HW updating MUEDCATimer after Tx HE TB PPDU
0: disable HW updating MUEDCATimer after Tx HE TB PPDU
[3] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[2] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[1] RW 0 RSVD RSVD
[0] R/W 1 B_AX_muedca_en_0 WMM0

0: disable HW updating MUEDCATimer
1860E374h R_AX_rand_scr_bit_C1
[31:23] RO 0 RSVD RSVD

1860E378h R_AX_random_cfg_C1
[31:24] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[23:0] R/W 0xE21051 B_AX_rand_set [23] : "1" enable random generator
[22:0] : random generater 生成多項式
1860E380h R_AX_MUEDCATIMER_0_C1
[31:16] $R/W 0 B_AX_MUEDCATIMER_BK_0 MUEDCATIMER for backup/restore flow in LPS
HW countdown this timer (until 0) in non-LPS state, and do compensate when restore (0x170[0]=0, clear timer)
Unit: 32 us.
[15:0] $R/W 0 B_AX_MUEDCATIMER_BE_0 MUEDCATIMER for backup/restore flow in LPS
HW countdown this timer (until 0) in non-LPS state, and do compensate when restore (0x170[0]=0, clear timer)
Unit: 32 us.
1860E384h R_AX_MUEDCATIMER_1_C1
[31:16] $R/W 0 B_AX_MUEDCATIMER_VO_0 MUEDCATIMER for backup/restore flow in LPS
HW countdown this timer (until 0) in non-LPS state, and do compensate when restore
Unit: 32 us.
[15:0] $R/W 0 B_AX_MUEDCATIMER_VI_0 MUEDCATIMER for backup/restore flow in LPS
HW countdown this timer (until 0) in non-LPS state, and do compensate when restore
Unit: 32 us.

[31:16] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD for WMM1

1860E390h R_AX_cca_control_C1
[31] RW 1 B_AX_TB_CHK_TX_NAV When TX NAV > 0 in the SIFS before HE TB PPDU
0: Can TX
1: Cannot TX
[30] RW 1 B_AX_TB_CHK_BASIC_NAV When TF CS required = 1 and BAISC NAV > 0
in the SIFS before HE TB PPDU TX
0: Can TX
1: Cannot TX
[29] RW 1 B_AX_TB_CHK_BTCCA When TF CS required = 1 and BTCCA assert
in the SIFS before HE TB PPDU TX
0: Can TX
1: Cannot TX
[28] RW 1 B_AX_TB_CHK_EDCCA When TF CS required = 1 and EDCCA assert
in the SIFS before HE TB PPDU TX
0: Can TX
1: Cannot TX
[27] RW 1 B_AX_TB_CHK_CCA_S80 When TF CS required = 1 and SECONDARY_CCA_80 assert
in the SIFS before HE TB PPDU TX
0: Can TX
1: Cannot TX
[26] RW 1 B_AX_TB_CHK_CCA_S40 When TF CS required = 1 and SECONDARY_CCA_40 assert
in the SIFS before HE TB PPDU TX
0: Can TX
1: Cannot TX
[25] RW 1 B_AX_TB_CHK_CCA_S20 When TF CS required = 1 and SECONDARY_CCA_20 assert
in the SIFS before HE TB PPDU TX
0: Can TX
1: Cannot TX
[24] RW 1 B_AX_TB_CHK_CCA_P20 When TF CS required = 1 and CCA assert
in the SIFS before HE TB PPDU TX
0: Can TX
1: Cannot TX
[23:22] R 0 RSVD
[21] RW 1 B_AX_SIFS_CHK_BTCCA When BTCCA assert in the SIFS before active TX
0: Can TX
1: Cannot TX
[20] RW 1 B_AX_SIFS_CHK_EDCCA When EDCCA assert in the SIFS before active TX
0: Can TX
1: Cannot TX
[19] RW 1 B_AX_SIFS_CHK_CCA_S80 When SECONDARY_CCA_80 assert in the SIFS before active TX
0: Can TX
1: Cannot TX
[18] RW 1 B_AX_SIFS_CHK_CCA_S40 When SECONDARY_CCA_40 assert in the SIFS before active TX
0: Can TX
1: Cannot TX
[17] RW 1 B_AX_SIFS_CHK_CCA_S20 When SECONDARY_CCA_20 assert in the SIFS before active TX
0: Can TX
1: Cannot TX
[16] RW 1 B_AX_SIFS_CHK_CCA_P20 When CCA assert in the SIFS before active TX
0: Can TX
1: Cannot TX
[15] $RW 0 RSVD RSVD
[14] $RW 0 RSVD RSVD
[13] $RW 0 RSVD RSVD
[12:9] R 0 RSVD
[8] RW 1 B_AX_CTN_CHK_TXNAV When TX NAV > 0 in the AIFS/Backoff before active TX
0: Can backoff, can TX
1: Cannot backoff, cannot TX
[7] RW 1 B_AX_CTN_CHK_INTRA_NAV When INTRA NAV > 0 in the AIFS/Backoff before active TX
0: Can backoff, can TX
1: Cannot backoff, cannot TX
[6] RW 1 B_AX_CTN_CHK_BASIC_NAV When BASIC NAV > 0 in the AIFS/Backoff before active TX
0: Can backoff, can TX
1: Cannot backoff, cannot TX
[5] RW 1 B_AX_CTN_CHK_BTCCA When BTCCA assert in the AIFS/Backoff before active TX
0: Can backoff, can TX
1: Cannot backoff, cannot TX
[4] RW 1 B_AX_CTN_CHK_EDCCA When EDCCA assert in the AIFS/Backoff before active TX
0: Can backoff, can TX
1: Cannot backoff, cannot TX
[3] RW 1 B_AX_CTN_CHK_CCA_S80 When SECONDARY_CCA_80 assert in the AIFS/Backoff before active TX
0: Can backoff, can TX
1: Can backoff, cannot TX
[2] RW 1 B_AX_CTN_CHK_CCA_S40 When SECONDARY_CCA_40 assert in the AIFS/Backoff before active TX
0: Can backoff, can TX
1: Can backoff, cannot TX
[1] RW 1 B_AX_CTN_CHK_CCA_S20 When SECONDARY_CCA_20 assert in the AIFS/Backoff before active TX
0: Can backoff, can TX
1: Can backoff, cannot TX
[0] RW 1 B_AX_CTN_CHK_CCA_P20 When CCA assert in the AIFS/Backoff before active TX
0: Can backoff, can TX
1: Cannot backoff, cannot TX
1860E394h R_AX_cca_control_2_C1
[31:25] R 0 RSVD
[24] RW 1 B_AX_TB_CHK_EDCCA_PER20 When edcca_per20_bitmap_sifs > 0 in the SIFS before HE TB PPDU
0: Can TX
1: Cannot TX
[23:8] R 0 RSVD
[7] RW 1 B_AX_SR_CTN_CHK_TX_NAV When TX NAV > 0 in the AIFS/Backoff before active TX
0: Can backoff, can TX
1: Cannot backoff, cannot TX
[6] RW 1 B_AX_SR_CTN_CHK__NAV When BASIC or INTRA NAV > 0 in the AIFS/Backoff before active TX
0: Can backoff, can TX
1: Cannot backoff, cannot TX
[5] RW 1 B_AX_SR_CTN_CHK_BTCCA When BTCCA assert in the AIFS/Backoff before active TX
0: Can backoff, can TX
1: Cannot backoff, cannot TX
[4] RW 1 B_AX_SR_CTN_CHK_EDCCA When EDCCA assert in the AIFS/Backoff before active TX
0: Can backoff, can TX
1: Cannot backoff, cannot TX
[3] RW 1 B_AX_SR_CTN_CHK_CCA_S80 When SECONDARY_CCA_80 assert in the AIFS/Backoff before active TX
0: Can backoff, can TX
1: Can backoff, cannot TX
[2] RW 1 B_AX_SR_CTN_CHK_CCA_S40 When SECONDARY_CCA_40 assert in the AIFS/Backoff before active TX
0: Can backoff, can TX
1: Can backoff, cannot TX
[1] RW 1 B_AX_SR_CTN_CHK_CCA_S20 When SECONDARY_CCA_20 assert in the AIFS/Backoff before active TX
0: Can backoff, can TX
1: Can backoff, cannot TX
[0] RW 1 RSVD
1860E398h R_AX_CTN_DRV_TXEN_C1
[31:18] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[17] R/W 1 B_AX_ctn_txen_twt_3 "1" : twt1 contention enable "0" : twt3 contention disable
[16] R/W 1 B_AX_ctn_txen_twt_2 "1" : twt1 contention enable "0" : twt2 contention disable
[15] R/W 1 B_AX_ctn_txen_twt_1 "1" : twt1 contention enable "0" : twt1 contention disable
[14] R/W 1 B_AX_ctn_txen_twt_0 "1" : twt0 contention enable "0" : twt0 contention disable
[13] R/W 1 B_AX_ctn_txen_ulq "1" : ulq contention enable "0" : ulq contention disable
[12] R/W 1 B_AX_ctn_txen_bcnq "1" : bcnq contention enable "0" : bcnq contention disable
[11] R/W 1 B_AX_ctn_txen_hgq "1" : hiq contention enable "0" : hiq contention disable
[10] R/W 1 B_AX_ctn_txen_cpumgq "1" : cpumgq contention enable "0" : cpumgq contention disable
[9] R/W 1 B_AX_ctn_txen_mgq1 "1" : mgq1 contention enable "0" : mgq1 contention disable
[8] R/W 1 B_AX_ctn_txen_mgq "1" : mgq contention enable "0" : mgq contention disable
[7] R/W 1 B_AX_ctn_txen_vo_1 "1" : wmm1 voq contention enable "0" : wmm1 voq contention disable
[6] R/W 1 B_AX_ctn_txen_vi_1 "1" : wmm1 viq contention enable "0" : wmm1 viq contention disable
[5] R/W 1 B_AX_ctn_txen_bk_1 "1" : wmm1 bkq contention enable "0" : wmm1 bkq contention disable
[4] R/W 1 B_AX_ctn_txen_be_1 "1" : wmm1 beq contention enable "0" : wmm1 beq contention disable
[3] R/W 1 B_AX_ctn_txen_vo_0 "1" : wmm0 voq contention enable "0" : wmm0 voq contention disable
[2] R/W 1 B_AX_ctn_txen_vi_0 "1" : wmm0 viq contention enable "0" : wmm0 viq contention disable
[1] R/W 1 B_AX_ctn_txen_bk_0 "1" : wmm0 bkq contention enable "0" : wmm0 bkq contention disable
[0] R/W 1 B_AX_ctn_txen_be_0 "1" : wmm0 beq contention enable "0" : wmm0 beq contention disable
1860E3E8h R_AX_SCHEDULE_ERR_IMR_C1
[31:2] R/W 0 RSVD -
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_SORT_NON_IDLE_ERR_INT_EN [RSVD] During sort process, and discover another sort_req
[0] R/W 1 B_AX_FSM_TIMEOUT_ERR_INT_EN State machine of SCHEDULE over 32us, and not retrun idle state
1860E3ECh R_AX_SCHEDULE_ERR_ISR_C1
[31:2] RO 0 RSVD -
[1] R/W1C 0 B_AX_SORT_NON_IDLE_ERR_INT During sort process, and discover another sort_req
[0] R/W1C 0 B_AX_FSM_TIMEOUT_ERR_INT State machine of SCHEDULE over 32us, and not retrun idle state
1860E3F4h R_AX_sch_dbg_sel_C1
[31:17] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[16] R/W 1 B_AX_sch_dbg_en enable scheduler debug
[15:8] R/W 0 B_AX_sch_cfg_cmd_sel scheduler config command select
[7:0] R/W 0 B_AX_sch_dbg_sel scheduler debug select
1860E3F8h R_AX_sch_dbg_C1
[31:0] RO 0 B_AX_scheduler_dbg scheduler debug port (for debug)
1860E3FCh R_AX_SCH_EXT_CTRL_C1
[31:24] R/W 0 B_AX_CHK_OFDM_CCA_PER20_BITMAP_DIS value indicated cbw bitmap 8 bits which need to check by 20Mhz bandwidth.
“0”, Need to check this 20Mhz bandwidth
"1" ,Not need to check this 20Mhz bandwidth
[23] R/W 0 B_AX_DUMMY_23_REG
[22] R/W 0 B_AX_DUMMY_22_REG
[21] R/W 0 B_AX_DUMMY_21_REG
[20] R/W 0 B_AX_DUMMY_20_REG
[19] R/W 0 B_AX_DUMMY_19_REG
[18] R/W 0 B_AX_DUMMY_18_REG
[17] R/W 0 B_AX_DUMMY_17_REG
[16] R/W 0 B_AX_DUMMY_16_REG
[15] R/W 0 B_AX_DUMMY_15_REG
[14] R/W 0 B_AX_DUMMY_14_REG
[13] R/W 0 B_AX_DUMMY_13_REG
[12] R/W 0 B_AX_DUMMY_12_REG
[11] R/W 0 B_AX_DUMMY_11_REG
[10] R/W 0 B_AX_DUMMY_10_REG
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_TXFIAL_BRK_TXOP_EN This bits control tx fail break/ not break txop.
"0" : tx fail break txop
"1" : tx fail NOT break txop
tx fail indicates receive unexpected frame or acktimeout after transmission.
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_DUMMY_8_REG
[7] R/W 0 B_AX_DUMMY_7_REG
[6] R/W 0 B_AX_DUMMY_6_REG
[5] R/W 0 B_AX_DUMMY_5_REG
[4] R/W 0 B_AX_DUMMY_4_REG
[3] R/W 0 B_AX_DUMMY_3_REG
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_DUMMY_2_REG
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_DUMMY_1_REG
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_DUMMY_0_REG
1860E400h R_AX_PORT_CFG_P0_C1
[31:18] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[17] R/W 0 B_AX_PROHIB_END_CAL_EN_P0 1: Hold time end update TBTT count down
0: Hold time end DO NOT update TBTT count down
[16] R/W 1 B_AX_BRK_SETUP_P0 1: ACQ/ULQ TX breaks at setup time.
0: ACQ/ULQ TX may cross setup time.
[15] R/W 1 B_AX_TBTT_UPD_SHIFT_SEL_P0 1: TBTT count down timer is updated with mod and shift at TBTT.
0: TBTT count down timer is updated to beacon interval at TBTT.
[14] R/W 1 B_AX_BCN_DROP_ALLOW_P0 1: Allow HW drop beacon.
0: NOT allow HW drop beacon.
[13] R/W 1 B_AX_TBTT_PROHIB_EN_P0 1: Enable TBTT prohibit (setup time + hold time)
0: Disable TBTT prohibit and BCN TRX,but TBTT INT still send to FW.
[12] R/W 0 B_AX_BCNTX_EN_P0 1: Enable Beacon TX after TBTT.
0: Disable beacon TX and prohibit time.
[11:10] R/W 0 B_AX_NET_TYPE_P0 Network Type for port 0 (Default: 00b).
00: No link
01: Link in ad hoc network
10: Link in infrastructure network
11 : AP mode
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_FORCETX_EN_P0 1: Enable BCN TX force mode, 0: Disable
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_TXBCN_BTCCA_EN_P0 1: Enable Beacon Tx at TBTT if BT_CCA is enabled
0: Disable
[7] R/W 0 B_AX_BCNERR_CNT_EN_P0 1: Enable BCN error counter
0: Disable BCN error counter and reset counter to 0
[6] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_AGRES_P0 1: BCN PKT aggression TX.
0: BCN PKT normal TX.
[5] W1C 0 B_AX_TSFTR_RST_P0 Write 1 to reset tsft
[4] R/W 1 B_AX_RX_BSSID_FIT_EN_P0 1: HW will handle rx_beacon_pkt and do the following actions
0: HW will ignore rx_beacon_pkt and ignore the following actions
(a). update tsf timer
(b). generate rx bcn report
(c). rx beacon time record
[3] R/W 1 B_AX_TSF_UDT_EN_P0 1: Enable port 0 TSF update when RX beacon frames or probe response frames.
0: Disable port 0 TSF update when RX beacon frames or probe response frames.
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_PORT_FUNC_EN_P0 When this bit is set, TSF and other beacon related functions are then enabled.
1. MAC address of port path. (A1 match_enable)
2. Timestamp enable for port.
3. Interrupt source.(TSF)
[1] R/W 1 B_AX_TXBCN_RPT_EN_P0 1: Enable to issue TXBCN report in ad hoc and AP mode. 0: Disable.
[0] R/W 1 B_AX_RXBCN_RPT_EN_P0 1: Enable RXBCNOK report. 0: Disable.
1860E404h R_AX_TBTT_PROHIB_P0_C1
[31:28] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[27:16] R/W 0xC8 B_AX_TBTT_HOLD_P0 TBTT prohibit hold time. unit: 32 us.
[15:8] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[7:0] R/W 0x02 B_AX_TBTT_SETUP_P0 TBTT prohibit setup time. unit: 32 us.
1860E408h R_AX_BCN_AREA_P0_C1
[31:28] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[27:16] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_MSK_AREA_P0 Mask BCN contention area width. Unit: 32us
[15:12] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[11:0] R/W 0x60 B_AX_BCN_CTN_AREA_P0 BCN contention area 1 width. Unit: 32us ( Not ready)
1860E40Ch R_AX_BCNERLYINT_CFG_P0_C1
[15:12] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[11:0] R/W 0xA0 B_AX_BCNERLY_P0 It is used to wake up early at BCN early time before TBTT and send interrupt to notify FW/SW. Unit: 32 us.
1860E40Eh R_AX_TBTTERLYINT_CFG_P0_C1
[15:12] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[11:0] R/W 0x05 B_AX_TBTTERLY_P0 It is used to config BB/RF early at TBTT early time before TBTT and send interrupt to notify FW/SW. Unit: 1 us.
1860E412h R_AX_TBTT_AGG_P0_C1
[15:8] R/W 1 B_AX_TBTT_AGG_NUM_P0 Set TBTT AGG number for DTIM TBTT. TBTT related INTs are NOT issued at non-DTIM TBTT.
[7:0] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
1860E414h R_AX_BCN_SPACE_CFG_P0_C1
[31:24] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[23:16] R/W 0 B_AX_SUB_BCN_SPACE_P0 BCN interval of the VAP in port 0. Not valid for port 1~4. Unit: TU.
[15:0] R/W 0x64 B_AX_BCN_SPACE_P0 When MBSSID is disable, this field is the beacon interval. When MBSSID is enable, this register is the beacon space of root. Unit: TU.
1860E418h R_AX_BCN_FORCETX_P0_C1
[31:24] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[23:16] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[15:8] R/W 0x01 B_AX_FORCE_BCN_NUM_P0 When BCN TX forced mode is enabled, force mode will be over after BCN TX OK number reaches this threshold. Set to 0 is equal to 1 (Still have 1 BCN in forced mode). (Not ready)
[7:0] R/W 0x10 B_AX_BCN_MAX_ERR_P0 When BCN TX error count goes over this threshold, BCN contention area 2 becomes forced mode (BCN will ignore CCA to TX). Set 0xFF to disable forced mode. (Not ready)
1860E420h R_AX_BCN_ERR_CNT_P0_C1
[31:24] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_CNT_SUM_P0 BCN error total count of port 0
[23:16] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_CNT_NAV_P0 BCN error count caused by NAV of port 0
[15:8] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_CNT_EDCCA_P0 BCN error count caused by EDCCA of port 0
[7:0] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_CNT_CCA_P0 BCN error count caused by CCA of port 0
1860E424h R_AX_BCN_ERR_FLAG_P0_C1
[15:7] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[6] W1C 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_FLAG_OTHERS_P0 BCN error flag caused by others of port 0. Write 1 clear. (Not ready)
[5] W1C 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_FLAG_MAC_P0 BCN error flag caused by MAC of port 0. Write 1 clear. (Not ready)
[4] W1C 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_FLAG_TXON_P0 BCN error flag caused by TXON of port 0. Write 1 clear. (Not ready)
[3] W1C 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_FLAG_SRCHEND_P0 BCN error flag caused by search until hold time end of port 0. Write 1 clear.
[2] W1C 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_FLAG_INVALID_P0 BCN error flag caused by INVALID of port 0. Write 1 clear.
[1] W1C 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_FLAG_CMP_P0 BCN error flag caused by BCN_SRCH_SEQ compare illegal of port 0. Write 1 clear.
[0] W1C 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_FLAG_LOCK_P0 BCN error flag caused by BCNQ locked until hold time end of port 0. Write 1 clear.
1860E426h R_AX_DTIM_CTRL_P0_C1
[15:8] R/W 1 B_AX_DTIM_NUM_P0 Set the DTIM count of port 0.
[7:0] R/W 0 B_AX_DTIM_CURRCNT_P0 Current DTIM count of port 0.
1860E428h R_AX_TBTT_SHIFT_P0_C1
[31:12] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[11:0] R/W 0 B_AX_TBTT_SHIFT_OFST_P0 TBTT shift offset. unit: TU.
Notice that this field is an signed number, it is minus value if MSB is 1.
Next TBTT counter = BCN_ITVL - (current TSF % BCN_ITVL) +- TBTT_SHIFT
1860E434h R_AX_BCN_CNT_TMR_P0_C1
[31:0] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_CNT_TMR_P0 Beacon count down timer of port 0. Unit: us.
1860E438h R_AX_TSFTR_LOW_P0_C1
[31:0] $R/W 1 B_AX_TSFTR_LOW_P0 TSFT TIMER low 32 bits of port 0
(需先寫 Low 32 bits 再寫 High 32 bits)
1860E43Ch R_AX_TSFTR_HIGH_P0_C1
[31:0] $R/W 0 B_AX_TSFTR_HIGH_P0 TSFT TIMER high 32 bits of port 0
(需先寫 Low 32 bits 再寫 High 32 bits)
1860E440h R_AX_PORT_CFG_P1_C1
[31:18] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[17] R/W 0 B_AX_PROHIB_END_CAL_EN_P1 1: Hold time end update TBTT count down
0: Hold time end DO NOT update TBTT count down
[16] R/W 1 B_AX_BRK_SETUP_P1 1: ACQ/ULQ TX breaks at setup time.
0: ACQ/ULQ TX may cross setup time.
[15] R/W 1 B_AX_TBTT_UPD_SHIFT_SEL_P1 1: TBTT count down timer is updated with mod and shift at TBTT.
0: TBTT count down timer is updated to beacon interval at TBTT.
[14] R/W 1 B_AX_BCN_DROP_ALLOW_P1 1: Allow HW drop beacon.
0: NOT allow HW drop beacon.
[13] R/W 1 B_AX_TBTT_PROHIB_EN_P1 1: Enable TBTT prohibit (setup time + hold time)
0: Disable TBTT prohibit and BCN TRX,but TBTT INT still send to FW.
[12] R/W 0 B_AX_BCNTX_EN_P1 1: Enable Beacon TX after TBTT.
0: Disable beacon TX and prohibit time.
[11:10] R/W 0 B_AX_NET_TYPE_P1 Network Type for port 1 (Default: 00b).
00: No link
01: Link in ad hoc network
10: Link in infrastructure network
11 : AP mode
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_FORCETX_EN_P1 1: Enable BCN TX force mode, 0: Disable
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_TXBCN_BTCCA_EN_P1 1: Enable Beacon Tx at TBTT if BT_CCA is enabled
0: Disable
[7] R/W 0 B_AX_BCNERR_CNT_EN_P1 1: Enable BCN error counter
0: Disable BCN error counter and reset counter to 0

0: BCN PKT normal TX.
[5] W1C 0 B_AX_TSFTR_RST_P1 Write 1 to reset tsft
[4] R/W 1 B_AX_RX_BSSID_FIT_EN_P1 1: HW will handle rx_beacon_pkt and do the following actions
0: HW will ignore rx_beacon_pkt and ignore the following actions
(a). update tsf timer
(b). generate rx bcn report
(c). rx beacon time record
[3] R/W 1 B_AX_TSF_UDT_EN_P1 1: Enable port 1 TSF update when RX beacon frames or probe response frames.
0: Disable port 1 TSF update when RX beacon frames or probe response frames.
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_PORT_FUNC_EN_P1 When this bit is set, TSF and other beacon related functions are then enabled.
1. MAC address of port path. (A1 match_enable)
2. Timestamp enable for port.
3. Interrupt source.(TSF)
[1] R/W 1 B_AX_TXBCN_RPT_EN_P1 1: Enable to issue TXBCN report in ad hoc and AP mode. 0: Disable.
[0] R/W 1 B_AX_RXBCN_RPT_EN_P1 1: Enable RXBCNOK report. 0: Disable.

1860E480h R_AX_PORT_CFG_P2_C1
[30:18] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[17] R/W 0 B_AX_PROHIB_END_CAL_EN_P2 1: Hold time end update TBTT count down
0: Hold time end DO NOT update TBTT count down
[16] R/W 1 B_AX_BRK_SETUP_P2 1: ACQ/ULQ TX breaks at setup time.
0: ACQ/ULQ TX may cross setup time.
[15] R/W 1 B_AX_TBTT_UPD_SHIFT_SEL_P2 1: TBTT count down timer is updated with mod and shift at TBTT.
0: TBTT count down timer is updated to beacon interval at TBTT.
[14] R/W 1 B_AX_BCN_DROP_ALLOW_P2 1: Allow HW drop beacon.
0: NOT allow HW drop beacon.
[13] R/W 1 B_AX_TBTT_PROHIB_EN_P2 1: Enable TBTT prohibit (setup time + hold time)
0: Disable TBTT prohibit and BCN TRX,but TBTT INT still send to FW.
[12] R/W 0 B_AX_BCNTX_EN_P2 1: Enable Beacon TX after TBTT.
0: Disable beacon TX and prohibit time.

00: No link
01: Link in ad hoc network
10: Link in infrastructure network
11 : AP mode
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_FORCETX_EN_P2 1: Enable BCN TX force mode, 0: Disable
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_TXBCN_BTCCA_EN_P2 1: Enable Beacon Tx at TBTT if BT_CCA is enabled
0: Disable
[7] R/W 0 B_AX_BCNERR_CNT_EN_P2 1: Enable BCN error counter
0: Disable BCN error counter and reset counter to 0
[6] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_AGRES_P2 1: BCN PKT aggression TX.
0: BCN PKT normal TX.
[5] W1C 0 B_AX_TSFTR_RST_P2 Write 1 to reset tsft
[4] R/W 1 B_AX_RX_BSSID_FIT_EN_P2 1: HW will handle rx_beacon_pkt and do the following actions
0: HW will ignore rx_beacon_pkt and ignore the following actions
(a). update tsf timer
(b). generate rx bcn report
(c). rx beacon time record
[3] R/W 1 B_AX_TSF_UDT_EN_P2 1: Enable port 2 TSF update when RX beacon frames or probe response frames.
0: Disable port 2 TSF update when RX beacon frames or probe response frames.
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_PORT_FUNC_EN_P2 When this bit is set, TSF and other beacon related functions are then enabled.
1. MAC address of port path. (A1 match_enable)
2. Timestamp enable for port.
3. Interrupt source.(TSF)
[1] R/W 1 B_AX_TXBCN_RPT_EN_P2 1: Enable to issue TXBCN report in ad hoc and AP mode. 0: Disable.
[0] R/W 1 B_AX_RXBCN_RPT_EN_P2 1: Enable RXBCNOK report. 0: Disable.
1860E488h R_AX_BCN_AREA_P2_C1
[31:28] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[27:16] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_MSK_AREA_P2 Mask BCN contention area width. Unit: 32us
[15:12] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[11:0] $RO 0 B_AX_BCN_CTN_AREA_P2 same value as B_AX_BCN_CTN_AREA_P1
1860E48Ch R_AX_BCNERLYINT_CFG_P2_C1
[15:12] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[11:0] R/W 0xA0 B_AX_BCNERLY_P2 It is used to wake up early at BCN early time before TBTT and send interrupt to notify FW/SW. Unit: 32 us.
1860E48Eh R_AX_TBTTERLYINT_CFG_P2_C1
[15:12] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[11:0] R/W 0x05 B_AX_TBTTERLY_P2 It is used to config BB/RF early at TBTT early time before TBTT and send interrupt to notify FW/SW. Unit: 1 us.
1860E492h R_AX_TBTT_AGG_P2_C1
[15:8] R/W 1 B_AX_TBTT_AGG_NUM_P2 Set TBTT AGG number for DTIM TBTT. TBTT related INTs are NOT issued at non-DTIM TBTT.
[7:0] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
1860E494h R_AX_BCN_SPACE_CFG_P2_C1
[31:16] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[15:0] R/W 0x64 B_AX_BCN_SPACE_P2 Beacon interval. Unit: TU.
1860E498h R_AX_BCN_FORCETX_P2_C1
[31:24] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[23:16] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[15:8] R/W 0x01 B_AX_FORCE_BCN_NUM_P2 When BCN TX forced mode is enabled, force mode will be over after BCN TX OK number reaches this threshold. Set to 0 is equal to 1 (Still have 1 BCN in forced mode). (Not ready)
[7:0] R/W 0x10 B_AX_BCN_MAX_ERR_P2 When BCN TX error count goes over this threshold, BCN contention area 2 becomes forced mode (BCN will ignore CCA to TX). Set 0xFF to disable forced mode. (Not ready)
1860E4A0h R_AX_BCN_ERR_CNT_P2_C1
[31:24] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_CNT_SUM_P2 BCN error total count of port 2
[23:16] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_CNT_NAV_P2 BCN error count caused by NAV of port 2
[15:8] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_CNT_EDCCA_P2 BCN error count caused by EDCCA of port 2
[7:0] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_CNT_CCA_P2 BCN error count caused by CCA of port 2
1860E4A4h R_AX_BCN_ERR_FLAG_P2_C1
[15:7] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[6] W1C 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_FLAG_OTHERS_P2 BCN error flag caused by others of port 2. Write 1 clear. (Not ready)
[5] W1C 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_FLAG_MAC_P2 BCN error flag caused by MAC of port 2. Write 1 clear. (Not ready)
[4] W1C 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_FLAG_TXON_P2 BCN error flag caused by TXON of port 2. Write 1 clear. (Not ready)
[3] W1C 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_FLAG_SRCHEND_P2 BCN error flag caused by search until hold time end of port 2. Write 1 clear.
[2] W1C 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_FLAG_INVALID_P2 BCN error flag caused by INVALID of port 2. Write 1 clear.
[1] W1C 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_FLAG_CMP_P2 BCN error flag caused by BCN_SRCH_SEQ compare illegal of port 2. Write 1 clear.
[0] W1C 0 B_AX_BCN_ERR_FLAG_LOCK_P2 BCN error flag caused by BCNQ locked until hold time end of port 2. Write 1 clear.
1860E4A6h R_AX_DTIM_CTRL_P2_C1
[15:8] R/W 1 B_AX_DTIM_NUM_P2 Set the DTIM count of port 2.
[7:0] R/W 0 B_AX_DTIM_CURRCNT_P2 Current DTIM count of port 2.
1860E4A8h R_AX_TBTT_SHIFT_P2_C1
[31:12] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[11:0] R/W 0 B_AX_TBTT_SHIFT_OFST_P2 TBTT shift offset. unit: TU.
Notice that this field is an signed number, it is minus value if MSB is 1.
Next TBTT counter = BCN_ITVL - (current TSF % BCN_ITVL) +- TBTT_SHIFT
1860E4B4h R_AX_BCN_CNT_TMR_P2_C1
[31:0] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_CNT_TMR_P2 Beacon count down timer of port 2. Unit: us.
1860E4B8h R_AX_TSFTR_LOW_P2_C1
[31:0] $R/W 1 B_AX_TSFTR_LOW_P2 TSFT TIMER low 32 bits of port 2
需先寫 Low 32 bits, 再寫 High 32 bits
1860E4BCh R_AX_TSFTR_HIGH_P2_C1
[31:0] $R/W 0 B_AX_TSFTR_HIGH_P2 TSFT TIMER high 32 bits of port 2
需先寫 Low 32 bits, 再寫 High 32 bits
1860E4C0h R_AX_PORT_CFG_P3_C1
[30:18] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[17] R/W 0 B_AX_PROHIB_END_CAL_EN_P3 1: Hold time end update TBTT count down
0: Hold time end DO NOT update TBTT count down
[16] R/W 1 B_AX_BRK_SETUP_P3 1: ACQ/ULQ TX breaks at setup time.
0: ACQ/ULQ TX may cross setup time.
[15] R/W 1 B_AX_TBTT_UPD_SHIFT_SEL_P3 1: TBTT count down timer is updated with mod and shift at TBTT.
0: TBTT count down timer is updated to beacon interval at TBTT.
[14] R/W 1 B_AX_BCN_DROP_ALLOW_P3 1: Allow HW drop beacon.
0: NOT allow HW drop beacon.
[13] R/W 1 B_AX_TBTT_PROHIB_EN_P3 1: Enable TBTT prohibit (setup time + hold time)
0: Disable TBTT prohibit and BCN TRX,but TBTT INT still send to FW.
[12] R/W 0 B_AX_BCNTX_EN_P3 1: Enable Beacon TX after TBTT.
0: Disable beacon TX and prohibit time.
[11:10] R/W 0 B_AX_NET_TYPE_P3 Network Type for port 3 (Default: 00b).
00: No link
01: Link in ad hoc network
10: Link in infrastructure network
11 : AP mode
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_FORCETX_EN_P3 1: Enable BCN TX force mode, 0: Disable
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_TXBCN_BTCCA_EN_P3 1: Enable Beacon Tx at TBTT if BT_CCA is enabled
0: Disable
[7] R/W 0 B_AX_BCNERR_CNT_EN_P3 1: Enable BCN error counter
0: Disable BCN error counter and reset counter to 0
[6] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_AGRES_P3 1: BCN PKT aggression TX.
0: BCN PKT normal TX.
[5] W1C 0 B_AX_TSFTR_RST_P3 Write 1 to reset tsft
[4] R/W 1 B_AX_RX_BSSID_FIT_EN_P3 1: HW will handle rx_beacon_pkt and do the following actions
0: HW will ignore rx_beacon_pkt and ignore the following actions
(a). update tsf timer
(b). generate rx bcn report
(c). rx beacon time record
[3] R/W 1 B_AX_TSF_UDT_EN_P3 1: Enable port 3 TSF update when RX beacon frames or probe response frames.
0: Disable port 3 TSF update when RX beacon frames or probe response frames.
[2] R/W 0 B_AX_PORT_FUNC_EN_P3 When this bit is set, TSF and other beacon related functions are then enabled.
1. MAC address of port path. (A1 match_enable)
2. Timestamp enable for port.
3. Interrupt source.(TSF)
[1] R/W 1 B_AX_TXBCN_RPT_EN_P3 1: Enable to issue TXBCN report in ad hoc and AP mode. 0: Disable.
[0] R/W 1 B_AX_RXBCN_RPT_EN_P3 1: Enable RXBCNOK report. 0: Disable.

1860E568h R_AX_MBSSID_CTRL_C1
[31:20] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[19:16] R/W 0 B_AX_P0MB_NUM Number of MBSSID is utilized. Only odd number can be set. If even number is set, the last MBSSID will NOT be available.
[15] R/W 1 B_AX_P0MB15_EN 1: Enable auto MBSSID for virtual interface 15 of port 0.
0: Disable beacon TX, prohibit time and related INT for virtual interface 15 of port 0.
[14] R/W 1 B_AX_P0MB14_EN 1: Enable auto MBSSID for virtual interface 14 of port 0.
0: Disable beacon TX, prohibit time and related INT for virtual interface 14 of port 0.

0: Disable beacon TX, prohibit time and related INT for virtual interface 13 of port 0.

0: Disable beacon TX, prohibit time and related INT for virtual interface 12 of port 0.

0: Disable beacon TX, prohibit time and related INT for virtual interface 11 of port 0.

0: Disable beacon TX, prohibit time and related INT for virtual interface 10 of port 0.

0: Disable beacon TX, prohibit time and related INT for virtual interface 9 of port 0.

0: Disable beacon TX, prohibit time and related INT for virtual interface 8 of port 0.

0: Disable beacon TX, prohibit time and related INT for virtual interface 7 of port 0.

0: Disable beacon TX, prohibit time and related INT for virtual interface 6 of port 0.

0: Disable beacon TX, prohibit time and related INT for virtual interface 5 of port 0.

0: Disable beacon TX, prohibit time and related INT for virtual interface 4 of port 0.
[3] R/W 1 B_AX_P0MB3_EN 1: Enable auto MBSSID for virtual interface 3 of port 0.
0: Disable beacon TX, prohibit time and related INT for virtual interface 3 of port 0.

[31:16] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[15:8] R/W 0x0F B_AX_RXTSF_OFST_OFDM Band 0 RX OFDM BCN timestamp offset. Unit: us
[7:0] R/W 0x0F B_AX_RXTSF_OFST_CCK Band 0 RX CCK BCN timestamp offset. Unit: us
1860E574h R_AX_RXBCN_TIME_CTRL_C1
[31] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[30:28] R/W 0 B_AX_RXBCN_TIME_PORT Port selection for RX beacon time. 0 ~ 4: port 0 ~ 4. Others: RSVD.
[27:18] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[17] W1C 0 B_AX_RXBCN_TIME_VLD 1: RX beacon TSF record is valid. 0: Invalid. Write 1 clear valid bit.
[16] R 0 B_AX_RXBCN_TIME_UDFW 1: Difference value is underflow (before > after).
[15:0] R 0 B_AX_RXBCN_TIME_DIFF Difference of TSF between TSF sync before and after. Unit: us.
1860E578h R_AX_RXBCN_TIME_SYNC_C1
[31:0] R 0 B_AX_RXBCN_TIME_SYNC RX beacon TSF record after TSF sync. Unit: us.
1860E57Ch R_AX_TBTT_TSF_INFO_C1
[31:0] R 0 B_AX_TBTT_TSF_INFO Latch TSF[31:0] when tbtt_int occurs. Unit: us.

1860E5B8h R_AX_LPS_RX_PERIOD_CTRL_C1
[31:24] R 0 RSVD
[23:16] RW 0 B_AX_RXBCN_PERIOD Rx Bcn Period:
This field is the period for waiting RX Bcn.
This period starts from TBTT. Unit: 64us
[15:8] RW 0 B_AX_CAT_PERIOD Consider Air Traffic Period
Stop count down RXBCN period if CCA is high during this period.
This period starts from TBTT. Unit: 32us
[7:4] R 0 rsvd
[3] RW 0 B_AX_LPS_RX_CTRL_EN Set this bit to 1 to enable the Rx period ctrl and Bcn count ctrl.
[2:0] RW 0 B_AX_LPS_PORT_SEL Port selection for LPS Rx period end ctrl and LPS_BCN_CNT.
1860E5BCh R_AX_LPS_BCN_CNT_C1
[31:24] RW 0 B_AX_BCN_TO_ACC_CNT Rx Bcn timeout accumulated counter:
Record the accumulated Bcn timeout counter, this counter WON’T be reset when Rx Bcn.
[23:16] RW 0 B_AX_BCN_OK_ACC_CNT Rx Bcn ok accumulated counter :
Record the accumulated Bcn ok counter.
[15:8] RW 0 B_AX_BCN_TO_CNT_THD Rx Bcn timeout counter threshold
When BCN_TO_CNT > BCN_TO_CNT_THD, issue
BCN_TO_CNT_EVENT to wake WCPU.
[7:0] RW 0 B_AX_BCN_TO_CNT Rx Bcn timeout counter
This counter will increase when (“no Rx Bcn” & “count > RXBCN_PERIOD”). Scheduler reset this value when Rx Bcn
1860E5C0h R_AX_freerun_cnt_low_C1
[31:0] $RW 0 B_AX_freerun_cnt_low freerun counter [31:0]
cmac0 and cmac 1 share same freerun counter.
需先寫 Low 32 bits 再寫 High 32 bits
1860E5C4h R_AX_freerun_cnt_high_C1
[31:0] RW 0 B_AX_freerun_cnt_high freerun counter [63:32]
cmac0 and cmac 1 share same freerun counter.
需先寫 Low 32 bits 再寫 High 32 bits
1860E5CCh R_AX_PSTIMER0_C1
[31:0] R/W 0 B_AX_PSTIMER0_VAL This register is set by driver/fw. When the lower 4 bytes of TSF(that select by B_AX_PSTIMER0_SEL) matches the trigger event of this register, the PSTIMER_0 interrupt is issued
1860E5D0h R_AX_PSTIMER1_C1
[31:0] R/W 0 B_AX_PSTIMER1_VAL This register is set by driver/fw. When the lower 4 bytes of TSF(that select by B_AX_PSTIMER1_SEL) matches the trigger event of this register, the PSTIMER_1 interrupt is issued
1860E5D4h R_AX_PSTIMER2_C1
[31:0] R/W 0 B_AX_PSTIMER2_VAL This register is set by driver/fw. When the lower 4 bytes of TSF(that select by B_AX_PSTIMER2_SEL) matches the trigger event of this register, the PSTIMER_2 interrupt is issued
1860E5D8h R_AX_PSTIMER3_C1
[31:0] R/W 0 B_AX_PSTIMER3_VAL This register is set by driver/fw. When the lower 4 bytes of TSF(that select by B_AX_PSTIMER3_SEL) matches the trigger event of this register, the PSTIMER_3 interrupt is issued
1860E5DCh R_AX_PSTIMER4_C1
[31:0] R/W 0 B_AX_PSTIMER4_VAL This register is set by driver/fw. When the lower 4 bytes of TSF(that select by B_AX_PSTIMER4_SEL) matches the trigger event of this register, the PSTIMER_4 interrupt is issued
1860E5E0h R_AX_PSTIMER5_C1
[31:0] R/W 0 B_AX_PSTIMER5_VAL This register is set by driver/fw. When the lower 4 bytes of TSF(that select by B_AX_PSTIMER5_SEL) matches the trigger event of this register, the PSTIMER_5 interrupt is issued
1860E5E4h R_AX_PSTIMER_CTRL_C1
[31:28] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[27] R/W 0 B_AX_PSTIMER6_EN PSTIMER6 Enable
[26:24] R/W 5 B_AX_PSTIMER6_SEL PSTIMER6 Source Select
0 for port 0, 1 for port1, 2 for port2, 3 for port3, 4 for port4, else for freerun counter
[23] R/W 0 B_AX_PSTIMER5_EN PSTIMER5 Enable
[22:20] R/W 5 B_AX_PSTIMER5_SEL PSTIMER5 Source Select
0 for port 0, 1 for port1, 2 for port2, 3 for port3, 4 for port4, else for freerun counter
[19] R/W 0 B_AX_PSTIMER4_EN PSTIMER4 Enable
[18:16] R/W 5 B_AX_PSTIMER4_SEL PSTIMER4 Source Select
0 for port 0, 1 for port1, 2 for port2, 3 for port3, 4 for port4, else for freerun counter
[15] R/W 0 B_AX_PSTIMER3_EN PSTIMER3 Enable
[14:12] R/W 5 B_AX_PSTIMER3_SEL PSTIMER3 Source Select
0 for port 0, 1 for port1, 2 for port2, 3 for port3, 4 for port4, else for freerun counter
[11] R/W 0 B_AX_PSTIMER2_EN PSTIMER2 Enable
[10:8] R/W 5 B_AX_PSTIMER2_SEL PSTIMER2 Source Select
0 for port 0, 1 for port1, 2 for port2, 3 for port3, 4 for port4, else for freerun counter
[7] R/W 0 B_AX_PSTIMER1_EN PSTIMER1 Enable
[6:4] R/W 5 B_AX_PSTIMER1_SEL PSTIMER1 Source Select
0 for port 0, 1 for port1, 2 for port2, 3 for port3, 4 for port4, else for freerun counter
[3] R/W 0 B_AX_PSTIMER0_EN PSTIMER0 Enable
[2:0] R/W 5 B_AX_PSTIMER0_SEL PSTIMER0 Source Select
0 for port 0, 1 for port1, 2 for port2, 3 for port3, 4 for port4, else for freerun counter
1860E5E8h R_AX_timer_compare_C1
[31:8] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[7] W1C 0 B_AX_x_comp_y_tsft_p trigger X Y compare function
[6:4] R/W 0 B_AX_y_comp_sel select Y factor
[3] RO 0 B_AX_x_comp_y_over "1": X < Y. "0": X >= Y
[2:0] R/W 0 B_AX_x_comp_sel select X factor
1860E5ECh R_AX_timer_compare_value_low_C1
[31:0] RO 0 B_AX_x_comp_y_val_low x compare y value bit 31:0
1860E5F0h R_AX_timer_compare_value_high_C1
[31:0] RO 0 B_AX_x_comp_y_val_high x compare y value bit 63:32
1860E5F4h R_AX_PSTIMER6_C1
[31:0] R/W 0 B_AX_PSTIMER6_VAL This register is set by driver/fw. When the lower 4 bytes of TSF(that select by B_AX_PSTIMER6_SEL) matches the trigger event of this register, the PSTIMER_6 interrupt is issued
1860E600h R_AX_PTCL_COMMON_SETTING_0_C1
[31:16] R/W 0 RSVD
[15:14] R/W 0x1 B_AX_PCIE_MODE 2’b01 : GEN1 / 2’b10 : GEN2 / Others : RSVD
[13:9] R/W 0 RSVD
[8] R/W 0x0 B_AX_CPUMGQ_LIFETIME_EN Lifetime function enable bit for MGQ2
[7] R/W 0x0 B_AX_MGQ_LIFETIME_EN Lifetime function enable bit for MGQ0, MGQ1
[6] R/W 0x0 B_AX_LIFETIME_EN Lifetime function enable bit for ACQ, TWTQ, ULQ
[5] R/W 0 B_AX_DIS_PTCL_CLK_GATING
[4] R/W 0x0 B_AX_PTCL_TRIGGER_SS_EN_UL 1: enable PTCL triggering f2p_cmd_done (to STA scheduler), if F2P_CMD.NEXT_QSEL belong to UL
[3] R/W 0x0 B_AX_PTCL_TRIGGER_SS_EN_1 1: enable PTCL triggering f2p_cmd_done (to STA scheduler), if F2P_CMD.NEXT_QSEL belong to WMM1
[2] R/W 0x0 B_AX_PTCL_TRIGGER_SS_EN_0 1: enable PTCL triggering f2p_cmd_done (to STA scheduler), if F2P_CMD.NEXT_QSEL belong to WMM0
[1] R/W 0x1 B_AX_CMAC_TX_MODE_1 PTCL Tx mode for WMM 1
1: HW mode
0: SW mode
[0] R/W 0x1 B_AX_CMAC_TX_MODE_0 PTCL Tx mode for WMM 0
1: HW mode
0: SW mode
1860E604h R_AX_AGG_BK_0_C1
[31:20] R/W 0 RSVD
[19] RW 1'h0 B_AX_EN_MU2SU_CHK_PROTECT_PPDU
[18] RW 1'h1 B_AX_RPT_TXOP_START_PROTECT
[17] RW 1'h0 B_AX_RANDOM_GEN_CMD_ABORT_EN
[16] RW 1'h1 B_AX_PHYTXON_ENDPS_RESP_CHK
[15] RW 1'h1 B_AX_CTN_CHK_SEQ_REQ_EN
[14] RW 1'h0 B_AX_PTCL_RLS_ALLFAIL_EN
[13] R/W 0 B_AX_MAX_AGG_NUM_FIX_MODE_EN 1: PTCL will only use 0xC610[7:0](B_AX_MAX_AGG_NUM) to break AMPDU
0: Disable this fix mode, PTCL uses the original AGG MAX NUM rules
[12] R/W 0 B_AX_DIS_MURU_SEC_Q_EMPTY_CHK 1: Disable check "Whether SEC USERs's ac queue is empty or not, let MURU DATA PPDU TX"
0: Enable check "If SEC USERs's ac queue is empty, Abort MURU DATA PPDU TX"
[11] R/W 0 B_AX_EN_SAMPDU_TXIME_TWT_CHECK 1: Enable check "PPDU which txpktnum = 1's TX time > TWT SP". If Yes, stop tx this f2ptxcmd.
0: Disable check "PPDU which txpktnum = 1's TX time > TWT SP"
[10] R/W 0 B_AX_DIS_SAMPDU_TXIME_P2P_CHECK 1: Disable check "PPDU which txpktnum = 1's TX time > P2P off time".
0: Enable check "PPDU which txpktnum = 1's TX time > P2P off time". If Yes, stop tx this f2ptxcmd.
[9] R/W 0 B_AX_DIS_SAMPDU_TXIME_BCN_CHECK 1: Disable check "PPDU which txpktnum = 1's TX time > BCN SETUP TIME".
0: Enable check "PPDU which txpktnum = 1's TX time > BCN SETUP TIME". If Yes, stop tx this f2ptxcmd.
[8] R/W 0 B_AX_DIS_UL_SEQ_ABORT_CHECK 1: Disable check "UL SEQ's TX time > BCN SETUP TIME/TWT SP/P2P off time".
0: Enable check "UL SEQ's TX time > BCN SETUP TIME/TWT SP/P2P off time". If Yes, abort this f2ptxcmd.
[7] R/W 0 B_AX_DIS_SND_STS_CHECK 1: PTCL will bypass "checking sounding status" step of MU2SU condtion
0: PTCL will check the sounding status of MU2SU condtion
[6] R/W 1 B_AX_NAV_PAUS_PHB_EN 1: Enable TXCMD paused if NAV cross setup time or during prohibit time.
0: Disable pause condition, Trigger sequence may cross into prohibit time.
* Not available in 8852A
[5] R/W 1 B_AX_TXOP_SHT_PHB_EN 1: Enable (protect all) TXOP shorten at setup time, and pause during prohibit time.
0: Disable break condition, (protect all) TXOP may cross into prohibit time.
* Not available in 8852A
[4] R/W 1 B_AX_AGG_BRK_PHB_EN 1: Enable AMPDU AGG break at setup time, (protect next) TXOP will be over at the same time. TX is paused during prohibit time.
0: Disable break condition, AMPDU / (protect next) TXOP may cross into prohibit time.
* Not available in 8852A
[3] R/W 0x0 B_AX_DIS_SSN_CHK Disable check the SSN rule when generating AMPDU TX cmd.
[2] R/W 0x0 B_AX_WDBK_CFG 0: WD.BK mode 0
1: WD.BK mode 1

mode 0:
WD.BK = 0: Aggregation proceed with this MPDU
WD.BK = 1: This MPDU is not aggregated with previous aggregation, but it can be aggregated in a new ARSVDMPDU (depending on the setting of AGG_EN)
mode 1:
only MPDUs with the same WD.BK value can be aggregated. 0 can be aggregated with 0, 1 can be aggregated with 1.
[1] R/W 0x1 B_AX_EN_RTY_BK 0: Follow CR.B_AX_EN_RTY_BK_COD
1: Retried MPDU can not be aggregated with new MPDU
[0] R/W 0x0 B_AX_EN_RTY_BK_COD 0: Retried MPDU can be aggregated with new MPDU
1:
If rate of the first retried MPDU is the same as initial rate, retried MPDU can be aggregated with new MPDU
If rate of the first retried MPDU is different with initial rate, retried MPDU can not be aggregated with new MPDU
1860E608h R_AX_TX_CTRL_C1
[31:24] R/W 0x40 B_AX_DROP_CHK_MAX_NUM maximum number of packet can be check in a MACID drop or lifetime drop event
[23:20] R/W 0x6 B_AX_DROP_CHK_TIMEOUT timeout for MACID drop or lifetime drop event
[19:16] R/W 0x6 B_AX_FWD_SRCH_TIMEOUT forward search timeout (note: ≦ slot time)
unit: 1 us
[15:8] R/W 0 RSVD
[7] R/W 0x0 B_AX_PTCL_STOP_WMM 1: stop WMM Tx path (WMM0/1/2/3), TWT Tx path and UL Tx path
包含主動 Tx (含 spatial reuse), HE TB PPDU Tx
[6:5] R/W 0 RSVD
[4:0] R/W 0x0 B_AX_TXOP_DELAY_TX define W: the maximum Tx delay in TXOP
Tx deadline(PLCP start) = SIFS(16us) + W after CCA falling edge
Unit: 1 us
1860E60Ch R_AX_TB_PPDU_CTRL_C1
[31:16] R/W 0 RSVD
[15] R/W 0x0 B_AX_TB_PPDU_BK_DIS 1: TB PPDU do not Tx this AC
[14] R/W 0x0 B_AX_TB_PPDU_BE_DIS 1: TB PPDU do not Tx this AC
[13] R/W 0x0 B_AX_TB_PPDU_VI_DIS 1: TB PPDU do not Tx this AC
[12] R/W 0x0 B_AX_TB_PPDU_VO_DIS 1: TB PPDU do not Tx this AC
[11:3] R/W 0 RSVD
[2] R/W 0x0 B_AX_TB_BYPASS_TXPWR Note: TXPWR module已有option, 當無法滿足TXPWR時會給PWR上限 or 給不Tx flag, PTCL 此bit 8852A已做了, 但下一顆IC要移除
[1:0] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SW_PREFER_AC HE TB PPDU 將指定 AC priority 提至最高, 其餘依 VO > VI > BE > BK 排序
0: BE (default 排序)
1: BK
2: VI
3: VO
1860E610h R_AX_AMPDU_AGG_LIMIT_C1
[31:24] R/W 0xA5 B_AX_AMPDU_MAX_TIME unit: 32us
[23:16] R/W 0x3F B_AX_RA_TRY_RATE_AGG_LMT The aggregation packet number limit (= B_AX_RA_TRY_RATE_AGG_LMT + 1) for try up rate of rate adaptive when descriptor Try bit is set.
[15:8] R/W 0x3F B_AX_RTS_MAX_AGG_NUM In RTS frame exchange sequence, the maximum aggregation packet number limit = B_AX_RTS_MAX_AGG_NUM + 1
[7:0] R/W 0x3F B_AX_MAX_AGG_NUM the maximum aggregation packet number limit = B_AX_MAX_AGG_NUM + 1
1860E614h R_AX_AGG_LEN_HT_0_C1
[31:16] R/W 0xFFFF B_AX_AMPDU_MAX_LEN_HT HT PPDU 限制, need to support 65,535 octets
Unit: Byte
[15:8] R/W 0 B_AX_RTS_TXTIME_TH RTS packet txtime threshold (unit: 32us)
[7:0] R/W 0 B_AX_RTS LEN_TH RTS packet Length threshold (unit: 16byte).
1860E618h R_AX_AGG_LEN_VHT_0_C1
[31:20] R/W 12'h91A B_AX_OFDM_LEN_TH when rate is OFDM rate and length thrushold default is 2330 bytes(mac header + payload)
[19:0] R/W 0xFFFFF B_AX_AMPDU_MAX_LEN_VHT VHT PPDU 限制, need to support 1,048,575 octets
Unit: Byte
1860E61Ch R_AX_AGG_LEN_HE_0_C1
[31:23] R/W 0 RSVD
[22:0] R/W 0x633117 B_AX_AMPDU_MAX_LEN_HE HE PPDU 限制, need to support 6,500,631 octets
Unit: Byte
1860E620h R_AX_SPECIAL_TX_SETTING_C1
[31] R/W 0x1 B_AX_TRI_PADDING_EXTEND
[30] R/W 0 RSVD
[29:28] R/W 0x0 B_AX_BW_SIGTA
[27] R/W 0x0 B_AX_USE_DATA_BW
[26] R/W 0x1 B_AX_BMC_NAV_PROTECT
[25:24] R/W 0 RSVD
[23:20] RW 4'h4 B_AX_BAR_TXRATE_FOR_NULL_WD
[19:18] R/W 0x0 B_AX_STBC_CFEND
[17:9] R/W 0xC B_AX_STBC_CFEND_RATE
[8:0] R/W 0x4 B_AX_Basic_CFEND_RATE
1860E624h R_AX_SIFS_SETTING_C1
[31:24] R/W 0x8 B_AX_HW_CTS2SELF_PKT_LEN_TH When B_AX_HW_CTS2SELF_EN = 1 & B_AX_HW_CTS2SELF_PKT_LEN_TH > 0 & TXPKTNUM = 1,
If first WD.txpktsize > B_AX_HW_CTS2SELF_PKT_LEN_TH (UNIT : 256B) & SEC_TYPE != WEP/TKIP/WAPI,
PTCL will TX CTS2SELF before that pkt in order to extend the time of DMA fetching payload
[23:18] R/W 0 B_AX_HW_CTS2SELF_PKT_LEN_TH_TWW When B_AX_HW_CTS2SELF_EN = 1 & B_AX_HW_CTS2SELF_PKT_LEN_TH_TWW > 0 & TXPKTNUM = 1,
If first WD.txpktsize > B_AX_HW_CTS2SELF_PKT_LEN_TH (UNIT : 256B) & SEC_TYPE == WEP/TKIP/WAP,
PTCL will TX CTS2SELF before that pkt in order to extend the time of DMA fetching payload
[17] R/W 0 RSVD
[16] R/W 0x0 B_AX_HW_CTS2SELF_EN HW CTS2SELF ENABLE
[15:8] R/W 0x10 B_AX_SPEC_SIFS_OFDM_PTCL
[7:0] R/W 0x10 B_AX_SPEC_SIFS_CCK_PTCL
1860E628h R_AX_TXRATE_CHK_C1
[31:24] R/W 0x0 B_AX_LATENCY_PADDING_PKT_TH SEC USERs組的筆數小於等於CR.LATENCY_PADDING_PKT_TH+1就要補對應的LATENCY_PADDING
[23:16] R/W 0x10 B_AX_PLCP_FETCH_BUFF BB來要payload前MAC可以先搬的時間, 實際約略為22~23 us, CR預設值先預設為16us
[15:7] R/W 0x87 B_AX_DEFT_RATE Default tx rate is HT MCS7 , if invalid band or invalid TxNSS happens change to this CR setting
[6] RW 1'h0 B_AX_OFDM_CCK_ERR_PROC
[5] R/W 0 B_AX_PKT_LAST_TX OFDM rate & >2304B / 1st AMSDU pkt time >5.484ms / Tx NSS > 0xC628[3:2] 上述error case 發生就會把last_tx舉1
[4] R/W 0 B_AX_BAND_MODE Operation band check condition
0: 5GHz; 1:2.4GHz
[3:2] R/W 1 B_AX_MAX_TXNSS Tx Nss check condition
0: 1SS; 1: 2SS, 2: 3SS, 3: 4SS
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_Rts_limit_in_ofdm6 If this bit is set, HW check Tx pkt’s data rate. If Rts rate is CCK rate, RTS is fixed to OFDM6.
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_CHECK_CCK_EN If this bit is set, HW check Tx pkt’s data rate. When data rate is CCK rate, modify the rate to OFDM6
1860E62Ch R_AX_TXCNT_C1
[31] R/W 0 B_AX_ADD_TXCNT_BY 0 : fetch pkt num by TMAC 1: fetch pkt num by CMAC DMA
[30] R/W 0 rsvd
[29:24] R/W 0x20 B_AX_S_TXCNT_LMT Short tx cnt limit
[23:22] R/W 0 rsvd
[21:16] R/W 0x20 B_AX_L_TXCNT_LMT Long tx cnt limit
[15:0] R/W 0 RSVD

Unit: 256 us

1860E63Ch R_AX_MBSSID_DROP_0_C1
[31] R/W 0 RSVD
[30] R/W 0 B_AX_gi_ltf_fb_sel 0: no GI_LTF fallback
1: GI_LTF fallback option 1 enabled (downgrade GI_LTF first from init. rate)
Others RSVD
[29:24] R/W 0 B_AX_rate_sel New ARFR (REG 0x40) rate group selection:
0: CCK1M – OFDM18M
1: OFDM24MRSVDOFDM54 , other no use
2: HT MCS0~MCS7
3: HT MCS8~MCS15
4: HT MCS16~MC23
5: HT MCS24~MCS31
6:VHT1SS/ MCS0~MCS7
7:VHT1SS/ MCS8~MCS9,other no use
…
…
…
20:VHT 8SS/ MCS0~MCS7
21:VHT 8SS/MCS8~MCS9,other no use
22:HE 1SS /MCS0~MCS7
23:HE 1SS /MCS8~MCS11 ,other no use
…
…
…
36:HE 1SS /MCS0~MCS7
37:HE 1SS /MCS8~MCS11 ,other no use

Others: rsvd

[20:16] R/W 0x0 B_AX_PORT_DROP_4_0 1: PORT4~PORT0 Drop (per bit controlled)
[15:0] R/W 0x0 B_AX_MBSSID_DROP_15_0 1: BSSID15~BSSID0 Drop (per bit controlled)

1860E654h R_AX_PTCL_ATM_C1
[31] R/W 0x0 B_AX_CHNL_REF_RX_BASIC_NAV Busy time reference RX basic NAV (Rx)
[30] R/W 0x0 B_AX_CHNL_REF_RX_INTRA_NAV Busy time reference RX intra NAV (Rx)
[29] R/W 0x0 B_AX_CHNL_REF_DATA_ON Busy time reference data_on (Rx)
[28] R/W 0x0 B_AX_CHNL_REF_EDCCA_P20 Busy time reference EDCCA (Rx)
[27] R/W 0x0 B_AX_CHNL_REF_CCA_P20 Busy time reference primary 20 CCA (Rx)
[26] R/W 0x0 B_AX_CHNL_REF_CCA_S20 Busy time reference secondary 20 CCA (Rx)
[25] R/W 0x0 B_AX_CHNL_REF_CCA_S40 Busy time reference secondary 40 CCA (Rx)
[24] R/W 0x0 B_AX_CHNL_REF_CCA_S80 Busy time reference secondary 80 CCA (Rx)
[23] R/W 0 B_AX_CHNL_REF_PHY_TXON Busy time reference phy_txon (Tx)
[22:20] R/W 0 RSVD
[19] RW 0x0 B_AX_RST_CHNL_BUSY Write “one” to set the counter to zero. (channel busy time) (由於屬性是 RW, 需要再寫成 0)
[18] RW 0x0 B_AX_RST_CHNL_IDLE Write “one” to set the counter to zero. (channel idle time) (由於屬性是 RW, 需要再寫成 0)
[17] R/W 0x0 B_AX_CHNL_INFO_EN 0: stop counter (no clear counter)
1: start count (no clear counter)
[16] R/W 0x0 B_AX_ATM_AIRTIME_EN 0 : If this bit disable, no need to count air time
1 : If this bit enable, count air time and paste to TXRPT
[15:14] R/W 0 RSVD
[13] R/W 0x1 B_AX_ATM_PRI
[12] R/W 0x1 B_AX_ATM_TF_UD After Trigger frame sequence Tx, update SS_SRAM.quota
0: do not update
1: update UL quota
[11:10] R/W 0x0 B_AX_ATM_SR_UD_1 After WMM1 spatial reuse Tx, update SS_SRAM.quota
0: do not update
1: update DL quota
2: update UL quota
3: update both DL quota and UL quota
[9:8] R/W 0x0 B_AX_ATM_SR_UD_0 After WMM0 spatial reuse Tx, update SS_SRAM.quota
0: do not update
1: update DL quota
2: update UL quota
3: update both DL quota and UL quota
[7:6] R/W 0x0 B_AX_ATM_TB_UD_1 After WMM1 HE TB PPDU Tx, update SS_SRAM.quota
0: do not update
1: update DL quota
2: update UL quota
3: update both DL quota and UL quota
[5:4] R/W 0x0 B_AX_ATM_TB_UD_0 After WMM0 HE TB PPDU Tx, update SS_SRAM.quota
0: do not update
1: update DL quota
2: update UL quota
3: update both DL quota and UL quota
[3:2] R/W 0x1 B_AX_ATM_TX_UD_1 After WMM1 normal Tx, update SS_SRAM.quota
0: do not update
1: update DL quota
2: update UL quota
3: update both DL quota and UL quota
[1:0] R/W 0x1 B_AX_ATM_TX_UD_0 After WMM0 normal Tx, update SS_SRAM.quota
0: do not update
1: update DL quota
2: update UL quota
3: update both DL quota and UL quota
1860E658h R_AX_CHNL_IDLE_TIME_0_C1
[31:0] RO 0x0 B_AX_CHNL_IDLE_TIME Unit: 1 us
1860E65Ch R_AX_CHNL_BUSY_TIME_0_C1
[31:0] RO 0x0 B_AX_CHNL_BUSY_TIME Unit: 1 us
1860E660h R_AX_PTCLRPT_FULL_HDL_C1
[31:22] R/W 0 RSVD
[21:16] RW 6'h20 B_AX_CMAC_DMA_BLOCK_TX_THD
[15:12] R/W 0xA B_AX_RPT_LATCH_PHY_TIME set latch r2t_collision, t2r_collision time after falling edge of normal txon. (unit: us)
[11] R/W 0 RSVD
[10] R/W 0x0 B_AX_TXOP_END_RPT_EN 1 : Generate extra TXRPT(TXOP_END bit = 1)
0 : Do not generate extra TXRPT for TXOP_END
[9] R/W 0x0 B_AX_F2PCMD_FWWD_RLS_MODE 0: basic trigger/BSRP/Sounding to macid_drop queue, he sig-b/MU-RTS/MU-BAR to no report queue (default)
1: all FW PKT ID to no report queue
[8] R/W 0x1 B_AX_F2PCMD_RPT_EN 1 : Generate F2PCMDRPT
0 : Do not generate F2PCMDRPT
[7:6] R/W 0x0 B_AX_BCN_RPT_PATH 0 : To Driver
1 : To WLCPU
2 : To Data CPU (RSVD)
3 : RSVD
[5:4] R/W 0x0 B_AX_SPE_RPT_PATH 0 : To Driver
1 : To WLCPU
2 : To Data CPU (RSVD)
3 : RSVD
[3:2] R/W 0x1 B_AX_TX_RPT_PATH 0 : To Driver
1 : To WLCPU
2 : To Data CPU (RSVD)
3 : RSVD
[1] R/W 0x0 B_AX_F2PCMDRPT_FULL_DROP 1: CMAC_DMA issues full_signal to PTCL (then PTCL drops this F2PCMD report)
0: PTCL wait for quota becoming available (then PTCL blocks the next txcmd)
[0] R/W 0x0 B_AX_NON_F2PCMDRPT_FULL_DROP 1: CMAC_DMA issues full_signal to PTCL (then PTCL drops this nonRSVDF2PCMD report)
0: PTCL wait for quota becoming available (then PTCL blocks the next txcmd)
1860E664h R_AX_PTCL_F2P_RLS_C1
[31:27] RW 5'h0 RSVD
[26:24] RW 3'h7 B_AX_F2PRLS_PRTID_NEED_RPT "7" : WDRLS port

[21:16] RW 6'h3 B_AX_F2PRLS_QUEID_NEED_RPT "3" : WDRLS port, MACID drop queue
[15:11] RW 5'h0 RSVD
[10:8] RW 3'h7 B_AX_F2PRLS_PRTID_NO_RPT "7" : WDRLS port
[7:6] RW 2'h0 RSVD
[5:0] RW 6'h4 B_AX_F2PRLS_QUEID_NO_RPT "4" : WDRLS port, No report queue

[17] R/W 0 B_AX_PRELD_HIQ_P2_EN 1: Enable preload for HIQ port 2. 0: Disable.

[8] R/W 0 B_AX_PRELD_HIQ_P0MB8_EN 1: Enable preload for HIQ port 0 mbssid 8. 0: Disable.

[31] R/W 0 B_AX_DISABLE_TXOP_CFE

[29:27] R/W 0 RSVD
[26] RW 1'h1 B_AX_CMAC_DMA_BLOCK_TX
[25] RW 1'h0 B_AX_CMAC_DMA_BREAK_TXOP

[15:8] R/W 0x0 B_AX_TXOP_BK_PKT_NUM When aggregation number < BIT_TXOP_LMT_PKT_NUM break TXOP
[7:0] R/W 0x0 B_AX_TXOP_BK_TX_TIME UNIT : 32us
When TX time < BIT_TXOP_LMT_TX_TIME break TXOP

[31:16] R/W 0 RSVD

[31:24] R/W 0x0 B_AX_TXQ_NAV_MSK
[23:19] R/W 0 RSVD
[18] R/W 0x0 B_AX_LSIG_TXOP_TXCMD_NAV
[17] R/W 0x1 B_AX_RTS_NAV_TXOP

[15:0] R/W 0x0 B_AX_NAV_PROT_LEN_CTN_MODE In CTN mode ,NAV setting which protects next packets, Unit: 1 us
1860E67Ch R_AX_BT_PLT_C1
31:16 RO 0 B_AX_BT_PLT_PKT_CNT
15:10 R/W 0 RSVD
9 W1C 0 B_AX_BT_PLT_RST reset B_AX_BT_PLT_PKT_CNT
8 R/W 0 B_AX_PLT_EN Enable polluted mechanism
7 R/W 0 B_AX_RX_PLT_GNT_LTE_RX 等Response過程中發現 LTE_RX = 1則為BT polluted
6 R/W 0 B_AX_RX_PLT_GNT_BT_RX 等Response過程中發現 GNT_BT_RX = 1則為BT polluted
5 R/W 0 B_AX_RX_PLT_GNT_BT_TX 等Response過程中發現 GNT_BT_TX = 1則為BT polluted
4 R/W 0 B_AX_RX_PLT_GNT_WL 等Response過程中發現 GNT_WL = 0則為BT polluted
3 R/W 0 B_AX_TX_PLT_GNT_LTE_RX TX 過程中發現 LTE_RX = 1則為BT polluted
2 R/W 0 B_AX_TX_PLT_GNT_BT_RX TX 過程中發現 GNT_BT_RX = 1則為BT polluted
1 R/W 0 B_AX_TX_PLT_GNT_BT_TX TX 過程中發現 GNT_BT_TX = 1則為BT polluted
0 R/W 0 B_AX_TX_PLT_GNT_WL TX 過程中發現 GNT_WL = 0則為BT polluted
1860E680h R_AX_TWTQ_CTRL1_C1
[31:16] R/W 0 B_AX_TWTQ_ULTRHD TWTQ uplink drop condition threshold. Unit: 32 us.
[15:0] R/W 0 B_AX_TWTQ_TXOPTRHD TWTQ TXOP break condition threshold. Unit: 32 us. (not available)
1860E684h R_AX_TWTQ_CTRL2_C1
[31:16] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[15:0] R/W 0 B_AX_TWTQ_AGGTRHD TWTQ AMPDU AGG break condition threshold. Unit: 32 us.
1860E690h R_AX_BCNQ_CTRL_C1
[31] $RO 0 B_AX_BCNQ_LOCK_STUS After B_AX_BCNQ_LOCK_B0 is set, this status shows the operation permission is obtained or not.
1: BCNQ operation permission is obtained by FW.
0: HW still has BCNQ operation permission.
[30:14] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[13:8] R/W 0 B_AX_BCN_DROP_DSTQUEID Destination port for PTCL drop beacon
[7] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[6:4] R/W 7 B_AX_BCN_DROP_PRTQUEID Destination queue for PTCL drop beacon
[3:2] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[1] R/W 0 B_AX_BCNQ_PKTIN_EN
[0] R/W 0 B_AX_BCNQ_LOCK Set 1 to request to lock band 0 BCNQ operation permission for FW. After FW operation done, this bit shall set to 0.

1860E6C0h R_AX_PTCL_IMR0_C1
[31] R/W 1 B_AX_F2PCMD_PKTID_ERR_INT_EN PTCL GET到一筆 0xfff 的 f2ptxcmd pktid
[30] R/W 1 B_AX_F2PCMD_RD_PKTID_ERR_INT_EN PTCL GET到 f2ptxcmd 中 MURTS/SIGB WD pktid 為 0xfff 無效位置
[29] R/W 1 B_AX_F2PCMD_ASSIGN_PKTID_ERR_INT_EN PTCL GET到 f2ptxcmd 中 某一筆 FW WD pktid為 0xfff 無效位置
[28] R/W 1 B_AX_F2PCMD_USER_ALLC_ERR_INT_EN f2ptxcmd MU/RU時 各user的TX AGG NUM配置相加超過 128 限制
[27] R/W 1 B_AX_RX_SPF_U0_PKTID_ERR_INT_EN 分析 user_0 的第一筆WD時 GET 到 pktid 為 0xfff 無效位置
[26] R/W 1 B_AX_TX_SPF_U1_PKTID_ERR_INT_EN 分析 user_1 的第一筆WD時 GET 到 pktid 為 0xfff 無效位置
[25] R/W 1 B_AX_TX_SPF_U2_PKTID_ERR_INT_EN 分析 user_2 的第一筆WD時 GET 到 pktid 為 0xfff 無效位置
[24] R/W 1 B_AX_TX_SPF_U3_PKTID_ERR_INT_EN 分析 user_3 的第一筆WD時 GET 到 pktid 為 0xfff 無效位置
[23] R/W 1 B_AX_TX_RECORD_PKTID_ERR_INT_EN 要累加TXCNT時從TMAC端時 GET 到 pktid 為 0xfff 無效位置
[22:16] R/W 1 RSVD
[15] R/W 1 B_AX_F2PCMD_EMPTY_ERR_INT_EN 沒有 F2PCMD 可以 TX, DEL ptcl_q_empty[15:8] = 8'hFF.
[14] R/W 1 B_AX_TWTSP_QSEL_ERR_INT_EN F2pcmd for twtsp_start, twtsp_end, but qsel not twtq
[13] R/W 1 RSVD
[12] R/W 1 B_AX_BCNQ_ORDER_ERR_INT_EN BCNQ forward search and fine order bit error value. EX: order = 0 and 2, and not decide which PKTID first push in BCNQ.
[11] R/W 1 B_AX_Q_PKTID_ERR_INT_EN Ptcl q operation display pktid == 0xFFF(null page)
[10] R/W 1 B_AX_D_PKTID_ERR_INT_EN Ptcl d operation display pktid == 0xFFF(null page)
[9] R/W 1 B_AX_TXPRT_FULL_DROP_ERR_INT_EN Ptcl drop txrpt because cmac_dma full
[8] R/W 1 B_AX_F2PCMDRPT_FULL_DROP_ERR_INT_EN Ptcl drop f2pcmdrpt because cmac_dma full
[7:2] R/W 1 RSVD RSVD
[1] R/W 1 B_AX_FSM1_TIMEOUT_ERR_INT_EN State machine of PTCL over 32us, and not retrun idle state
[0] R/W 1 B_AX_FSM_TIMEOUT_ERR_INT_EN State machine of PTCL over 32us, and not retrun idle state
1860E6C4h R_AX_PTCL_ISR0_C1
[31] R/W1C 1 B_AX_F2PCMD_PKTID_ERR PTCL GET到一筆 0xfff 的 f2ptxcmd pktid
[30] R/W1C 1 B_AX_F2PCMD_RD_PKTID_ERR PTCL GET到 f2ptxcmd 中 MURTS/SIGB WD pktid 為 0xfff 無效位置
[29] R/W1C 1 B_AX_F2PCMD_ASSIGN_PKTID_ERR PTCL GET到 f2ptxcmd 中 某一筆 FW WD pktid為 0xfff 無效位置
[28] R/W1C 1 B_AX_F2PCMD_USER_ALLC_ERR f2ptxcmd MU/RU時 各user的TX AGG NUM配置相加超過 128 限制
[27] R/W1C 1 B_AX_RX_SPF_U0_PKTID_ERR 分析 user_0 的第一筆WD時 GET 到 pktid 為 0xfff 無效位置
[26] R/W1C 1 B_AX_TX_SPF_U1_PKTID_ERR 分析 user_1 的第一筆WD時 GET 到 pktid 為 0xfff 無效位置

[23] R/W1C 1 B_AX_TX_RECORD_PKTID_ERR 要累加TXCNT時從TMAC端時 GET 到 pktid 為 0xfff 無效位置
[22:16] R/W1C 0 RSVD
[15] R/W1C 1 B_AX_F2PCMD_EMPTY_ERR 沒有 F2PCMD 可以 TX, DEL ptcl_q_empty[15:8] = 8'hFF.
[14] R/W1C 1 B_AX_TWTSP_QSEL_ERR F2pcmd for twtsp_start, twtsp_end, but qsel not twtq
[13] R/W1C 1 RSVD
[12] R/W1C 1 B_AX_BCNQ_ORDER_ERR BCNQ forward search and fine order bit error value. EX: order = 0 and 2, and not decide which PKTID first push in BCNQ.
[11] R/W1C 1 B_AX_Q_PKTID_ERR Ptcl q operation display pktid == 0xFFF(null page)
[10] R/W1C 1 B_AX_D_PKTID_ERR Ptcl d operation display pktid == 0xFFF(null page)
[9] R/W1C 1 B_AX_TXPRT_FULL_DROP_ERR Ptcl drop txrpt because cmac_dma full
